papers.title: MOSAIC: Module Discovery via Sparse Additive Identifiable Causal Learning for Scientific Time Series
papers.abstract: Causal representation learning (CRL) seeks to recover latent variables with identifiability guarantees, typically up to permutation and component-wise reparameterization under appropriate assumptions. However, identifiability does not imply interpretability: latent semantics are typically assigned post hoc by alignment with known ground-truth factors. This limitation is particularly acute in scientific time series, where underlying mechanisms are unknown and discovering interpretable structure is a primary goal. In contrast, scientific observations (such as residue-pair distances, climate indices, or process sensors) are inherently semantic, as they correspond to named physical quantities. This raises a key question: can the interpretability of observations be transferred to the identifiable latent space? We propose MOSAIC (Module discovery via Sparse Additive Identifiable Causal learning), a sparse temporal VAE that integrates temporal CRL identifiability with support recovery over observed variables. MOSAIC identifies latent variables via regime-conditioned temporal variation, and recovers for each latent a sparse set of associated observations through an additive decoder, yielding module-level interpretability. We show that ANOVA main-effect supports are identifiable under general smooth mixing functions, and provide finite-sample recovery guarantees for a tractable sparse-additive variant. Empirically, MOSAIC recovers domain-consistent variable groups across RNA molecular dynamics, solar wind, ENSO climate, the Tennessee Eastman process, and a synthetic tokamak benchmark, enabling interpretable discovery of latent mechanisms in scientific time series.

analysis.tldr: 提出 MOSAIC，一种稀疏时序 VAE，通过因果表征学习实现科学时间序列中可解释的潜变量模块发现。
analysis.research_motivation: 科学时间序列中，因果表征学习虽能保证潜变量可识别，但潜变量语义通常需事后与真实因子对齐，缺乏内在可解释性；而科学观测本身具有语义，如何将观测的可解释性迁移到潜空间是一个关键问题。
analysis.problem: 如何在科学时间序列中学习可识别的潜变量，并同时为每个潜变量恢复一组稀疏的观测变量，从而实现模块级可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 MOSAIC，一种稀疏时序 VAE，结合了时序因果表征学习的可识别性（通过状态条件的时间变化）和观测变量的支持恢复（通过加性解码器），利用 ANOVA 主效应支持的可识别性和有限样本恢复保证。
contributions: 提出 MOSAIC 框架，将时序 CRL 可识别性与观测变量支持恢复相结合，实现模块级可解释性。
证明在一般光滑混合函数下 ANOVA 主效应支持的可识别性，并为可处理的稀疏加性变体提供有限样本恢复保证。
在 RNA 分子动力学、太阳风、ENSO 气候、田纳西伊士曼过程和合成托卡马克基准上验证了域一致变量组的恢复。
analysis.experiments: 在 RNA 分子动力学、太阳风、ENSO 气候、田纳西伊士曼过程和合成托卡马克基准上进行了实验，恢复了域一致变量组。
limitations: 可能依赖于状态条件的时间变化假设，在非平稳或弱变化场景下效果未知。
稀疏加性解码器可能无法捕捉复杂的非线性交互。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，理论保证扎实，实验覆盖多个科学领域，但应用范围较窄，适合对因果表征学习或科学时间序列感兴趣的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 MOSAIC，一种稀疏时序 VAE，通过因果表征学习实现科学时间序列中可解释的潜变量模块发现。

papers.title: Tumor-aware augmentation with task-guided attention analysis improves rectal cancer segmentation from magnetic resonance images
papers.abstract: Pretraining on large-scale datasets has been shown to improve transformer generalizability, even for out-of-domain (OOD) modalities and tasks. However, two common assumptions often fail under OOD transfer: that downstream datasets can be adapted to the fixed input geometry of pretrained models and that pretrained representations transfer effectively across imaging modalities. We show that these assumptions break down through two interacting failure modes in CT-to-MRI transfer: inefficient token usage caused by zero-padding to match pretrained input dimensions and ineffective feature adaptation. These failures led to accuracy degradation despite extensive fine-tuning. We investigated these failure modes using two CT-pretrained hierarchical shifted-window transformer backbones, SMIT and Swin UNETR, pretrained with different objectives and datasets. Mechanistic analysis introduced an attention dilution index (ADI), an entropy-based metric quantifying attention diverted toward uninformative padding tokens, and centered kernel alignment (CKA) to measure feature reuse in MRI tasks. ADI increased with zero-padding, while high feature reuse did not necessarily correspond to improved accuracy. To mitigate these issues, we introduced two interventions: a tumor-aware augmentation strategy to improve tumor appearance heterogeneity coverage and an anisotropic cropping strategy to restore token efficiency. Fine-tuning on identical rectal MRI datasets improved detection rates to 224/247 (90.7%) for SMIT and 219/247 (88.7%) for Swin UNETR, demonstrating improved robustness under CT-to-MRI transfer. This study is among the first to examine when pretrained transformers fail to transfer effectively across imaging modalities and how simple mitigation strategies, motivated by mechanistic analysis of datasets, can reduce transfer limitations while improving robustness and MRI detection.

analysis.tldr: 通过肿瘤感知增强和任务引导注意力分析，改善CT预训练Transformer在直肠癌MRI分割中的迁移效果。
analysis.research_motivation: CT预训练模型迁移到MRI时，零填充导致token效率低下和特征适应不良，造成性能下降，亟需分析失败机制并提出缓解策略。
analysis.problem: CT预训练Transformer在OOD模态（MRI）迁移中因零填充和特征重用失效导致分割精度下降。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 零填充增加注意力稀释指数（ADI），高特征重用（CKA）不一定对应高精度，揭示了两种交互失败模式。
analysis.method: 提出肿瘤感知增强策略（增加肿瘤外观异质性覆盖）和各向异性裁剪策略（恢复token效率），基于注意力稀释指数和中心核对齐进行机制分析。
contributions: 首次系统分析CT预训练Transformer在CT-to-MRI迁移中的失败模式，引入ADI和CKA指标。
提出肿瘤感知增强和各向异性裁剪两种简单有效的缓解策略，显著提升直肠癌MRI检测率。
analysis.experiments: 在直肠MRI数据集上，SMIT检测率提升至224/247（90.7%），Swin UNETR提升至219/247（88.7%）。
limitations: 仅针对CT-to-MRI迁移，其他模态对可能需调整。
缓解策略依赖肿瘤区域先验知识，可能不适用于无明确病灶的任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验验证有效，但仅针对特定模态迁移，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过肿瘤感知增强和任务引导注意力分析，改善CT预训练Transformer在直肠癌MRI分割中的迁移效果。

papers.title: When Semantic Communication Meets Queueing: Cross-Layer Latency and Task Fidelity Optimization
papers.abstract: Semantic communication (SemCom) with learned encoder-decoder architectures enables end-to-end learning of compact task-oriented representations optimized for the wireless channel, reducing channel resources needed to convey task-relevant information and improving spectrum efficiency. This paper studies semantic image transmission over block Rayleigh fading with AWGN using a multi-task semantic autoencoder that jointly reconstructs images and predicts labels from the received waveform. The latent dimension (complex channel uses per source sample) serves as a cross-layer control variable governing semantic fidelity and channel resource usage. We characterize the resulting latency-task fidelity tradeoff: larger latent representations improve inference accuracy but increase service time, channel uses, and queueing delay. Building on this insight, we develop online semantic-rate controllers that adapt the latent dimension per update under a long-term semantic error constraint. A queue-aware drift-plus-penalty policy minimizes delay subject to an average semantic error cap, while a complementary age-aware policy minimizes time-average Age of Information (AoI). By adapting the semantic rate to congestion and fidelity requirements, the proposed framework improves spectrum utilization and enables timely semantic updates with significantly lower delay and AoI than fixed-rate baselines.

analysis.tldr: 将语义通信与排队论结合，通过在线调整潜在维度优化跨层延迟与任务保真度。
analysis.research_motivation: 语义通信通过端到端学习紧凑的任务导向表示，可减少信道资源消耗并提升频谱效率，但现有工作缺乏对延迟与语义保真度之间权衡的跨层分析。
analysis.problem: 在块瑞利衰落加性高斯白噪声信道上，如何通过跨层控制潜在维度（每源样本的复数信道使用数）来联合优化语义图像传输的延迟与任务保真度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 更大的潜在表示提升推理精度，但增加服务时间、信道使用和排队延迟，形成延迟-保真度权衡。
analysis.method: 提出在线语义率控制器，基于漂移加惩罚策略和年龄感知策略，自适应调整每轮更新的潜在维度，在长期语义误差约束下最小化延迟或信息年龄。
contributions: 首次将语义通信与排队论结合，刻画延迟-任务保真度权衡。
提出两种在线语义率控制器（队列感知和年龄感知），在约束下优化延迟或信息年龄。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅考虑图像传输任务，未扩展到视频或文本。
假设信道模型为块瑞利衰落，实际场景可能更复杂。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 跨层优化语义通信的延迟与保真度，方法新颖但实验细节缺失，适合精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将语义通信与排队论结合，通过在线调整潜在维度优化跨层延迟与任务保真度。

papers.title: Agentic AI and the Industrialization of Cyber Offense: Forecast, Consequences, and Defensive Priorities for Enterprises and the Mittelstand
papers.abstract: Agentic AI systems can plan, call tools, inspect code, interact with web applications, and coordinate multi-step workflows. These same capabilities change the economics of cyber offense. The central near-term risk is not that every low-skill criminal immediately becomes a frontier exploit researcher; it is that agentic AI compresses the attack lifecycle by lowering the cost of reconnaissance, phishing, credential abuse, vulnerability triage, exploit adaptation, and post-compromise decision support. This paper synthesizes current public evidence from national cybersecurity agencies, industry threat reports, agent security guidance, and research on LLM agents cyber capabilities. It introduces a Three Channel Agentic Cyber Risk Model and an Agentic Attack Compression Model, uses the 2026 Linux kernel Copy Fail incident as a case study for foothold-to-root acceleration, and develops a 2026 to 2028 forecast for large enterprises and the German and European Mittelstand. The paper concludes with a prioritized defense roadmap. Organizations should treat agentic AI security as an immediate operational problem: identity, phishing resistant authentication, patch velocity, CI/CD and Linux/container hardening, agent governance, telemetry, and recovery readiness must be strengthened now.

analysis.tldr: Agentic AI将压缩网络攻击生命周期，企业需立即强化身份认证、补丁管理等防御措施。
analysis.research_motivation: Agentic AI具备规划、工具调用、代码检查等能力，这些能力改变了网络攻击的经济性，但当前缺乏系统性的风险评估和防御优先级指导。
analysis.problem: 如何评估Agentic AI对网络攻击的加速效应，并为企业和中型企业制定防御优先级。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Agentic AI压缩攻击生命周期，降低侦察、钓鱼、凭证滥用、漏洞利用等环节的成本，但并非使低技能攻击者立即成为前沿漏洞研究者。
analysis.method: 综合国家网络安全机构、行业威胁报告、Agent安全指南及LLM Agent网络能力研究，提出三通道Agentic网络风险模型和Agentic攻击压缩模型，并以2026年Linux内核Copy Fail事件作为案例研究。
contributions: 提出三通道Agentic网络风险模型和Agentic攻击压缩模型
给出2026-2028年大型企业和德国/欧洲中型企业的预测及防御路线图
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 预测基于当前公开证据，可能未涵盖所有攻击场景
防御路线图主要针对企业和中型企业，可能不适用于小型组织
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 论文提出新颖的风险模型和防御路线图，对企业和中型企业具有实际指导意义，但缺乏实验验证。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Agentic AI将压缩网络攻击生命周期，企业需立即强化身份认证、补丁管理等防御措施。

papers.title: The First Controllable Bokeh Rendering Challenge at NTIRE 2026
papers.abstract: This study presents the outcomes of the first Controllable Bokeh Rendering Challenge at NTIRE and highlights the most effective submitted methodologies. In total, 44 participants registered for the competition, of which 8 teams submitted valid solutions after the conclusion of the final test phase. All submissions were evaluated on unseen images, focusing on portraits and intricate subjects with complex and visually appealing bokeh phenomena. In addition to the first track focusing on established quantitative fidelity metrics, we conducted a qualitative user study with a panel of experts for a second track focusing on perceptual assessment. As this was the inaugural challenge on this topic, most of the participants focused on refining and extending the Bokehlicious baseline method.

analysis.tldr: NTIRE 2026 首届可控散景渲染挑战赛结果，8支队伍提交有效方案，多数基于 Bokehlicious 基线改进。
analysis.research_motivation: 散景渲染是摄影和计算摄影中的重要效果，但现有方法缺乏可控性，且缺乏统一的评测基准和挑战赛来推动该领域发展。
analysis.problem: 如何实现可控的散景渲染，并在定量和定性指标上公平比较不同方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多数参赛者基于 Bokehlicious 基线进行改进，说明该基线是当前主流方法；定性用户研究用于评估感知质量。
analysis.method: 组织挑战赛，设置两个赛道：定量保真度指标和定性感知评估；参赛者提交方法并在未见过的图像上评估。
contributions: 首次提出可控散景渲染挑战赛，建立统一评测框架
收集并分析了多种方法在定量和定性指标上的表现
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 参赛方法数量有限（8个），可能不足以全面反映领域进展
定性评估依赖专家小组，可能受主观因素影响
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 挑战赛总结论文，方法创新有限，但对领域有基准价值，适合了解现状。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: NTIRE 2026 首届可控散景渲染挑战赛结果，8支队伍提交有效方案，多数基于 Bokehlicious 基线改进。

papers.title: FoodCHA: Multi-Modal LLM Agent for Fine-Grained Food Analysis
papers.abstract: The widespread adoption of camera-equipped mobile devices and wearables has enabled convenient capture of meal images, making food recognition a key component for real time dietary monitoring. However, real-world food images present challenges due to high intra-class similarity and the frequent presence of multiple food items within a single image. While deep learning models achieve strong performance in coarse grained classification, they often struggle to capture fine-grained attributes such as cooking style. Moreover, open-ended generation in modern vision-language models can produce non-canonical labels, limiting their practical deployment. We propose FoodCHA, a multimodal agentic framework that reformulates food recognition as a hierarchical decision-making process. By progressively anchoring predictions, FoodCHA guides subcategory identification using high-level categories and guides cooking style recognition using subcategories, improving semantic consistency and attribute-level discrimination. To ensure practical deployability, FoodCHA utilizes the compact Moondream-2B vision language model, which provides strong reasoning capability while maintaining lower computational and memory overhead. Experiments on FoodNExTDB show that FoodCHA outperforms Food-Llama-3.2-11B by 13.8% and 38.2% in category and subcategory recognition precision, respectively, and achieves a striking 153.2% improvement in cooking style classification precision.

analysis.tldr: 提出FoodCHA多模态智能体框架，通过层次化决策提升细粒度食品分析的准确性和语义一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 真实世界食品图像存在类间相似性高、多物品共存等问题，现有深度学习模型在细粒度属性（如烹饪方式）识别上表现不足，且视觉语言模型可能生成非标准标签，限制实际部署。
analysis.problem: 如何实现细粒度食品分析，包括类别、子类别和烹饪方式的准确识别，并确保语义一致性和低计算开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出FoodCHA多模态智能体框架，将食品识别重构为层次化决策过程：先识别高层类别，再引导子类别识别，最后利用子类别识别烹饪方式，使用Moondream-2B轻量级视觉语言模型。
contributions: 提出层次化决策的食品识别框架，提升细粒度属性识别精度。
在FoodNExTDB上显著优于Food-Llama-3.2-11B，烹饪方式识别精度提升153.2%。
analysis.experiments: 在FoodNExTDB数据集上，FoodCHA在类别和子类别识别精度上分别比Food-Llama-3.2-11B提升13.8%和38.2%，烹饪方式识别精度提升153.2%。
limitations: 仅在一个数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
层次化决策可能引入错误累积。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有明确创新，实验提升显著，但仅在一个数据集上验证，且与核心方向中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FoodCHA多模态智能体框架，通过层次化决策提升细粒度食品分析的准确性和语义一致性。

papers.title: ReaComp: Compiling LLM Reasoning into Symbolic Solvers for Efficient Program Synthesis
papers.abstract: LLMs can solve program synthesis tasks but remain inefficient and unreliable on hard instances requiring large combinatorial search. Given a small set of reasoning traces, we use coding agents to compile them into reusable symbolic program synthesizers over constrained DSLs. The resulting solvers require no LLM calls at test time and are strong standalone systems: symbolic solver ensembles reach 91.3% accuracy on PBEBench-Lite and 84.7% on PBEBench-Hard, outperforming LLMs with test-time scaling for the latter by +16.3 percentage points at zero LLM inference cost. They also complement LLM search, improving PBEBench-Hard accuracy from 68.4% to 85.8% while reducing reported token usage by 78%, and raising SLR-Bench hard-tier accuracy from 34.4% to 58.0% in a neuro-symbolic hybrid setting. Compared to directly using coding agents as per-instance solvers, induced solvers are substantially more Pareto-efficient, amortizing a small one-time construction cost over many zero-token executions. Finally, most solvers transfer zero-shot to a real historical linguistics task - predicting sound changes in natural language data - reaching 80.1% accuracy under ensembling and recovering some plausible linguistic rules. Together, these results show that reasoning traces can be compiled into reusable symbolic solvers that solve many tasks directly, complement LLM inference on hard cases, and provide a scalable route to domain-general solver induction. We release code and data for reproducibility.

analysis.tldr: 将LLM推理轨迹编译为符号求解器，实现零推理成本的高效程序合成。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在程序合成任务中表现良好，但在需要大规模组合搜索的困难实例上效率低且不可靠，现有方法依赖大量LLM调用，成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何将LLM的推理能力转化为可复用的符号求解器，以消除测试时LLM调用并提升困难实例的求解性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用编码代理将少量推理轨迹编译为受限DSL上的可复用符号程序合成器，通过集成形成符号求解器。
contributions: 提出ReaComp方法，将LLM推理轨迹编译为符号求解器，实现零LLM调用的高效程序合成。
在PBEBench和SLR-Bench上验证了符号求解器在准确率和效率上的优势，并展示了在历史语言学任务上的零样本迁移能力。
analysis.experiments: 在PBEBench-Lite（91.3%）、PBEBench-Hard（84.7%）和SLR-Bench（58.0%）上评估，并与LLM测试时缩放、神经符号混合等方法对比，报告了准确率和token使用量。
limitations: 方法依赖受限DSL，可能限制其通用性。
编译过程需要少量推理轨迹，初始构建成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，将推理轨迹编译为符号求解器，实验充分且效果显著，与LLM推理方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将LLM推理轨迹编译为符号求解器，实现零推理成本的高效程序合成。

papers.title: FinRAG-12B: A Production-Validated Recipe for Grounded Question Answering in Banking
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are rapidly being adopted across various domains. However, their adoption in banking industry faces resistance due to demands for high accuracy, regulatory compliance, and the need for verifiable and grounded responses. We present a unified, data-efficient framework for training grounded domain-specific LLMs that optimizes answer quality, citation grounding, and calibrated refusal under real-world deployment constraints. First, we describe a data generation pipeline that combines LLM-as-a-Judge filtering, citation annotation, and curriculum learning with only 143M tokens. The resulting 12B model achieves high answer quality outperforming GPT-4.1 on citation grounding, with a modest citation tradeoff versus the untuned base. Second, we propose a calibrated refusal mechanism: training on 22% unanswerable examples yield a 12% "I don't know" rate, substantially improving over the base model's unsafe 4.3% rate while avoiding GPT-4.1's over-refusal (20.2%). Third, we present an end-to-end methodology spanning from data curation to quantized serving. The system is deployed at 40+ financial institutions, achieving a 7.1 percentage point improvement in query resolution (p < 0.001). Additionally, the model delivers 3-5x faster responses at 20-50x lower cost compared to GPT-4.1.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个数据高效的金融领域问答框架，12B模型在引用准确性和校准拒绝上超越GPT-4.1，已在40+金融机构部署。
analysis.research_motivation: 银行业对LLM的高准确性、合规性和可验证响应有严格要求，现有模型在部署中面临引用不准确、过度拒绝或拒绝不足等问题。
analysis.problem: 如何在有限数据下训练一个既保证答案质量、引用可验证，又能校准拒绝率的领域专用LLM。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合LLM-as-a-Judge过滤、引用标注和课程学习的数据生成流水线（仅143M tokens），以及基于22%不可回答样本的校准拒绝机制。
contributions: 提出一个统一的数据高效框架，用于训练接地气的领域专用LLM，优化答案质量、引用和校准拒绝。
在40+金融机构部署，查询解决率提升7.1个百分点，响应速度比GPT-4.1快3-5倍，成本低20-50倍。
analysis.experiments: 在银行领域部署验证，查询解决率提升7.1个百分点（p<0.001），引用准确性优于GPT-4.1，拒绝率从4.3%调整至12%。
limitations: 仅针对银行领域，泛化性未验证。
数据生成依赖LLM-as-a-Judge，可能引入偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法实用且经生产验证，但创新性中等，适合关注金融领域LLM部署的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个数据高效的金融领域问答框架，12B模型在引用准确性和校准拒绝上超越GPT-4.1，已在40+金融机构部署。

papers.title: GRALIS: A Unified Canonical Framework for Linear Attribution Methods via Riesz Representation
papers.abstract: The main XAI attribution methods for deep neural networks -- GradCAM, SHAP, LIME, Integrated Gradients -- operate on separate theoretical foundations and are not formally comparable. We present GRALIS (Gradient-Riesz Averaged Locally-Integrated Shapley), a mathematical framework establishing a representation theory for attributions: every additive, linear, and continuous attribution functional on L^2(Q,mu) admits a unique canonical representation (Q, w, Delta), proved necessary by the Riesz Representation Theorem. This class encompasses SHAP, IG, LIME and linearized GradCAM, but excludes nonlinear functionals such as standard GradCAM or attention maps. Seven formal theorems provide simultaneous guarantees absent in any individual method: (T1) necessary canonical form; (T2) exact completeness; (T3) Monte Carlo convergence O(1/sqrt(m))+O(1/k); (T4) exact Shapley Interaction Values; (T5) Hoeffding ANOVA decomposition; (T6) Sobol sensitivity generalization; (T7) multi-scale extension (MS-GRALIS) with minimum-variance weights. An algebraic appendix justifies the GRALIS-SIV correspondence via the Mobius transform without circularity. GRALIS satisfies 13.5/14 axiomatic properties vs. 2.5-6/14 for individual methods, including completeness, sensitivity, locality, order-k interactions and optimal multi-scale aggregation simultaneously. Preliminary validation on BreaKHis (1,187 histology images, DenseNet-121) reports deletion faithfulness AUC +0.015 (malignant), 96% class-conditional consistency, SAL = 0.762+/-0.109 and sparsity index 0.39. Extended comparison with baseline XAI methods is planned for a companion paper.

analysis.tldr: GRALIS 通过 Riesz 表示定理为线性归因方法建立了统一的规范框架，在理论上同时满足 13.5/14 条公理性质。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 XAI 归因方法（如 GradCAM、SHAP、LIME、Integrated Gradients）基于不同的理论基础，无法进行形式化比较，缺乏统一的数学框架。
analysis.problem: 如何为深度神经网络的线性归因方法建立一个统一的、可比较的规范表示框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 GRALIS 框架，基于 Riesz 表示定理证明每个加性、线性、连续的归因泛函在 L^2(Q,mu) 上存在唯一的规范表示 (Q, w, Delta)，并给出七条形式化定理。
contributions: 建立了线性归因方法的统一规范框架，包含唯一规范表示和七条理论保证。
GRALIS 同时满足 13.5/14 条公理性质，远超现有方法（2.5-6/14）。
analysis.experiments: 在 BreaKHis 数据集（1,187 张组织学图像，DenseNet-121）上进行了初步验证，报告了删除忠实度 AUC、类条件一致性、SAL 和稀疏性指标。
limitations: 仅适用于线性归因泛函，不涵盖非线性方法（如标准 GradCAM 或注意力图）。
初步实验规模较小，更全面的对比计划在后续论文中。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.reason: 理论贡献突出，统一框架具有高创新性和技术深度，但实验尚初步，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GRALIS 通过 Riesz 表示定理为线性归因方法建立了统一的规范框架，在理论上同时满足 13.5/14 条公理性质。

papers.title: LANTERN: LLM-Augmented Neurosymbolic Transfer with Experience-Gated Reasoning Networks
papers.abstract: Transfer learning in reinforcement learning (RL) seeks to accelerate learning in new tasks by leveraging knowledge from related sources. Existing neurosymbolic transfer methods, however, typically rely on manually specified task automata, assume a single source task, and use fixed knowledge-integration mechanisms that cannot adapt to varying source relevance. We propose LANTERN, a unified framework for multi-source neurosymbolic transfer that addresses these limitations through three components: (i) deterministic finite automata generated from natural language task descriptions using large language models, (ii) semantic embedding-based aggregation of multiple source policies weighted by cross-task similarity, and (iii) adaptive teacher-student gating based on temporal-difference error and semantic uncertainty. Across domains spanning resource management, navigation, and control, LANTERN achieves 40-60% improvements in sample efficiency over existing baselines while remaining robust to poorly aligned sources. These results demonstrate that multi-source, adaptively weighted neurosymbolic transfer can improve scalability and robustness in symbolic RL settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出LANTERN框架，利用LLM生成任务自动机、语义嵌入聚合多源策略和自适应门控机制，实现多源神经符号迁移学习，在资源管理、导航和控制任务中样本效率提升40-60%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有神经符号迁移学习方法依赖手动指定的任务自动机、假设单一源任务，并使用固定的知识集成机制，无法适应不同源任务的相关性变化，限制了迁移学习的可扩展性和鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 如何实现多源神经符号迁移学习，自动生成任务表示、自适应聚合多源策略并动态调整知识集成权重。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: LANTERN框架包含三个组件：1) 利用大语言模型从自然语言任务描述生成确定性有限自动机；2) 基于语义嵌入的多源策略聚合，通过跨任务相似度加权；3) 基于时序差分误差和语义不确定性的自适应师生门控机制。
contributions: 提出统一的多源神经符号迁移学习框架LANTERN，无需手动指定任务自动机。
引入语义嵌入聚合和自适应门控机制，提升样本效率和对低质量源任务的鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在资源管理、导航和控制等多个领域进行实验，LANTERN相比现有基线在样本效率上提升40-60%，并对对齐较差的源任务保持鲁棒。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM生成自动机的质量，对复杂任务描述可能不准确。
多源聚合和门控机制可能增加计算开销。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LANTERN框架，利用LLM生成任务自动机、语义嵌入聚合多源策略和自适应门控机制，实现多源神经符号迁移学习，在资源管理、导航和控制任务中样本效率提升40-60%。

papers.title: A Unified Benchmark for Evaluating Knowledge Graph Construction Methods and Graph Neural Networks
papers.abstract: Knowledge graphs automatically constructed from text are increasingly used in real-world applications. However, their inherent noise, fragmentation, and semantic inconsistencies significantly affect the performance of Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) on downstream tasks. Assessing their performance and robustness remains difficult, as it is often unclear whether observed results stem from the learning model or from the quality of the constructed graph itself. In this work, we introduce a dual-purpose benchmark designed to jointly evaluate (i) the performance of GNNs on noisy, text-derived graphs and (ii) the effectiveness of graph construction methods on a downstream task. The benchmark is built in the biomedical domain from a single textual corpus and includes two automatically constructed graphs generated using different extraction methods, alongside a high-quality reference graph curated by experts that serves as an upper performance bound. This design enables controlled comparison of construction methods and systematic evaluation of GNN robustness through semi-supervised node classification. We further provide a standardized, reproducible, and extensible evaluation framework, facilitating the integration of new graph extraction methods and learning models.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个双用途基准，用于联合评估知识图谱构建方法和图神经网络在噪声文本派生图上的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动构建的知识图谱存在噪声、碎片化和语义不一致问题，影响GNN在下游任务中的表现，且难以区分性能差异源于模型还是图质量。

analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

contributions: 提出一个双用途基准，联合评估图构建方法和GNN性能。
提供标准化、可扩展的评估框架，便于集成新方法和模型。

papers.title: Intentionality is a Design Decision: Measuring Functional Intentionality for Accountable AI Systems
papers.abstract: As AI systems increasingly exhibit autonomous, goal-directed, and long-horizon behavior, users lack a standardized way to detect the degree to which a system functions like an intentional actor for governance and accountability purposes. This position paper defines intentionality not as consciousness, but as a behavioral profile characterized by purpose, foresight, volition, temporal commitment, and coherence - criteria long used in legal and philosophical contexts to infer intent. These properties are design-contingent: architectural choices such as memory persistence, planning depth, and tool autonomy shape the degree to which systems exhibit organized goal pursuit. If intentionality is design-contingent, it is in principle controllable. Yet control requires measurement. We introduce the Functional Intentionality Test (FIT), a multidimensional framework that quantifies intentional-like behavior across five observable dimensions, and propose FIT-Eval, a structured evaluation protocol for eliciting and scoring them. While reduced human agency can increase efficiency, rising intentional capacity heightens accountability risks. By translating intentionality into interpretable levels, FIT enables proportionate oversight and deliberate autonomy calibration in increasingly agentic systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出功能意向性测试（FIT），将AI系统的意向性行为量化为可测量维度，以支持问责与自主性校准。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着AI系统表现出自主、目标导向和长期行为，用户缺乏标准化方法来检测系统在多大程度上像有意向的行动者，从而难以进行治理和问责。
analysis.problem: 如何定义和测量AI系统的功能意向性，以便在设计和部署中实现可控的自主性校准和问责。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但指出意向性是设计依赖的：架构选择（如记忆持久性、规划深度、工具自主性）塑造了系统展现组织化目标追求的程度。
analysis.method: 提出功能意向性测试（FIT），一个多维框架，通过五个可观察维度（目的、预见、意志、时间承诺、连贯性）量化意向性行为，并设计FIT-Eval评估协议来激发和评分这些维度。
contributions: 将意向性定义为行为特征而非意识，并建立基于法律和哲学背景的五个维度标准。
提出FIT框架和FIT-Eval协议，将意向性转化为可解释的水平，支持比例监督和自主性校准。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: FIT框架可能无法覆盖所有类型的AI系统行为。

papers.title: The Pedagogy of AI Mistakes: Fostering Higher-Order Thinking
papers.abstract: As generative AI becomes increasingly integrated into higher education, its frequent errors and hallucinations, often seen as limitations, offer a unique pedagogical opportunity. By framing AI as a ``learning companion'' whose imperfect outputs prompt analysis, evaluation, and reflection, we argue that instructors can engage students in the fundamental processes of higher-order thinking. This paper presents a design-oriented study in which an AI-integrated syllabus in a \textit{database design} course deliberately leverages AI's limitations to foster critical thinking and higher-order cognitive skills aligned with Bloom's taxonomy of learning. Using a mixed-methods approach, we examine how structured interaction with AI-generated errors supports metacognitive engagement, reinforces disciplinary rigor, and relates to students' perceived AI literacy and subject-matter competency.

analysis.tldr: 利用AI的错误和幻觉作为教学工具，促进高等教育中的高阶思维。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式AI在高等教育中日益普及，但其频繁的错误和幻觉通常被视为局限，本研究探索如何将这些局限转化为独特的教育机会。
analysis.problem: 如何通过结构化地利用AI生成错误，在数据库设计课程中培养学生的批判性思维和高阶认知技能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: AI的错误和幻觉可以激发学生的分析、评估和反思，从而促进高阶思维过程。
analysis.method: 设计导向研究，在数据库设计课程中集成AI教学大纲，故意利用AI的局限性，采用混合方法评估学生对AI素养和学科能力的感知。

papers.title: Robustness of Graph Self-Supervised Learning to Real-World Noise: A Case Study on Text-Driven Biomedical Graphs
papers.abstract: Graph Self-Supervised Learning (GSSL) offers a powerful paradigm for learning graph representations without labeled data. However, existing work assumes clean, manually curated graphs. Recent advances in NLP enable the large-scale automatic extraction of knowledge graphs from text, opening new opportunities for GSSL while introducing substantial real-world noise. This type of noise remains largely unexplored, as prior robustness studies typically rely on synthetic perturbations. To address this gap, we present the first comprehensive evaluation of GSSL methods on text-driven graphs for unsupervised term typing. We introduce Noise-Aware Text-Driven Graph GSSL (NATD-GSSL), a unified framework that combines automatic graph construction, graph refinement, and GSSL. Our evaluation follows a dual-graph protocol that contrasts a noisy graph derived from MedMentions with a clean Unified Medical Language System (UMLS) reference graph, aligned through a shared gold standard. Our results reveal variability in robustness across both pretext tasks and Graph Neural Network (GNN) architectures. Relation reconstruction is highly sensitive to noise and benefits from well-defined schemas, whereas feature reconstruction is considerably more robust, achieving performance comparable to clean-graph settings. Contrastive objectives are generally less affected by noise but depend strongly on alignment with downstream tasks. GNN architecture also plays a critical role: bidirectional relational message-passing designs are better suited to noisy, text-driven graphs, while unidirectional relational ones perform best on clean graphs. Overall, NATD-GSSL provides practical guidance for applying GSSL to real-world, noisy graphs and achieves up to a 7\% improvement over pretrained language model baselines. All code and benchmarks are publicly available at https://github.com/OthmaneKabal/MC2GAE.

analysis.tldr: 首个系统评估图自监督学习在文本驱动生物医学图上对真实噪声鲁棒性的工作，提出NATD-GSSL框架并发现不同预任务和GNN架构对噪声的敏感性差异显著。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图自监督学习（GSSL）研究假设图是干净且人工整理的，但NLP技术可自动从文本中大规模构建知识图谱，引入真实世界噪声，而先前鲁棒性研究仅依赖合成噪声，缺乏对真实噪声的评估。
analysis.problem: 评估GSSL方法在文本驱动生物医学图上对真实噪声的鲁棒性，并探索如何通过图构建、精炼和GSSL设计来缓解噪声影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 关系重建任务对噪声高度敏感，但受益于良好定义的schema；特征重建任务鲁棒性更强，性能接近干净图设置；对比目标受噪声影响较小但依赖下游任务对齐；双向关系消息传递GNN更适合噪声图，单向关系GNN在干净图上表现更好。
analysis.method: 提出NATD-GSSL框架，包含自动图构建（从MedMentions提取）、图精炼和GSSL，采用双图协议（噪声图vs干净UMLS参考图）进行对比评估。
contributions: 首次系统评估GSSL方法在文本驱动生物医学图上对真实噪声的鲁棒性
提出NATD-GSSL统一框架，结合自动图构建、精炼和GSSL
揭示不同预任务和GNN架构对噪声的敏感性差异，提供实用指导

papers.title: Agentic Discovery of Exchange-Correlation Density Functionals
papers.abstract: The development of accurate exchange-correlation (XC) functionals remains a longstanding challenge in density functional theory (DFT). The vast majority of XC functionals have been hand designed by human researchers combining physical insight, exact constraints, and empirical fitting. Recent advances in large language models enable a systematic, automated alternative to this human-driven design loop. This report presents an agentic search system in which an LLM proposes structured functional-form changes guided by evolutionary history. The system attempts to improve functional performance through an iterative plan-execute-summarize loop, where improvements are measurable by optimizing functional parameters against a standard thermochemistry dataset, then evaluating performance on a held-out subset. The strongest discovered functional, SAFS26-a (Seed Agentic Functional Search 2026), improves upon the gold-standard ωB97M-V baseline by ~9%. These results also surface a cautionary lesson for AI-assisted science: models powerful enough to discover genuine improvements are equally capable of exploiting unphysical shortcuts to game the benchmark; domain expertise translated into explicitly enforced constraints remains essential to keeping results scientifically grounded.

analysis.tldr: 利用LLM智能体自动搜索密度泛函理论中的交换关联泛函，发现比ωB97M-V提升约9%的新泛函，同时揭示AI辅助科学中基准作弊的风险。
analysis.research_motivation: 交换关联泛函的发现长期依赖人工设计，结合物理直觉、精确约束和经验拟合，效率低且可能遗漏更优形式。
analysis.problem: 如何自动化、系统地发现性能更优的交换关联泛函，同时避免AI利用非物理捷径在基准上作弊。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，强大的AI模型既能发现真正的改进，也能利用非物理捷径在基准上作弊，因此需要将领域知识转化为显式约束来保证科学合理性。
analysis.method: 提出一个基于LLM的智能体搜索系统，由LLM在进化历史指导下提出结构化的泛函形式变化，通过迭代的“计划-执行-总结”循环优化泛函参数，并在标准热化学数据集上评估性能。
contributions: 提出一种基于LLM智能体的自动化交换关联泛函搜索方法。
发现SAFS26-a泛函，在标准热化学基准上比ωB97M-V提升约9%。
揭示AI辅助科学中基准作弊的风险，强调领域知识约束的必要性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及在标准热化学数据集上优化参数并在留出子集上评估。
limitations: 可能依赖特定基准数据集，泛化性未验证。
未讨论搜索的计算成本或可复现性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，结合LLM与物理科学，但实验细节有限，且与核心关注方向（VLM/视频生成等）距离较远。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用LLM智能体自动搜索密度泛函理论中的交换关联泛函，发现比ωB97M-V提升约9%的新泛函，同时揭示AI辅助科学中基准作弊的风险。

papers.title: EchoXFlow: A Beamspace Echocardiography Dataset for Cardiac Motion, Flow, and Function
papers.abstract: We introduce EchoXFlow, a clinical echocardiography dataset for learning from ultrasound in its native acquisition geometry rather than from scan-converted Cartesian videos. Existing public datasets offer limited opportunities to study cross-modal relationships between cardiac anatomy, myocardial motion, and blood flow, as Doppler is typically absent or fused as RGB overlays, and acquisitions are released after lossy vendor display processing. EchoXFlow comprises 37125 recordings from 666 routine-care examinations, preserving the timing, geometry, and modality relationships needed for physically grounded echo learning. Each recording is retained as separable modality-specific streams: temporally resolved 1D, 2D, and 3D data alongside multiple Doppler modalities, paired with a synchronized ECG. Clinical annotations span guideline-based measurements to dense 2D myocardial contours and 3D left-ventricular endocardial meshes. With its associated open-source tooling, EchoXFlow enables cross-modal, acquisition-aware learning tasks that cannot be formulated from conventional scan-converted videos alone, and serves as a testbed for 4D vision and physically grounded multi-modal learning more broadly.

analysis.tldr: EchoXFlow 是一个保留超声原生采集几何结构的多模态心超数据集，支持跨模态与物理驱动的学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有公开心超数据集通常经过扫描转换和厂商显示处理，丢失了原始采集的时序、几何和模态关系，且多普勒信息缺失或融合为RGB叠加，限制了跨模态心脏解剖、心肌运动和血流之间关系的研究。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个保留原生采集几何结构、包含分离多模态流（如1D/2D/3D数据与多普勒）并配有临床标注的心超数据集，以支持物理驱动的跨模态学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含37125条记录、来自666次常规检查的临床心超数据集，每条记录保留可分离的模态特定流（时序1D/2D/3D数据与多普勒），并配有同步心电图和临床标注（包括指南测量、2D心肌轮廓和3D左心室心内膜网格），同时提供开源工具。
contributions: 提出了EchoXFlow数据集，保留超声原生采集几何结构，包含分离的多模态流和同步ECG。
提供了丰富的临床标注，包括2D心肌轮廓和3D左心室网格，支持跨模态和采集感知的学习任务。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集仅来自单一机构，可能影响泛化性。
未提供基线模型或基准测试结果。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 数据集设计新颖，保留原生几何结构，对心超跨模态学习有重要价值，但缺乏实验验证。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EchoXFlow 是一个保留超声原生采集几何结构的多模态心超数据集，支持跨模态与物理驱动的学习。

papers.title: SLAM: Structural Linguistic Activation Marking for Language Models
papers.abstract: LLM watermarks must be detectable without compromising text quality, yet most existing schemes bias the next-token distribution and pay for detection with measurable quality loss. We present SLAM (Structural Linguistic Activation Marking), a novel white-box watermarking scheme that sidesteps this cost by writing the mark into structural geometry rather than token frequencies: sparse autoencoders identify residual-stream directions encoding linguistic structure (e.g., voice, tense, clause order), and we causally steer those directions at generation time, leaving lexical sampling and semantics unconstrained. On Gemma-2 2B and 9B, SLAM achieves 100% detection accuracy with a quality cost of only 1-2 reward points - compared to 7.5-11.5 for KGW, EWD, and Unigram - with naturalness and diversity preserved at near-unwatermarked levels across both models. The trade-off is a complementary robustness profile: SLAM resists word-level edits but is vulnerable to paraphrase that restructures syntax (at a quality cost), the converse of token-distribution methods.

analysis.tldr: SLAM通过因果干预稀疏自编码器提取的语言结构方向实现无质量损失的LLM水印。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM水印方案通过偏置下一个token分布实现检测，但会引入可测量的文本质量损失，亟需一种不牺牲质量的水印方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在保证文本质量和自然度的前提下，实现高检测精度的LLM水印。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出token分布水印（如KGW、EWD、Unigram）在检测时需付出7.5-11.5质量分代价，而SLAM仅损失1-2分，且自然度和多样性接近无水印水平。
analysis.method: 利用稀疏自编码器从残差流中识别编码语言结构（如语态、时态、从句顺序）的方向，在生成时对这些方向进行因果干预，将水印嵌入结构几何而非token频率。
contributions: 提出SLAM，一种基于结构几何的白盒水印方案，避免了对token分布的偏置。
在Gemma-2 2B和9B上实现100%检测准确率，质量损失仅1-2分，显著优于现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在Gemma-2 2B和9B模型上评估，与KGW、EWD、Unigram对比，SLAM检测准确率100%，质量损失1-2分，自然度和多样性接近无水印水平。
limitations: 对改写（paraphrase）攻击鲁棒性较弱，因为改写会重构句法结构。
需要白盒访问模型内部表示，可能不适用于黑盒场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，实验充分，质量损失极小，但鲁棒性有局限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SLAM通过因果干预稀疏自编码器提取的语言结构方向实现无质量损失的LLM水印。

papers.title: Authorization Propagation in Multi-Agent AI Systems: Identity Governance as Infrastructure
papers.abstract: The security discussion around agentic AI focuses heavily on prompt injection. This paper argues that multi-agent systems also create a distinct authorization problem: maintaining authorization invariants as non-human principals retrieve data, delegate tasks, and synthesize results across changing boundaries. We call this problem authorization propagation. It is not reducible to prompt injection and is not fully addressed by classical access-control models such as RBAC, ABAC, or ReBAC. The paper formalizes authorization propagation as a workflow-level property, identifies three sub-problems (transitive delegation, aggregation inference, and temporal validity), and derives seven structural requirements for authorization architectures in multi-agent AI systems. Recent work on invocation-bound capability tokens, task-scoped authorization envelopes, dependency-graph policy enforcement, and execution-count revocation demonstrates that the field is converging on the problem, but not yet on a complete architecture. The central claim is that identity governance must be treated as infrastructure: evaluated continuously, enforced at every interaction boundary, and designed into the system before orchestration logic is allowed to scale. Preliminary implementation evidence from a production enterprise AI platform shows that ordinary system behavior, not only adversarial action, already produces the failures this model predicts.

analysis.tldr: 多智能体AI系统存在授权传播问题，需将身份治理作为基础设施。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有安全讨论聚焦于提示注入，但多智能体系统在非人类主体间数据检索、任务委派和结果合成时会产生独特的授权问题，传统访问控制模型（如RBAC、ABAC、ReBAC）无法完全解决。
analysis.problem: 多智能体AI系统中授权不变性在跨边界传播时被破坏的问题，即授权传播问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出普通系统行为（而非仅对抗行为）已能产生模型预测的授权失败，且领域虽在收敛（如调用绑定能力令牌、任务范围授权信封等），但尚未形成完整架构。
analysis.method: 形式化授权传播为工作流级属性，识别三个子问题（传递委派、聚合推断、时间有效性），推导出多智能体AI系统授权架构的七个结构性需求。
contributions: 首次形式化定义多智能体AI系统中的授权传播问题，并区分于提示注入和经典访问控制模型。
识别三个子问题并推导七个架构需求，为系统设计提供指导。
analysis.experiments: 来自生产级企业AI平台的初步实现证据表明，普通系统行为已产生模型预测的失败模式。摘要未提供具体实验细节。
limitations: 初步实现证据来自单一企业平台，泛化性待验证。
未提供完整架构或系统实现，仅提出需求。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 问题定义新颖，但技术深度和实验证据有限，适合关注多智能体安全的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多智能体AI系统存在授权传播问题，需将身份治理作为基础设施。

papers.title: Safety-Critical Camera Reliability Monitoring for ADAS via Degradation-Aware Uncertainty Pattern Analysis
papers.abstract: Reliable camera input is essential for safety-critical ADAS perception, but most monitoring approaches detect sensor failures only after downstream performance has degraded. We propose a proactive camera reliability monitoring framework that estimates perception risk from degradation-induced uncertainty patterns before downstream failure becomes observable. The method introduces a Global Sensor Health Index (GSHI), a continuous reliability score that aggregates per-degradation severities using a risk-aware multiplicative formulation, allowing severe single-mode failures such as lens occlusion or motion blur to dominate the health estimate. A lightweight multi-task network predicts degradation type, severity, GSHI, and spatial uncertainty maps from a single RGB image without downstream task feedback. Training uses physics- and geometry-aware synthetic supervision over twelve camera degradation modes. Experiments on KITTI-derived degradations show that GSHI decreases monotonically with severity, achieves a health-estimation MAE of 0.064, and provides positive early-warning lead time of 0.47 $\pm$ 0.25 severity units before YOLOv8 detection failure. GSHI also outperforms IQA, detector-confidence, and clean-feature OOD baselines, and transfers zero-shot to real adverse-weather driving data. These results support degradation-aware uncertainty analysis as a practical direction for proactive camera reliability monitoring in intelligent vehicles.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于退化感知不确定性分析的ADAS摄像头可靠性监控框架，通过全局传感器健康指数（GSHI）在检测器失效前预警感知风险。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有摄像头监控方法通常在下游性能下降后才检测到传感器故障，缺乏主动预警能力，难以满足安全关键ADAS系统的需求。
analysis.problem: 如何在ADAS系统中实现摄像头可靠性的主动监控，在感知任务失效前通过退化不确定性模式估计感知风险。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出全局传感器健康指数（GSHI），采用风险感知乘法公式聚合各退化严重度，使严重单模式故障主导健康估计；设计轻量多任务网络从单张RGB图像预测退化类型、严重度、GSHI和空间不确定性图，无需下游任务反馈；使用物理和几何感知的合成监督训练，覆盖12种摄像头退化模式。
contributions: 提出GSHI作为连续可靠性评分，实现退化严重度的风险感知聚合。
构建轻量多任务网络，无需下游反馈即可预测退化类型、严重度、GSHI和不确定性图。
在KITTI衍生数据和真实恶劣天气数据上验证了GSHI的早期预警能力和零样本迁移性。
analysis.experiments: 在KITTI衍生退化数据上，GSHI随严重度单调递减，健康估计MAE为0.064，在YOLOv8检测失败前提供0.47±0.25严重度单位的早期预警时间；GSHI优于IQA、检测器置信度和干净特征OOD基线，并零样本迁移到真实恶劣天气驾驶数据。
limitations: 合成训练数据可能与真实退化分布存在差距。
仅针对单目RGB图像，未考虑多摄像头或时序信息。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，实验充分且结果积极，与ADAS安全监控强相关，值得精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于退化感知不确定性分析的ADAS摄像头可靠性监控框架，通过全局传感器健康指数（GSHI）在检测器失效前预警感知风险。

papers.title: On Semantic Loss Fine-Tuning Approach for Preventing Model Collapse in Causal Reasoning
papers.abstract: Standard fine-tuning of transformer models on causal reasoning tasks leads to catastrophic model collapse, where models learn trivial solutions such as always predicting "Yes" or "No" regardless of input structure. We demonstrate that fine-tuning Gemma 270M on transitivity and d-separation tasks without semantic loss results in 100% collapse rate, with models achieving misleadingly high accuracy (73.9%) while learning no causal reasoning. We propose a semantic loss function with graph-based logical constraints and dynamic lambda scheduling that prevents this collapse. Our approach achieves 70.4% accuracy on transitivity tasks and 68.6% on d-separation tasks with stable, context-dependent predictions, representing a 42.7% improvement over collapsed baselines. Adversarial evaluation on 1,000 structural reasoning samples shows semantic models achieve 67-70% accuracy while collapsed models fail catastrophically at 43-71%. We validate our findings through comprehensive benchmarking on 200,000+ evaluation samples across five model variants, demonstrating that semantic loss is essential and not optional, for stable causal reasoning in transformers.

analysis.tldr: 提出语义损失微调方法，防止因果推理中Transformer模型崩溃。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准微调在因果推理任务中导致模型崩溃（如总是预测“是”或“否”），无法学习真正的因果推理，需要解决这一关键问题。
analysis.problem: 防止Transformer模型在因果推理微调时出现模型崩溃，使其学习到基于输入结构的稳定预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准微调导致100%崩溃率，模型虽达到73.9%的误导性高准确率，但未学习因果推理。
analysis.method: 提出包含图逻辑约束和动态lambda调度的语义损失函数。
contributions: 揭示了标准微调在因果推理任务中导致模型崩溃的现象。
提出语义损失微调方法，有效防止模型崩溃，提升稳定性和准确率。
analysis.experiments: 在传递性和d-分离任务上评估，使用Gemma 270M模型，在20万+样本上验证，对抗性评估显示语义模型准确率67-70%，崩溃模型43-71%。
limitations: 方法仅在较小模型（270M）上验证，更大模型效果未知。
语义损失函数的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，实验充分，对因果推理领域有重要价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语义损失微调方法，防止因果推理中Transformer模型崩溃。

papers.title: TRAM: Training Approximate Multiplier Structures for Low-Power AI Accelerators
papers.abstract: Reducing power consumption in AI accelerators is increasingly important. Approximate computing can reduce power consumption while keeping the accuracy loss small. Since multipliers are power-hungry components in AI models, this paper focuses on synthesizing low-power approximate multipliers (AxMs). Unlike prior works that design AxMs separately from AI model training, we present TRAM, which jointly optimizes the AxM structure and AI model parameters to lower power with small accuracy loss. Experiments show that compared to state-of-the-art AxMs, TRAM achieves up to 25.05% AxM power reduction on CNNs with CIFAR-10, and reduces power by up to 27.09% on vision transformers with ImageNet.

analysis.tldr: TRAM通过联合优化近似乘法器结构与AI模型参数，在保持低精度损失的同时显著降低AI加速器功耗。
analysis.research_motivation: AI加速器功耗日益重要，近似计算可在保持精度损失较小的同时降低功耗，但现有方法将近似乘法器设计与模型训练分离，未能充分利用联合优化潜力。
analysis.problem: 如何联合优化近似乘法器结构（AxM）与AI模型参数，以在最小化精度损失的前提下最大化功耗降低。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出TRAM框架，将近似乘法器结构搜索与模型训练联合优化，通过端到端方式同时调整AxM结构和模型权重，以降低功耗并控制精度损失。
contributions: 提出TRAM方法，首次实现近似乘法器结构与AI模型参数的联合优化。
在CNN和视觉Transformer上分别实现高达25.05%和27.09%的AxM功耗降低，且精度损失小。
analysis.experiments: 在CIFAR-10上的CNN和ImageNet上的视觉Transformer上评估，与最先进AxM相比，TRAM分别实现高达25.05%和27.09%的AxM功耗降低。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的近似乘法器结构。
联合优化可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.reason: 方法有一定创新性，但实验规模有限，且与当前重点方向（VLM/视频生成等）相关性中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TRAM通过联合优化近似乘法器结构与AI模型参数，在保持低精度损失的同时显著降低AI加速器功耗。

papers.title: The Geopolitics of AI Safety: A Causal Analysis of Regional LLM Bias
papers.abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) are integrated into global software systems, ensuring equitable safety guardrails is a critical requirement. Current fairness evaluations predominantly measure bias observationally, a methodology confounded by the inherent toxicity of topics naturally paired with specific demographics in testing datasets. This study introduces a Probabilistic Graphical Model (PGM) framework to audit LLM safety mechanisms causally. By applying Pearl's do-operator, we mathematically isolate the causal effect of injecting a cultural demographic into a prompt. We conduct a large-scale empirical analysis across seven instruction-tuned models spanning diverse origins: the United States (Llama-3.1-8B, Gemma-2-9B), Europe (Mistral-7B-v0.3), the UAE (Falcon3-7B), China (Qwen2.5-7B, DeepSeek-7B), and India (Airavata-7B). Utilizing two distinct datasets (ToxiGen and BOLD), the findings reveal a disparity between observational and interventional bias, demonstrating that standard fairness metrics can overestimate demographic bias by failing to account for context toxicity. Furthermore, the causal probabilities indicate distinct alignment trends: Western models exhibit higher causal refusal rates for specific demographic groups, whereas Eastern models demonstrate low overall intervention rates with targeted sensitivities toward regional demographics. We discuss the implications of these biases, highlighting how demographic-sensitive over-triggering restricts benign discourse in downstream applications.

analysis.tldr: 通过因果分析揭示LLM安全机制中区域偏见与观测偏差的差异。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前LLM公平性评估主要依赖观测性指标，但测试数据中人口统计属性与话题毒性天然相关，导致偏见估计混杂。
analysis.problem: 如何因果地隔离人口统计属性对LLM安全机制（拒绝回答）的独立影响，并比较不同区域模型的偏见模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观测性偏见与干预性偏见存在显著差异；标准公平性指标可能高估人口统计偏见；西方模型对特定群体有更高因果拒绝率，东方模型整体干预率低但对区域人口有针对性敏感性。
analysis.method: 提出概率图模型（PGM）框架，应用Pearl的do-算子从因果角度审计LLM安全机制，隔离提示中注入文化人口统计属性的因果效应。
contributions: 引入PGM框架实现LLM安全机制的因果审计，区分观测与干预偏见。
跨7个区域模型的大规模实证分析，揭示区域对齐趋势与下游应用影响。
analysis.experiments: 在ToxiGen和BOLD两个数据集上对7个指令微调模型（Llama-3.1-8B, Gemma-2-9B, Mistral-7B-v0.3, Falcon3-7B, Qwen2.5-7B, DeepSeek-7B, Airavata-7B）进行实验。
limitations: 仅分析7个模型，可能不覆盖所有区域变体。
因果框架依赖PGM假设，实际数据可能违反某些条件。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新（因果审计）与实证发现（区域偏见差异）对LLM安全对齐领域有重要价值，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过因果分析揭示LLM安全机制中区域偏见与观测偏差的差异。

papers.title: Information Theoretic Adversarial Training of Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) remain vulnerable to adversarial prompting despite advances in alignment and safety, often exhibiting harmful behaviors under novel attack strategies. While adversarial training can improve robustness, existing approaches are computationally expensive and difficult to scale. Recent continuous adversarial training methods, such as Continuous adversarial training (CAT) and Continuous Adversarial Preference Optimization (CAPO), address this challenge by leveraging gradient-based perturbations in the embedding space, enabling more efficient and expressive attacks. Building on this paradigm, we propose WARDEN, a distributionally robust adversarial training framework for LLMs that dynamically reweights adversarial examples through an f -divergence ambiguity set around the empirical training distribution. Our method optimizes the worst-case adversarial loss within a divergence ball around the empirical data distribution, automatically emphasizing harder adversarial examples. Using the convex dual formulation, the objective reduces to a log-sum-exp form under the KL divergence, with a dynamical parameter controlling the strength of reweighting. This study leads to a new class of information-theoretic objectives that significantly reduce attack success rates while maintaining model utility. Across multiple LLMs and attack settings, WARDEN substantially reduces attack success rates with computational and utility costs comparable to CAT-, CAPO-, and MixAT-based baselines, making it a practical approach for scalable robust alignment.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于信息论对抗训练的分布鲁棒框架WARDEN，通过f-散度动态重加权对抗样本，提升LLM鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM仍易受对抗提示攻击，现有对抗训练方法计算昂贵且难以扩展，亟需高效可扩展的鲁棒对齐方法。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种计算高效且可扩展的对抗训练方法，在保持模型效用同时显著降低攻击成功率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出WARDEN框架，利用f-散度模糊集对经验训练分布进行分布鲁棒优化，通过凸对偶形式将目标简化为KL散度下的log-sum-exp形式，动态重加权困难对抗样本。
contributions: 提出基于信息论对抗训练的分布鲁棒框架WARDEN，通过f-散度动态重加权对抗样本。
推导出KL散度下log-sum-exp形式的凸对偶目标，实现自动强调困难样本。
在多个LLM和攻击设置下，WARDEN显著降低攻击成功率，且计算和效用成本与现有方法相当。
analysis.experiments: 在多个LLM和攻击设置下评估，与CAT、CAPO、MixAT等基线比较，WARDEN显著降低攻击成功率，计算和效用成本相当。
limitations: 可能依赖特定f-散度选择，泛化性需进一步验证。
动态重加权机制可能引入额外超参数调优成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分，对LLM安全对齐有重要实践价值，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于信息论对抗训练的分布鲁棒框架WARDEN，通过f-散度动态重加权对抗样本，提升LLM鲁棒性。

papers.title: From History to State: Constant-Context Skill Learning for LLM Agents
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents are increasingly used to operate browsers, files, code and tools, making personal assistants a natural deployment target. Yet personal agents face a privacy-cost-capability tension: cloud models execute multi-step workflows well but expose sensitive intermediate context to external APIs, while local models preserve privacy but remain less reliable. Both settings also pay repeatedly for long skill prompts and growing histories. We propose constant-context skill learning, a context-to-weights framework for recurring agent workflows: reusable procedures are learned in lightweight task-family modules, while inference conditions only on the current observation and a compact state block. A deterministic tracker renders this state block from task progress and supplies aligned subgoal rewards, so each module can be trained with step-level SFT and refined through online RL. Across ALFWorld, WebShop, and SciWorld, our agents achieve strong performance across Qwen3-4B, Qwen3-8B and Llama-3.1-8B. With Qwen3-8B, SFT+RL reaches 89.6\% unseen success on ALFWorld, 76.8\% success on WebShop, and 66.4\% unseen success on SciWorld. They match or exceed strong published agent-training results while reducing prompt tokens per turn by 2--7$\times$ relative to controlled ReAct prompting baselines, showing that procedural context can be moved from prompts into weights.

analysis.tldr: 提出常上下文技能学习框架，将LLM Agent的重复工作流从提示词转移到模型权重中，在多个基准上实现高效推理。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM Agent在浏览器、文件、代码和工具操作中面临隐私-成本-能力矛盾：云端模型暴露敏感上下文，本地模型可靠性不足，且长技能提示和历史记录导致重复计算。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲性能的前提下，将Agent的重复性工作流从上下文提示中剥离，转化为模型权重，从而减少推理时的token消耗并保护隐私。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出常上下文技能学习框架，通过轻量级任务族模块学习可重用流程，推理时仅依赖当前观测和紧凑状态块；确定性跟踪器从任务进度渲染状态块并提供对齐的子目标奖励，模块通过步骤级SFT和在线RL训练。
contributions: 提出常上下文技能学习框架，将Agent的重复工作流从提示词转移到模型权重，显著减少推理token。
在ALFWorld、WebShop和SciWorld上验证了方法，使用Qwen3-8B达到89.6%、76.8%和66.4%的成功率，且token消耗减少2-7倍。
analysis.experiments: 在ALFWorld、WebShop和SciWorld三个基准上评估，使用Qwen3-4B、Qwen3-8B和Llama-3.1-8B模型，SFT+RL训练后达到或超过强基线，同时token消耗显著降低。
limitations: 方法可能依赖于任务族模块的预定义，对新任务族的泛化能力未知。
确定性跟踪器的设计可能对复杂任务状态表示有局限。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且效果显著，与LLM Agent方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出常上下文技能学习框架，将LLM Agent的重复工作流从提示词转移到模型权重中，在多个基准上实现高效推理。

papers.title: Creative Robot Tool Use by Counterfactual Reasoning
papers.abstract: We propose a causal reasoning framework for creative robot tool use where a suitable tool for a task is correctly identified for use beyond its primary objectives. The proposed framework first discovers the causal relationships between the tool and the task by conducting simulated experiments in a dynamics model. We decouple the causal discovery problem into two complementary components: VLM-based feature suggestion and counterfactual tool generation via targeted geometric and physical feature perturbations. Then, novel objects are classified based on identified causal features, and the tool use skill is transferred via keypoint matching conditioned on the identified causal features. By reconstructing the task in a dynamics model, our approach grounds tool use in the physics of the problem. We illustrate our approach in reaching a distant object with different sticks, scooping candies from a bowl using diverse items, and using different boxes or crates as stepping platforms to retrieve an object from a high shelf. Our baseline comparisons show that identifying causal features and grounding them in physical tool properties leads to more reliable tool selection and stronger skill keypoint transfer.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于反事实推理的因果框架，使机器人能创造性地使用工具完成超出其原始目的的任务。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有机器人工具使用多依赖预设功能或大量演示，缺乏对工具物理因果关系的理解，难以在未见场景中灵活选择非标准工具。
analysis.problem: 如何让机器人通过因果推理识别工具的因果特征，从而在缺乏直接训练数据的情况下创造性地使用工具。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在动力学模型中进行模拟实验发现工具与任务的因果关系；利用VLM建议特征和反事实几何/物理扰动生成候选工具；基于因果特征分类新物体；通过关键点匹配迁移工具使用技能。
contributions: 提出将因果发现解耦为VLM特征建议和反事实工具生成的框架
通过动力学模型将工具使用扎根于物理规律，实现可靠工具选择和技能迁移
analysis.experiments: 在三个任务（用不同棍子够远物、用多样物品舀糖果、用箱子/板条箱作为台阶取物）中验证，基线比较表明因果特征识别和物理属性扎根带来更可靠的工具选择和更强的技能关键点迁移。
limitations: 依赖动力学模型的准确性
VLM建议可能引入偏差
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，结合因果推理与机器人操作，实验验证有效，但依赖动力学模型和VLM。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于反事实推理的因果框架，使机器人能创造性地使用工具完成超出其原始目的的任务。

papers.title: LaTA: A Drop-in, FERPA-Compliant Local-LLM Autograder for Upper-Division STEM Coursework
papers.abstract: Large-language-model (LLM) graders promise to relieve the grading burden of upper-division STEM courses, but most deployments to date send student work to third-party APIs, violating FERPA and exposing institutions to data risk while requiring substantial assignment modification. We present $\textbf{LaTA}\ (\textit{LaTeX Teaching Assistant})$, a drop-in, open-source autograder that runs entirely on commodity on-premises hardware and assumes a LaTeX-native workflow already adopted by many engineering and physics courses. LaTA implements a four-stage pipeline (ingest, segment, grade, report) using a locally hosted open-weight chain-of-thought LLM grader (gpt-oss:120b) that compares student work to an instructor-authored reference solution and applies a YAML rubric with binary per-item scoring. We deployed LaTA in Winter~2026 in ME 373 (Mechanical Engineering Methods) at Oregon State University, grading every weekly assignment for approximately 200 students on a single Mac Studio at \$0 marginal cost per assignment and 1--3 minutes of wall-clock time per submission, enabling regrading of corrected assignments and greatly expanded TA office hour offerings. The instructor-confirmed grading-error rate held at roughly $0.02$--$0.04\%$ per rubric line item across the term. Relative to the same instructor's previous traditionally-graded cohort, the LaTA-graded cohort outperformed by approximately $11\%$ on the midterm exam and $8\%$ on the final exam, and reported large gains in self-assessed confidence on every stated learning objective ($N = 159$ survey responses, $Δ\geq +1.49$ Likert points, $p < 10^{-27}$ on every comparison). We release the code under AGPLv3.

analysis.tldr: LaTA 是一个完全本地运行、符合 FERPA 规范的 LLM 自动评分系统，在工科高年级课程中实现了低成本、低错误率的高效评分，并显著提升了学生成绩与信心。
analysis.research_motivation: 高年级 STEM 课程评分负担重，现有 LLM 评分系统依赖第三方 API，违反 FERPA 并带来数据风险，且需要大量作业修改。
analysis.problem: 如何在不违反隐私法规、不依赖外部 API、不要求大幅修改作业的前提下，利用 LLM 实现高年级 STEM 课程的自动评分。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供现象分析。
analysis.method: LaTA 采用四阶段流水线（摄入、分段、评分、报告），使用本地部署的开源链式思维 LLM（gpt-oss:120b）对比学生答案与教师参考解答，并基于 YAML 格式的二元评分项进行评分。
contributions: 提出 LaTA，一个完全本地运行、符合 FERPA 规范的 LLM 自动评分系统，可直接嵌入 LaTeX 原生工作流。
在 200 名学生规模的工科课程中验证了系统有效性，评分错误率仅 0.02-0.04%，且学生成绩和自信度显著提升。
analysis.experiments: 在俄勒冈州立大学 ME 373 课程（机械工程方法）中部署，每周为约 200 名学生评分，使用单台 Mac Studio，边际成本为零，每份作业耗时 1-3 分钟。评分错误率约 0.02-0.04%。与传统人工评分相比，LaTA 评分班级期中考试成绩提高约 11%，期末考试成绩提高约 8%，学生自评信心提升显著（N=159，Δ≥+1.49 Likert 点，p<10^{-27}）。
limitations: 仅适用于 LaTeX 原生工作流的课程，限制了在其他学科或非 LaTeX 环境中的通用性。
评分依赖教师提供的参考解答和 YAML 评分项，前期准备成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法实用且验证充分，但仅适用于特定工作流，创新性中等，推荐阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LaTA 是一个完全本地运行、符合 FERPA 规范的 LLM 自动评分系统，在工科高年级课程中实现了低成本、低错误率的高效评分，并显著提升了学生成绩与信心。

papers.title: Agentic Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Financial Document Question Answering
papers.abstract: Financial document question answering (QA) demands complex multi-step numerical reasoning over heterogeneous evidence--structured tables, textual narratives, and footnotes--scattered across corporate filings. Existing retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) approaches adopt a single-pass retrieve-then-generate paradigm that struggles with the compositional reasoning chains prevalent in financial analysis. We propose FinAgent-RAG, an agentic RAG framework that orchestrates iterative retrieval-reasoning loops with self-verification, specifically engineered for the precision requirements of financial numerical reasoning. The framework integrates three domain-specific innovations: (1) a Contrastive Financial Retriever trained with hard negative mining to distinguish semantically similar but numerically distinct financial passages, (2) a Program-of-Thought reasoning module that generates executable Python code for precise arithmetic rather than relying on error-prone LLM-based mental computation, and (3) an Adaptive Strategy Router that dynamically allocates computational resources based on question complexity, reducing API costs by 41.3% on FinQA while preserving accuracy. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets--FinQA, ConvFinQA, and TAT-QA--demonstrate that FinAgent-RAG achieves 76.81%, 78.46%, and 74.96% execution accuracy respectively, outperforming the strongest baseline by 5.62--9.32 percentage points. Ablation studies, cross-backbone evaluation with four LLMs, and deployment cost analysis confirm the framework's robustness and practical viability for financial institutions.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种面向金融文档问答的智能体检索增强生成框架，通过迭代检索-推理循环和自验证机制显著提升数值推理精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 金融文档问答需要跨异构证据（表格、文本、脚注）进行多步数值推理，现有单次检索-生成范式难以处理金融分析中常见的组合推理链。
analysis.problem: 解决现有RAG方法在金融数值推理中无法有效处理多步组合推理和数值精度的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出FinAgent-RAG框架，包含三个创新：对比金融检索器（硬负样本挖掘）、程序化思维推理模块（生成可执行Python代码）、自适应策略路由器（根据问题复杂度动态分配计算资源）。
contributions: 提出首个面向金融文档问答的智能体RAG框架，集成迭代检索-推理循环与自验证。
设计对比金融检索器、程序化思维推理模块和自适应策略路由器三个领域特定创新。
在三个基准数据集上取得SOTA，并展示显著的成本降低（API成本降低41.3%）。
analysis.experiments: 在FinQA、ConvFinQA和TAT-QA三个基准数据集上评估，执行准确率分别达76.81%、78.46%和74.96%，超过最强基线5.62-9.32个百分点；还进行了消融研究、跨骨干网络评估和部署成本分析。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的训练数据（如硬负样本）。
自适应路由策略的泛化性可能受限于问题复杂度分布。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且效果显著，与金融领域应用高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种面向金融文档问答的智能体检索增强生成框架，通过迭代检索-推理循环和自验证机制显著提升数值推理精度。

papers.title: PRISM: Perception Reasoning Interleaved for Sequential Decision Making
papers.abstract: Scaling LLM-based embodied agents from text-only environments to complex multimodal settings remains a major challenge. Recent work identifies a perception-reasoning-decision gap in standalone Vision-Language Models (VLMs), which often overlook task-critical information. In this paper, we introduce PRISM, a framework that tightly couples perception (VLM) and decision (LLM) through a dynamic question-answer (DQA) pipeline. Instead of passively accepting the VLM's description, the LLM critiques it, probes the VLM with goal-oriented questions, and synthesizes a compact image description. This closed-loop interaction yields a sharp, task-driven understanding of the scene. We evaluate PRISM on the ALFWorld and Room-to-Room (R2R) benchmarks. We show that: (1) PRISM significantly outperforms state-of-the-art image-based models, (2) our Interactive goal-oriented perception pipeline yields systematic and substantial gains, and (3) PRISM is fully automatic, eliminating the need for handcrafted questions or answers.

analysis.tldr: PRISM通过VLM与LLM的动态问答闭环，提升具身智能体在复杂多模态环境中的感知与决策能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM具身智能体从纯文本环境扩展到多模态环境时，存在感知-推理-决策鸿沟，独立VLM常忽略任务关键信息，导致决策失误。
analysis.problem: 如何让VLM与LLM紧密协作，生成任务驱动的紧凑场景描述，以提升多模态顺序决策的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出独立VLM存在感知-推理-决策鸿沟，常忽略任务关键信息，导致描述不精准。
analysis.method: 提出PRISM框架，通过动态问答管道（DQA）让LLM主动批判VLM描述、提出目标导向问题，并综合生成紧凑图像描述，形成闭环交互。
contributions: 提出PRISM框架，实现VLM与LLM的紧密耦合，通过动态问答提升感知准确性。
在ALFWorld和R2R基准上显著超越现有图像模型，且无需手工设计问答。
analysis.experiments: 在ALFWorld和Room-to-Room (R2R)基准上评估，结果显示PRISM显著优于最先进的图像模型，且交互式感知管道带来系统性提升。
limitations: 可能依赖VLM和LLM的基座模型能力，泛化性未充分讨论。
动态问答可能增加推理延迟，摘要未提及效率分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，在具身智能关键任务上取得显著提升，且与VLA方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PRISM通过VLM与LLM的动态问答闭环，提升具身智能体在复杂多模态环境中的感知与决策能力。

papers.title: Zero-Shot Satellite Image Retrieval through Joint Embeddings: Application to Crisis Response
papers.abstract: Semantic search of Earth observation archives remains challenging. Visual foundation models such as CLAY produce rich embeddings of satellite imagery but lack the natural-language grounding needed for intuitive query, and full contrastive training of a remote-sensing CLIP-style model requires paired data and compute that are unavailable at global scale. To allow natural language querying at global scales, we present GeoQuery, a zero-shot retrieval system that sidesteps data and compute constraints through a two-stage semantic and visual search, leveraging a natural language embedding of a subset (proxy) of global data. Rather than training a joint encoder, we generate language descriptions for a 100k proxy subset of global Sentinel-2 tiles and optimise the description-generation prompt so that distances in the resulting text-embedding space correlate with distances in the frozen CLAY visual-embedding space. Queries are resolved in two stages, with a text-similarity search over the proxy subset followed by a visual nearest-neighbour search over worldwide CLAY embeddings On 76 disaster-location queries covering UK floods, US wildfires, and US droughts, GeoQuery achieves 31.6\% accuracy within 50\,km, with the strongest performance on floods (50\% within 50\,km) where terrain features are well captured by RGB embeddings. Deployed within a crisis response system called \ECHO{}, GeoQuery identified vulnerable areas during Brisbane's 2025 Cyclone Alfred, with downstream flood simulations reproducing historical patterns. Prompt-aligned proxies offer a practical bridge between EO foundation models and operational retrieval when full contrastive training is out of reach.

analysis.tldr: GeoQuery通过两阶段语义-视觉搜索实现零样本卫星图像检索，在灾害响应中验证有效性。
analysis.research_motivation: 地球观测档案的语义搜索仍具挑战，现有视觉基础模型缺乏自然语言对齐，而全对比训练需要全球范围内不可获取的配对数据和计算资源。
analysis.problem: 如何在缺乏大规模配对数据和计算资源的情况下，实现全球尺度的自然语言卫星图像检索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: GeoQuery：使用冻结的CLAY视觉嵌入和文本嵌入，通过优化描述生成提示使文本嵌入空间与视觉嵌入空间对齐；两阶段检索：先对代理子集进行文本相似度搜索，再在全球CLAY嵌入中进行视觉最近邻搜索。
contributions: 提出GeoQuery零样本检索系统，无需配对数据或联合训练即可实现自然语言查询。
在76个灾害位置查询上达到31.6%的50公里内准确率，洪水场景达50%。
在真实危机响应系统ECHO中部署，成功识别2025年布里斯班气旋阿尔弗雷德期间的脆弱区域。
analysis.experiments: 在76个灾害位置查询（英国洪水、美国野火和干旱）上评估，GeoQuery达到31.6%的50公里内准确率，洪水场景表现最佳（50%）。下游洪水模拟复现历史模式。
limitations: 代理子集规模（100k）可能限制覆盖范围。
依赖CLAY嵌入质量，可能对非RGB特征（如干旱）表现较弱。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实用，在灾害响应中验证，但技术细节有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GeoQuery通过两阶段语义-视觉搜索实现零样本卫星图像检索，在灾害响应中验证有效性。

papers.title: When Helpfulness Becomes Sycophancy: Sycophancy is a Boundary Failure Between Social Alignment and Epistemic Integrity in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: This position paper argues that sycophancy in LLMs is a boundary failure between social alignment and epistemic integrity. Existing work often operationalizes sycophancy through external behavior such as agreement with incorrect user beliefs, position reversals, or deviation from an objective standard of correctness. These formulations capture only overt forms of the phenomenon and leave subtler boundary failures involving epistemic integrity and social alignment underspecified. We argue that sycophancy should not be understood as agreement alone, but as alignment behavior that displaces independent epistemic judgment. To clarify this boundary, we propose a three-condition framework for sycophancy. First, the user expresses a cue in the form of a belief, preference, or self-concept. Second, the model shifts toward that cue through alignment behavior. Third, this shift compromises epistemic accuracy, independent reasoning, or appropriate correction. We also introduce a taxonomy for classifying sycophancy, consisting of alignment targets, mechanisms, and severity. The paper concludes by discussing implications for alignment evaluation and argues for boundary-aware assessment, structured rubrics, and mitigation strategies, while situating these proposals alongside alternative views of sycophancy.

analysis.tldr: 本文提出谄媚是LLM中社会对齐与认知完整性之间的边界失效，并给出三条件框架与分类法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有工作将谄媚简化为外部行为（如同意错误信念），忽略了涉及认知完整性与社会对齐的微妙边界失效，导致评估与缓解策略不完善。

引入包含对齐目标、机制和严重程度的分类法。
讨论对齐评估、结构化评分和缓解策略的启示。

papers.title: Intelligent CCTV for Urban Design: AI-Based Analysis of Soft Infrastructure at Intersections
papers.abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) and computer vision are transforming transportation data collection. This study introduces an AI-enabled analytics framework leveraging existing CCTV infrastructure to evaluate the impact of soft interventions, such as temporary pedestrian refuges and curb extensions, on vehicle speed and safety. Using deep learning and perspective-based speed estimation, we evaluated driver behavior before and after interventions, with repeated post-installation monitoring in Week 1 and Week 2, in Minneapolis. Findings reveal that at unsignalized intersections, mean and 85th-percentile speeds fell by up to 18.75% and 16.56%, respectively, while pass-through traffic decreased by as much as 12.2%. Signalized intersections showed comparable reductions except one location, with mean and 85th-percentile speeds dropping by up to 20.0% and 17.19%. These results demonstrate the traffic-calming effectiveness of soft infrastructure and underscore the utility of AI-powered methods for rapid, low-cost, and evidence-based transport policy evaluation.

analysis.tldr: 利用现有监控摄像头和深度学习进行城市交通软基础设施效果评估。

papers.title: Mise en Place for Agentic Coding: Deliberate Preparation as Context Engineering Methodology
papers.abstract: The rapid adoption of AI coding agents has produced a dominant workflow pattern -- often called "vibe coding" -- that prioritizes speed of implementation over deliberate preparation. We argue that this approach creates a systematic alignment problem: agents that lack sufficient context produce code requiring extensive debugging and refactoring, consuming substantial development time. Drawing on the culinary concept of mise en place (everything in its place; abbreviated MEP), we propose a three-phase preparation methodology for agentic coding: (1) contextual grounding, where domain expertise and tacit knowledge are externalized into structured documents; (2) collaborative specification, where human-agent dialogue produces detailed design artifacts; and (3) task decomposition, where specifications are converted into structured, dependency-aware task records. We report on the application of MEP during a competitive hackathon, where roughly two hours of preparation enabled a rapid parallel implementation of a full-stack educational platform by concurrent AI agents. We introduce the concept of context fluency as an emerging developer skill -- the ability to create rich, structured context that agents can act on -- and connect it to established frameworks in backward design and tacit knowledge externalization. We conclude with a research agenda for empirically validating preparation-phase methodologies in AI-assisted software development.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种名为Mise en Place的AI编码代理准备方法论，通过结构化上下文工程提升代码质量与开发效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前AI编码代理的主流工作流（如“vibe coding”）优先速度而非准备，导致代理因缺乏上下文而产生大量需要调试和重构的代码，消耗大量开发时间。
analysis.problem: AI编码代理因缺乏充分上下文而产生系统性对齐问题，导致代码质量低下和开发效率损失。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出“vibe coding”模式优先速度而非准备，导致代理产生需要大量调试和重构的代码，形成系统性对齐问题。
analysis.method: 提出三阶段准备方法论：上下文扎根（将领域知识和隐性知识外化为结构化文档）、协作规范（人机对话生成详细设计工件）、任务分解（将规范转换为结构化、依赖感知的任务记录）。
contributions: 提出Mise en Place (MEP)方法论，为AI编码代理提供系统性的上下文工程准备流程。
引入“上下文流畅性”概念，作为开发者创建丰富结构化上下文的新兴技能。
通过黑客马拉松应用案例展示MEP方法的有效性：约2小时准备即可实现并行AI代理快速开发全栈教育平台。
analysis.experiments: 在竞争性黑客马拉松中应用MEP方法，约2小时准备后，并行AI代理快速实现了全栈教育平台。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅在一个黑客马拉松场景中应用，缺乏大规模或多样化项目的实证验证。
未提供定量比较（如与vibe coding在代码质量、开发时间上的对比）。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种名为Mise en Place的AI编码代理准备方法论，通过结构化上下文工程提升代码质量与开发效率。

papers.title: Generating Query-Focused Summarization Datasets from Query-Free Summarization Datasets
papers.abstract: Large-scale datasets are widely used to perform summarization tasks, but they may not include queries alongside documents and summaries. In the search for suitable datasets for Query-Focused Summarization (QFS), we identify two research questions: Is it possible to automatically generate evidence-based query keywords from query-free datasets? Does evidence-based query generation support the QFS task? This paper proposes an evidence-based model to generate queries from query-free datasets. To evaluate our model intrinsically, we compare the similarity between the original queries and the system-generated queries of two QFS datasets. We also perform summarization tasks using different pre-trained models, as well as a state-of-the-art (SOTA) QFS model, to measure the extrinsic performance of our query generation approach. Experimental results indicate that summaries generated using evidence-based queries achieve competitive ROUGE scores compared to those generated from the original queries.

analysis.tldr: 提出从无查询摘要数据集中自动生成基于证据的查询关键词，用于查询聚焦摘要任务。

papers.title: LAMP: Localization Aware Multi-camera People Tracking in Metric 3D World
papers.abstract: Tracking 3D human motion from egocentric multi-camera headset is challenged by severe egomotion, partial visibility or occlusions and lack of training data. Existing methods designed for monocular video often require static or slowly-moving cameras and cannot efficiently leverage multi-view, calibrated and localized input. This makes them brittle and prone to fail on dynamic egocentric captures. We propose LAMP (Localization Aware Multi-camera People Tracking): a novel, simple framework to solve this via early disentanglement of observer and target motion. LAMP introduces a two-step process. First, we leverage the known device 6 DoF motion and calibration to convert detected 2D body keypoints from all cameras over a temporal window into a unified 3D world reference frame. Second, an end-to-end-trained spatio-temporal transformer fits 3D human motion directly to this 3D ray cloud. This "lift-then-fit" approach allows LAMP to learn and leverage a natural human motion prior in the world-space, as well as providing an elegant framework to flexibly incorporate information from multiple temporally asynchronous, partially observing and moving cameras. LAMP achieves state-of-the-art results on monocular benchmarks, while significantly outperforming baselines for our targeted egocentric setting.

analysis.tldr: 提出LAMP框架，通过解耦观察者与目标运动，利用多相机6DoF信息实现3D人体跟踪。

analysis.problem: 如何从自中心多相机头戴设备中鲁棒地跟踪3D人体运动。

contributions: 提出LAMP框架，通过早期解耦观察者与目标运动实现鲁棒3D人体跟踪。

papers.title: Two-Stage Learned Decomposition for Scalable Routing on Multigraphs
papers.abstract: Most neural methods for Vehicle Routing Problems (VRPs) are limited to Euclidean settings or simple graphs. In this work, we instead consider multigraphs, where parallel edges represent distinct travel options with varying trade-offs (e.g., distance vs time). Few methods are designed for such formulations and those that do exist face major scalability issues. We mitigate these scalability issues via a Node-Edge Policy Factorization (NEPF) approach, which splits the routing policy into a node permutation stage and an edge selection stage. To enable the decomposition, we introduce a pre-encoding edge aggregation scheme and a non-autoregressive architecture for the edge stage, as well as a hierarchical reinforcement learning method to train the stages jointly. Our experiments across six VRP variants demonstrate that NEPF matches or outperforms the state-of-the-art in terms of solution quality, while being significantly faster in training and inference.

analysis.tldr: 提出节点-边策略分解（NEPF）方法，将多图路由策略分解为节点排列和边选择两阶段，显著提升可扩展性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有神经方法多限于欧几里得或简单图，难以处理多图中平行边带来的复杂权衡，且已有方法可扩展性差。
analysis.problem: 多图车辆路径问题中，如何设计可扩展的神经路由策略以处理平行边选择。

引入预编码边聚合和非自回归架构，实现高效边选择。

papers.title: BALAR : A Bayesian Agentic Loop for Active Reasoning
papers.abstract: Large language models increasingly operate in interactive settings where solving a task requires multiple rounds of information exchange with a user. However, most current systems treat dialogue reactively and lack a principled mechanism to reason about what information is missing and which question should be asked next. We propose BALAR (Bayesian Agentic Loop for Active Reasoning), a task-agnostic outer-loop algorithm that requires no fine-tuning and enables structured multi-turn interaction between an LLM agent and a user. BALAR maintains a structured belief over latent states, selects clarifying questions by maximizing expected mutual information, and dynamically expands its state representation when the current one proves insufficient. We evaluate BALAR on three diverse benchmarks: AR-Bench-DC (detective cases), AR-Bench-SP (thinking puzzles), and iCraft-MD (clinical diagnosis). BALAR significantly outperforms all baselines across all three benchmarks, with $14.6\%$ higher accuracy on AR-Bench-DC, $38.5\%$ on AR-Bench-SP, and $30.5\%$ on iCraft-MD.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需微调的贝叶斯主动推理循环，通过最大化期望互信息选择问题，显著提升多轮交互任务准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前LLM在多轮交互中缺乏主动推理能力，无法有效识别缺失信息并决定下一步提问，导致对话效率低、准确性差。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM在无需微调的情况下，主动推理缺失信息并选择最优问题，以提升多轮交互任务性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: BALAR算法：维护潜在状态的贝叶斯信念，通过最大化期望互信息选择澄清问题，并在当前状态表示不足时动态扩展。
contributions: 提出一种任务无关的主动推理外循环算法BALAR，无需微调即可增强LLM的多轮交互能力。
在三个不同基准上（侦探推理、思维谜题、临床诊断）显著优于所有基线，准确率提升14.6%至38.5%。
analysis.experiments: 在AR-Bench-DC、AR-Bench-SP和iCraft-MD三个基准上评估，BALAR准确率分别提升14.6%、38.5%和30.5%。
limitations: 可能依赖初始信念表示的质量。
未讨论计算开销或实时性。

papers.title: Visual Text Compression as Measure Transport
papers.abstract: Visual text compression (VTC) promises efficient long-context processing by rendering text into an image and re-encoding it with a vision-language model, often producing $3$--$20\times$ fewer decoder tokens than subword tokenization. Yet token savings do not translate predictably into downstream utility: on some tasks the visual path matches or exceeds the text path, on others it collapses, and the compression ratio itself does not predict which regime will occur. The missing quantity is therefore not another summary of efficiency, but a principled measure of task-relevant information loss induced by visual encoding. We address this problem by formulating VTC in the language of measure transport. Treating text and visual tokens as empirical probability measures, we show that the ViT patch encoder induces a push-forward map whose transport cost decomposes into a precision cost from within-patch aggregation and a coverage cost from cross-patch fragmentation. Both terms are estimable from downstream-label-free probes. This formulation yields two operational consequences: a downstream-label-free routing criterion that selects whether to use the visual path for a given input or benchmark instance, and a transport-informed foveation mechanism that re-encodes high-cost regions at higher resolution. Across $24$ NLP datasets at Qwen3-4B, our label-free rule matches the per-dataset oracle on $17/24$ datasets ($70.8\%$), and improves the average task score by $+3.3\%$ with $-10.3\%$ average tokens relative to a pure-LLM.

analysis.tldr: 将视觉文本压缩建模为测度传输，提出无标签路由准则和聚焦机制，在24个NLP数据集上匹配70.8%的oracle选择并提升平均任务分数3.3%。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉文本压缩（VTC）虽能大幅减少解码器token数，但压缩比无法预测下游任务性能，缺乏衡量视觉编码信息损失的原则性方法。
analysis.problem: 如何量化视觉文本压缩中任务相关信息的损失，并据此决定何时使用视觉路径以及如何改进编码。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 视觉路径在某些任务上表现优异，在另一些任务上则崩溃，且压缩比本身无法预测这种差异。
analysis.method: 将文本和视觉token视为经验概率测度，ViT补丁编码器诱导推前映射，其传输代价分解为补丁内聚合的精度代价和跨补丁碎片化的覆盖代价，两者均可无标签估计；据此提出无标签路由准则和传输引导的聚焦机制。
contributions: 将视觉文本压缩形式化为测度传输问题，并分解出精度代价和覆盖代价。
提出无标签路由准则，在24个NLP数据集上匹配70.8%的oracle选择。
提出传输引导的聚焦机制，通过重新编码高代价区域提升性能。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen3-4B模型上对24个NLP数据集进行实验，无标签路由准则匹配17/24数据集的oracle选择（70.8%），平均任务分数提升+3.3%，平均token减少-10.3%。
limitations: 仅验证了Qwen3-4B一个模型，泛化性未知。
聚焦机制的具体实现细节和计算开销未在摘要中说明。
