analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将视觉文本压缩建模为测度传输，提出无标签路由准则和聚焦机制，在24个NLP数据集上匹配70.8%的oracle选择并提升平均任务分数3.3%。

papers.title: Partial Evidence Bench: Benchmarking Authorization-Limited Evidence in Agentic Systems
papers.abstract: Enterprise agents increasingly operate inside scoped retrieval systems, delegated workflows, and policy-constrained evidence environments. In these settings, access control can be enforced correctly while the system still produces an answer that appears complete even though material evidence lies outside the caller's authorization boundary. This paper introduces Partial Evidence Bench, a deterministic benchmark for measuring that failure mode. The benchmark ships three scenario families -- due diligence, compliance audit, and security incident response -- with 72 tasks total, ACL-partitioned corpora, oracle complete answers, oracle authorized-view answers, oracle completeness judgments, and structured gap-report oracles. It evaluates systems along four surfaces: answer correctness, completeness awareness, gap-report quality, and unsafe completeness behavior. Checked-in baselines show that silent filtering is catastrophically unsafe across all shipped families, while explicit fail-and-report behavior eliminates unsafe completeness without collapsing the task into trivial abstention. Preliminary real-model runs show model-dependent and scenario-sensitive differences in whether systems overclaim completeness, conservatively underclaim, or report incompleteness in an enterprise-usable form. The benchmark's broader contribution is to make a governance-critical agent failure measurable without human judges or contamination-prone static corpora.

analysis.tldr: 提出Partial Evidence Bench基准，用于衡量智能体系统在授权受限证据环境下的失败模式。
analysis.research_motivation: 企业智能体在受限检索和策略约束环境中运行时，即使访问控制正确，仍可能因隐藏未授权证据而给出看似完整实则不完整的答案，这种失败模式缺乏系统评测。
analysis.problem: 如何量化评估智能体系统在授权边界外存在证据时，是否产生不完整答案、是否意识到不完整、以及能否报告证据缺口。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出静默过滤（silent filtering）在所有场景族中灾难性地不安全，而显式失败并报告行为可消除不安全完整性，但不会导致任务退化为简单弃权。
analysis.method: 构建包含尽职调查、合规审计、安全事件响应三个场景族共72个任务的确定性基准，提供ACL分区语料、完整答案、授权视图答案、完整性判断和结构化缺口报告标准答案，从答案正确性、完整性意识、缺口报告质量和危险完整性行为四个维度评估。
contributions: 提出Partial Evidence Bench基准，系统衡量智能体在授权受限证据下的失败模式。
通过基线实验揭示静默过滤的灾难性风险，并验证显式失败报告策略的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到检查基线（checked-in baselines）和初步真实模型运行（preliminary real-model runs），显示模型依赖和场景敏感差异，但未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 基准任务数量有限（72个），可能无法覆盖所有企业场景。
未提供真实模型运行的详细性能数据，实用性有待进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 针对智能体授权证据缺失这一重要但未被充分研究的失败模式，提供了确定性基准和初步分析，具有较高新颖性和应用价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Partial Evidence Bench基准，用于衡量智能体系统在授权受限证据环境下的失败模式。

papers.title: Two Steps Are All You Need: Efficient 3D Point Cloud Anomaly Detection with Consistency Models
papers.abstract: Diffusion models are rapidly redefining 3D anomaly detection in point cloud data. As 3D sensing becomes integral to modern manufacturing, reliable anomaly detection is essential for high-throughput quality assurance and process control. Yet practical deployment on resource-constrained, latency-critical systems remains limited. Existing methods are often computationally prohibitive or unreliable in complex, unmasked regions, and diffusion pipelines are inherently bottlenecked by iterative denoising. In this work, we address this bottleneck by reformulating reconstructionbased anomaly detection through consistency learning, enabling direct prediction of anomaly-free geometry in one or two network evaluations. We further introduce a novel hybrid loss formulation that explicitly enforces reconstruction toward clean data. This design substantially reduces inference cost, achieving up to 80x faster runtime than the current state-of-the-art method, without GPU acceleration, while preserving strong detection performance. It outperforms R3D-AD on Anomaly-ShapeNet with 76.20% I-AUROC and remains competitive on Real3DAD with 72.80% I-AUROC, enabling efficient, low-latency anomaly detection on resource-constrained platforms, including drones, smart industrial cameras, and other edge devices.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于一致性模型的3D点云异常检测方法，仅需1-2步推理即可实现高效检测，速度提升80倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D点云异常检测在工业质检中至关重要，但现有扩散模型方法计算成本高、推理延迟大，难以部署在资源受限的边缘设备上。

analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

contributions: 提出基于一致性模型的3D点云异常检测框架，大幅降低推理成本。
设计混合损失函数提升重建质量，在多个基准上取得竞争性能。
analysis.experiments: 在Anomaly-ShapeNet上I-AUROC达76.20%，在Real3DAD上达72.80%，推理速度比当前最优方法快80倍（无需GPU加速）。

papers.title: SPADE: Faster Drug Discovery by Learning from Sparse Data
papers.abstract: Drug discovery seeks molecules (ligands) that bind strongly and selectively to a target protein. However, fewer than 5% of candidate ligands pass the bar for even the early stages of drug discovery. Furthermore, we want methods that work for novel proteins for which we have no prior data. Starting from scratch, we have to iteratively select and test candidate ligands such that we find enough ligands of the desired quality in as few tests as possible. Our proposed algorithm, named SPADE, introduces a novel approach to ligand selection that requires only 40 tests on average to find 10 high-quality ligands. In one-vs-one comparisons, SPADE outperforms deep learning and Bayesian optimization methods on more proteins, achieving median improvements of 7%-32% in sample efficiency. SPADE is also 10x faster than its closest competitor at scoring candidate drugs. Dataset and code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/SPADE_Fast_Drug_Discovery_by_Learning_from_Sparse_Data-F028/README.md

analysis.tldr: SPADE算法仅需40次测试即可找到10个高质量候选药物，样本效率优于深度学习和贝叶斯优化方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 药物发现中候选配体通过率极低（<5%），且对无先验数据的新蛋白需要高效迭代筛选，现有方法样本效率不足。
analysis.problem: 如何从稀疏数据中高效选择高质量配体，以最少测试次数找到足够数量的候选药物。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SPADE算法，一种基于稀疏数据学习的配体选择新方法。

在样本效率上中位数提升7%-32%，且评分速度比最接近的竞争者快10倍。
analysis.experiments: 在多个蛋白质上进行了对比实验，SPADE在样本效率上优于深度学习和贝叶斯优化方法。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的蛋白质-配体相互作用。

papers.title: Towards an Inferentialist Account of Information Through Proof-theoretic Semantics
papers.abstract: Information is one of the most widely-discussed concepts of the current era. However, a great deal of insightful work notwithstanding, it is yet to be given wholly convincing logical or mathematical foundations. Without them, we lack adequate reasoning tools for understanding the complex ecosystems of systems upon which the society depends. We seek to rectify this by taking a first step towards developing an inferentialist semantic theory of information. There are three key interacting components. First, conceptual analysis: the metaphysics of information. Dretske expressed the key concepts of information in terms of intentionality, truth, and transmissibility. We replace truth with inferability, and trace the consequences of this replacement. Second, logic: proof-theoretic semantics (P-tS) provides a mathematical-logical realization of inferentialist reasoning. Using P-tS, we develop the first steps towards a mathematical-logical theory of an inferentialist primitive unit of information, the 'inferon'. This proof-theoretic approach counterpoints the model-theoretic view of information articulated in situation theory. Furthermore, we argue that it facilitates addressing all three components of van Benthem and Martinez's categorization of the understandings of information, as range, as correlation, and as code. Our focus is on information-as-correlation. Third, systems: the P-tS tools we develop provide the basis for a mathematical account of distributed systems modelling -- a key tool from informatics for understanding the organization of information processing systems. This yields a reasoning-based theory of information flow in models of distributed systems. Overall, we seek to give a conceptually rigorous mathematical-logical account of information and its role within informatics, grounded in inference and reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 基于证明论语义学，提出一种推理主义的信息理论，以‘inferon’为基本单位，为信息提供逻辑数学基础。
analysis.research_motivation: 信息概念虽被广泛讨论，但缺乏令人信服的逻辑或数学基础，导致我们缺乏理解复杂信息处理系统的推理工具。

analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合概念分析（用可推理性替代真值）、证明论语义学（定义信息基本单元‘inferon’）和分布式系统建模，构建基于推理的信息流理论。
contributions: 提出推理主义信息理论，用可推理性替代真值作为信息核心属性。
利用证明论语义学定义‘inferon’作为信息基本单元，为信息流提供数学逻辑基础。

papers.title: Tamaththul3D: High-Fidelity 3D Saudi Sign Language Avatars from Monocular Video
papers.abstract: Arabic Sign Language (ArSL) and its dialects serve approximately 400 million Arabic speakers worldwide, yet the community lacks high-quality 3D parametric annotations and specialized reconstruction methods for avatar generation. We address this critical gap through two key contributions: First, we introduce the first high-quality 3D parametric annotations for the Ishara-500 Saudi Sign Language dataset, providing precise SMPL-X parameters for 500 culturally authentic SSL signs. Second, we present Tamaththul3D, a specialized reconstruction pipeline designed for ArSL's unique articulation patterns. Our pipeline integrates SMPLer-X for robust body estimation, WiLoR for detailed hand refinement with automatic localization and mirroring, and MediaPipe for 2D pose supervision. Through kinematic-chain-based wrist alignment with hybrid swing-twist decomposition and 2D-supervised joint optimization, Tamaththul3D achieves state-of-the-art hand accuracy (up to 32% improvement over previous methods) while maintaining competitive body pose. Together, these 3D annotations and Tamaththul3D pipeline establish the first comprehensive framework for high-fidelity ArSL avatar reconstruction, enabling new accessibility technologies and cultural preservation efforts for the Arab Deaf community.

analysis.tldr: 首个高质量沙特手语3D参数化标注与重建管线，实现高保真虚拟人生成。

papers.title: ZAYA1-8B Technical Report
papers.abstract: We present ZAYA1-8B, a reasoning-focused mixture-of-experts (MoE) model with 700M active and 8B total parameters, built on Zyphra's MoE++ architecture. ZAYA1-8B's core pretraining, midtraining, and supervised fine-tuning (SFT) were performed on a full-stack AMD compute, networking, and software platform. With under 1B active parameters, ZAYA1-8B matches or exceeds DeepSeek-R1-0528 on several challenging mathematics and coding benchmarks, and remains competitive with substantially larger open-weight reasoning models. ZAYA1-8B was trained from scratch for reasoning, with reasoning data included from pretraining onward using an answer-preserving trimming scheme. Post-training uses a four-stage RL cascade: reasoning warmup on math and puzzles; a 400-task RLVE-Gym curriculum; math and code RL with test-time compute traces and synthetic code environments built from competitive-programming references; and behavioral RL for chat and instruction following. We also introduce Markovian RSA, a test-time compute method that recursively aggregates parallel reasoning traces while carrying forward only bounded-length reasoning tails between rounds. In TTC evaluation, Markovian RSA raises ZAYA1-8B to 91.9\% on AIME'25 and 89.6\% on HMMT'25 while carrying forward only a 4K-token tail, narrowing the gap to much larger reasoning models including Gemini-2.5 Pro, DeepSeek-V3.2, and GPT-5-High.

analysis.tldr: ZAYA1-8B是一个基于MoE++架构的推理聚焦模型，仅700M活跃参数即可在数学和编码基准上匹配或超越DeepSeek-R1-0528，并引入Markovian RSA测试时计算方法提升推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前推理模型通常需要大量参数和计算资源，如何在保持较小活跃参数量的同时实现强推理能力是一个重要挑战。
analysis.problem: 设计并训练一个参数高效、推理能力强的混合专家模型，并在全AMD计算平台上实现从预训练到后训练的全流程。

analysis.method: 采用MoE++架构，从预训练开始融入推理数据并使用答案保留修剪方案；后训练采用四阶段RL级联（推理热身、RLVE-Gym课程、数学/代码RL、行为RL）；提出Markovian RSA测试时计算方法，递归聚合并行推理轨迹并仅保留有限长度尾部。

analysis.experiments: 在AIME'25和HMMT'25等数学基准上评估，ZAYA1-8B结合Markovian RSA达到91.9%和89.6%的准确率。

papers.title: COPYCOP: Ownership Verification for Graph Neural Networks
papers.abstract: Given two GNNs that output node embeddings, how can we determine if they were trained independently? An adversary could have trained one GNN specifically to mimic the other GNN's embeddings. To obscure this relationship between the GNNs, the adversarial GNN might then transform its output embeddings. The two GNNs could have different architectures, weights, and embedding dimensions, and the adversary can transform the embeddings. Despite these stringent conditions, our algorithm (named CopyCop) can identify such copycat GNNs, unlike existing watermarking and fingerprinting methods. We also provide theoretical guarantees for CopyCop. Finally, experiments on 14 datasets and 5 GNN architectures demonstrate that CopyCop is accurate and robust against a broad class of adversarial attacks and transformations. Code is available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/CopyCop-Graph-Ownership-Verification-8143/README.md

analysis.tldr: 提出CopyCop算法，用于检测图神经网络是否被复制，即使攻击者变换输出嵌入也能识别。
analysis.research_motivation: 图神经网络（GNN）的模型窃取问题日益严重，现有水印和指纹方法无法在攻击者变换嵌入、使用不同架构等条件下有效检测复制模型。
analysis.problem: 如何判断两个GNN是否独立训练，还是其中一个刻意模仿另一个的输出嵌入，即使攻击者变换嵌入且模型架构、权重、嵌入维度不同。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CopyCop算法，通过分析节点嵌入的统计特性或关系来识别复制关系，并提供理论保证。
contributions: 提出CopyCop算法，能在攻击者变换嵌入、不同架构等条件下检测GNN复制模型。
提供理论保证，并在14个数据集和5种GNN架构上验证了准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在14个数据集和5种GNN架构上实验，表明CopyCop准确且能抵抗多种对抗攻击和变换。
limitations: 可能依赖特定嵌入统计假设，对极端变换的鲁棒性需进一步验证。

papers.title: Balancing Stability and Plasticity in Sequentially Trained Early-Exiting Neural Networks
papers.abstract: Early-exiting neural networks enable adaptive inference by allowing inputs to exit at intermediate classifiers, reducing computation for easy samples while maintaining high accuracy. In practice, exits can be trained sequentially by incrementally adding them to a shared backbone; however, this sequential training can cause newly introduced exits to interfere with previously learned ones, degrading the performance of earlier classifiers. We address this problem by retaining the knowledge embedded in existing exits while allowing new ones to specialize. We propose two alternative approaches that operate at different levels of the model. The first constrains learning by protecting parameters that are important for previously trained exits, while the second preserves the output distributions of earlier exits as the network adapts. These alternatives directly reflect the stability-plasticity trade-off studied in continual learning. Accordingly, we leverage \textit{Elastic Weight Consolidation} to constrain critical weights and \textit{Learning without Forgetting} to preserve output distributions. Experiments on standard benchmarks show that our approaches consistently improve early-exit performance, achieving higher accuracy over existing sequential training methods and significant performance speedups at low computational budgets.

analysis.tldr: 提出两种基于持续学习的方法（EWC和LwF）来缓解顺序训练早期退出神经网络中新旧分类器之间的干扰，提升早期退出性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 早期退出神经网络通过顺序训练添加分类器时，新分类器会干扰已学习的分类器，导致早期分类器性能下降，需要解决稳定性与可塑性的权衡问题。
analysis.problem: 顺序训练早期退出神经网络中新引入的分类器干扰先前学习的分类器，导致早期分类器性能退化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 顺序训练新退出节点会干扰先前学习的退出节点，降低早期分类器的准确率，体现了持续学习中的稳定性-可塑性权衡。
analysis.method: 提出两种方法：1）基于弹性权重巩固（EWC）保护对先前退出重要的参数；2）基于不遗忘学习（LwF）保留先前退出的输出分布。
contributions: 首次将持续学习中的稳定性-可塑性权衡引入早期退出神经网络的顺序训练问题
提出两种分别基于参数约束和输出分布保留的方法，有效缓解新退出对旧退出的干扰
analysis.experiments: 在标准基准上，所提方法一致提升了早期退出性能，相比现有顺序训练方法获得更高准确率，并在低计算预算下实现显著加速。
limitations: 可能增加训练复杂度或内存开销
未在更大规模或更复杂模型上验证
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出两种基于持续学习的方法（EWC和LwF）来缓解顺序训练早期退出神经网络中新旧分类器之间的干扰，提升早期退出性能。

papers.title: Counterargument for Critical Thinking as Judged by AI and Humans
papers.abstract: This intervention study investigates the use of counterarguments in writing for critical thinking by students in the context of Generative AI (GenAI). This is especially as risks of cheating and cognitive offloading exist with the use of GenAI. We presented 36 students in a particular university course with 4 carefully selected thesis statements (from a set of popular debates) to write about anyone of them. We used six established rubrics (focus, logic, content, style, correctness and reference) to conduct three human assessments (two student peer-reviews and one experienced teacher) per writeup on a 5-point Likert scale for all the qualified samples (n) of 35 submissions (after disqualifying one for irregularity). Using the same rubrics and guidelines, we also assessed the submissions using six frontier LLMs as judges. Our mixed-method design included qualitative open-ended feedback per assessment and quantitative methods. The results reveal that (1) the students' self-written counterarguments to AI-generated content contains logic, among other things, which is a key component of critical thinking, and (2) GenAI can be successfully used at scale to assess students' written work, based on clear rubrics, and these assessments generally align with human assessments as shown with Gwets AC2 inter-rater reliability values of 0.33 for all the models except one.

analysis.tldr: 使用反论证写作评估批判性思维，发现AI评分与人类评分基本一致。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式AI（GenAI）在学术场景中可能引发作弊和认知卸载风险，亟需有效评估学生批判性思维的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何利用反论证写作评估学生的批判性思维，并验证AI评分与人类评分的一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 学生针对AI生成内容自行撰写的反论证包含逻辑等批判性思维关键要素；除一个模型外，六个前沿LLM的评分与人类评分具有中等一致性（Gwet's AC2=0.33）。
analysis.method: 36名学生从4个热门辩论论点中选择一个撰写反论证，使用6个标准评分量规（焦点、逻辑、内容、风格、正确性、引用），由两名同学和一名教师进行人工评分，同时用六个前沿LLM作为评委进行自动评分。
contributions: 实证表明学生自行撰写的反论证能体现批判性思维中的逻辑要素。
验证了基于清晰量规的GenAI自动评分与人类评分具有中等一致性，可用于大规模评估。
analysis.experiments: 35份有效学生写作，使用6个量规进行3次人工评分和6个LLM评分，计算Gwet's AC2一致性系数。
limitations: 样本量较小（n=35），仅来自一门课程。
仅使用六个特定LLM，泛化性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法简单，样本量小，但验证了AI评分与人类评分的一致性，有一定应用价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 使用反论证写作评估批判性思维，发现AI评分与人类评分基本一致。

papers.title: egenioussBench: A New Dataset for Geospatial Visual Localisation
papers.abstract: We present egenioussBench, a visual localisation benchmark built on geospatial reference data: a city-scale airborne 3D mesh and a CityGML LoD2 model. This pairing reflects deployable mapping assets and supports true scalability beyond traditional SfM-based approaches. The query data comprise smartphone images with centimetre-accurate, map-independent ground truth obtained via PPK and GCP/CP-aided adjustment. From 2,709 images, we derive a non-co-visible subset by estimating the full co-visibility matrix from rendered depth and selecting a maximum independent set; the released data include a test split of 42 non-co-visible images with withheld ground truth and a validation split of 412 sequential images with poses, e.g. for training of pose regressors and self-validation. The benchmark features a public leaderboard evaluated with binning metrics at multiple pose-error thresholds alongside global statistics (median, RMSE, outlier ratio), ensuring fair, like-for-like comparison across mesh- and LoD2-based methods. Together, these design choices expose realistic cross-view and cross-domain challenges while providing a rigorous, scalable path for advancing large-scale visual localisation. We make the evaluation code and data availeable at https://github.com/fratopa/egenioussBench and https://www.egeniouss.eu/

analysis.tldr: 提出一个基于城市级3D网格和CityGML LoD2模型的地理空间视觉定位基准数据集，支持可扩展的跨视图定位评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉定位基准多基于SfM方法，难以扩展到城市级大规模场景，且缺乏真实部署可用的地理空间参考数据。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个使用真实地理空间参考数据（如3D网格和CityGML模型）的大规模视觉定位基准，以支持跨视图、跨域挑战的公平比较。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含城市级机载3D网格和CityGML LoD2模型的基准数据集，使用PPK和GCP/CP辅助调整获取厘米级真实位姿，通过渲染深度估计共视矩阵并选择最大独立集生成非共视子集，采用分箱指标和全局统计进行公平评估。
contributions: 提出首个结合城市级3D网格和CityGML LoD2模型的视觉定位基准，支持可扩展的大规模定位评估。
提供非共视测试集和带位姿的验证集，并公开排行榜和评估代码。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集仅包含42张非共视测试图像，规模可能有限。
仅针对城市级空中和地面视角，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 数据集设计有创新性，但规模较小且实验信息不足，适合关注视觉定位的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个基于城市级3D网格和CityGML LoD2模型的地理空间视觉定位基准数据集，支持可扩展的跨视图定位评估。

papers.title: The Single-File Test: A Longitudinal Public-Interface Evaluation of First-Output LLM Web Generation with Social Reach Tracking
papers.abstract: This paper presents an eight-week observational comparison of 68 single-file HTML generations collected across 17 public experiments in the "HTML AI Battle" project between December 10, 2025 and February 4, 2026. Four reasoning model families, GPT, Gemini, Grok, and Claude, were compared under a fixed public-interface protocol with no custom instructions, no personality tuning, and no repair prompts. Each output was evaluated from a rendered browser video using human scores and a Gemini LLM-as-a-judge layer for prompt adherence, functional correctness, and UI quality, then packaged into a standardized social-media protocol spanning X (Twitter), TikTok, and YouTube. The tracker was also used for two supervised predictive analyses: an experiment-level model for 24-hour X impressions and a generation-level model for HTML verbosity. Under this protocol, Claude was the strongest and most consistent family, leading mean performance and winning 9/17 prompts under the primary human weighted score. Longer measured reasoning time was not associated with higher quality overall. Gemini as a judge was significantly more lenient than the human evaluator on functional correctness and overall performance, while stable self-favoring bias remained unresolved. The exploratory X-impressions model remained weak under post-screen cross-validation (MAE = 46,874, R^2 = -0.377), whereas the HTML-lines model performed better, with a model-family-only baseline outperforming prompt-aware alternatives (MAE = 135.2, R^2 = 0.576). Overall, selected pre-publication technical/audio variables were not sufficient to predict 24-hour X reach, while code verbosity was driven much more by model family than by prompt wording. The comparisons remain observational and are limited by public-interface drift, access-path differences, and one primary human scorer.

analysis.tldr: 八周观察比较四种推理模型家族在HTML生成任务上的表现，Claude表现最强，但推理时间与质量无关。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM评估多基于静态基准或人工标注，缺乏在真实、动态、公开接口下对模型输出质量和社交传播效果的纵向比较。
analysis.problem: 在固定公开接口协议下，比较不同推理模型家族（GPT、Gemini、Grok、Claude）在单文件HTML生成任务中的表现，并探索技术变量对社交传播（X平台曝光量）的预测能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Claude在人类加权评分中表现最强且最一致；更长的推理时间并未带来更高整体质量；Gemini作为评判者比人类更宽容，且存在自我偏好偏差；代码冗长度主要由模型家族而非提示词决定。
analysis.method: 收集68个单文件HTML生成样本，采用固定公开接口协议（无自定义指令、无个性调整、无修复提示），通过人类评分和Gemini评判层评估提示遵循度、功能正确性和UI质量，并标准化发布到社交媒体平台，同时构建实验级和生成级预测模型。
contributions: 提出了一个纵向公开接口评估协议，用于比较LLM在HTML生成任务中的表现。
揭示了推理时间与生成质量无显著关联、评判者偏差等实证发现。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了评估流程和预测模型性能（X曝光量模型MAE=46,874, R²=-0.377；HTML行数模型MAE=135.2, R²=0.576）。
limitations: 观察性研究，受公开接口漂移、访问路径差异和单一人类评分者限制。
社交传播预测模型较弱，技术变量不足以预测24小时X曝光量。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性一般，但纵向公开接口评估设计有一定参考价值，实验规模较小且局限较多。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 八周观察比较四种推理模型家族在HTML生成任务上的表现，Claude表现最强，但推理时间与质量无关。

papers.title: Making AI Drafts Count: A Quality Threshold in Audio Description Workflows
papers.abstract: Audio description (AD) narrates visual elements in video for blind and low-vision audiences. Recent work has shown that giving novice describers an AI-generated draft to start from helps produce higher-quality AD and lowers the barrier to entry. What remains an open question is how draft quality shapes the editing process. We investigate this through GenAD, an AD generation pipeline that incorporates accessibility guidelines and contextual video information, and RefineAD, an editing interface for human revisions. Human-AI contributions are measured across text, timing, and delivery. In a within-subjects study, we compared authoring from scratch against editing AI drafts of varying quality. GenAD drafts cut completion time by more than half and significantly reduced cognitive load. In contrast, baseline drafts generated from simple, unguided prompts offered only modest benefits, pointing to a minimum quality threshold for effectiveness. Qualitative findings suggest this threshold is content-dependent; as visual complexity increases, so does the quality needed from AI drafts. We propose this as a design principle: effective AI assistance should clear a quality threshold suited to the target content, rather than simply be present.

analysis.tldr: AI生成的音频描述草稿需达到质量阈值才能有效提升效率，否则收益有限。
analysis.research_motivation: 音频描述（AD）对盲人和低视力观众至关重要，但新手描述员制作高质量AD门槛高。AI生成草稿可降低门槛，但草稿质量如何影响编辑过程尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 探究AI生成草稿的质量如何影响音频描述的编辑效率、认知负荷及最终质量，并确定有效辅助所需的质量阈值。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 高质量草稿（GenAD）将完成时间减半并显著降低认知负荷，而低质量基线草稿仅带来微小收益，表明存在最低质量阈值；该阈值随视觉复杂性增加而提高。
analysis.method: 提出GenAD（结合可访问性指南和视频上下文的AD生成管道）和RefineAD（人工修订界面），通过受试者内实验比较从零创作与编辑不同质量AI草稿的效果。
contributions: 揭示了AI辅助音频描述中草稿质量存在阈值效应，低质量草稿收益有限。
提出了GenAD和RefineAD系统，验证了高质量草稿在效率与认知负荷上的显著优势。
提出设计原则：AI辅助应达到与目标内容匹配的质量阈值，而非简单存在。
analysis.experiments: 受试者内实验，比较从零创作与编辑不同质量AI草稿（GenAD vs 基线）在完成时间、认知负荷等方面的差异。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 实验规模可能有限，未提及样本量。
质量阈值可能因内容类型和描述员经验而异，需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法增量，但揭示了质量阈值这一实用设计原则，实验验证有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AI生成的音频描述草稿需达到质量阈值才能有效提升效率，否则收益有限。

papers.title: Open-SAT: LLM-Guided Query Embedding Refinement for Open-Vocabulary Object Retrieval in Satellite Imagery
papers.abstract: In satellite applications, user queries often take the form of open-ended natural language, extending beyond a fixed set of predefined categories. This open-vocabulary nature poses significant challenges for retrieving relevant image tiles, as the retrieval system must generalize to a wide range of unseen objects and concepts. While vision-language models (VLMs) such as CLIP are widely used for text-image retrieval, even fine-tuned variants often struggle to accurately align such queries with satellite imagery. To address this, we propose Open-SAT, a training-free query embedding refinement algorithm that operates at inference time to improve alignment between user queries and satellite image content. Open-SAT uses VLMs to compute embeddings for image tiles, which are stored in a vector database for efficient retrieval. At query time, it leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) to refine the text embeddings by incorporating contextual information about objects of interest and their surroundings. A threshold-free retrieval mechanism further enhances accuracy and efficiency. Experimental results in three public benchmarks demonstrate that Open-SAT improves the F1 score by up to 16.04%, while retrieving a comparable number of image tiles. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of Open-SAT in open-vocabulary satellite image retrieval, leveraging LLM guidance without the need for additional training or supervision.

analysis.tldr: Open-SAT 利用 LLM 在推理时精炼查询嵌入，无需训练即可提升卫星图像开放词汇检索的 F1 分数。
analysis.research_motivation: 卫星图像检索中用户查询常为开放词汇，现有 VLM（如 CLIP）即使微调也难以准确对齐查询与图像内容，亟需无需额外训练的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不训练的情况下，利用 LLM 改进开放词汇查询与卫星图像之间的嵌入对齐，提升检索精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: Open-SAT 在推理时使用 LLM 精炼文本嵌入，融入对象及其周围环境的上下文信息，并采用无阈值检索机制。
contributions: 提出一种无需训练的查询嵌入精炼算法，利用 LLM 改进开放词汇卫星图像检索。
在三个公开基准上 F1 分数提升高达 16.04%，且检索图像数量相当。
analysis.experiments: 在三个公开基准上评估，F1 分数提升最高 16.04%，检索图像数量与基线相当。
limitations: 依赖 LLM 的推理能力，可能受限于 LLM 的上下文理解质量。
未讨论大规模数据库下的检索效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖但属于增量改进，实验充分但未提供更多细节，适合相关领域读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Open-SAT 利用 LLM 在推理时精炼查询嵌入，无需训练即可提升卫星图像开放词汇检索的 F1 分数。

papers.title: Feature Starvation as Geometric Instability in Sparse Autoencoders
papers.abstract: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) are used to disentangle the dense, polysemantic internal representations of large language models (LLMs) into interpretable, monosemantic concepts. However, standard $\ell_1$-regularized SAEs suffer from feature starvation (dead neurons) and shrinkage bias, often requiring computationally expensive heuristic resampling and nondifferentiable hard-masking methods to bypass these challenges. We argue that feature starvation is not merely an empirical artifact of poor data diversity, but a fundamental optimization-geometric pathology of overcomplete dictionaries: the $\ell_1$-induced sparse coding map is unstable and fundamentally misaligned with shallow, amortized encoders. To address this structural instability, we introduce adaptive elastic net SAEs (AEN-SAEs), a fully differentiable architecture grounded in classical sparse regression. AEN-SAEs combine an $\ell_2$ structural term that enforces strong convexity and Lipschitz stability with adaptive $\ell_1$ reweighting that eliminates shrinkage bias and suppresses spurious features, thereby jointly controlling the curvature and interaction structure of the induced polyhedral geometry. Theoretically, we show that AEN-SAEs yield a Lipschitz-continuous sparse coding map and recover the global feature support under mild assumptions. Empirically, across synthetic settings and LLMs (Pythia 70M, Llama 3.1 8B), AEN-SAEs mitigate feature starvation without auxiliary heuristics while maintaining competitive reconstruction abilities.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应弹性网稀疏自编码器，通过优化几何稳定性解决特征饥饿问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准L1正则化SAE存在特征饥饿（死神经元）和收缩偏差，现有启发式重采样和硬掩码方法计算昂贵且不可微，需要更根本的解决方案。
analysis.problem: 稀疏自编码器中特征饥饿的优化几何根源及其缓解方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 特征饥饿并非数据多样性不足的实证伪影，而是过完备字典下L1诱导的稀疏编码映射不稳定且与浅层摊销编码器根本性错位的优化几何病理。
analysis.method: 提出自适应弹性网SAE（AEN-SAEs），结合L2结构项（保证强凸性和Lipschitz稳定性）与自适应L1重加权（消除收缩偏差和抑制虚假特征），联合控制诱导多面体几何的曲率和交互结构。
contributions: 从优化几何角度揭示特征饥饿的根本原因，即L1稀疏编码映射的不稳定性。
提出全可微的AEN-SAEs架构，理论证明其Lipschitz连续稀疏编码映射和全局特征支持恢复能力。
analysis.experiments: 在合成设置和LLM（Pythia 70M, Llama 3.1 8B）上验证，AEN-SAEs无需辅助启发式方法即可缓解特征饥饿，同时保持有竞争力的重建能力。
limitations: 可能增加计算开销（弹性网正则化）。
理论假设在极端复杂场景下可能不成立。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，理论分析深入，实验验证充分，与LLM可解释性高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应弹性网稀疏自编码器，通过优化几何稳定性解决特征饥饿问题。

papers.title: How Far Are VLMs from Privacy Awareness in the Physical World? An Empirical Study
papers.abstract: As Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly deployed as autonomous cognitive cores for embodied assistants, evaluating their privacy awareness in physical environments becomes critical. Unlike digital chatbots, these agents operate in intimate spaces, such as homes and hospitals, where they possess the physical agency to observe and manipulate privacy-sensitive information and artifacts. However, current benchmarks remain limited to unimodal, text-based representations that cannot capture the demands of real-world settings. To bridge this gap, we present ImmersedPrivacy, an interactive audio-visual evaluation framework that simulates realistic physical environments using a Unity-based simulator. ImmersedPrivacy evaluates physically grounded privacy awareness across three progressive tiers that test a model's ability to identify sensitive items in cluttered scenes, adapt to shifting social contexts, and resolve conflicts between explicit commands and inferred privacy constraints. Our evaluation of 12 state-of-the-art models reveals consistent deficits. In cluttered scenes, all models exhibit monotonic performance decay as scene complexity grows due to perceptual deficit. When social context shifts, no model exceed 65% selection accuracy. Under conflicting commands, the best model gemini-3.1-pro perfectly balances task completion and privacy preservation in only 51% of cases. These findings reveal that current VLMs in the physical world suffer from perceptual fragility and fail to let their knowledge of privacy cues govern their situated behavior. Our code and data is available at https://github.com/immersed-privacy/immersed-privacy .

analysis.tldr: VLMs在物理世界中的隐私意识存在系统性缺陷，场景复杂度增加时性能单调下降，社交情境变化时准确率不足65%，冲突指令下仅51%能平衡任务与隐私。
analysis.research_motivation: VLMs被部署为具身助手的自主认知核心，在家庭、医院等私密空间中可能观察和操作隐私敏感信息，但现有基准局限于单模态文本表示，无法评估真实物理环境中的隐私意识。
analysis.problem: 评估VLMs在物理世界中的隐私意识，包括识别杂乱场景中的敏感物品、适应社交情境变化、解决显式指令与隐私约束之间的冲突。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有模型在杂乱场景中性能随复杂度增加单调下降（感知缺陷）；社交情境变化时无模型准确率超过65%；冲突指令下最佳模型仅51%能完美平衡任务完成与隐私保护。
analysis.method: 提出ImmersedPrivacy交互式视听评估框架，基于Unity模拟器构建真实物理环境，包含三个渐进层级：敏感物品识别、社交情境适应、冲突指令解决。
contributions: 提出ImmersedPrivacy评估框架，填补物理世界VLM隐私意识评估的空白
系统评估12个SOTA模型，揭示感知脆弱性和情境行为不一致的缺陷
analysis.experiments: 在12个SOTA模型上评估，包括gemini-3.1-pro等，报告了场景复杂度、社交情境和冲突指令下的性能指标。
limitations: 模拟环境与真实物理世界仍有差距
仅评估了有限数量的模型和场景
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 针对VLM物理世界隐私意识评估这一重要且未被充分研究的问题，提出了新颖的交互式框架，实验揭示了关键缺陷，对安全部署有指导意义。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VLMs在物理世界中的隐私意识存在系统性缺陷，场景复杂度增加时性能单调下降，社交情境变化时准确率不足65%，冲突指令下仅51%能平衡任务与隐私。

papers.title: ViTok-v2: Scaling Native Resolution Auto-Encoders to 5 Billion Parameters
papers.abstract: Vision Transformer (ViT) autoencoders have emerged as compelling tokenizers for images, offering improved reconstruction over convolutional tokenizers. However, existing ViT tokenizers cannot explore this landscape as performance degrades outside training resolutions, and reliance on adversarial losses prevents stable scaling. ViTok (Hansen-Estruch et al., 2025) found that the compression ratio r mediates a reconstruction-generation trade-off where lower r means better reconstructions but harder generations, so improving tokenizer reconstruction is key to more Pareto-optimal tokenizers. We introduce ViTok-v2, which addresses these limitations with native resolution support via NaFlex for generalization across resolutions and aspect ratios, and a novel DINOv3 perceptual loss that replaces both LPIPS and GAN objectives for stable training at any scale. ViTok-v2 is trained on about 2B images and scaled to 5B parameters, the largest image autoencoder to date. ViTok-v2 matches or exceeds state-of-the-art reconstruction at 256p and outperforms all baselines at 512p and above. In joint scaling experiments with flow matching generators, we show that scaling both the autoencoder and the generator advances the Pareto frontier of this trade-off.

analysis.tldr: ViTok-v2 通过 NaFlex 实现原生分辨率支持，并用 DINOv3 感知损失替代 GAN 和 LPIPS，将图像自编码器扩展到 5B 参数，在重建质量和生成帕累托前沿上取得突破。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 ViT 自编码器在训练分辨率外性能下降，且依赖对抗损失导致无法稳定扩展，限制了图像分词器的重建-生成帕累托前沿。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个可稳定扩展至数十亿参数、支持任意分辨率和宽高比、且无需对抗损失的图像自编码器。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 压缩比 r 调节重建-生成权衡：低 r 改善重建但增加生成难度，因此提升分词器重建质量是推动帕累托前沿的关键。
analysis.method: 引入 NaFlex 实现原生分辨率支持（任意分辨率和宽高比），并用 DINOv3 感知损失替代 LPIPS 和 GAN 目标，实现稳定训练。
contributions: 提出 ViTok-v2，首个 5B 参数图像自编码器，支持原生分辨率。
用 DINOv3 感知损失替代对抗损失，实现稳定扩展。
在 256p 匹配或超越 SOTA 重建，在 512p 以上全面领先。
联合缩放实验表明，同时缩放自编码器和生成器可推动帕累托前沿。
analysis.experiments: 在约 2B 图像上训练，与流匹配生成器联合缩放，在 256p、512p 及以上分辨率评估重建质量。
limitations: 摘要未提及推理效率或参数量对实际部署的影响。
可能依赖大规模数据和计算资源，可复现性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新（NaFlex、DINOv3损失）和规模（5B参数）显著，实验显示SOTA，对生成模型领域有重要影响。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ViTok-v2 通过 NaFlex 实现原生分辨率支持，并用 DINOv3 感知损失替代 GAN 和 LPIPS，将图像自编码器扩展到 5B 参数，在重建质量和生成帕累托前沿上取得突破。

papers.title: Graph Normalization: Fast Binarizing Dynamics for Differentiable MWIS
papers.abstract: We introduce Graph Normalization (GN), a principled dynamical system on graphs that serves as a differentiable approximation engine for the NP-hard Maximum Weight Independent Set (MWIS) problem. MWIS encompasses many combinatorial challenges, including optimal assignment, scheduling, set packing, and MAP inference in discrete Markov Random Fields. Unlike Belief Propagation, we prove GN always converges to a binary indicator of a Maximum Independent Set. GN realizes a fast quasi-Newton descent through an exact Majorization-Minimization step, systematically improving the MWIS relaxed primal objective. We establish an equivalence between GN and the Replicator Dynamics of a nonlinear evolutionary game, where vertices compete for inclusion in an independent set. While a non-potential game, the GN game follows Fisher's Fundamental Theorem of Natural Selection, where the average fitness equals the MWIS primal objective and strictly increases. This connection leads to a weighted extension of the Motzkin-Straus theorem, showing MISes are in bijection with the local minima of a quadratic form over a tilted simplex. For the Assignment Problem, GN acts as a variant of the Sinkhorn algorithm that naturally converges to a hard assignment while generalizing to arbitrary constraint graphs. We demonstrate GN's performance as a fast binarization engine for the state-of-the-art Bregman-Sinkhorn relaxed MWIS solver. On real-world benchmarks with up to 1M edges, GN identifies solutions within 1% of the best known results in seconds on a CPU. GN opens new avenues for deep learning architectures requiring differentiable, "hard" decisions under constraints, with applications in structured sparse attention, dynamic network pruning, and Mixture-of-Experts. Beyond core AI, the GN framework enables end-to-end learning of constrained optimization in computer vision, computational biology, and resource allocation.

analysis.tldr: 提出图归一化（GN）作为可微分的最大权独立集（MWIS）求解器，收敛快且性能接近最优。
analysis.research_motivation: MWIS是NP-hard问题，传统方法如信念传播可能不收敛，且需要可微分的硬决策以集成到深度学习架构中。
analysis.problem: 设计一个可微分且保证收敛的MWIS近似求解器，用于端到端学习中的组合优化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出图归一化（GN），一种基于精确Majorization-Minimization步骤的拟牛顿下降动力学系统，等价于非线性进化博弈的复制动力学，并证明其收敛到最大独立集的二元指示器。
contributions: 提出图归一化（GN）作为可微分的MWIS求解器，证明其收敛到最大独立集。
建立GN与进化博弈复制动力学的等价性，并推导出加权Motzkin-Straus定理。
在Assignment Problem上，GN作为Sinkhorn算法的变体，自然收敛到硬分配。
在多达100万边的真实基准上，GN在CPU上秒级内找到接近最优解（1%以内）。
analysis.experiments: 在多达100万边的真实基准上，GN在CPU上秒级内找到接近最优解（1%以内）。
limitations: 可能仅适用于MWIS问题，泛化到其他组合优化需验证。
理论保证限于最大独立集，加权情况需进一步分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出图归一化（GN）作为可微分的最大权独立集（MWIS）求解器，收敛快且性能接近最优。

papers.title: Understanding Annotator Safety Policy with Interpretability
papers.abstract: Safety policies define what constitutes safe and unsafe AI outputs, guiding data annotation and model development. However, annotation disagreement is pervasive and can stem from multiple sources such as operational failures (annotators misunderstand or misexecute the task), policy ambiguity (policy wording leaves room for interpretation), or value pluralism (different annotators hold different perspectives on safety). Distinguishing these sources matters. For example, operational failures call for quality control, ambiguity calls for policy clarification, and pluralism calls for deliberation about incorporating diverse perspectives. Yet understanding why annotators disagree is difficult. Directly asking annotators for their reasoning is costly, substantially increasing annotation burden, and can be unreliable for both human and LLM annotators as self-reported reasoning often fails to reflect actual decision processes. We introduce Annotator Policy Models (APMs), interpretable models that learn annotators' internal safety policies from labeling behavior alone, making annotator reasoning visible and comparable without additional annotation effort. We validate that APMs accurately model annotator safety policy (>80% accuracy), faithfully predict responses to counterfactual edits, and recover known policy differences in controlled settings. Applying APMs to LLM and human annotations, we demonstrate two core applications: (1) surfacing policy ambiguity by revealing how annotators interpret safety instructions differently, and (2) surfacing value pluralism by uncovering systematic differences in safety priorities across demographic groups. Together, these capabilities support more targeted, transparent, and inclusive safety policy design.

analysis.tldr: 提出可解释的标注者政策模型（APM），从标注行为中学习内部安全政策，无需额外标注即可揭示分歧根源。
analysis.research_motivation: 安全政策定义AI输出的安全边界，但标注分歧普遍存在且来源多样（操作失误、政策模糊、价值多元），区分这些来源对改进标注质量、政策设计和包容性至关重要，但直接询问标注者推理过程成本高且不可靠。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加标注负担的情况下，从标注行为中自动推断并解释标注者内部安全政策的差异，从而区分分歧来源。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标注分歧源于操作失误、政策模糊或价值多元，直接询问标注者推理过程成本高且不可靠（自我报告常偏离实际决策）。
analysis.method: 提出Annotator Policy Models (APMs)，一种可解释模型，仅从标注行为学习标注者的内部安全政策，使推理过程可见且可比较。
contributions: 提出APM框架，从标注行为中学习可解释的标注者安全政策，无需额外标注。
验证APM在准确建模政策（>80%）、预测反事实编辑响应和恢复已知政策差异方面的有效性。
展示两个核心应用：揭示政策模糊性（标注者如何不同解释安全指令）和价值多元性（不同人口群体安全优先级系统性差异）。
analysis.experiments: 在LLM和人类标注上验证APM，准确率>80%，能预测反事实编辑响应，并在受控设置中恢复已知政策差异。
limitations: 可能依赖标注任务的具体设计，泛化性需进一步验证。
模型可解释性可能受限于政策表示的复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，解决安全对齐中的关键问题，实验验证有效，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出可解释的标注者政策模型（APM），从标注行为中学习内部安全政策，无需额外标注即可揭示分歧根源。

papers.title: Query2Uncertainty: Robust Uncertainty Quantification and Calibration for 3D Object Detection under Distribution Shift
papers.abstract: Reliable uncertainty estimation for 3D object detection is critical for deploying safe autonomous systems, yet modern detectors remain poorly calibrated, especially under distribution shifts. Although post-hoc calibration methods address this issue and provide improved calibration for in-distribution tests, they fail to adapt in distribution-shifted scenarios. In this work, we address this issue and introduce a density-aware calibration method that couples post-hoc calibrators with the feature density of latent object queries from DETR-style 3D object detectors. These queries form a compact, location and class-aware feature, ideal for density estimation, allowing our approach to adjust model confidences in distribution-shift scenarios. By fitting a density estimator on these query features, our approach jointly recalibrates both classification and bounding box regression uncertainties. On both a multi-view camera and LiDAR-based detector, our approach consistently outperforms standard post-hoc methods in both in-distribution and distribution-shifted scenarios. Code available https://tillbeemelmanns.github.io/query2uncertainty/ .

analysis.tldr: 提出密度感知校准方法，利用DETR风格3D检测器的查询特征密度来联合校准分类和回归不确定性，在分布偏移下优于标准后处理方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D目标检测在自动驾驶中至关重要，但现有检测器校准不良，尤其在分布偏移场景下，后处理方法无法适应分布变化，亟需鲁棒的不确定性量化方法。
analysis.problem: 解决3D目标检测器在分布偏移下校准失效的问题，实现分类和边界框回归不确定性的联合校准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准后处理方法在分布内测试中表现良好，但在分布偏移场景下无法适应，导致校准性能下降。
analysis.method: 提出密度感知校准方法，利用DETR风格3D检测器的潜在查询特征进行密度估计，将后处理校准器与特征密度耦合，联合调整分类和回归置信度。
contributions: 提出一种密度感知的校准方法，利用查询特征密度实现分布偏移下的鲁棒不确定性量化。
在相机和LiDAR检测器上验证，该方法在分布内和分布偏移场景下均优于标准后处理方法。
analysis.experiments: 在多视角相机和基于LiDAR的检测器上进行实验，对比标准后处理方法，在分布内和分布偏移场景下均取得更优性能。
limitations: 仅适用于DETR风格的3D检测器，对其他架构的泛化性未知。
密度估计的计算开销可能影响实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，针对分布偏移下的校准问题提出密度感知方案，实验充分，对自动驾驶安全有实际价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出密度感知校准方法，利用DETR风格3D检测器的查询特征密度来联合校准分类和回归不确定性，在分布偏移下优于标准后处理方法。

papers.title: Syn4D: A Multiview Synthetic 4D Dataset
papers.abstract: Dense 3D reconstruction and tracking of dynamic scenes from monocular video remains an important open challenge in computer vision. Progress in this area has been constrained by the scarcity of high-quality datasets with dense, complete, and accurate geometric annotations. To address this limitation, we introduce Syn4D, a multiview synthetic dataset of dynamic scenes that includes ground-truth camera motion, depth maps, dense tracking, and parametric human pose annotations. A key feature of Syn4D is the ability to unproject any pixel into 3D to any time and to any camera. We conduct extensive evaluations across multiple downstream tasks to demonstrate the utility and effectiveness of the proposed dataset, including 4D scene reconstruction, 3D point tracking, geometry-aware camera retargeting, and human pose estimation. The experimental results highlight Syn4D's potential to facilitate research in dynamic scene understanding and spatiotemporal modeling.

analysis.tldr: Syn4D 是一个多视角合成动态场景数据集，提供密集、完整的几何标注，支持多种下游任务。
analysis.research_motivation: 动态场景的密集 3D 重建与跟踪因缺乏高质量标注数据集而进展缓慢，现有数据难以满足密集、完整、精确的几何标注需求。
analysis.problem: 缺乏包含密集、完整、精确几何标注的动态场景多视角数据集，限制了 4D 重建与跟踪研究。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建多视角合成动态场景数据集 Syn4D，包含真实相机运动、深度图、密集跟踪和参数化人体姿态标注，支持任意像素到任意时间与相机的 3D 反投影。
contributions: 提出 Syn4D 数据集，提供密集、完整的动态场景几何标注。
在 4D 场景重建、3D 点跟踪、几何感知相机重定向和人体姿态估计等任务上验证了数据集的实用性。
analysis.experiments: 在 4D 场景重建、3D 点跟踪、几何感知相机重定向和人体姿态估计等下游任务上进行了广泛评估，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 数据集为合成数据，与真实场景存在域差异。
可能仅覆盖有限类型的动态场景和运动模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 数据集有明确应用价值，但合成数据与真实场景存在差距，且摘要未提供具体实验数据。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Syn4D 是一个多视角合成动态场景数据集，提供密集、完整的几何标注，支持多种下游任务。

papers.title: Taming Outlier Tokens in Diffusion Transformers
papers.abstract: We study outlier tokens in Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) for image generation. Prior work has shown that Vision Transformers (ViTs) can produce a small number of high-norm tokens that attract disproportionate attention while carrying limited local information, but their role in generative models remains underexplored. We show that this phenomenon appears in both the encoder and denoiser of modern Representation Autoencoder (RAE)-DiT pipelines: pretrained ViT encoders can produce outlier representations, and DiTs themselves can develop internal outlier tokens, especially in intermediate layers. Moreover, simply masking high-norm tokens does not improve performance, indicating that the problem is not only caused by a few extreme values, but is more closely related to corrupted local patch semantics. To address this issue, we introduce Dual-Stage Registers (DSR), a register-based intervention for both components: trained registers when available, recursive test-time registers otherwise, and diffusion registers for the denoiser. Across ImageNet and large-scale text-to-image generation, these interventions consistently reduce outlier artifacts and improve generation quality. Our results highlight outlier-token control as an important ingredient in building stronger DiTs.

analysis.tldr: 提出双阶段寄存器方法抑制扩散Transformer中的异常token，提升图像生成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散Transformer在图像生成中会出现异常token，导致生成质量下降，而现有研究主要关注ViT中的异常token，对生成模型中的影响探索不足。
analysis.problem: 扩散Transformer中异常token导致生成质量下降的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 异常token出现在RAE-DiT管道的编码器和去噪器中，且简单掩码高范数token无效，问题与局部patch语义损坏相关。
analysis.method: 提出双阶段寄存器（DSR）方法，包括训练寄存器、递归测试时寄存器和扩散寄存器，分别应用于编码器和去噪器。
contributions: 揭示了扩散Transformer中异常token的存在及其对生成质量的影响。
提出了双阶段寄存器方法有效抑制异常token，提升图像生成质量。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet和大规模文本到图像生成任务上验证，DSR一致减少异常伪影并提升生成质量。
limitations: 可能增加计算开销。
对不同类型的异常token的鲁棒性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实验充分，对扩散模型生成质量有显著提升，值得精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双阶段寄存器方法抑制扩散Transformer中的异常token，提升图像生成质量。

papers.title: D-OPSD: On-Policy Self-Distillation for Continuously Tuning Step-Distilled Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: The landscape of high-performance image generation models is currently shifting from the inefficient multi-step ones to the efficient few-step counterparts (e.g, Z-Image-Turbo and FLUX.2-klein). However, these models present significant challenges for directly continuous supervised fine-tuning. For example, applying the commonly used fine-tuning technique would compromises their inherent few-step inference capability. To address this, we propose D-OPSD, a novel training paradigm for step-distilled diffusion models that enables on-policy learning during supervised fine-tuning. We first find that the modern diffusion model where the LLM/VLM serves as the encoder can inherit its encoder's in-context capabilities. This enables us to make the training as an on-policy self-distillation process. Specifically, during training, we make the model acts as both the teacher and the student with different contexts, where the student is conditioned only on the text feature, while the teacher is conditioned on the multimodal feature of both the text prompt and the target image. Training minimizes the two predicted distributions over the student's own roll-outs. By optimized on the model's own trajectory and under it's own supervision, D-OPSD enables the model to learn new concept, style, etc. without sacrificing the original few-step capacity.

analysis.tldr: 提出D-OPSD，一种用于步蒸馏扩散模型的在线策略自蒸馏训练范式，在不牺牲少步推理能力的前提下实现连续微调。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前高性能图像生成模型正从多步模型转向高效少步模型，但这些模型难以直接进行连续监督微调，因为常用微调技术会损害其固有的少步推理能力。
analysis.problem: 如何在不破坏步蒸馏扩散模型少步推理能力的前提下，实现有效的连续监督微调。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现现代扩散模型（以LLM/VLM为编码器）能够继承编码器的上下文能力，从而可以将训练构建为在线策略自蒸馏过程。
analysis.method: 提出D-OPSD，一种在线策略自蒸馏训练范式：训练时模型同时作为教师和学生，学生仅以文本特征为条件，教师以文本提示和目标图像的多模态特征为条件；通过最小化学生自身轨迹上的两个预测分布来优化。
contributions: 提出D-OPSD，一种针对步蒸馏扩散模型的在线策略自蒸馏训练范式，支持连续微调而不牺牲少步能力。
发现现代扩散模型可继承编码器的上下文能力，并利用此特性实现自蒸馏。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于以LLM/VLM为编码器的扩散模型。
自蒸馏过程可能对教师和学生的上下文设计敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，针对少步扩散模型微调难题，但摘要未提供实验验证，影响评分。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出D-OPSD，一种用于步蒸馏扩散模型的在线策略自蒸馏训练范式，在不牺牲少步推理能力的前提下实现连续微调。

papers.title: Securing the Agent: Vendor-Neutral, Multitenant Enterprise Retrieval and Tool Use
papers.abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and agentic AI systems are increasingly prevalent in enterprise AI deployments. However, real enterprise environments introduce challenges largely absent from academic treatments and consumer-facing APIs: multiple tenants with heterogeneous data, strict access-control requirements, regulatory compliance, and cost pressures that demand shared infrastructure. A fundamental problem underlies existing RAG architectures in these settings: retrieval systems rank documents by relevance--whether through semantic similarity, keyword matching, or hybrid approaches--not by authorization, so a query from one tenant can surface another tenant's confidential data simply because it scores highest. We formalize this gap and analyze additional shortcomings--including tool-mediated disclosure, context accumulation across turns, and client-side orchestration bypass--that arise when agentic systems conflate relevance with authorization. To address these challenges, we introduce a layered isolation architecture combining policy-aware ingestion, retrieval-time gating, and shared inference, enforced through server-side agentic orchestration. This approach centralizes security-critical operations--tool execution authorization, state isolation, and policy enforcement--on the server, creating natural enforcement points for multitenant isolation while allowing client-side frameworks to retain control over agent composition and latency-sensitive operations. We validate the proposed architecture through an open-source implementation in OGX, a vendor-neutral framework that implements an OpenAI-compatible, open-source Responses API with server-side multi-turn orchestration. We evaluate it empirically and show that ABAC gating eliminates cross-tenant leakage while introducing negligible overhead.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种分层隔离架构，通过服务端代理编排解决企业RAG系统中的多租户数据泄露问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 企业级AI部署中，RAG和代理系统面临多租户、异构数据、严格访问控制等挑战，现有架构按相关性而非授权检索，导致跨租户数据泄露风险。
analysis.problem: 现有RAG系统在检索时仅考虑相关性，忽略授权，导致一个租户的查询可能返回另一租户的机密数据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出检索系统按相关性排序而非授权，导致跨租户数据泄露；此外，工具中介披露、跨轮上下文累积和客户端编排绕过等问题也加剧了安全风险。
analysis.method: 提出分层隔离架构，包括策略感知的摄取、检索时门控和共享推理，通过服务端代理编排强制执行多租户隔离。
contributions: 形式化了企业RAG系统中相关性混淆授权的问题，并分析了工具中介披露等额外缺陷。
提出并实现了一种分层隔离架构，通过服务端代理编排实现多租户安全隔离。
在开源框架OGX中验证了架构，实验表明ABAC门控消除了跨租户泄露且开销可忽略。
analysis.experiments: 在OGX框架中实现并评估，显示ABAC门控消除跨租户泄露且引入可忽略的开销。
limitations: 可能未考虑所有边缘情况，如动态权限变更。
服务端编排可能增加延迟，尽管摘要声称开销可忽略。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 针对企业RAG安全痛点提出系统化解决方案，实验验证有效，但方法偏向工程架构，理论创新有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种分层隔离架构，通过服务端代理编排解决企业RAG系统中的多租户数据泄露问题。

papers.title: Grokability in five inequalities
papers.abstract: In this note, we report five mathematical discoveries made in collaboration with Grok, all of which have been subsequently verified by the authors. These include an improved lower bound on the maximal Gaussian perimeter of convex sets in $\mathbb{R}^n$, sharper $L_2$-$L_1$ moment comparison inequalities on the Hamming cube $\{-1,1\}^n$, a strengthened autoconvolution inequality, improved asymptotic bounds on the size of the largest $g$-Sidon sets in $\{1,\dots,n\}$, and an optimal balanced Szarek's inequality.

analysis.tldr: 与Grok合作发现五个数学不等式改进，均经人工验证。
analysis.research_motivation: 探索AI辅助数学发现的可能性，验证大语言模型在严格数学推理中的有效性。
analysis.problem: 利用AI工具Grok发现并证明五个经典数学不等式的新下界或改进形式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过与Grok交互式协作，提出猜想并逐步完善证明，最终由人类作者验证。
contributions: 改进了凸集高斯周长的下界
改进了Hamming立方上的L2-L1矩比较不等式
加强了自卷积不等式
改进了最大g-Sidon集大小的渐近界
给出了平衡的Szarek不等式的最优形式
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 结果仅限于数学不等式领域，通用性未知
依赖特定AI工具Grok，可复现性待验证
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 方法创新但领域小众，与主流ML方向关联弱。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 与Grok合作发现五个数学不等式改进，均经人工验证。

papers.title: Almost-Orthogonality in Lp Spaces: A Case Study with Grok
papers.abstract: Carbery proposed the following sharpened form of triangle inequality for many functions: for any $p\ge 2$ and any finite sequence $(f_j)_j\subset L^p$ we have \[ \Big\|\sum_j f_j\Big\|_p \ \le\ \left(\sup_{j} \sum_{k} α_{jk}^{\,c}\right)^{1/p'} \Big(\sum_j \|f_j\|_p^p\Big)^{1/p}, \] where $c=2$, $1/p+1/p'=1$, and $α_{jk}=\sqrt{\frac{\|f_{j}f_{k}\|_{p/2}}{\|f_{j}\|_{p}\|f_{k}\|_{p}}}$. In the first part of this paper we construct a counterexample showing that this inequality fails for every $p>2$. We then prove that if an estimate of the above form holds, the exponent must satisfy $c\le p'$. Finally, at the critical exponent $c=p'$, we establish the inequality for all integer values $p\ge 2$. In the second part of the paper we obtain a sharp three-function bound \[ \Big\|\sum_{j=1}^{3} f_j\Big\|_p \ \le\ \left(1+2Γ^{c(p)}\right)^{1/p'} \Big(\sum_{j=1}^{3} \|f_j\|_p^p\Big)^{1/p}, \] where $p \geq 3$, $c(p) = \frac{2\ln(2)}{(p-2)\ln(3)+2\ln(2)}$ and $Γ=Γ(f_1,f_2,f_3)\in[0,1]$ quantifies the degree of orthogonality among $f_1,f_2,f_3$. The exponent $c(p)$ is optimal, and improves upon the power $r(p) = \frac{6}{5p-4}$ obtained previously by Carlen, Frank, and Lieb. Some intermediate lemmas and inequalities appearing in this work were explored with the assistance of the large language model Grok.

analysis.tldr: 本文研究了Lp空间中几乎正交函数的三角不等式，构造了反例并得到了最优指数。
analysis.research_motivation: Carbery提出的尖锐三角不等式在Lp空间中具有重要理论意义，但该不等式是否对所有p成立尚不清楚，且其最优指数未知。
analysis.problem: 验证并改进Carbery提出的Lp空间中函数序列的三角不等式，确定其成立的条件和最优指数。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过构造反例证明原不等式对p>2不成立，然后推导出必要指数条件，并在临界指数下证明不等式成立；对于三函数情形，得到最优指数的不等式。
contributions: 构造反例表明Carbery不等式对任意p>2不成立，并证明指数必须满足c≤p'。
在临界指数c=p'下对所有整数p≥2建立不等式。
得到三函数情形的尖锐界，指数c(p)最优，改进了Carlen等人的结果。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 结果仅限于Lp空间，未推广到其他函数空间。
三函数情形的指数c(p)仅对p≥3有效。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.reason: 理论贡献扎实，但属于纯数学分析，与机器学习应用距离较远。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文研究了Lp空间中几乎正交函数的三角不等式，构造了反例并得到了最优指数。

papers.title: LongSeeker: Elastic Context Orchestration for Long-Horizon Search Agents
papers.abstract: Long-horizon search agents must manage a rapidly growing working context as they reason, call tools, and observe information. Naively accumulating all intermediate content can overwhelm the agent, increasing costs and the risk of errors. We propose that effective context management should be adaptive: parts of the agent's trajectory are maintained at different levels of detail depending on their current relevance to the task. To operationalize this principle, we introduce Context-ReAct, a general agentic paradigm for elastic context orchestration that integrates reasoning, context management, and tool use in a unified loop. Context-ReAct provides five atomic operations: Skip, Compress, Rollback, Snippet and Delete, which allow the agent to dynamically reshape its working context, preserving important evidence, summarizing resolved information, discarding unhelpful branches, and controlling context size. We prove that the Compress operator is expressively complete, while the other specialized operators provide efficiency and fidelity guarantees that reduce generation cost and hallucination risk. Building on this paradigm, we develop LongSeeker, a long-horizon search agent fine-tuned from Qwen3-30B-A3B on 10k synthesized trajectories. Across four representative search benchmarks, LongSeeker achieves 61.5% on BrowseComp and 62.5% on BrowseComp-ZH, substantially outperforming Tongyi DeepResearch (43.2% and 46.7%) and AgentFold (36.2% and 47.3%). These results highlight the potential of adaptive context management, showing that agents can achieve more reliable and efficient long-horizon reasoning by actively shaping their working memory.

analysis.tldr: 提出弹性上下文编排范式Context-ReAct及长程搜索智能体LongSeeker，通过五种原子操作动态管理工作上下文，显著提升长程搜索性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 长程搜索智能体在推理和工具调用过程中工作上下文快速增长，简单累积所有中间内容会导致成本增加和错误风险上升，亟需自适应上下文管理方法。
analysis.problem: 如何让长程搜索智能体根据当前任务相关性动态调整工作上下文的详细程度，以平衡信息保留、成本控制和推理可靠性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Context-ReAct范式，集成推理、上下文管理和工具调用，定义Skip、Compress、Rollback、Snippet、Delete五种原子操作；基于此微调得到LongSeeker智能体。
contributions: 提出Context-ReAct范式，实现弹性上下文编排，并证明Compress操作表达完备性。
开发LongSeeker智能体，在多个长程搜索基准上显著超越现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在BrowseComp、BrowseComp-ZH等四个搜索基准上评估，LongSeeker分别达到61.5%和62.5%，优于Tongyi DeepResearch（43.2%、46.7%）和AgentFold（36.2%、47.3%）。
limitations: 可能依赖合成轨迹的质量和多样性。
五种原子操作的实际组合策略可能需进一步优化。

papers.title: LoViF 2026 The First Challenge on Holistic Quality Assessment for 4D World Model (PhyScore)
papers.abstract: This paper reports on the LoViF 2026 PhyScore challenge, a competition on holistic quality assessment of world-model-generated videos across both 2D and 4D generation settings. The challenge is motivated by a central gap in current evaluation practice: perceptual quality alone is insufficient to judge whether generated dynamics are physically plausible, temporally coherent, and consistent with input conditions. Participants are required to build a metric that jointly predicts four dimensions, i.e., Video Quality, Physical Realism, Condition-Video Alignment, and Temporal Consistency. Depart from that, participants also need to localize physical anomaly timestamps for fine-grained diagnosis. The benchmark dataset contains 1,554 videos generated by seven representative world generative models, organized into three tracks (text-2D, image-to-4D, and video-to-4D) and spanning 26 categories. These categories explicitly cover physics-relevant scenarios, including dynamics, optics, and thermodynamics, together with diverse real-world and creative content. To ensure label reliability, scores and anomaly timestamps are produced through trained human annotation with an additional automated quality-control pass. Evaluation is based on both score prediction and anomaly localization, with a composite protocol that combines TimeStamp_IOU and SRCC/PLCC. This report summarizes the challenge design and provides method-level insights from submitted solutions.

analysis.tldr: LoViF 2026 PhyScore挑战赛聚焦4D世界模型生成视频的整体质量评估，涵盖物理真实性、时间一致性等多维度。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前生成视频评估仅关注感知质量，缺乏对物理合理性、时间连贯性和条件一致性的联合评判，亟需全面的评估指标。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能够同时预测视频质量、物理真实性、条件-视频对齐和时间一致性，并定位物理异常时间戳的评估指标。

analysis.method: 组织挑战赛，构建包含1554个视频的基准数据集，由七种世界模型生成，覆盖26个类别；通过训练的人类标注和自动质量控制生成分数和异常时间戳；评估采用时间戳IoU和SRCC/PLCC复合协议。
contributions: 提出了首个针对4D世界模型生成视频的整体质量评估挑战赛，涵盖2D和4D生成设置。
构建了包含多维度标注（视频质量、物理真实性、对齐、时间一致性）和异常定位的基准数据集。

papers.title: OpenSearch-VL: An Open Recipe for Frontier Multimodal Search Agents
papers.abstract: Deep search has become a crucial capability for frontier multimodal agents, enabling models to solve complex questions through active search, evidence verification, and multi-step reasoning. Despite rapid progress, top-tier multimodal search agents remain difficult to reproduce, largely due to the absence of open high-quality training data, transparent trajectory synthesis pipelines, or detailed training recipes. To this end, we introduce OpenSearch-VL, a fully open-source recipe for training frontier multimodal deep search agents with agentic reinforcement learning. First, we curated a dedicated pipeline to construct high-quality training data through Wikipedia path sampling, fuzzy entity rewriting, and source-anchor visual grounding, which jointly reduce shortcuts and one-step retrieval collapse. Based on this pipeline, we curate two training datasets, SearchVL-SFT-36k for SFT and SearchVL-RL-8k for RL. Besides, we design a diverse tool environment that unifies text search, image search, OCR, cropping, sharpening, super-resolution, and perspective correction, enabling agents to combine active perception with external knowledge acquisition. Finally, we propose a multi-turn fatal-aware GRPO training algorithm that handles cascading tool failures by masking post-failure tokens while preserving useful pre-failure reasoning through one-sided advantage clamping. Built on this recipe, OpenSearch-VL delivers substantial performance gains, with over 10-point average improvements across seven benchmarks, and achieves results comparable to proprietary commercial models on several tasks. We will release all data, code, and models to support open research on multimodal deep search agents.

analysis.tldr: OpenSearch-VL 提出了一套完全开源的配方，通过智能体强化学习训练前沿多模态搜索智能体，在七个基准上平均提升超10个点。
analysis.research_motivation: 顶级多模态搜索智能体难以复现，因为缺乏开源的高质量训练数据、透明的轨迹合成流程和详细的训练配方。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个完全开源、可复现的多模态深度搜索智能体训练配方。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法存在捷径和一步检索崩溃问题，且工具使用中多步故障难以处理。
analysis.method: 提出 OpenSearch-VL 配方，包括：1) 通过 Wikipedia 路径采样、模糊实体重写和源锚点视觉基础构建高质量训练数据；2) 设计统一工具环境（文本搜索、图像搜索、OCR、裁剪、锐化、超分辨率、透视校正）；3) 提出多轮致命感知 GRPO 训练算法，通过掩码故障后令牌和单边优势钳制处理级联工具故障。
contributions: 提出完全开源的多模态深度搜索智能体训练配方 OpenSearch-VL，包含数据、代码和模型。
设计高质量训练数据构建流程和统一工具环境。
提出多轮致命感知 GRPO 算法，有效处理工具级联故障。
analysis.experiments: 在七个基准上平均提升超过10个点，性能与专有商业模型相当。
limitations: 可能依赖 Wikipedia 数据，泛化到其他领域需验证。
多轮致命感知 GRPO 的复杂度可能增加训练开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 开源配方、显著性能提升，与多模态智能体方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: OpenSearch-VL 提出了一套完全开源的配方，通过智能体强化学习训练前沿多模态搜索智能体，在七个基准上平均提升超10个点。

papers.title: When Life Gives You BC, Make Q-functions: Extracting Q-values from Behavior Cloning for On-Robot Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Behavior Cloning (BC) has emerged as a highly effective paradigm for robot learning. However, BC lacks a self-guided mechanism for online improvement after demonstrations have been collected. Existing offline-to-online learning methods often cause policies to replace previously learned good actions due to a distribution mismatch between offline data and online learning. In this work, we propose Q2RL, Q-Estimation and Q-Gating from BC for Reinforcement Learning, an algorithm for efficient offline-to-online learning. Our method consists of two parts: (1) Q-Estimation extracts a Q-function from a BC policy using a few interaction steps with the environment, followed by online RL with (2) Q-Gating, which switches between BC and RL policy actions based on their respective Q-values to collect samples for RL policy training. Across manipulation tasks from D4RL and robomimic benchmarks, Q2RL outperforms SOTA offline-to-online learning baselines on success rate and time to convergence. Q2RL is efficient enough to be applied in an on-robot RL setting, learning robust policies for contact-rich and high precision manipulation tasks such as pipe assembly and kitting, in 1-2 hours of online interaction, achieving success rates of up to 100% and up to 3.75x improvement against the original BC policy. Code and video are available at https://pages.rai-inst.com/q2rl_website/

analysis.tldr: 从行为克隆中提取Q函数并通过Q门控实现高效离线到在线强化学习，在机器人操作任务中显著提升成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 行为克隆（BC）在机器人学习中效果显著，但缺乏在线自我改进机制；现有离线到在线学习方法常因分布不匹配导致策略退化。
analysis.problem: 如何从BC策略中高效提取Q函数并利用其指导在线RL，避免分布偏移并加速收敛。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Q2RL算法，包含两部分：1) Q-Estimation：通过少量环境交互从BC策略中提取Q函数；2) Q-Gating：基于Q值在BC和RL策略动作间切换，为RL策略收集样本。
contributions: 提出Q2RL方法，实现从BC到RL的高效离线到在线学习。
在D4RL和robomimic基准上超越SOTA基线，并在真实机器人上1-2小时内学习鲁棒策略，成功率高达100%。
analysis.experiments: 在D4RL和robomimic基准的操控任务上评估，Q2RL在成功率和收敛时间上优于SOTA离线到在线学习方法；在真实机器人上完成管道组装和套件整理等任务，1-2小时在线交互内成功率提升至100%，相比原始BC策略提升达3.75倍。
limitations: 可能依赖初始BC策略的质量。
Q-Estimation阶段需要少量环境交互，可能不适用于完全无交互场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，在机器人学习领域有实际应用价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从行为克隆中提取Q函数并通过Q门控实现高效离线到在线强化学习，在机器人操作任务中显著提升成功率。

papers.title: Design Conductor 2.0: An agent builds a TurboQuant inference accelerator in 80 hours
papers.abstract: Driven by a rapid co-evolution of both harness and underlying models, LLM agents are improving at a dizzying pace. In our prior work (performed in Dec. 2025), we introduced "Design Conductor" (or just "Conductor"), a system capable of building a 5-stage Linux-capable RISC-V CPU in 12 hours. In this work, we introduce an updated multi-agent harness powered by frontier models released in April 2026, which is able to handle 80x larger tasks, at higher quality, fully autonomously. Following a brief introduction, we examine 4 designs that the system produced autonomously, including "VerTQ", an LLM inference accelerator which hard-wires support for TurboQuant in a 240-cycle pipeline, starting from the TurboQuant arXiv paper. VerTQ includes heavy compute processing, with 5129 FP16/32 units; the design was mapped to an FPGA at 125 MHz and consumes 5.7 mm^2 in TSMC 16FF (8 attention pipes). We review the key new characteristics that enabled these results. Finally, we analyze Design Conductor's token usage and other empirical characteristics, including its limitations.

analysis.tldr: Design Conductor 2.0 是一个多智能体系统，可自主构建 TurboQuant 推理加速器，80 小时内完成从论文到 FPGA 的设计。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM 智能体能力快速提升，但此前系统只能处理小规模任务（如 5 级 RISC-V CPU），需要扩展到更大、更复杂的硬件设计任务。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个多智能体系统，使其能够自主完成大规模硬件设计（如 LLM 推理加速器），包括从论文理解到 FPGA 实现的完整流程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于前沿模型（2026 年 4 月发布）的更新多智能体框架，能够处理 80 倍于先前工作的任务，全自主运行。
contributions: 提出 Design Conductor 2.0，一个可自主构建大规模硬件设计的系统。
展示了 VerTQ，一个从 TurboQuant 论文自动生成的 LLM 推理加速器，包含 5129 个 FP16/32 单元，在 FPGA 上以 125 MHz 运行。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定前沿模型，泛化性未知。
token 使用量可能较大，成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，展示了 LLM 智能体在硬件设计中的潜力，但摘要实验细节不足。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Design Conductor 2.0 是一个多智能体系统，可自主构建 TurboQuant 推理加速器，80 小时内完成从论文到 FPGA 的设计。

papers.title: The First Token Knows: Single-Decode Confidence for Hallucination Detection
papers.abstract: Self-consistency detects hallucinations by generating multiple sampled answers to a question and measuring agreement, but this requires repeated decoding and can be sensitive to lexical variation. Semantic self-consistency improves this by clustering sampled answers by meaning using natural language inference, but it adds both sampling cost and external inference overhead. We show that first-token confidence, phi_first, computed from the normalized entropy of the top-K logits at the first content-bearing answer token of a single greedy decode, matches or modestly exceeds semantic self-consistency on closed-book short-answer factual question answering. Across three 7-8B instruction-tuned models and two benchmarks, phi_first achieves a mean AUROC of 0.820, compared with 0.793 for semantic agreement and 0.791 for standard surface-form self-consistency. A subsumption test shows that phi_first is moderately to strongly correlated with semantic agreement, and combining the two signals yields only a small AUROC improvement over phi_first alone. These results suggest that much of the uncertainty information captured by multi-sample agreement is already available in the model's initial token distribution. We argue that phi_first should be reported as a default low-cost baseline before invoking sampling-based uncertainty estimation.

analysis.tldr: 首个token的置信度即可媲美多采样语义自洽性，用于幻觉检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有幻觉检测方法如自洽性需要多次解码，计算成本高且对词汇变化敏感；语义自洽性虽改进但增加了采样和外部推理开销。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加采样成本的前提下高效检测LLM的幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出phi_first，即单次贪心解码中首个内容token的top-K logits归一化熵，作为置信度指标。
contributions: 提出phi_first，一种基于单次解码首个token置信度的幻觉检测方法。
在多个模型和基准上证明phi_first性能与语义自洽性相当或略优，且计算成本更低。
analysis.experiments: 在三个7-8B指令微调模型和两个基准上，phi_first平均AUROC为0.820，优于语义自洽性（0.793）和表面形式自洽性（0.791）。
limitations: 仅适用于闭卷短答案事实问答，泛化性未知。
依赖首个token的logits，可能不适用于生成式任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法简单有效，实验充分，对幻觉检测有实用价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个token的置信度即可媲美多采样语义自洽性，用于幻觉检测。

papers.title: Geometry-Aware State Space Model: A New Paradigm for Whole-Slide Image Representation
papers.abstract: Accurate analysis of histopathological images is critical for disease diagnosis and treatment planning. Whole-slide images (WSIs), which digitize tissue specimens at gigapixel resolution, are fundamental to this process but require aggregating thousands of patches for slide-level predictions. Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) tackles this challenge with a two-stage paradigm, decoupling tile-level embedding and slide-level prediction. However, most existing methods implicitly embed patch representations in homogeneous Euclidean spaces, overlooking the hierarchical organization and regional heterogeneity of pathological tissues. This limits current models' ability to capture global tissue architecture and fine-grained cellular morphology. To address this limitation, we introduce a hybrid hyperbolic-Euclidean representation that embeds WSI features in dual geometric spaces, enabling complementary modeling of hierarchical tissue structures and local morphological details. Building on this formulation, we develop BatMIL, a WSI classification framework that leverages both geometric spaces. To model long-range dependencies among thousands of patches, we employ a structured state space sequence model (S4) backbone that encodes patch sequences with linear computational complexity. Furthermore, to account for regional heterogeneity, we introduce a chunk-level mixture-of-experts (MoE) module that groups patches into regions and dynamically routes them to specialized subnetworks, improving representational capacity while reducing redundant computation. Extensive experiments on seven WSI datasets spanning six cancer types demonstrate that BatMIL consistently outperforms state-of-the-art MIL approaches in slide-level classification tasks. These results indicate that geometry-aware representation learning offers a promising direction for next-generation computational pathology.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合双曲-欧几里得空间表示与状态空间模型结合的WSI分类框架BatMIL，在七个数据集上超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有WSI分析方法将病理图像块嵌入同质欧几里得空间，忽略了组织层次结构和区域异质性，限制了全局组织架构和细粒度细胞形态的建模能力。
analysis.problem: 如何有效建模全切片图像中病理组织的层次结构、区域异质性以及长程依赖关系，实现准确的幻灯片级分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出BatMIL框架：1）混合双曲-欧几里得表示，分别建模层次结构和局部细节；2）使用结构化状态空间序列模型（S4）编码补丁序列，实现线性复杂度；3）引入块级混合专家（MoE）模块，将补丁分组为区域并动态路由到专用子网络。
contributions: 首次将混合双曲-欧几里得表示引入WSI分析，实现层次结构与局部形态的互补建模。
提出BatMIL框架，结合S4序列模型和块级MoE，有效处理长程依赖和区域异质性。
在七个涵盖六种癌症类型的WSI数据集上取得一致最优性能。
analysis.experiments: 在七个涵盖六种癌症类型的WSI数据集上进行幻灯片级分类实验，BatMIL持续优于现有最先进的MIL方法。
limitations: 可能对超参数（如双曲空间曲率、MoE专家数量）敏感。
未在更大规模或更多样化的数据集上验证泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（双曲空间+状态空间模型+MoE），实验充分，与医学图像分析方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出混合双曲-欧几里得空间表示与状态空间模型结合的WSI分类框架BatMIL，在七个数据集上超越现有方法。

papers.title: PhysForge: Generating Physics-Grounded 3D Assets for Interactive Virtual World
papers.abstract: Synthesizing physics-grounded 3D assets is a critical bottleneck for interactive virtual worlds and embodied AI. Existing methods predominantly focus on static geometry, overlooking the functional properties essential for interaction. We propose that interactive asset generation must be rooted in functional logic and hierarchical physics. To bridge this gap, we introduce PhysForge, a decoupled two-stage framework supported by PhysDB, a large-scale dataset of 150,000 assets with four-tier physical annotations. First, a VLM acts as a "physical architect" to plan a "Hierarchical Physical Blueprint" defining material, functional, and kinematic constraints. Second, a physics-grounded diffusion model realizes this blueprint by synthesizing high-fidelity geometry alongside precise kinematic parameters via a novel KineVoxel Injection (KVI) mechanism. Experiments demonstrate that PhysForge produces functionally plausible, simulation-ready assets, providing a robust data engine for interactive 3D content and embodied agents.

analysis.tldr: PhysForge通过解耦两阶段框架和大型物理标注数据集，生成具备物理交互属性的3D资产。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D资产生成方法主要关注静态几何，忽略了交互所需的功能属性，成为交互式虚拟世界和具身AI的瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何生成具有物理交互属性（如材料、功能、运动学约束）的3D资产。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 解耦两阶段框架：1) VLM作为物理架构师规划分层物理蓝图；2) 物理引导扩散模型通过KineVoxel Injection机制合成高保真几何和精确运动学参数。
contributions: 提出PhysForge框架，将物理属性融入3D资产生成。
构建PhysDB数据集，包含15万资产和四层物理标注。
设计KineVoxel Injection机制实现运动学参数生成。
