analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且针对交互式虚拟世界和具身AI的关键瓶颈，但摘要未提供实验细节。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PhysForge通过解耦两阶段框架和大型物理标注数据集，生成具备物理交互属性的3D资产。

papers.title: Wasserstein-Aligned Localisation for VLM-Based Distributional OOD Detection in Medical Imaging
papers.abstract: Zero-shot anomaly localisation via vision-language models (VLMs) offers a compelling approach for rare pathology detection, yet its performance is fundamentally limited by the absence of healthy anatomical context. We reformulate zero-shot localisation as a comparative inference problem in which anomalies are identified through structured comparison against reference distributions of normal anatomy. We introduce WALDO, a training-free framework grounded in optimal transport theory that enables comparative reasoning through: (i) entropy-weighted Sliced Wasserstein distances for anatomically-aware reference selection from DINOv2 patch distributions, (ii) Goldilocks zone sampling exploiting the non-monotonic relationship between reference similarity and localisation accuracy, and (iii) self-consistency aggregation via weighted non-maximum suppression. We theoretically analyse the Goldilocks effect through distributional divergence, and show that references with moderate similarity minimize a bias-variance trade-off in comparative visual reasoning. On the NOVA brain MRI benchmark, WALDO with Qwen2.5-VL-72B achieves $43.5_{\pm1.6}\%$ mAP@30 (95\% CI: [40.4, 46.7]), representing a 19\% relative improvement over zero-shot baselines. Cross-model evaluation shows consistent gains: GPT-4o achieves $32.0_{\pm6.5}\%$ and Qwen3-VL-32B achieves $32.0_{\pm6.6}\%$ mAP@30. Paired McNemar tests confirm statistical significance ($p<0.01$). Source code is available at https://github.com/bkainz/WALDO_MICCAI26_demo .

analysis.tldr: 提出WALDO框架，利用最优传输理论实现无训练的比较推理，显著提升VLM在医学图像中的零样本异常定位性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 零样本异常定位通过视觉语言模型（VLM）检测罕见病理，但缺乏健康解剖上下文，性能受限。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖训练数据的情况下，利用VLM进行分布外（OOD）异常定位，并克服缺乏正常解剖参考的局限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现参考相似性与定位精度之间存在非单调关系，中等相似性参考可最小化比较视觉推理中的偏差-方差权衡（Goldilocks效应）。
analysis.method: 提出WALDO框架，基于最优传输理论，包含熵加权Sliced Wasserstein距离进行解剖感知参考选择、Goldilocks区域采样和自一致性聚合。
contributions: 将零样本定位重新定义为比较推理问题，利用参考分布进行结构化比较。
提出WALDO框架，无需训练，通过最优传输实现解剖感知参考选择和Goldilocks采样。
理论分析Goldilocks效应，证明中等相似性参考可优化偏差-方差权衡。
在NOVA脑MRI基准上实现19%的相对改进，跨模型验证统计显著性。
analysis.experiments: 在NOVA脑MRI基准上评估，WALDO with Qwen2.5-VL-72B达到43.5% mAP@30，相对改进19%；GPT-4o和Qwen3-VL-32B均达32.0% mAP@30。McNemar检验p<0.01。
limitations: 仅针对医学影像（脑MRI），泛化性待验证。
依赖VLM的视觉编码能力，可能受限于模型本身。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，理论分析深入，实验验证充分，与VLM和医学图像方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出WALDO框架，利用最优传输理论实现无训练的比较推理，显著提升VLM在医学图像中的零样本异常定位性能。

papers.title: Seeing What Shouldn't Be There: Counterfactual GANs for Medical Image Attribution
papers.abstract: Ascription of an image gives insights into the objects that influence the classification of the whole image or its pixels towards a specific category. These insights help radiologists to visualize deformities in medical imaging. Most of the existing visualization techniques are based on discriminative models and highlight regions of the input image participating in the decision-making of a classifier. However, these approaches do not take all noticeable objects into account as their objective is to classify the input by using a minimal set of discriminative features. To overcome the issue, a counterfactual explanation (CX) based class-oriented feature attribution method is proposed. A counterfactual explanation (CX) explicates a causal reasoning process of the form: "if X had not happened, then Y would not have happened". The method is built on generative adversarial networks (GANs) with a cyclical-consistent loss function. We evaluate our method on three datasets: synthetic, tuberculosis and BraTS. All experiments confirm the efficacy of the proposed method. This study also highlighted the limitations of existing counterfactual explanation techniques in producing plausible counterfactual instances (CIs). Accompanying CXs with believable CIs thus provides self-explanatory analogy-based explanations. To this end, a CI generation method is proposed. Also, a novel technique is used to evaluate the quality of CI. The baseline results are produced on the BraTS dataset.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于GAN的反事实归因方法，生成可信的反事实实例以解释医学图像分类。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有可视化技术基于判别模型，仅使用最小判别特征集，忽略其他显著对象，无法提供完整解释。
analysis.problem: 如何生成考虑所有显著对象的反事实解释，并产生可信的反事实实例用于医学图像归因。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有反事实解释技术难以生成可信的反事实实例。
analysis.method: 基于生成对抗网络（GAN）和循环一致性损失构建反事实解释方法，并设计反事实实例生成与质量评估技术。
contributions: 提出基于GAN的反事实归因方法，克服判别模型仅使用最小判别特征的局限。
提出反事实实例生成方法，提供自解释的类比解释。
提出新颖的反事实实例质量评估技术。
analysis.experiments: 在合成数据集、肺结核数据集和BraTS数据集上验证，所有实验证实方法有效性，并在BraTS上产生基线结果。
limitations: 摘要未提及计算效率或实时性。
可能依赖数据集规模和质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且针对医学图像解释痛点，实验验证有效，但技术细节未充分展开。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于GAN的反事实归因方法，生成可信的反事实实例以解释医学图像分类。

papers.title: PSK at SemEval-2026 Task 9: Multilingual Polarization Detection Using Ensemble Gemma Models with Synthetic Data Augmentation
papers.abstract: We present our system for SemEval-2026 Task 9: Multilingual Polarization Detection, a binary classification task spanning 22 languages. Our approach fine-tunes separate Gemma~3 models (12B and 27B parameters) per language using Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA), augmented with synthetic data generated by a large language model (LLM). We employ three synthetic data strategies (direct generation, paraphrasing, and contrastive pair creation) using GPT-4o-mini, with a multi-stage quality filtering pipeline including embedding-based deduplication. We find that per-language threshold tuning on the development set yields 2 to 4\% F1 improvements without retraining. We also use weighted ensembles of 12B and 27B model predictions with per-language strategy selection. Our final system achieves a mean macro-F1 of 0.811 across all 22 languages, ranking 2nd overall of the participating teams, with 1st place finishes in 3 languages and top-3 in 8 languages. We also find that alternative architectures (XLM-RoBERTa, Qwen3) that showed strong development set performance suffered 30 to 50\% F1 drops on the test set, highlighting the importance of generalization.

analysis.tldr: 使用LoRA微调Gemma模型结合合成数据增强，在多语言极化检测任务中取得第二名。
analysis.research_motivation: 多语言极化检测面临数据稀缺和跨语言泛化挑战，现有方法在测试集上泛化能力不足。
analysis.problem: 如何有效利用合成数据增强和模型集成提升多语言极化检测的准确性和泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 替代架构（XLM-RoBERTa, Qwen3）在开发集表现良好但测试集F1下降30-50%，表明泛化是关键瓶颈。
analysis.method: 为每种语言单独微调Gemma 3模型（12B和27B），使用LoRA；采用三种合成数据策略（直接生成、释义、对比对）并用GPT-4o-mini生成，经多阶段质量过滤；开发集上每语言阈值调优；加权集成12B和27B模型预测，每语言选择最佳策略。
contributions: 提出基于Gemma模型和LoRA微调的多语言极化检测系统，结合合成数据增强和集成策略。
在SemEval-2026任务9中取得第二名，在3种语言中排名第一，8种语言进入前三。
analysis.experiments: 在22种语言上评估，平均macro-F1为0.811，排名第二；替代架构泛化失败。
limitations: 依赖GPT-4o-mini生成合成数据，可能引入偏差。
每语言单独微调模型，计算成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法实用但创新有限，实验充分但任务特定，适合关注多语言NLP的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 使用LoRA微调Gemma模型结合合成数据增强，在多语言极化检测任务中取得第二名。

papers.title: Aes3D: Aesthetic Assessment in 3D Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: As 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) gains attention in immersive media and digital content creation, assessing the aesthetics of 3D scenes becomes important in helping creators build more visually compelling 3D content. However, existing evaluation methods for 3D scenes primarily emphasize reconstruction fidelity and perceptual realism, largely overlooking higher-level aesthetic attributes such as composition, harmony, and visual appeal. This limitation comes from two key challenges: (1) the absence of general 3DGS datasets with aesthetic annotations, and (2) the intrinsic nature of 3DGS as a low-level primitive representation, which makes it difficult to capture high-level aesthetic features. To address these challenges, we propose Aes3D, the first systematic framework for assessing the aesthetics of 3D neural rendering scenes. Aes3D includes Aesthetic3D, the first dataset dedicated to 3D scene aesthetic assessment, built on our proposed annotation strategy for 3D scene aesthetics. In addition, we present Aes3DGSNet, a lightweight model that directly predicts scene-level aesthetic scores from 3DGS representations. Notably, our model operates solely on 3D Gaussian primitives, eliminating the need for rendering multi-view images and thus reducing computational cost and hardware requirements. Through aesthetics-supervised learning on multi-view 3DGS scene representations, Aes3DGSNet effectively captures high-level aesthetic cues and accurately regresses aesthetic scores. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach achieves strong performance while maintaining a lightweight design, establishing a new benchmark for 3D scene aesthetic assessment. Code and datasets will be made available in a future version.

analysis.tldr: 首个针对3D高斯泼溅场景的美学评估框架，包含专用数据集和轻量级评分网络。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D场景评估方法只关注重建保真度和感知真实感，忽略了构图、和谐度等高级美学属性，而3DGS在沉浸式媒体和数字内容创作中日益重要，亟需美学评估工具。
analysis.problem: 缺乏带美学标注的3DGS数据集，且3DGS作为低层基元表示难以捕获高层美学特征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Aes3D框架，包含Aesthetic3D数据集（基于3D场景美学标注策略构建）和Aes3DGSNet（轻量级模型，直接在3D高斯基元上预测场景级美学分数，无需渲染多视图图像）。
contributions: 首个针对3D神经渲染场景的美学评估系统Aes3D。
首个3D场景美学评估数据集Aesthetic3D及标注策略。
轻量级模型Aes3DGSNet，直接从3DGS表示预测美学分数，降低计算成本。
analysis.experiments: 实验结果表明方法在保持轻量设计的同时取得了强性能，建立了3D场景美学评估的新基准。
limitations: 数据集规模可能有限，泛化性待验证。

analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 首个3DGS美学评估工作，数据集和轻量模型有实用价值，但技术深度中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个针对3D高斯泼溅场景的美学评估框架，包含专用数据集和轻量级评分网络。

papers.title: Superposition Is Not Necessary: A Mechanistic Interpretability Analysis of Transformer Representations for Time Series Forecasting
papers.abstract: Transformer architectures have been widely adopted for time series forecasting, yet whether the representational mechanisms that make them powerful in NLP actually engage on time series data remains unexplored. The persistent competitiveness of simple linear models such as DLinear has fueled ongoing debate, but no mechanistic explanation for this phenomenon has been offered. We address this gap by applying sparse autoencoders (SAEs), a tool from mechanistic interpretability, to probe the internal representations of PatchTST. We first establish that a single-layer, narrow-dimensional transformer matches the forecasting performance of deeper configurations across commonly used benchmarks. We then train SAEs on the post-GELU intermediate FFN activations with dictionary sizes ranging from 0.5x to 4.0x the native dimensionality. Expanding the dictionary yields negligible downstream performance change (average 0.214%), with large portions of overcomplete dictionaries remaining inactive. Targeted causal interventions on dominant latent features produce minimal forecast perturbation. Across all evaluated settings, we observe no empirical evidence that the analyzed FFN representations rely on strong superposition. Instead, the representations remain sparse, stable under aggressive dictionary expansion, and largely insensitive to latent interventions. These results demonstrate that superposition is not necessary for competitive performance on standard forecasting benchmarks, suggesting they may not demand the rich compositional representations that drive transformer success in language modeling, and helping explain the persistent competitiveness of simple linear models

analysis.tldr: 通过稀疏自编码器分析发现，时间序列Transformer的FFN表示并不依赖叠加（superposition），这解释了为何简单线性模型仍具竞争力。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer在时间序列预测中广泛应用，但简单线性模型（如DLinear）仍具竞争力，其背后的机制原因尚未被解释。
analysis.problem: 探究时间序列Transformer的内部表示是否依赖叠加（superposition）机制，以及为何简单线性模型仍能与之竞争。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：字典扩展对性能影响极小（平均0.214%），过完备字典大部分神经元不活跃，对主导潜在特征进行因果干预几乎不改变预测结果，表明FFN表示稀疏且不依赖叠加。
analysis.method: 使用稀疏自编码器（SAE）分析PatchTST的FFN中间激活，通过不同字典大小、因果干预等方法检验叠加假设。
contributions: 首次从机制可解释性角度分析时间序列Transformer的表示，发现其不依赖叠加。
为简单线性模型在时间序列预测中的持续竞争力提供了机制解释。
analysis.experiments: 在常用基准上，单层窄Transformer匹配深层性能；SAE字典大小从0.5x到4.0x原生维度，性能变化平均0.214%；因果干预实验。
limitations: 仅分析了PatchTST一种架构，可能不适用于其他时间序列Transformer变体。
SAE分析局限于FFN层，未覆盖注意力机制等其他组件。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.reason: 方法创新（SAE用于时间序列可解释性）且结果有启发性，但实验仅针对单一架构，影响有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过稀疏自编码器分析发现，时间序列Transformer的FFN表示并不依赖叠加（superposition），这解释了为何简单线性模型仍具竞争力。

papers.title: What Matters in Practical Learned Image Compression
papers.abstract: One of the major differentiators unlocked by learned codecs relative to their hard-coded traditional counterparts is their ability to be optimized directly to appeal to the human visual system. Despite this potential, a perceptual yet practical image codec is yet to be proposed. In this work, we aim to close this gap. We conduct a comprehensive study of the key modeling choices that govern the design of a practical learned image codec, jointly optimized for perceptual quality and runtime -- including within the ablations several novel techniques. We then perform performance-aware neural architecture search over millions of backbone configurations to identify models that achieve the target on-device runtime while maximizing compression performance as captured by perceptual metrics. We combine the various optimizations to construct a new codec that achieves a significantly improved tradeoff between speed and perceptual quality. Based on rigorous subjective user studies, it provides 2.3-3x bitrate savings against AV1, AV2, VVC, ECM and JPEG-AI, and 20-40% bitrate savings against the best learned codec alternatives. At the same time, on an iPhone 17 Pro Max, it encodes 12MP images as fast as 230ms, and decodes them in 150ms -- faster than most top ML-based codecs run on a V100 GPU.

analysis.tldr: 通过神经架构搜索和多项优化，提出一种在感知质量和运行速度上均显著优于传统和现有学习编解码器的实用图像压缩方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 学习型编解码器理论上可针对人类视觉系统优化，但尚未出现既感知友好又实用的图像编解码器，现有方法在速度与感知质量间存在权衡。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个在感知质量和运行时速度上同时达到实用水平的学习型图像编解码器。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 对关键建模选择进行综合消融研究（包含若干新技术），然后执行性能感知的神经架构搜索，在数百万骨干配置中寻找满足目标设备运行时且最大化感知指标压缩性能的模型，最后组合多种优化构建新编解码器。
contributions: 首次提出兼顾感知质量和实用运行速度的学习型图像编解码器。
通过神经架构搜索和多项技术优化，在感知质量上比AV1等传统标准节省2.3-3倍码率，比最佳学习编解码器节省20-40%码率。
在iPhone 17 Pro Max上实现12MP图像编码230ms、解码150ms，速度快于多数顶级ML编解码器在V100 GPU上的运行速度。
analysis.experiments: 基于严格的主观用户研究，与AV1、AV2、VVC、ECM、JPEG-AI及最佳学习编解码器进行对比，并报告了在iPhone 17 Pro Max上的实际运行时间。
limitations: 可能仅在特定硬件（iPhone 17 Pro Max）上验证了速度优势。
感知质量优化可能依赖特定主观测试设置，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且结果显著，对实用图像压缩领域有重要推动作用。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过神经架构搜索和多项优化，提出一种在感知质量和运行速度上均显著优于传统和现有学习编解码器的实用图像压缩方法。

papers.title: Executable World Models for ARC-AGI-3 in the Era of Coding Agents
papers.abstract: We evaluate an initial coding-agent system for ARC-AGI-3 in which the agent maintains an executable Python world model, verifies it against previous observations, refactors it toward simpler abstractions as a practical proxy for an MDL-like simplicity bias, and plans through the model before acting. The system is intentionally direct: it uses a scripted controller, predefined world-model interfaces, verifier programs, and a plan executor, but no hand-coded game-specific logic. We report results on the 25 public ARC-AGI-3 games. Each recorded playthrough uses a fresh agent instance with no access to previous playthrough-specific files or conversation state. Most games have a single recorded playthrough; for a few games, we report multiple independent fresh-agent playthroughs to expose run-to-run variability. The agent fully solved 7 games, achieved a Relative Human Action Efficiency greater than 75%, on 6 games, and obtained a mean per-game RHAE of 32.58%. Because the system uses no game-specific code, it can serve as a game-general baseline for ARC-AGI-3. Performance on the private validation set remains to be tested. Overall, the results provide preliminary evidence that verifier-driven executable world models are a promising approach for ARC-AGI-3 agents.

analysis.tldr: 基于可执行世界模型和编码智能体的系统在ARC-AGI-3上取得初步成功，无需游戏特定代码。
analysis.research_motivation: ARC-AGI-3任务要求通用智能体从少量观测中学习抽象规则并泛化，现有方法依赖手工编码或大量数据，缺乏可解释性和泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个无需游戏特定代码、能通过世界模型验证和规划来解决ARC-AGI-3任务的通用智能体系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 系统包含脚本控制器、预定义世界模型接口、验证器程序和计划执行器；智能体维护可执行的Python世界模型，通过验证器与历史观测对比，重构为更简单的抽象（近似MDL简单性偏差），并在行动前通过模型进行规划。
contributions: 提出了一种基于可执行世界模型和编码智能体的通用ARC-AGI-3基线系统，无需游戏特定代码。
在25个公开ARC-AGI-3游戏上进行了评估，完全解决了7个游戏，平均RHAE为32.58%。
analysis.experiments: 在25个公开ARC-AGI-3游戏上测试，每个游戏使用全新智能体实例，无先前游戏文件或对话状态。完全解决7个游戏，6个游戏RHAE>75%，平均RHAE 32.58%。私有验证集性能待测。
limitations: 仅在公开游戏上测试，私有验证集性能未知。
大多数游戏只有单次记录，运行间变异性未充分评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，结合世界模型与编码智能体，但实验规模有限，适合精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于可执行世界模型和编码智能体的系统在ARC-AGI-3上取得初步成功，无需游戏特定代码。

papers.title: CPCANet: Deep Unfolding Common Principal Component Analysis for Domain Generalization
papers.abstract: Domain Generalization (DG) aims to learn representations that remain robust under out-of-distribution (OOD) shifts and generalize effectively to unseen target domains. While recent invariant learning strategies and architectural advances have achieved strong performance, explicitly discovering a structured domain-invariant subspace through second-order statistics remains underexplored. In this work, we propose CPCANet, a novel framework grounded in Common Principal Component Analysis (CPCA), which unrolls the iterative Flury-Gautschi (FG) algorithm into fully differentiable neural layers. This approach integrates the statistical properties of CPCA into an end-to-end trainable framework, enforcing the discovery of a shared subspace across diverse domains while preserving interpretability. Experiments on four standard DG benchmarks demonstrate that CPCANet achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance in zero-shot transfer. Moreover, CPCANet is architecture-agnostic and requires no dataset-specific tuning, providing a simple and efficient approach to learning robust representations under distribution shift. Code is available at https://github.com/wish44165/CPCANet.

analysis.tldr: 将共同主成分分析展开为可微神经网络，用于域泛化中的不变子空间学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 域泛化旨在学习对分布偏移鲁棒的表示，现有方法多依赖不变学习策略或架构改进，但通过二阶统计量显式发现结构化域不变子空间的方法尚未充分探索。
analysis.problem: 如何利用共同主成分分析（CPCA）的统计特性，通过可微展开学习一个跨域共享的、可解释的域不变子空间，以提升域泛化性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CPCANet，将CPCA的迭代Flury-Gautschi（FG）算法展开为全可微神经网络层，集成到端到端训练框架中，强制学习跨域共享子空间并保持可解释性。
contributions: 首次将CPCA的FG算法展开为可微神经网络，实现端到端域不变子空间学习。
在四个标准DG基准上达到零样本迁移的SOTA性能，且架构无关、无需数据集特定调参。
analysis.experiments: 在四个标准域泛化基准上评估，零样本迁移达到SOTA。
limitations: 可能对大规模高维数据计算开销较大。
仅基于二阶统计量，可能无法捕捉高阶非线性不变性。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.reason: 方法新颖（展开CPCA），实验充分（四个基准SOTA），但属于增量贡献，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将共同主成分分析展开为可微神经网络，用于域泛化中的不变子空间学习。

papers.title: Joint Treatment Effect Estimation from Incomplete Healthcare Data: Temporal Causal Normalizing Flows with LLM-driven Evolutionary MNAR Imputation
papers.abstract: Target trial emulation (TTE) enables causal questions to be studied with observational data when randomized controlled trials (RCTs) are infeasible. Yet treatment-effect methods often address causal estimation, missingness, and temporal structure separately, limiting their robustness in electronic health records (EHRs), where time-varying confounding and missing-not-at-random (MNAR) biomarkers can reach 50%--80%. We propose a two-stage pipeline for treatment effect estimation from incomplete longitudinal EHRs. First, CausalFlow-T, a directed acyclic graph (DAG)-constrained normalizing flow with long short-term memory (LSTM)-encoded patient history, performs exact invertible counterfactual inference, avoiding approximation errors from variational inference and separating confounding through explicit causal structure. Ablations on four synthetic and one semi-synthetic benchmark with known counterfactuals show that DAG constraints and exact inference address distinct failure modes: neither compensates for the other. Second, because CausalFlow-T requires completed inputs, we introduce an LLM-driven evolutionary imputer that proposes executable imputation operators rather than individual entries, and evaluate it with three large language model (LLM) backends, including two open-source models. Across 30%--80% MNAR missingness, this imputer achieves the best pooled rank over biomarker and causal metrics, leading in point-wise accuracy and temporal extrapolation while preserving average treatment effect (ATE) recovery as statistical baselines degrade. On Swiss primary-care EHRs from adults with type 2 diabetes initiating a GLP-1 receptor agonist or SGLT-2 inhibitor, the pipeline estimates a per-protocol weight-loss difference of -0.98 kg [95% CI -1.01, -0.96] favoring GLP-1 receptor agonists, consistent with randomized evidence and obtained from realistically incomplete real-world EHRs.

analysis.tldr: 提出两阶段因果效应估计流程，结合DAG约束归一化流与LLM驱动的进化插补，处理缺失非随机纵向EHR数据。
analysis.research_motivation: 随机对照试验不可行时，目标试验模拟利用观察数据研究因果问题，但现有方法将因果估计、缺失处理和时序结构分离，在电子健康记录中因时变混杂和缺失非随机（MNAR）生物标志物（缺失率可达50%-80%）而鲁棒性不足。
analysis.problem: 从缺失非随机（MNAR）的纵向电子健康记录数据中准确估计联合处理效应。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 消融实验表明，DAG约束和精确推断分别解决不同的失败模式，两者不可相互替代；LLM驱动的进化插补在30%-80% MNAR缺失率下，在生物标志物和因果指标上取得最佳综合排名。
analysis.method: 两阶段流程：第一阶段CausalFlow-T，使用DAG约束的归一化流结合LSTM编码的患者历史，进行精确可逆反事实推断；第二阶段LLM驱动的进化插补器，生成可执行的插补算子而非单个条目，利用大语言模型后端。
contributions: 提出CausalFlow-T，一种DAG约束的归一化流，实现精确可逆反事实推断，避免变分推断的近似误差。
引入LLM驱动的进化插补器，处理高缺失率MNAR数据，在多个指标上优于统计基线。
在合成、半合成基准和真实瑞士初级保健EHR上验证，估计的GLP-1受体激动剂与SGLT-2抑制剂体重差异与随机证据一致。
analysis.experiments: 在四个合成和一个半合成基准（已知反事实）上进行消融实验，并在瑞士初级保健EHR（2型糖尿病成人患者）上评估，缺失率30%-80% MNAR。摘要未提供具体实验结果数值。
limitations: 依赖LLM后端，可能受限于模型质量和计算成本。
DAG约束假设可能不适用于所有实际场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.reason: 方法创新结合因果推断与LLM，实验设计较全面，但摘要未提供具体数值结果，影响评分。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出两阶段因果效应估计流程，结合DAG约束归一化流与LLM驱动的进化插补，处理缺失非随机纵向EHR数据。

papers.title: Adaptive Policy Selection and Fine-Tuning under Interaction Budgets for Offline-to-Online Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: In offline-to-online reinforcement learning (O2O-RL), policies are first safely trained offline using previously collected datasets and then further fine-tuned for tasks via limited online interactions. In a typical O2O-RL pipeline, candidate policies trained with offline RL are evaluated via either off-policy evaluation (OPE) or online evaluation (OE). The policy with the highest estimated value is then deployed and continually fine-tuned. However, this setup has two main issues. First, OPE can be unreliable, making it risky to deploy a policy based solely on those estimates, whereas OE may identify a viable policy with substantial online interaction, which could have been used for fine-tuning. Second--and more importantly--it is also often not possible to determine a priori whether a pretrained policy will improve with post-deployment fine-tuning, especially in non-stationary environments. As a result, procedures committing to a single deployed policy are impractical in many real-world settings. Moreover, a naive remedy that exhaustively fine-tunes all candidates would violate interaction budget constraints and is likewise infeasible. In this paper, we propose a novel adaptive approach for policy selection and fine-tuning under online interaction budgets in O2O-RL. Following the standard pipeline, we first train a set of candidate policies with different offline RL algorithms and hyperparameters; we then perform OPE to obtain initial performance estimates. We next adaptively select and fine-tune the policies based on their predicted performance via an upper-confidence-bound approach thereby making efficient use of online interactions. We demonstrate that our approach improves upon O2O-RL baselines with various benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种自适应策略选择与微调方法，在离线到在线强化学习中高效利用在线交互预算。
analysis.research_motivation: 离线到在线强化学习（O2O-RL）中，离线策略评估（OPE）不可靠，在线评估（OE）消耗大量交互预算，且无法预先确定预训练策略能否通过微调提升，导致固定单一策略的流程不实用，而穷举微调所有候选策略又违反预算约束。
analysis.problem: 如何在有限的在线交互预算下，自适应地选择并微调离线预训练策略，以最大化最终性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出OPE不可靠、OE消耗大、策略微调效果不确定，且穷举微调不可行。
analysis.method: 先训练一组候选策略，用OPE获得初始性能估计，然后基于上置信界（UCB）方法自适应地选择策略进行微调，高效利用在线交互。
contributions: 提出一种自适应策略选择与微调框架，解决O2O-RL中交互预算有限的问题。
采用UCB方法平衡探索与利用，提升在线交互效率。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖OPE初始估计的质量。
UCB方法在策略数量多时计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.reason: 方法有创新但实验细节缺失，适合保存后续关注。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种自适应策略选择与微调方法，在离线到在线强化学习中高效利用在线交互预算。

papers.title: On the Wasserstein Gradient Flow Interpretation of Drifting Models
papers.abstract: Recently, Deng et al. (2026) proposed Generative Modeling via Drifting (GMD), a novel framework for generative tasks. This note presents an analysis of GMD through the lens of Wasserstein Gradient Flows (WGF), i.e., the path of steepest descent for a functional in the space of probability measures, equipped with the geometry of optimal transport. Unlike previous WGF-based contributions, GMD can be thought of as directly targeting a fixed point of a specific WGF flow. We demonstrate three main results: first, that one algorithm proposed by Deng et al. (2026) corresponds to finding the limiting point of a WGF on the KL divergence, with Parzen smoothing on the densities. Second, that the algorithm actually implemented by Deng et al. (2026) corresponds to a different procedure, which bears some resemblance to the fixed point of a WGF on the Sinkhorn divergence, but lacks certain desirable properties of the latter. Third, the same same idea can be extended to the limiting point of other WGFs, including the Maximum Mean Discrepancy (MMD), the sliced Wasserstein distance, and GAN critic functions.

analysis.tldr: 从Wasserstein梯度流视角解释漂移生成模型，揭示其与KL散度、Sinkhorn散度等WGF固定点的联系。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成模型的理论基础对理解算法行为和改进至关重要，但新提出的漂移模型（GMD）缺乏从最优传输几何角度的严格分析。
analysis.problem: 从Wasserstein梯度流（WGF）视角解释GMD算法的数学本质，明确其与不同散度WGF固定点的对应关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将GMD算法映射为WGF固定点求解：证明一个版本对应KL散度WGF（带Parzen平滑），实际实现版本类似Sinkhorn散度WGF固定点但缺理想性质，并推广到MMD、切片Wasserstein距离和GAN判别器。
contributions: 证明Deng等人提出的一个GMD算法等价于KL散度WGF的极限点（带Parzen平滑）。
揭示实际实现的GMD算法与Sinkhorn散度WGF固定点的相似性及差异。
将GMD思想推广到其他WGF（MMD、切片Wasserstein、GAN判别器）。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论分析未涉及算法实际性能或收敛性保证。
推广部分缺乏实验验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 理论分析有深度，但缺乏实验且仅针对特定方法，影响有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从Wasserstein梯度流视角解释漂移生成模型，揭示其与KL散度、Sinkhorn散度等WGF固定点的联系。

papers.title: LineRides: Line-Guided Reinforcement Learning for Bicycle Robot Stunts
papers.abstract: Designing reward functions for agile robotic maneuvers in reinforcement learning remains difficult, and demonstration-based approaches often require reference motions that are unavailable for novel platforms or extreme stunts. We present LineRides, a line-guided learning framework that enables a custom bicycle robot to acquire diverse, commandable stunt behaviors from a user-provided spatial guideline and sparse key-orientations, without demonstrations or explicit timing. LineRides handles physically infeasible guidelines using a tracking margin that permits controlled deviation, resolves temporal ambiguity by measuring progress via traveled distance along the guideline, and disambiguates motion details through position- and sequence-based key-orientations. We evaluate LineRides on the Ultra Mobility Vehicle (UMV) and show that the policy trained with our methods supports seamless transitions between normal driving and stunt execution, enabling five distinct stunts on command: MiniHop, LargeHop, ThreePointTurn, Backflip, and DriftTurn.

analysis.tldr: 提出 LineRides 框架，通过空间引导线和稀疏关键朝向使自行车机器人无需演示即可学习多种特技动作。
analysis.research_motivation: 为敏捷机器人动作设计奖励函数困难，且演示方法需要参考动作，对于新平台或极限特技不可用。
analysis.problem: 如何在没有演示和显式时序的情况下，让自行车机器人学会多样化的、可命令的特技行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: LineRides 框架：用户提供空间引导线和稀疏关键朝向，使用跟踪裕度处理不可行引导线，通过沿引导线行进距离解决时间模糊性，利用位置和序列关键朝向消除运动细节歧义。
contributions: 提出无需演示的线引导学习框架 LineRides，使自行车机器人获得多种特技行为。
在 Ultra Mobility Vehicle (UMV) 上验证了五种不同特技的可命令执行和与正常驾驶的无缝切换。
analysis.experiments: 在 Ultra Mobility Vehicle (UMV) 上评估，策略支持正常驾驶与特技执行之间的无缝切换，实现了五种特技：MiniHop、LargeHop、ThreePointTurn、Backflip 和 DriftTurn。
limitations: 可能依赖用户提供的引导线质量。
未提及在更复杂环境或不同机器人平台上的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，但实验仅在一个平台上，且未与基线对比，建议阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 LineRides 框架，通过空间引导线和稀疏关键朝向使自行车机器人无需演示即可学习多种特技动作。

papers.title: Building informative materials datasets beyond targeted objectives
papers.abstract: Materials science data collection can be expensive, making the reuse and long-term utility of datasets critical important for future discovery campaigns. In practice, researchers prioritize a subset of properties due to research interests. However, ignoring a subset of outcomes in data collection campaigns potentially generate datasets poorly suited for future learning tasks. Here, we present a framework for dataset construction that maximizes informativeness for target properties of interest while preserving performance on untargeted ones. Our approach uses diversity-aware selection to ensure broad coverage of the materials space. In noisy experimental dataset construction, we find that without our diversity-aware framework, prediction performance on untargeted properties can degrade by up to 40% relative to random sampling, whereas applying our framework yields improvements of up to 10% . For targeted properties, performance can degrade with respect to random sampling by up to 12.5% without diversity, while our framework achieves gains of up to 25%. Incorporating diversity into dataset construction not only preserves informativeness for the targeted properties, but also improves materials coverage for potential future objectives. As a result, the constructed datasets remain broadly informative across considered and unconsidered outcomes, ensuring unbiased quality entries and mitigating cold-start limitations in subsequent modeling and discovery campaigns.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个多样性感知的数据集构建框架，在最大化目标属性信息量的同时保持非目标属性的预测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 材料科学数据收集成本高昂，但现有数据集常因只关注特定属性而忽略其他属性，导致未来学习任务中数据集适用性差。
analysis.problem: 如何在构建材料数据集时，既最大化目标属性的信息量，又保持对非目标属性的预测性能，避免数据集偏倚。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：无多样性感知时，非目标属性预测性能相比随机采样下降高达40%，目标属性下降12.5%；而引入多样性后，非目标属性提升10%，目标属性提升25%。
analysis.method: 提出一个多样性感知的数据集构建框架，通过多样性感知选择确保材料空间的广泛覆盖，同时优化目标属性的信息量。
contributions: 提出一个兼顾目标与非目标属性的材料数据集构建框架。
通过实验证明多样性感知能显著提升非目标属性的预测性能（最高10%），并改善目标属性性能（最高25%）。
analysis.experiments: 在噪声实验数据集上进行了验证，比较了有无多样性感知框架下的预测性能，并与随机采样对比。
limitations: 摘要未提及框架在不同材料类型或更大规模数据集上的泛化能力。
未讨论计算成本或多样性度量的选择对结果的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.reason: 方法有实际价值，但摘要实验细节有限，创新性中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个多样性感知的数据集构建框架，在最大化目标属性信息量的同时保持非目标属性的预测性能。

papers.title: Text Corpora as Concept Fields: Black-Box Hallucination and Novelty Measurement
papers.abstract: We introduce the \textbf{Concept Field} of a text corpus: a local drift field with pointwise uncertainty, estimated in sentence-embedding space from the deltas between consecutive sentences. Given a candidate sentence transition, we score its agreement with the field by $ζ$, the mean absolute z-distance between the observed delta and the field's local Gaussian estimate. The score is black-box (no model internals), corpus-attributable (every score traces to nearby corpus sentences), and admits a probabilistically motivated interpretation under a local Gaussian approximation. We support the computation with the introduction of a \textbf{Vector Sequence Database (VSDB)} that stores embeddings together with sequence-position and next-delta metadata. We evaluate this approach on two large-scale settings: hallucination-style groundedness detection over the U.S. Code of Federal Regulations, and novelty detection over Project Gutenberg. On controlled LLM-generated rewrites, Concept Fields achieve strong selective classification performance under a grounded / ungrounded / unsure triage policy. Unlike retrieval-centric baselines, the resulting coverage-risk behavior is similar across both domains, supporting a degree of cross-domain stability for the standardized deviation score. We also sketch how divergence and curl of the Concept Field, computed on dense clusters, surface qualitatively meaningful semantic patterns (logic sources, sinks, and implicit topics), which we offer as hypothesis-generating rather than as a quantitative result. Concept Fields provide a fast, lightweight, and interpretable signal for groundedness and novelty, complementary to LLM-as-judge and white-box detectors.

analysis.tldr: 提出文本语料库的概念场，通过句子嵌入空间中的局部漂移场实现黑盒幻觉检测和新颖性度量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有幻觉检测方法依赖模型内部信息或检索基线，缺乏轻量级、可解释且跨领域稳定的黑盒方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在不访问模型内部的情况下，仅利用文本语料库本身检测生成文本的幻觉（groundedness）和新颖性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 定义文本语料库的Concept Field：在句子嵌入空间中，基于连续句子间的delta估计局部漂移场（含逐点不确定性）；对于候选句子转换，通过ζ分数（观测delta与局部高斯估计的绝对平均z距离）衡量其与场的吻合度；引入向量序列数据库（VSDB）存储嵌入及序列位置和next-delta元数据以支持计算。
contributions: 提出Concept Field概念，用于黑盒、可归因的幻觉和新颖性检测。
引入Vector Sequence Database (VSDB)高效支持计算。
在CFR法规和Project Gutenberg两个大规模场景上验证，显示跨领域稳定性。
analysis.experiments: 在U.S. Code of Federal Regulations上进行幻觉风格的基础性检测，在Project Gutenberg上进行新颖性检测；使用受控LLM生成的重写，在grounded/ungrounded/unsure分诊策略下实现强选择性分类性能。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 局部高斯近似可能不适用于所有语料分布。
概念场的散度和旋度分析仅作为假设生成，未提供定量结果。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且轻量，但实验细节有限，适合关注幻觉检测的研究者阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出文本语料库的概念场，通过句子嵌入空间中的局部漂移场实现黑盒幻觉检测和新颖性度量。

papers.title: SPECTRA-Net: Scalable Pipeline for Explainable Cross-domain Tensor Representations for AI-generated Images Detection
papers.abstract: The rapid proliferation of AI-generated images (AIGI) presents a significant challenge to digital information integrity. While human observers and existing detection models struggle to keep pace with the increasing sophistication of generative models, the need for robust, real-time detection systems has become critical. This paper introduces SPECTRA-Net, a scalable pipeline for explainable, cross-domain tensor representations for AIGI detection. Our approach leverages a multi-view representation of images, combining global semantic features from a Vision Foundation Model (VFM), spectral analysis, local patch-based anomaly detection, and statistical descriptors. By fusing these complementary data streams, SPECTRA-Net achieves state-of-the-art performance in both in-domain and cross-domain settings, demonstrating high accuracy and generalization capabilities across a wide range of challenging datasets, including WildFake, Chameleon, and RRDataset. The proposed pipeline not only provides a robust solution for AIGI detection but also offers explainability through artifact localization, paving the way for more trustworthy and reliable content verification in real-world applications.

analysis.tldr: SPECTRA-Net通过多视图特征融合实现跨域AI生成图像检测，兼具高精度与可解释性。

analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

papers.title: Continual Knowledge Updating in LLM Systems: Learning Through Multi-Timescale Memory Dynamics
papers.abstract: LLMs are trained once, then deployed into a world that never stops changing. External memory compensates for this, but most systems manage it explicitly rather than letting it adapt on its own. Biological memory works differently: coupled multi-timescale dynamics make new associations immediately usable, strengthen what repetition confirms, and let the rest fade. We argue that external memory should follow a similar principle. In Memini, this view takes the form of an associative memory that organizes knowledge as a directed graph. Each edge carries two coupled internal variables, one fast and one slow, following the Benna-Fusi model of synaptic consolidation. From this coupling, episodic sensitivity, gradual consolidation, and selective forgetting emerge as facets of a single mechanism, reframing external memory as a learning substrate that reorganizes through its own dynamics.

analysis.tldr: 提出Memini框架，将生物多时间尺度记忆动力学引入LLM外部记忆，实现持续知识更新。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM部署后世界持续变化，但现有外部记忆系统缺乏自适应学习能力，而生物记忆通过多时间尺度动力学实现高效更新。

papers.title: A Bayesian Approach for Task-Specific Next-Best-View Selection with Uncertain Geometry
papers.abstract: We develop a framework for task-specific active next-best-view selection in 3D reconstruction from point clouds, by casting the problem in the language of Bayesian decision theory. Our framework works by (a) placing a prior distribution over the space of implicit surfaces, (b) using recently-developed stochastic surface reconstruction methods to calculate the resulting posterior distribution, then (c) using the posterior distribution to carefully reason about which view to scan next. This enables us to perform camera selection in a manner that is directly optimized for the intended use of the reconstructed data - meaning, we reduce uncertainty only in those regions that make a difference in the task at hand, as opposed to prior approaches that reduce it uniformly across space. We evaluate our method across three distinct downstream tasks: semantic classification, segmentation, and PDE-guided physics simulation. Experimental results demonstrate that our framework achieves superior task performance with fewer views compared to commonly used baselines and prior general uncertainty-reduction techniques.

analysis.tldr: 提出贝叶斯决策框架，针对下游任务优化3D重建中的下一最佳视角选择，减少任务相关区域的不确定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有主动视角选择方法通常均匀减少空间不确定性，未考虑下游任务需求，导致效率低下。
analysis.problem: 如何根据特定下游任务（如语义分类、分割、物理模拟）选择下一最佳视角，以最少视图实现最优任务性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

contributions: 提出任务特定的主动视角选择框架，将贝叶斯决策理论应用于3D重建。

analysis.experiments: 在语义分类、分割和PDE引导物理模拟三个任务上评估，与常用基线和通用不确定性减少技术对比，显示更优任务性能和更少视图。

papers.title: Driver-WM: A Driver-Centric Traffic-Conditioned Latent World Model for In-Cabin Dynamics Rollout
papers.abstract: Safe L2/L3 driving automation requires anticipating human-in-the-loop reactions during shared-control transitions. While most driving world models forecast the external environment, in-cabin intelligence remains strictly recognition-oriented and lacks multi-step rollout capabilities for driver dynamics. We introduce Driver-WM, a driver-centric latent world model that rolls out in-cabin dynamics causally conditioned on out-cabin traffic context. This formulation unifies physical kinematics forecasting with auxiliary behavioral and emotional semantic recognition. Operating in a compact latent space constructed from frozen vision-language features, Driver-WM adopts a dual-stream architecture to separately encode external traffic and internal driver states. These streams are directionally coupled via a gated causal injection mechanism, which uses a learned vector gate to modulate external contextual perturbations while strictly enforcing temporal causality. Evaluations on a multi-task assistive driving benchmark demonstrate that Driver-WM yields robust long-horizon geometric forecasting for reactive high-motion maneuvers and improves semantic alignment for both driver and traffic states. Finally, the explicit external-to-internal conditioning allows for controlled test-time interventions to systematically analyze mechanism responses.

analysis.tldr: 提出以驾驶员为中心的潜在世界模型，在紧凑潜空间中因果条件化外部交通上下文以滚动预测车内动态。
analysis.research_motivation: L2/L3级自动驾驶需要预测人机共驾过程中的驾驶员反应，但现有世界模型主要预测外部环境，车内智能仅限识别，缺乏多步滚动预测驾驶员动态的能力。

设计双流架构与门控因果注入机制，实现外部交通到内部驾驶员的因果条件化滚动预测。

papers.title: Think-Aloud Reshapes Automated Cognitive Model Discovery Beyond Behavior
papers.abstract: Computational cognitive models discovered using large language models have so far relied solely on behavioral data. However, it is well-known that models produced from the behavioral trajectory alone are typically under-determined. In this work, we explore the use of Think Aloud traces as an additional form of data constraint during automated model discovery. When applied to the domain of risky decision-making, we find that the models discovered with think-aloud achieve significantly improved predictive performance on held-out data. Additionally, we find that the discovered models belong to different structural classes than those discovered from behavior alone for the majority of participants (69.4\%), specifically, it shifts from Explicit comparator towards Integrated utility. These results suggest that process-level language data not only improve model fit, but also systematically reshape the structure of the discovered cognitive models, enabling the identification of mechanisms that are not recoverable from behavior alone.

analysis.tldr: 利用出声思维数据重塑自动化认知模型发现，超越仅依赖行为数据的局限。
analysis.research_motivation: 仅依赖行为数据发现的认知模型通常欠定，无法唯一确定潜在机制，需要额外的数据约束来提高模型可识别性和预测性能。
analysis.problem: 如何利用出声思维（Think Aloud）语言数据作为额外约束，改进自动化认知模型发现，使其能识别行为数据无法恢复的认知机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：加入出声思维后，模型预测性能显著提升；且对69.4%的参与者，模型结构类别从显式比较转向集成效用，表明过程级语言数据系统性地重塑了模型结构。

papers.title: Automatically Finding and Validating Unexpected Side-Effects of Interventions on Language Models
papers.abstract: We present an automated, contrastive evaluation pipeline for auditing the behavioral impact of interventions on large language models. Given a base model $M_1$ and an intervention model $M_2$, our method compares their free-form, multi-token generations across aligned prompt contexts and produces human-readable, statistically validated natural-language hypotheses describing how the models differ, along with recurring themes that summarize patterns across validated hypotheses. We evaluate the approach in synthetic setting by injecting known behavioral changes and showing that the pipeline reliably recovers them. We then apply it to three real-world interventions, reasoning distillation, knowledge editing and unlearning, demonstrating that the method surfaces both intended and unexpected behavioral shifts, distinguishes large from subtle interventions, and does not hallucinate differences when effects are absent or misaligned with the prompt bank. Overall, the pipeline provides a statistically grounded and interpretable tool for post-hoc auditing of intervention-induced changes in model behavior.

analysis.tldr: 提出自动化对比评估流水线，用于审计语言模型干预的意外副作用。

papers.title: External Validation of Deep Learning Models for BI-RADS Breast Density Prediction from Ultrasound Images
papers.abstract: We externally validated three deep learning models (DenseNet121, ViT-B/32, and ResNet50) for predicting mammographic breast density from breast ultrasound exams on an independent cohort. The external validation set comprised 2,000 ultrasound exams, including 500 cancer cases defined by an initial negative exam (BI-RADS 1 or 2) followed by a cancer diagnosis within 6 months to 10 years, and 1,500 negative controls matched by manufacturer and study year. Performance was measured using patient-level AUROC across four density categories: A (fatty), B (scattered), C (heterogeneous), and D (extremely dense). As a downstream assessment, we also evaluated 10-year risk prediction by incorporating age and AI-derived density into the Tyrer-Cuzick model and comparing performance against a reference model using age and mammography-reported density. All three models performed best in extremely dense breasts (AUROC 0.868-0.899), with strong performance in fatty (0.814-0.838) and scattered density (0.764-0.799), and lower performance in heterogeneously dense breasts (0.699-0.729). DenseNet121 achieved the highest overall performance (micro-averaged AUROC 0.885), and performance across categories was comparable between internal and external testing. For risk modeling, age combined with AI-derived density yielded a lower AUROC than age combined with mammography-reported density (0.541 vs. 0.570; p = 0.23), with no statistically significant difference. These findings indicate that deep learning models generalize well to external data with different racial composition for breast density assessment. While performance is strongest in extremely dense breasts, heterogeneously dense remains more challenging, highlighting the need for targeted optimization.

analysis.tldr: 深度学习模型在超声图像中预测乳腺密度的外部验证表现良好，但对异质性致密型乳腺仍需优化。
analysis.research_motivation: 乳腺密度是乳腺癌风险的重要指标，但超声图像预测乳腺密度的深度学习模型缺乏外部验证，特别是不同种族人群的泛化性未知。
analysis.problem: 验证深度学习模型在独立外部队列中从超声图像预测乳腺密度的性能，并评估其在下游风险预测中的效用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在极致密型乳腺中表现最佳（AUROC 0.868-0.899），在异质性致密型乳腺中表现最差（0.699-0.729），表明该类别是主要瓶颈。
analysis.method: 外部验证三种深度学习模型（DenseNet121、ViT-B/32、ResNet50），使用2000例超声检查（含500例癌症病例），评估AUROC，并将AI密度与年龄结合用于Tyrer-Cuzick风险模型。
contributions: 首次在独立外部队列中验证超声图像预测乳腺密度的深度学习模型，显示良好泛化性。
揭示了异质性致密型乳腺是性能瓶颈，为后续优化指明方向。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 风险预测中AI密度与年龄组合的AUROC低于参考模型，且差异不显著，可能需更多特征。
仅验证了三种模型，其他架构或预训练策略可能表现不同。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 外部验证工作具有临床价值，但方法创新性一般，实验信息有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 深度学习模型在超声图像中预测乳腺密度的外部验证表现良好，但对异质性致密型乳腺仍需优化。

papers.title: A unified Benchmark for Multi-Frame Image Restoration under Severe Refractive Warping
papers.abstract: Video sequence capturing through refractive dynamic media, such as a turbulent air or water surface, often suffer from severe geometric distortions and temporal instability. While recent advances address mild atmospheric turbulence, no existing benchmarks systematically evaluate restoration methods under strong and highly nonuniform refractive conditions. We present a comprehensive benchmark for geometric distortion removal in video, covering a range from turbulence-like mild warping to strong discontinuous refractive deformations. The benchmark includes both laboratory-captured real data and synthetic sequences generated for static scenes via physics-based light refraction modeling across four distortion levels and multiple surface wave types. We evaluate a spectrum of methods from simple baselines and classical registration algorithms to advanced learning-based approaches including DATUM and our proposed diffusion based V-cache for high and extreme distortions regimes. Evaluation uses both pixel-level (PSNR, SSIM), and perceptual (LPIPS, DINO, CLIP) metrics providing the first large scale analysis of geometric distortion removal. Our benchmark establishes a new foundation for developing and evaluating algorithms capable of reconstructing video from highly distorted optical environments. Our code and datasets are available at https://github.com/iafoss/refractive-mfir-benchmark.

analysis.tldr: 首个针对强折射扭曲下多帧图像恢复的统一基准，包含真实与合成数据及多种评估指标。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准仅针对轻度大气湍流，缺乏对强非均匀折射条件（如湍流空气或水面）下几何畸变去除的系统评估。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个全面、标准化的基准来评估视频序列在严重折射扭曲下的几何畸变去除方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含实验室真实数据和基于物理光折射模型生成的合成序列的基准，涵盖四种畸变等级和多种表面波类型，并评估从简单基线到先进学习方法（包括DATUM和提出的扩散V-cache）的性能。
contributions: 提出了首个针对强折射扭曲的多帧图像恢复统一基准。
提供了包含真实和合成数据、多种畸变等级和波类型的全面数据集。
进行了大规模几何畸变去除分析，使用像素级和感知级指标。
analysis.experiments: 在基准上评估了多种方法，包括简单基线、经典配准算法和基于学习的方法（如DATUM和扩散V-cache），使用PSNR、SSIM、LPIPS、DINO和CLIP指标。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 合成数据可能无法完全模拟真实场景的复杂性。
基准主要针对静态场景，动态场景的泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 首个针对强折射扭曲的基准，具有明确贡献和开源资源，但方法创新有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个针对强折射扭曲下多帧图像恢复的统一基准，包含真实与合成数据及多种评估指标。

papers.title: FlowDIS: Language-Guided Dichotomous Image Segmentation with Flow Matching
papers.abstract: Accurate image segmentation is essential for modern computer vision applications such as image editing, autonomous driving, and medical image analysis. In recent years, Dichotomous Image Segmentation (DIS) has become a standard task for training and evaluating highly accurate segmentation models. Existing DIS approaches often fail to preserve fine-grained details or fully capture the semantic structure of the foreground. To address these challenges, we present FlowDIS, a novel dichotomous image segmentation method built on the flow matching framework, which learns a time-dependent vector field to transport the image distribution to the corresponding mask distribution, optionally conditioned on a text prompt. Moreover, with our Position-Aware Instance Pairing (PAIP) training strategy, FlowDIS offers strong controllability through text prompts, enabling precise, pixel-level object segmentation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art approaches both with and without language guidance. Compared with the best prior DIS method, FlowDIS achieves a 5.5% higher $F_β^ω$ measure and 43% lower MAE ($\mathcal{M}$) on the DIS-TE test set. The code is available at: https://github.com/Picsart-AI-Research/FlowDIS

analysis.tldr: FlowDIS 利用流匹配框架实现语言引导的二值图像分割，在 DIS-TE 测试集上 Fβω 提升 5.5%，MAE 降低 43%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有二值图像分割方法难以保留细粒度细节和完整语义结构，且缺乏语言引导的灵活性，限制了在图像编辑、自动驾驶等场景中的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何实现高精度、细粒度且可通过文本提示控制的二值图像分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于流匹配框架，学习时间相关向量场将图像分布映射到掩码分布，并可选地以文本提示为条件；提出位置感知实例配对训练策略增强文本可控性。
contributions: 提出 FlowDIS，首个将流匹配用于二值图像分割的方法，支持语言引导。
设计位置感知实例配对训练策略，实现精确的像素级对象分割。
在 DIS-TE 测试集上显著超越现有方法，Fβω 提升 5.5%，MAE 降低 43%。
analysis.experiments: 在 DIS-TE 测试集上评估，与最先进方法比较，FlowDIS 在 Fβω 和 MAE 指标上均取得显著提升。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量文本描述，弱描述下性能未知。
流匹配推理速度可能较慢，实时性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性高，实验效果显著，与视觉理解方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FlowDIS 利用流匹配框架实现语言引导的二值图像分割，在 DIS-TE 测试集上 Fβω 提升 5.5%，MAE 降低 43%。

papers.title: Height-Guided Projection Reparameterization for Camera-LiDAR Occupancy
papers.abstract: 3D occupancy prediction aims to infer dense, voxel-wise scene semantics from sensor observations, where the 2D-to-3D view transformation serves as a crucial step in bridging image features and volumetric representations. Most previous methods rely on a fixed projection space, where 3D reference points are uniformly sampled along pillars. However, such sampling struggles to capture the sparsity and height variations of real-world scenes, leading to ambiguous correspondences and unreliable feature aggregation. To address these challenges, we propose HiPR, a camera-LiDAR occupancy framework with Height-Guided Projection Reparameterization. HiPR first encodes LiDAR into a BEV height map to capture the maximum height of the point cloud. HiPR then adjusts the sampling range of each pillar using the height prior, enabling adaptive reparameterization of the projection space. As a result, the projected points are redistributed into geometrically meaningful regions rather than fixed ranges. Meanwhile, we mask out the invalid parts of the height map to avoid misleading the feature aggregation. In addition, to alleviate the training instability caused by noisy LiDAR-derived heights, we introduce a training-time Progressive Height Conditioning strategy, which gradually transitions the conditioning signal from ground-truth heights to LiDAR heights. Extensive experiments demonstrate that HiPR consistently outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods while maintaining real-time inference. The code and pretrained models can be found at https://github.com/yanzq95/HiPR.

analysis.tldr: 提出高度引导投影重参数化（HiPR）方法，利用LiDAR高度先验自适应调整投影空间，提升相机-激光雷达3D占用预测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D占用预测方法在2D到3D视图变换中采用固定投影空间，沿柱体均匀采样参考点，难以捕捉真实场景的稀疏性和高度变化，导致对应模糊和特征聚合不可靠。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LiDAR高度信息自适应重参数化投影空间，以解决固定投影空间在3D占用预测中的局限性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出HiPR框架，首先将LiDAR编码为BEV高度图以捕获点云最大高度，然后利用高度先验调整每个柱体的采样范围，实现投影空间的自适应重参数化；同时掩码高度图中的无效部分，并引入渐进式高度调节策略缓解训练不稳定。
contributions: 提出高度引导投影重参数化方法，使投影点分布到几何有意义区域。
引入渐进式高度调节策略，缓解噪声LiDAR高度导致的训练不稳定。
在多个数据集上达到SOTA性能，并保持实时推理。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上进行实验，HiPR一致优于现有SOTA方法，并保持实时推理。
limitations: 依赖LiDAR数据，可能不适用于纯视觉场景。
高度先验的准确性受LiDAR噪声影响，渐进式策略增加了训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且达到SOTA，与视觉理解方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出高度引导投影重参数化（HiPR）方法，利用LiDAR高度先验自适应调整投影空间，提升相机-激光雷达3D占用预测性能。

papers.title: Look Once, Beam Twice: Camera-Primed Real-Time Double-Directional mmWave Beam Management for Vehicular Connectivity
papers.abstract: Millimeter-wave (mmWave) frequencies promise multi-gigabit connectivity for vehicle-to-everything (V2X) networks, but face challenges in terms of severe path loss and mobility-related beam misalignment. Reliable V2X connectivity requires fast, double-directional beam alignment. However, existing methods suffer from high training overhead and limited generalization to unseen scenarios. This paper presents VIsion-based BEamforming(VIBE), a hybrid model-based, closed-loop, learning architecture for real-time double-directional mmWave beam management primed by camera sensing. VIBE fuses machine learning, model-based reasoning, and closed-loop RF feedback to balance beam-pair establishment latency with link quality. VIBE bypasses exhaustive training overhead and accelerates link establishment by leveraging camera observations to reduce the beam-search space. Lightweight beam refinement and offset tracking mechanisms adaptively refine beams in response to dynamic application requirements. VIBE is implemented and evaluated across online indoor/outdoor testbeds, public datasets, and real-time vehicular experiments, demonstrating strong generalization capabilities, making it suitable for real-time V2X communication. Comparisons with 5G NR hierarchical beamforming show that VIBE consistently maintains lower outage rates. Furthermore, VIBE outperforms state-of-the-art end-to-end ML models for beam selection when evaluated on public datasets and achieves outage rates as low as 1.1-1.4 %. The results show that a hybrid model-based, closed-loop learning architecture is better suited for real-world mmWave vehicular connectivity than end-to-end trained ML models. For reproducibility, we publish our code to https://github.com/UNL-CPN-Lab/Look-Once-Beam-Twice.

analysis.tldr: 提出VIBE，一种基于摄像头感知的混合模型闭环学习架构，用于实时双方向毫米波波束管理，在V2X通信中实现低中断率。
analysis.research_motivation: 毫米波V2X通信面临严重路径损耗和移动性导致的波束失准问题，现有方法训练开销大且泛化能力有限。
analysis.problem: 如何实现快速、双方向的波束对齐，同时降低训练开销并提升泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: VIBE融合机器学习、模型推理和闭环RF反馈，利用摄像头观测缩小波束搜索空间，并通过轻量级波束细化和偏移跟踪机制自适应调整。
contributions: 提出VIBE架构，结合摄像头感知和闭环学习实现实时双方向波束管理。
在在线室内/外测试台、公开数据集和实时车辆实验中验证了强泛化能力和低中断率（1.1-1.4%）。
analysis.experiments: 在在线室内/外测试台、公开数据集和实时车辆实验中评估，与5G NR分层波束成形和端到端ML模型比较，VIBE中断率更低。
limitations: 依赖摄像头感知，可能受光照和遮挡影响。
未讨论多车辆或高密度场景下的扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，但属于通信领域，与核心ML方向相关性中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VIBE，一种基于摄像头感知的混合模型闭环学习架构，用于实时双方向毫米波波束管理，在V2X通信中实现低中断率。

papers.title: The Impossibility Triangle of Long-Context Modeling
papers.abstract: We identify and prove a fundamental trade-off governing long-sequence models: no model can simultaneously achieve (i) per-step computation independent of sequence length (Efficiency), (ii) state size independent of sequence length (Compactness), and (iii) the ability to recall a number of historical facts proportional to sequence length (Recall). We formalize this trade-off within an Online Sequence Processor abstraction that unifies Transformers, state space models, linear recurrent networks, and their hybrids. Using the Data Processing Inequality and Fano's Inequality, we prove that any model satisfying Efficiency and Compactness can recall at most O(poly(d)/log V) key-value pairs from a sequence of arbitrary length, where d is the model dimension and V is the vocabulary size. We classify 52 architectures published before March 2026 into the triangle, showing that each achieves at most two of the three properties and that hybrid architectures trace continuous trajectories in the interior. Experiments on synthetic associative recall tasks with five representative architectures validate the theoretical bound: empirical recall capacity lies strictly below the information-theoretic limit, and no architecture escapes the triangle.

analysis.tldr: 长序列建模存在不可能三角：效率、紧凑性和回忆能力三者不可兼得。
analysis.research_motivation: 长序列建模是LLM和基础模型的核心挑战，现有方法（如Transformer、状态空间模型）在效率、紧凑性和回忆能力之间面临权衡，但缺乏统一的理论框架来理解这种根本性限制。
analysis.problem: 证明长序列模型中效率（每步计算与序列长度无关）、紧凑性（状态大小与序列长度无关）和回忆能力（回忆与序列长度成比例的历史事实）三者不可同时满足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过信息论不等式严格证明，任何满足效率和紧凑性的模型最多只能回忆O(poly(d)/log V)个键值对，与序列长度无关；对52种架构的分类显示每种最多满足两个性质，混合架构位于三角形内部。
analysis.method: 提出在线序列处理器抽象统一各类模型，利用数据处理不等式和Fano不等式推导信息论下界，并通过合成关联回忆任务验证理论边界。
contributions: 首次严格证明长序列建模的不可能三角，揭示效率、紧凑性和回忆能力之间的根本权衡。
对52种架构进行分类，实证验证理论边界，表明无架构能逃脱该三角形。
analysis.experiments: 在合成关联回忆任务上对五种代表性架构进行实验，验证经验回忆容量严格低于信息论极限。
limitations: 理论分析基于特定抽象（在线序列处理器），可能不覆盖所有模型变体。
实验仅使用合成任务，未在真实长序列基准上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 理论贡献重大，严格证明长序列建模的根本限制，对模型设计有指导意义。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 长序列建模存在不可能三角：效率、紧凑性和回忆能力三者不可兼得。

papers.title: SoK: Robustness in Large Language Models against Jailbreak Attacks
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable success but remain highly susceptible to jailbreak attacks, in which adversarial prompts coerce models into generating harmful, unethical, or policy-violating outputs. Such attacks pose real-world risks, eroding safety, trust, and regulatory compliance in high-stakes applications. Although a variety of attack and defense methods have been proposed, existing evaluation practices are inadequate, often relying on narrow metrics like attack success rate that fail to capture the multidimensional nature of LLM security. In this paper, we present a systematic taxonomy of jailbreak attacks and defenses and introduce Security Cube, a unified, multi-dimensional framework for comprehensive evaluation of these techniques. We provide detailed comparison tables of existing attacks and defenses, highlighting key insights and open challenges across the literature. Leveraging Security Cube, we conduct benchmark studies on 13 representative attacks and 5 defenses, establishing a clear view of the current landscape encompassing jailbreak attacks, defenses, automated judges, and LLM vulnerabilities. Based on these evaluations, we distill critical findings, identify unresolved problems, and outline promising research directions for enhancing LLM robustness against jailbreak attacks. Our analysis aims to pave the way towards more robust, interpretable, and trustworthy LLM systems. Our code is available at Code.

analysis.tldr: 本文系统梳理了大语言模型越狱攻击与防御的现状，提出统一评估框架Security Cube，并通过基准实验揭示当前方法的不足与未来方向。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型在关键应用中面临越狱攻击风险，现有评估方法单一且不全面，缺乏系统性理解，亟需统一框架来指导鲁棒性提升。
analysis.problem: 如何系统分类和全面评估大语言模型越狱攻击与防御方法，以识别当前瓶颈并推动鲁棒性研究。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有评估依赖攻击成功率等窄指标，无法捕捉安全性的多维特性；攻击与防御方法多样但缺乏统一比较。
analysis.method: 提出Security Cube多维评估框架，构建攻击与防御的系统分类法，并对13种攻击和5种防御进行基准研究。
contributions: 提出越狱攻击与防御的系统分类法，提供详细对比表。
设计Security Cube统一评估框架，涵盖多维安全指标。
通过基准实验揭示当前方法的不足，指出开放挑战和研究方向。
analysis.experiments: 对13种代表性攻击和5种防御进行基准研究，使用Security Cube框架评估，但摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 基准实验可能未覆盖所有最新攻击/防御方法。
Security Cube框架的指标权重和实用性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 系统综述与统一评估框架对安全对齐领域有重要参考价值，但方法创新性中等，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文系统梳理了大语言模型越狱攻击与防御的现状，提出统一评估框架Security Cube，并通过基准实验揭示当前方法的不足与未来方向。

papers.title: ScriptHOI: Learning Scripted State Transitions for Open-Vocabulary Human-Object Interaction Detection
papers.abstract: Open-vocabulary human-object interaction (HOI) detection requires recognizing interaction phrases that may not appear as annotated categories during training. Recent vision-language HOI detectors improve semantic transfer by matching human-object features with text embeddings, but their predictions are often dominated by object affordance and phrase-level co-occurrence. As a result, a model may predict \textit{cut cake} from the presence of a knife and a cake without verifying whether the hand, tool, target, contact pattern, and object state jointly support the action. We propose \textbf{ScriptHOI}, a structured framework that represents each interaction phrase as a soft scripted state transition. Rather than treating a phrase as a single class token, ScriptHOI decomposes it into body-role, contact, geometry, affordance, motion, and object-state slots. A visual state tokenizer parses each detected human-object pair into corresponding state tokens, and a slot-wise matcher estimates both script coverage and script conflict. These two quantities calibrate HOI logits, expose missing visual evidence, and provide training constraints for incomplete annotations. To avoid suppressing valid but unannotated interactions, we further introduce interval partial-label learning, which constrains unannotated candidates with script-derived lower and upper probability bounds instead of assigning closed-world negatives. A counterfactual script contrast loss swaps individual script slots to discourage object-only shortcuts. Experiments on HICO-DET, V-COCO, and open-vocabulary HOI splits show that ScriptHOI improves rare and unseen interaction recognition while substantially reducing affordance-conflict false positives.

analysis.tldr: ScriptHOI 将交互短语分解为软脚本状态转移，通过视觉状态标记器和槽位匹配器校准 HOI 逻辑，提升开放词汇 HOI 检测的泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有开放词汇 HOI 检测器依赖物体可供性和短语共现，导致预测缺乏对交互细节的验证，产生大量假阳性。

analysis.method: 将交互短语分解为身体角色、接触、几何、可供性、运动和物体状态六个槽位，用视觉状态标记器解析为状态令牌，通过槽位匹配器计算脚本覆盖度和冲突度来校准 HOI 逻辑，并引入区间部分标签学习和反事实脚本对比损失。
contributions: 提出脚本状态转移框架 ScriptHOI，将交互短语分解为结构化槽位，提升开放词汇 HOI 检测的语义验证能力。
设计槽位匹配器、区间部分标签学习和反事实脚本对比损失，有效减少假阳性并处理未标注交互。
analysis.experiments: 在 HICO-DET、V-COCO 和开放词汇 HOI 分割上实验，ScriptHOI 提升了罕见和未见交互的识别，并显著减少了可供性冲突的假阳性。
limitations: 脚本槽位的定义可能依赖先验知识，对复杂交互的覆盖有限。
视觉状态标记器的性能可能受限于检测质量。

papers.title: Adaptive Learning Strategies for AoA-Based Outdoor Localization: A Comprehensive Framework
papers.abstract: Localization in 5G and 6G networks is essential for important use cases such as intelligent transportation, smart factories, and smart cities. Although deep learning has enabled improving localization accuracy, depending on the deployment scenario and the effort required for dataset collection campaigns on a given infrastructure, the training process for localization models can vary significantly. Furthermore, with respect to feature selection, recent works have demonstrated the robustness of angle-of-arrival (AoA) based localization. In view of these two points, we propose an adaptive framework for AoA-based localization that consists of two alternative learning strategies, each suited either for large or small training datasets. The proposed framework is evaluated on a real, massive multiple input multiple output (mMIMO) orthogonal frequency division multiplexing (OFDM) outdoor channel state information (CSI) dataset. First, we investigate offline learning when large training datasets are available; we propose a hierarchical framework that first distinguishes between line of sight (LoS) and non line of sight (NLoS) regions and then moves to more fine grained localization in the respective region. This approach provides high-performance localization through accumulated batch retraining and an integrated hyperparameter optimization mechanism. Second, when only a small training dataset is available, an online learning framework is proposed, using incremental tree-based and ensemble-based models for handling streaming data and continuously updating mode, as well as an online few-shot learning model for rapidly initializing new classes from a limited labeled support set. These results showcase that highly accurate robust localization can be achieved incrementally during network operation by exploiting online learning, alleviating the need for large dataset collection campaigns.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于到达角（AoA）的自适应定位框架，针对大规模和小规模训练数据分别采用离线分层学习和在线增量学习策略，在真实mMIMO-OFDM室外数据集上验证了高精度定位。
analysis.research_motivation: 5G/6G网络中的定位对智能交通、智慧工厂等应用至关重要，但深度学习定位模型的训练过程因部署场景和数据采集成本差异大，且现有工作已证明AoA的鲁棒性，因此需要自适应学习策略来应对不同数据规模。
analysis.problem: 如何根据训练数据集的大小（大规模或小规模）自适应地选择高效的学习策略，实现基于AoA的室外定位。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出自适应框架，包含两种策略：1）离线学习：当大数据集可用时，采用分层框架先区分LoS/NLoS区域，再进行细粒度定位，结合累积批量重训练和超参数优化；2）在线学习：当小数据集可用时，使用增量树/集成模型处理流数据并持续更新，以及在线少样本学习快速初始化新类别。
contributions: 提出一个自适应框架，根据训练数据规模选择离线分层学习或在线增量学习策略。
在真实mMIMO-OFDM室外CSI数据集上验证了两种策略的有效性，表明在线学习可在网络运行中增量实现高精度定位，减少数据采集需求。
analysis.experiments: 在真实mMIMO-OFDM室外CSI数据集上评估，但摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于AoA特征，未考虑其他特征（如ToA）的融合。
在线学习策略的收敛速度和稳定性在极端小样本场景下可能受限。

papers.title: Direct Product Flow Matching: Decoupling Radial and Angular Dynamics for Few-Shot Adaptation
papers.abstract: Recent flow matching (FM) methods improve the few-shot adaptation of vision-language models, by modeling cross-modal alignment as a continuous multi-step flow. In this paper, we argue that existing FM methods are inherently constrained by incompatible geometric priors on pre-trained cross-modal features, resulting in suboptimal adaptation performance. We first analyze these methods from a polar decomposition perspective (i.e., radial and angular sub-manifolds). Under this new geometric view, we identify three overlooked limitations in them: 1) Angular dynamics distortion: The radial-angular coupling induces non-uniform speed on the angular sub-manifold, leading to regression training difficulty and extra truncation errors. 2) Radial dynamics neglect: Feature normalization discards modality confidence, failing to distinguish out-of-distribution and in-distribution data, and abandoning crucial radial dynamics. 3) Context-agnostic unconditional flow: Dataset-specific information loss during pre-trained cross-modal feature extraction remains unrecovered. To resolve these issues, we propose warped product flow matching (WP-FM), a unified Riemannian framework that reformulates alignment on a warped product manifold. Within this framework, we derive direct product flow matching (DP-FM) by introducing a constant-warping metric, which yields a decoupled cylindrical manifold (i.e., direct product manifold). DP-FM enables independent radial evolution and constant-speed angular geodesic transport, effectively eliminating angular dynamics distortion while preserving radial consistency. Meanwhile, we incorporate classifier-free guidance by conditioning the flow on the pre-trained VLMs' hidden states to inject missing dataset-specific information. Extensive results across 11 benchmarks have demonstrated that DP-FM achieves a new state-of-the-art for multi-step few-shot adaptation.

analysis.tldr: 提出直接积流匹配（DP-FM），通过解耦径向和角度动力学，提升视觉-语言模型少样本适应的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有流匹配方法在少样本适应中因不兼容的几何先验导致次优性能，需要更合理的几何框架来建模跨模态对齐。
analysis.problem: 现有流匹配方法在少样本适应中存在的径向-角度耦合、径向动力学忽略和上下文无关无条件流三个问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 从极分解视角分析，发现现有方法存在角度动力学失真、径向动力学被丢弃、数据集特定信息丢失等局限。
analysis.method: 提出扭曲积流匹配（WP-FM）框架，并推导出直接积流匹配（DP-FM），通过常扭曲度量解耦径向和角度动力学，同时利用分类器无关引导注入隐藏状态信息。
contributions: 从极分解视角揭示现有流匹配方法的三个局限。
提出WP-FM框架和DP-FM方法，实现径向和角度动力学的解耦。
在11个基准上取得少样本适应新SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在11个基准上进行实验，结果表明DP-FM在多步少样本适应中达到新SOTA。
limitations: 可能对特定数据集或任务需要调整扭曲度量。

papers.title: Reduced-order Neural Modeling with Differentiable Simulation for High-Detail Tactile Perception
papers.abstract: Tactile perception is key to dexterous manipulation, yet simulating high-resolution elastomer deformation remains computationally prohibitive. Finite element methods (FEM) deliver high fidelity but demand costly remeshing, while Material Point Methods (MPM) suffer from heavy particle-memory tradeoffs. We propose a {reduced-order neural simulation framework} that couples coarse-grained MPM dynamics with an implicit neural decoder to reconstruct sub-particle tactile details from compact latent states. The framework learns a continuous deformation manifold from paired high- and low-resolution simulations, enabling physically consistent, differentiable inference. Compared to the TacIPC, our method achieves over 65\% faster simulation and {40\% lower memory usage}, while maintaining better geometric fidelity. In tactile rendering and 3D surface reconstruction, our methods further improve accuracy by 25\% and produce realistic depth images and surface mesh within a faster inference speed. These results demonstrate that the proposed reduced-order neural model enables high-detail, physically grounded tactile simulation with substantial efficiency gains for robotic interaction and optimization.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种降阶神经模拟框架，结合粗粒度MPM与隐式神经解码器，实现高效高细节触觉感知模拟。
analysis.research_motivation: 高分辨率弹性体变形模拟计算成本高，传统FEM和MPM方法存在重网格或内存-粒子权衡问题，难以用于机器人交互和优化。
analysis.problem: 如何实现高细节、物理一致且高效的触觉模拟。

papers.title: Piper: Efficient Large-Scale MoE Training via Resource Modeling and Pipelined Hybrid Parallelism
papers.abstract: Frontier models increasingly adopt Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures to achieve large-model performance at reduced cost. However, training MoE models on HPC platforms is hindered by large memory footprints, frequent large-scale communication across heterogeneous networks, and severe workload imbalance. To characterize these challenges, we develop a mathematical model that quantifies memory, compute, and communication requirements for MoE configurations under various parallelization schemes, verified through micro-benchmarking, code instrumentation, and hardware profiling. Our analysis identifies performance bottlenecks: all-to-all latency at scale from expert parallelism, insufficient compute-communication overlap, low GPU utilization from imbalanced skinny GEMMs, and the absence of platform-aware hybrid parallelization strategies. To address these, we introduce Piper, a framework that leverages resource modeling to identify efficient training strategies for MoE models on target HPC platforms, applying pipeline parallelism with optimized schedules. Piper achieves 2-3.5X higher MFU than state-of-the-art frameworks such as X-MoE, and a novel all-to-all algorithm delivers 1.2-9X bandwidth over vendor implementation.

analysis.tldr: Piper 通过资源建模和流水线混合并行，将 MoE 训练效率提升 2-3.5 倍 MFU。
analysis.research_motivation: MoE 模型在 HPC 平台上训练面临内存占用大、异构网络通信频繁和负载严重不均的挑战，现有框架缺乏平台感知的混合并行策略。
analysis.problem: 如何通过资源建模和流水线并行优化 MoE 训练中的通信瓶颈和负载不均问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过微基准测试和硬件分析识别出性能瓶颈：专家并行的 all-to-all 延迟、计算-通信重叠不足、不均衡瘦 GEMM 导致 GPU 利用率低、缺乏平台感知的混合并行策略。

提出 Piper 框架，通过资源建模和流水线混合并行实现 2-3.5 倍 MFU 提升，并设计新型 all-to-all 算法实现 1.2-9 倍带宽提升。

papers.title: When Relations Break: Analyzing Relation Hallucination in Vision-Language Model Under Rotation and Noise
papers.abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) achieve strong multimodal performance but remain prone to relation hallucination, which requires accurate reasoning over inter-object interactions. We study the impact of visual perturbations, specifically rotation and noise, and show that even mild distortions significantly degrade relational reasoning across models and datasets. We further evaluate prompt-based augmentation and preprocessing strategies (orientation correction and denoising), finding that while they offer partial improvements, they do not fully resolve hallucinations. Our results reveal a gap between perceptual robustness and relational understanding, highlighting the need for more robust, geometry-aware VLMs.

analysis.tldr: 视觉语言模型在旋转和噪声扰动下关系幻觉加剧，现有增强策略仅能部分缓解。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉语言模型在多模态任务中表现优异，但关系幻觉问题突出，尤其是在物体间交互推理上。现有研究缺乏对视觉扰动（如旋转和噪声）如何影响关系推理的系统分析。
analysis.problem: 研究视觉扰动（旋转和噪声）对VLM关系推理能力的影响，并评估现有增强和预处理策略的缓解效果。

评估了现有增强和预处理策略的局限性，指出需要更鲁棒的几何感知VLM。

papers.title: Preference-Based Self-Distillation: Beyond KL Matching via Reward Regularization
papers.abstract: On-policy distillation is an efficient alternative to reinforcement learning, offering dense token-level training signals. However, its reliance on a stronger external teacher has driven recent work on on-policy self-distillation, where the same model serves as both teacher and student under different prompt contexts. Yet, existing self-distillation methods largely reduce learning to KL matching toward the context-augmented teacher model. This approach often suffers from training instability and can degrade reasoning performance over time. Moreover, self-distillation from the same model with prompt augmentation lacks the exploratory diversity provided by a genuine external teacher. To address these limitations, we move beyond fixed-teacher KL matching and propose \textbf{P}reference-\textbf{B}ased \textbf{S}elf-\textbf{D}istillation (\textbf{PBSD}), which revisits on-policy self-distillation through a reward-regularized perspective. Instead of directly matching the teacher distribution, we derive a reward-regularized objective whose analytic optimum is a reward-reweighted teacher distribution, yielding a target policy provably superior to the original teacher under this objective. Practically, PBSD optimizes preference gaps between teacher and student samples while maintaining on-policy student sampling. We support this framework with a statistical analysis of the induced preference-learning problem, formally establishing when on policy self-distillation is preferable to learning from an external teacher in our setting. Experiments on mathematical reasoning and tool-use benchmarks across multiple model scales demonstrate that PBSD consistently achieves the strongest average performance among comparable baselines, showing improved training stability over prior self-distillation baselines while preserving token efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出偏好自蒸馏PBSD，通过奖励正则化超越KL匹配，提升自蒸馏的稳定性和推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自蒸馏方法依赖KL匹配，训练不稳定且推理性能随时间下降，同时缺乏外部教师的探索多样性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计自蒸馏目标，使其超越固定教师的KL匹配，提升训练稳定性和模型性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出KL匹配自蒸馏存在训练不稳定和推理性能退化问题，且缺乏探索多样性。

contributions: 提出PBSD框架，将自蒸馏重新定义为奖励正则化问题，理论证明其最优策略优于原始教师。
通过偏好学习优化偏好差距，并给出何时自蒸馏优于外部教师的统计分析。
