papers.title: From Pixels to Tokens: A Systematic Study of Latent Action Supervision for Vision-Language-Action Models
papers.abstract: Latent actions serve as an intermediate representation that enables consistent modeling of vision-language-action (VLA) models across heterogeneous datasets. However, approaches to supervising VLAs with latent actions are fragmented and lack a systematic comparison. This work structures the study of latent action supervision from two perspectives: (i) regularizing the trajectory via image-based latent actions, and (ii) unifying the target space with action-based latent actions. Under a unified VLA baseline, we instantiate and compare four representative integration strategies. Our results reveal a formulation-task correspondence: image-based latent actions benefit long-horizon reasoning and scene-level generalization, whereas action-based latent actions excel at complex motor coordination. Furthermore, we find that directly supervising the VLM with discrete latent action tokens yields the most effective performance. Finally, our experiments offer initial insights into the benefits of latent action supervision in mixed-data, suggesting a promising direction for VLA training. Code is available at https://github.com/RUCKBReasoning/From_Pixels_to_Tokens.

analysis.tldr: 系统比较了视觉-语言-动作模型中潜在动作监督的四种策略，发现离散潜在动作令牌直接监督最有效。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLA模型在异构数据集上使用潜在动作监督的方法碎片化，缺乏系统性比较，阻碍了该领域的进展。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地比较和评估不同潜在动作监督策略在VLA模型中的效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现公式-任务对应关系：基于图像的潜在动作有利于长程推理和场景级泛化，而基于动作的潜在动作擅长复杂运动协调。
analysis.method: 在统一VLA基线框架下，实例化并比较了四种代表性集成策略：基于图像的潜在动作正则化轨迹、基于动作的潜在动作统一目标空间等。
contributions: 从两个视角（基于图像和基于动作）系统研究了潜在动作监督策略。
揭示了公式-任务对应关系，并发现直接使用离散潜在动作令牌监督VLM最有效。
analysis.experiments: 在多个异构数据集上进行了实验，验证了不同策略的效果，并提供了混合数据训练的初步见解。
limitations: 可能未涵盖所有潜在动作监督变体。
混合数据训练的优势尚需更多验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 系统比较VLA潜在动作监督策略，有明确发现和开源代码，与机器人VLA方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统比较了视觉-语言-动作模型中潜在动作监督的四种策略，发现离散潜在动作令牌直接监督最有效。

papers.title: CodeEvolve: LLM-Driven Evolutionary Optimization with Runtime-Enriched Target Selection for Multi-Language Code Enhancement
papers.abstract: We present CodeEvolve, an evolutionary framework for improving program performance and code quality with Large Language Models (LLMs). CodeEvolve extends OpenEvolve with runtime-guided target selection, Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS), automated code refinement, and language-specific evaluation pipelines for Java and Salesforce Apex. The system uses Java Flight Recorder (JFR) profiles to build weighted component graphs and select optimization targets that account for most execution cost, reducing reliance on manual bottleneck identification. For each target, CodeEvolve generates candidate edits, evaluates them through build validation, unit tests, performance checks, static analysis, and LLM-based review, and retains only variants that preserve functional correctness. Across real-world optimization tasks, CodeEvolve improves performance and code metrics while maintaining correctness. On a large enterprise Java codebase, it achieves an average speedup of 15.22$\times$ across seven hotspot functions and outperforms single-pass LLM optimization on five of them. An ablation study on Apex optimization shows that the full MCTS-augmented configuration produces 19.5 valid programs out of 20 on average, indicating that search, filtering, and refinement each contribute to more reliable optimization.

analysis.tldr: CodeEvolve 利用 LLM 和运行时信息进行多语言代码进化优化，在 Java 和 Apex 上实现显著加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 手动识别代码瓶颈并优化耗时且依赖专家经验，现有 LLM 单次优化方法缺乏系统性和可靠性。
analysis.problem: 如何自动、高效地利用 LLM 对多语言代码进行性能和质量优化，同时保证功能正确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于进化框架，结合运行时引导的目标选择（Java Flight Recorder 构建加权组件图）、MCTS 搜索、自动代码精炼和语言特定评估流水线（构建验证、单元测试、性能检查、静态分析、LLM 审查）。
contributions: 提出 CodeEvolve 框架，将运行时信息与 LLM 驱动的进化优化结合，减少人工瓶颈识别依赖。
在 Java 和 Salesforce Apex 上验证有效性，Java 热点函数平均加速 15.22 倍，Apex 优化中 MCTS 增强配置平均生成 19.5/20 个有效程序。
analysis.experiments: 在大型企业 Java 代码库的七个热点函数上平均加速 15.22 倍，优于单次 LLM 优化；Apex 消融实验显示完整 MCTS 配置平均生成 19.5 个有效程序（共 20 次）。
limitations: 可能仅适用于 Java 和 Apex，其他语言需适配。
依赖运行时 profiling 工具（JFR），可能不适用于所有环境。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，结合运行时引导和 MCTS，实验效果显著，但应用场景较窄。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CodeEvolve 利用 LLM 和运行时信息进行多语言代码进化优化，在 Java 和 Apex 上实现显著加速。

papers.title: Physical Adversarial Clothing Evades Visible-Thermal Detectors via Non-Overlapping RGB-T Pattern
papers.abstract: Visible-thermal (RGB-T) object detection is a crucial technology for applications such as autonomous driving, where multimodal fusion enhances performance in challenging conditions like low light. However, the security of RGB-T detectors, particularly in the physical world, has been largely overlooked. This paper proposes a novel approach to RGB-T physical attacks using adversarial clothing with a non-overlapping RGB-T pattern (NORP). To simulate full-view (0$^{\circ}$--360$^{\circ}$) RGB-T attacks, we construct 3D RGB-T models for human and adversarial clothing. NORP is a new adversarial pattern design using distinct visible and thermal materials without overlap, avoiding the light reduction in overlapping RGB-T patterns (ORP). To optimize the NORP on adversarial clothing, we propose a spatial discrete-continuous optimization (SDCO) method. We systematically evaluated our method on RGB-T detectors with different fusion architectures, demonstrating high attack success rates both in the digital and physical worlds. Additionally, we introduce a fusion-stage ensemble method that enhances the transferability of adversarial attacks across unseen RGB-T detectors with different fusion architectures.

analysis.tldr: 提出非重叠RGB-T图案的对抗服装，通过空间离散-连续优化方法实现可见-热红外双模态检测器的物理攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: 可见-热红外（RGB-T）目标检测在自动驾驶等应用中至关重要，但现有研究忽视了其在物理世界中的安全性，尤其是针对多模态融合检测器的对抗攻击尚未被充分探索。
analysis.problem: 如何设计物理对抗服装，使其能够有效欺骗RGB-T双模态检测器，同时避免传统重叠图案导致的光线衰减问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出非重叠RGB-T图案（NORP）的对抗服装设计，利用可见光和热红外材料不重叠的图案避免光线衰减；并采用空间离散-连续优化（SDCO）方法优化图案，同时引入融合阶段集成方法增强跨不同融合架构检测器的攻击迁移性。
contributions: 首次提出针对RGB-T双模态检测器的物理对抗服装攻击方法。
设计非重叠RGB-T图案（NORP）避免光线衰减，并构建3D RGB-T模型模拟全视角攻击。
提出空间离散-连续优化（SDCO）方法和融合阶段集成方法，提升攻击成功率和迁移性。
analysis.experiments: 在多种融合架构的RGB-T检测器上进行了数字和物理世界实验，展示了高攻击成功率。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定RGB-T检测器架构有效，泛化性需进一步验证。
物理世界实验可能受限于环境条件（如光照、温度变化）。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 针对RGB-T双模态检测器的物理对抗攻击具有新颖性，方法设计合理，实验验证充分，但应用场景较窄。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出非重叠RGB-T图案的对抗服装，通过空间离散-连续优化方法实现可见-热红外双模态检测器的物理攻击。

papers.title: Harmonized Feature Conditioning and Frequency-Prompt Personalization for Multi-Rater Medical Segmentation
papers.abstract: Multi-rater medical image segmentation captures the inherent ambiguity of clinical interpretation, where diagnostic boundaries vary across experts and imaging devices. Existing approaches often reduce this diversity to consensus labels or treat rater differences as noise, resulting in overconfident and poorly calibrated models. We propose a harmonized probabilistic framework that disentangles acquisition artifacts from genuine annotator variability through adaptive feature conditioning and frequency-domain personalization. A lightweight Harmonizer Network implicitly models scanner-specific artifacts and performs dynamic feature modulation to standardize latent representations, ensuring that uncertainty reflects anatomy rather than noise. To represent rater-specific styles, we introduce a novel High-Frequency Prompt Modules that operate in the spectral domain to encode annotator-dependent boundary precision and textural sensitivity. These prompts adaptively modulate harmonized features to produce personalized yet anatomically consistent segmentations. Furthermore, a Generalized Energy Distance based regularization aligns the generative distribution with empirical annotation variability, promoting diversity where experts disagree and consensus where they converge. Experiments on LIDC-IDRI and NPC-170 show SOTA aggregated and individualized segmentation, with notable GED reductions and improved Dice scores, especially on noisy cases. Beyond accuracy, the model exhibits clinically meaningful uncertainty. Confidence rises in agreement regions and declines in ambiguous areas, supporting its use as a reliable and interpretable tool for multi-expert clinical workflows.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种概率框架，通过特征条件化和频域提示实现多专家医学图像分割，兼顾共识与个体差异。
analysis.research_motivation: 多专家标注的医学图像分割中，现有方法常将专家差异视为噪声或强制共识，导致模型过自信且校准差，无法反映临床解释的固有歧义。
analysis.problem: 如何同时建模采集伪影和标注者变异，生成既个性化又解剖一致的分割结果，并输出有意义的置信度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出调和概率框架：1) Harmonizer Network 隐式建模设备伪影并动态调制特征；2) 高频提示模块在频域编码标注者边界精度和纹理敏感性；3) 广义能量距离正则化对齐生成分布与经验标注变异。
contributions: 提出调和特征条件化和频域个性化框架，分离采集伪影与标注者变异。
引入高频提示模块在频域编码标注者风格，实现个性化分割。
采用广义能量距离正则化促进专家分歧处多样性、共识处一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在 LIDC-IDRI 和 NPC-170 数据集上达到 SOTA 聚合与个体分割性能，GED 显著降低，Dice 提升，尤其在噪声病例上；模型置信度在共识区域高、歧义区域低。
limitations: 可能依赖特定频域变换，泛化性待验证。
Harmonizer Network 需额外训练，可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且结果显著，与医学图像分割方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种概率框架，通过特征条件化和频域提示实现多专家医学图像分割，兼顾共识与个体差异。

papers.title: Contact Matrix: Enhancing Dance Motion Synthesis with Precise Interaction Modeling
papers.abstract: Generating realistic reactive motions, in which one person reacts to the fixed motions of others, is challenging due to strict interaction constraints and a limited feasible solution space. This paper focuses on a typical scenario: duet dance, where high-quality data is scarce, motion patterns are complex, and the details of human interactions are both intricate and abundant. To tackle these challenges, we propose a novel two-stage framework. In the first stage, we introduce a motion VQ-VAE with separate body-part encoders and a joint decoder, enabling specialized codebooks to enhance representation capacity while dynamically modeling dependencies across body parts during decoding, thereby preventing inconsistencies in the generated motions. In the second stage, we propose a contact-aware diffusion model for reactive motion generation that jointly generates motion and a contact matrix between individuals, enabling explicit interaction modeling and providing guidance toward more precise and constrained interaction dynamics during sampling. Experiments show that our method outperforms Duolando with lower $\text{FID}_k$ (8.89 vs. 25.30) and $\text{FID}_{cd}$ (8.01 vs. 9.97), as well as a higher BED (0.4606 vs. 0.2858), indicating improved interaction fidelity and rhythmic synchronization.

analysis.tldr: 提出两阶段框架，通过VQ-VAE和接触感知扩散模型提升双人舞蹈交互运动生成的真实性和精确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成双人交互运动（如双人舞）面临数据稀缺、运动模式复杂、交互约束严格等挑战，现有方法难以精确建模交互细节。
analysis.problem: 如何生成高质量、符合交互约束的双人舞蹈反应式运动。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段使用带身体部位分离编码器和联合解码器的运动VQ-VAE，增强表示能力并建模部位依赖；第二阶段使用接触感知扩散模型，联合生成运动和接触矩阵，显式建模交互。
contributions: 提出身体部位分离编码器和联合解码器的VQ-VAE，提升运动表示能力并防止不一致。
提出接触感知扩散模型，通过联合生成接触矩阵实现精确交互建模。
analysis.experiments: 在双人舞蹈数据集上，方法在FID_k（8.89 vs 25.30）、FID_cd（8.01 vs 9.97）和BED（0.4606 vs 0.2858）上优于Duolando。
limitations: 仅针对双人舞蹈场景，泛化性未知。
依赖接触矩阵的显式建模，可能不适用于非接触交互。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较强，实验效果显著，但场景局限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出两阶段框架，通过VQ-VAE和接触感知扩散模型提升双人舞蹈交互运动生成的真实性和精确性。

papers.title: CAST: Mitigating Object Hallucination in Large Vision-Language Models via Caption-Guided Visual Attention Steering
papers.abstract: Although Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have demonstrated remarkable performance on downstream tasks, they frequently produce contents that deviate from visual information, leading to object hallucination. To tackle this, recent works mostly depend on expensive manual annotations and training cost, or decoding strategies which significantly increase inference time. In this work, we observe that LVLMs' attention to visual information is significantly enhanced when answering caption queries compared to non-caption queries. Inspired by this phenomenon, we propose Caption-guided Visual Attention Steering (CAST), a training-free, plug-and-play hallucination mitigation method that leverages the attention activation pattern corresponding to caption queries to enhance LVLMs' visual perception capability. Specifically, we use probing techniques to identify attention heads that are highly sensitive to caption queries and estimate optimized steering directions for their outputs. This steering strengthens LVLM's fine-grained visual perception capabilities, thereby effectively mitigating object hallucination. CAST reduced object hallucination by an average of 6.03% across five widely used LVLMs and five benchmarks including both discriminative and generative tasks, demonstrating state-of-the-art performance while adding little inference cost and preserving other foundational capabilities.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需训练、即插即用的方法，通过引导视觉注意力来缓解LVLM中的物体幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: LVLM常产生与视觉信息不符的内容（物体幻觉），现有方法依赖昂贵的人工标注和训练成本，或增加推理时间的解码策略。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加训练成本和显著推理开销的前提下，有效缓解LVLM中的物体幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到LVLM在回答描述性查询时对视觉信息的注意力显著强于非描述性查询。
analysis.method: 利用描述性查询对应的注意力激活模式，通过探针技术识别对描述性查询敏感的注意力头，并估计优化引导方向，增强模型细粒度视觉感知能力。
contributions: 提出一种训练免费、即插即用的幻觉缓解方法CAST。
在五个LVLM和五个基准上平均减少6.03%的物体幻觉，达到SOTA性能且几乎不增加推理成本。
analysis.experiments: 在五个广泛使用的LVLM和五个基准（包括判别和生成任务）上评估，平均减少6.03%的物体幻觉。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的幻觉（物体幻觉）。
引导方向估计可能依赖探针质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实用，实验充分，与VLM幻觉缓解方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需训练、即插即用的方法，通过引导视觉注意力来缓解LVLM中的物体幻觉。

papers.title: Gradients with Respect to Semantics Preserving Embeddings Tell the Uncertainty of Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Uncertainty quantification (UQ) is an important technique for ensuring the trustworthiness of LLMs, given their tendency to hallucinate. Existing state-of-the-art UQ approaches for free-form generation rely heavily on sampling, which incurs high computational cost and variance. In this work, we propose the first gradient-based UQ method for free-form generation, SemGrad, which is sampling-free and computationally efficient. Unlike prior gradient-based methods developed for classification tasks that operates in parameter space, we propose to consider gradients in semantic space. Our method builds on the key intuition that a confident LLM should maintain stable output distributions under semantically equivalent input perturbations. We interpret the stability as the gradients in semantic space and introduce a Semantic Preservation Score (SPS) to identify embeddings that best capture semantics, with respect to which gradients are computed. We further propose HybridGrad, which combines the strengths of SemGrad and parameter gradients. Experiments demonstrate that both of our methods provide efficient and effective uncertainty estimates, achieving superior performance than state-of-the-art methods, particularly in settings with multiple valid responses.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个基于梯度的无采样不确定性量化方法SemGrad，通过语义空间梯度高效评估LLM不确定性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM存在幻觉问题，不确定性量化（UQ）对确保其可信度至关重要，但现有基于采样的UQ方法计算成本高且方差大。
analysis.problem: 如何高效且准确地量化自由文本生成中LLM的不确定性，避免高计算开销和采样方差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SemGrad，在语义空间中计算梯度，利用语义保持嵌入（SPS）衡量LLM对语义等价扰动的稳定性；并进一步提出HybridGrad结合参数梯度。
contributions: 首个针对自由文本生成的梯度基无采样UQ方法SemGrad，显著降低计算成本。
提出语义保持分数（SPS）选择最佳语义嵌入，并设计混合方法HybridGrad提升性能。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上实验，SemGrad和HybridGrad在不确定性估计上优于现有方法，尤其在多有效响应场景下表现突出。
limitations: 可能依赖语义嵌入的质量，对复杂语义变化敏感。
未讨论在极长文本或实时场景下的效率表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验有效，与LLM安全相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个基于梯度的无采样不确定性量化方法SemGrad，通过语义空间梯度高效评估LLM不确定性。

papers.title: UniPCB: A Generation-Assisted Detection Framework for PCB Defect Inspection
papers.abstract: In the Industrial Internet of Things (IIoT), enabling intelligent, real-time Printed Circuit Board (PCB) defect inspection is critical for ensuring product reliability. However, existing IIoT-based visual inspection systems face two compounding challenges: scarce and imbalanced defect samples that limit model training, and insufficient feature representation under complex circuit backgrounds. Existing generation methods rely on single-modality conditions with coarse structural control, while detection methods improve architectures without addressing the data bottleneck. To resolve both challenges jointly, we propose a generation-assisted PCB defect inspection framework that integrates controlled defect synthesis with task-specific defect detection within an IIoT-enabled pipeline. On the generation side, a Multi-modal Condition Generator extracts complementary edge, depth, and text conditions in parallel. A ScaleEncoder then embeds these conditions into the diffusion U-Net at four resolutions, and a Condition Modulation applies FiLM-style spatially-adaptive modulation at each scale, enabling structurally aligned and defect-aware sample synthesis to augment the scarce IIoT dataset. On the detection side, an Inverted Residual Shift Attention couples self-attention with shift-wise convolution to jointly capture global context and local texture, and a Cross-level Complementary Fusion Block generates pixel-level gates for selective cross-level feature fusion. The synthesized samples directly enrich the detection training set, so that improvements in generation compound with improvements in detection. Extensive experiments on DsPCBSD+ demonstrate that UniPCB achieves mAP@0.5 of 98.0% and mAP@0.5:0.95 of 61.8% on defect detection, surpassing all compared methods, while the generation branch attains an FID of 129.61 and SSIM of 0.619, outperforming existing conditional generation approaches.

analysis.tldr: 提出生成辅助检测框架UniPCB，通过多模态条件扩散生成缺陷样本并改进检测网络，在PCB缺陷检测上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业物联网中PCB缺陷检测面临缺陷样本稀缺、类别不平衡以及复杂背景下特征表示不足的问题，现有生成方法结构控制粗糙，检测方法未解决数据瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何同时解决PCB缺陷检测中的样本稀缺和特征表示不足问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有生成方法依赖单模态条件且结构控制粗糙，检测方法仅改进架构而未缓解数据瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出生成辅助检测框架，生成侧使用多模态条件生成器提取边缘、深度和文本条件，通过ScaleEncoder嵌入扩散U-Net并采用FiLM式空间自适应调制；检测侧使用倒残差移位注意力（结合自注意力和移位卷积）和跨级互补融合模块进行特征融合。
contributions: 提出生成辅助检测框架，联合解决数据稀缺和特征表示问题
设计多模态条件生成器实现结构对齐的缺陷样本合成
提出倒残差移位注意力和跨级互补融合模块提升检测性能
analysis.experiments: 在DsPCBSD+数据集上，缺陷检测mAP@0.5达98.0%，mAP@0.5:0.95达61.8%，生成分支FID为129.61，SSIM为0.619，均优于对比方法。
limitations: 生成样本质量（FID 129.61）仍有提升空间
框架依赖多模态条件提取，可能增加计算开销

papers.title: AuditRepairBench: A Paired-Execution Trace Corpus for Evaluator-Channel Ranking Instability in Agent Repair
papers.abstract: Agent-repair leaderboards reorder under evaluator reconfiguration, and a measurable share of the reordering is produced by methods that consult evaluator-derived signal during internal selection of candidate repairs. We document this failure mode on a public leaderboard and release AuditRepairBench, a paired-execution trace corpus of 576,000 registered cells (96,000 executed) that operationalizes evaluator-channel-blocking ranking instability within a declared observability boundary. A modular screening architecture decides pathway-blocking through four interchangeable implementations, a learned influence proxy, a rule-based channel-exposure ratio that uses no trained model, a counterfactual sensitivity proxy, and a sparse human-audit proxy, combined into a screening posterior that feeds a cell-level flip functional, a set-valued label, a stratified system score, and a set-valued leaderboard. The resource is supported by mechanism-anchored validation on an 80-case source-level channel-surgery subset, an independent-discovery protocol under which two annotator groups separated from the pipeline developers discover coupling patterns blinded to the screening design and the frozen ensemble attains pooled AUROC 0.83 on their 79 cases, implementation robustness, uncertainty propagation that raises 95% coverage from 0.81 to 0.95, and forward transfer with pooled community-evaluator Spearman \r{ho} = 0.65. Screening-guided blinding patches reduce rank displacement by 55--74% (mean 62%) at fewer than 50 lines of code, whereas random channel blinding produces at most 7% reduction and generic retraining at most 13%. AuditRepairBench-Lite, a rule-only configuration on a 12,000-cell subset, preserves the leaderboard at Kendall τ = 0.88 under twenty-four GPU-hours and is the primary release artifact at 42 GB.

analysis.tldr: 提出AuditRepairBench语料库，用于检测和缓解智能体修复排行榜中因评估器通道导致的排名不稳定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 智能体修复排行榜在评估器重新配置时会发生重排，且部分重排源于方法在内部选择候选修复时使用了评估器信号，这破坏了排行榜的公平性和可靠性。
analysis.problem: 评估器通道引起的排行榜排名不稳定性问题，即方法通过评估器信号进行内部选择导致排名失真。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到评估器重新配置导致排行榜重排，且部分重排由依赖评估器信号的方法引起，并量化了该失败模式。
analysis.method: 构建AuditRepairBench语料库，包含576,000个注册单元（96,000个已执行）的配对执行轨迹；设计模块化筛选架构，通过四种可互换实现（学习影响代理、规则型通道暴露比、反事实敏感性代理、稀疏人工审计代理）决定路径阻断，生成筛选后验，进而产生单元级翻转函数、集合值标签、分层系统分数和集合值排行榜。
contributions: 发布AuditRepairBench语料库，用于操作化评估器通道阻断排名不稳定性。
提出模块化筛选架构，包含多种阻断策略，并通过机制锚定验证、独立发现协议等证明有效性。
展示筛选引导的盲补丁可将排名位移减少55-74%，而随机通道盲补丁最多减少7%。
analysis.experiments: 在80例源级通道手术子集上进行了机制锚定验证；独立发现协议中，两个注释组发现耦合模式，冻结集成在79例上达到池化AUROC 0.83；不确定性传播将95%覆盖率从0.81提升至0.95；前向迁移中社区评估器斯皮尔曼ρ=0.65；筛选引导盲补丁减少排名位移55-74%。
limitations: 语料库规模有限，可能无法覆盖所有评估器通道场景。
规则型配置（Lite版本）在更小数据集上可能牺牲部分精度。

papers.title: Library learning with e-graphs on jazz harmony
papers.abstract: Humans can acquire a highly structured intuitive understanding of musical patterns, yet these patterns often require multiple iterations of reflection and re-listening to internalize fully. To capture such an internalization process, we present a computational model for the learning of jazz harmonic patterns based on library learning. Given a corpus of harmonic progressions, our model searches over a space of programs composed of primitive harmonic relations in order to discover concise generative explanations of the corpus. The model first enumerates possible programs for each piece, and then jointly learns a library of harmonic patterns and refactored programs. To efficiently navigate the vast joint space of programs and libraries, we integrate deductive parsing with library learning on e-graphs. We explore how well our model captures aspects of human musical pattern learning by evaluating the intuitiveness of both programs and libraries, as well as similarities to human-written harmonic derivations.

papers.title: Temporal Structure Matters for Efficient Test-Time Adaptation in Wearable Human Activity Recognition
papers.abstract: Wearable human activity recognition (WHAR) models often suffer from performance degradation under real-world cross-user distribution shifts. Test-time adaptation (TTA) mitigates this degradation by adapting models online using unlabeled test streams, yet existing methods largely inherit assumptions from vision tasks and underexploit the inherent inter-window temporal structure in WHAR streams. In this paper, we revisit such temporal structure as a feature-conditioned inference signal rather than merely an output-space smoothing prior. We derive the insight that temporal continuity and observation-induced feature deviations provide complementary cues for determining when to preserve or release temporal inertia and where to route prediction refinement during likely transitions. Building upon this insight, we propose SIGHT, a lightweight and backpropagation-free TTA framework for WHAR, enabling real-time edge deployment. SIGHT estimates predictive surprise by comparing the current feature with a prototype-based expected state, and then uses the resulting feature deviation to guide geometry-aware transition routing based on prototype alignment and stream-level marginal habit tracking. Evaluations on real-world datasets confirm that SIGHT outperforms existing TTA baselines while reducing computational and memory costs.

analysis.tldr: 提出利用时间结构进行高效测试时适应的轻量级框架SIGHT，用于可穿戴人体活动识别。

papers.title: Guidelines for Designing AI Technologies to Support Adult Learning
papers.abstract: AI-powered educational technologies have demonstrated measurable benefits for learners, but their design and evaluation have largely centered on K-12 contexts. As a result, many AI-supported learning systems remain poorly aligned with the needs, constraints, and goals of adult learners. To better understand how AI systems function in adult education, this paper examines the deployment of several AI learning technologies developed within a multidisciplinary, national research institute in the United States focused on adult learning and online education. Drawing on longitudinal deployment data, we conducted a reflexive thematic analysis to identify recurring challenges and design considerations across systems. These insights were synthesized into a set of 19 design guidelines intended to inform future AI-supported adult learning technologies. We demonstrate the utility of these guidelines through a heuristic evaluation of the deployed systems. Lastly, we present a guideline exploration tool that aids in the ideation of technologies by connecting the guidelines to stakeholder statements surfaced in the analysis process.

papers.title: Beyond Retrieval: A Multitask Benchmark and Model for Code Search
papers.abstract: Code search has usually been evaluated as first-stage retrieval, even though production systems rely on broader pipelines with reranking and developer-style queries. Existing benchmarks also suffer from data contamination, label noise, and degenerate binary relevance. In this paper, we introduce \textsc{CoREB}, a contamination-limited, multitask \underline{co}de \underline{r}etrieval and r\underline{e}ranking \underline{b}enchmark, together with a fine-tuned code reranker, that goes beyond retrieval to cover the full code search pipeline. \textsc{CoREB} is built from counterfactually rewritten LiveCodeBench problems in five programming languages and delivered as timed releases with graded relevance judgments. We benchmark eleven embedding models and five rerankers across three tasks: text-to-code, code-to-text, and code-to-code. Our experiments reveal that: \circone code-specialised embeddings dominate code-to-code retrieval (${\sim}2{\times}$ over general encoders), yet no single model wins all three tasks; \circtwo short keyword queries, the format closest to real developer search, collapse every model to near-zero nDCG@10; \circthree off-the-shelf rerankers are task-asymmetric, with a 12-point swing on code-to-code and no baseline net-positive across all tasks; \circfour our fine-tuned \textsc{CoREB-Reranker} is the first to achieve consistent gains across all three tasks. The data and model are released.

analysis.tldr: 提出代码搜索全流程的多任务基准CoREB和微调重排序器，揭示现有模型在短查询等场景下的严重缺陷。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有代码搜索评测仅关注第一阶段检索，忽略生产系统中的重排序和开发者风格查询；同时存在数据污染、标签噪声和二元相关性退化问题。
analysis.problem: 缺乏覆盖完整代码搜索流水线（检索+重排序）的多任务基准和统一模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 代码专用嵌入在代码到代码检索中优势明显（约2倍于通用编码器），但无单一模型在所有三个任务上获胜；短关键词查询（最接近真实开发者搜索）导致所有模型nDCG@10接近零；现成重排序器存在任务不对称性，在代码到代码任务上出现12个点的性能波动，且无基线在所有任务上净收益为正。
analysis.method: 构建CoREB基准（基于反事实重写的LiveCodeBench问题，五种编程语言，分时发布，分级相关性判断），并微调CoREB-Reranker重排序器。
contributions: 提出CoREB，一个抗污染、多任务（文本到代码、代码到文本、代码到代码）的代码搜索基准，包含分级相关性判断和分时发布机制。
微调得到CoREB-Reranker，首个在所有三个任务上实现一致增益的代码重排序器。
系统评测11个嵌入模型和5个重排序器，揭示短查询崩溃、任务不对称性等关键失败模式。
analysis.experiments: 在CoREB基准上评测了11个嵌入模型和5个重排序器，涵盖三个检索任务，并对比了微调重排序器与基线性能。
limitations: 基准仅基于LiveCodeBench问题，可能未覆盖所有真实代码搜索场景。
微调重排序器在极端短查询上的表现未明确说明。

papers.title: VocalParse: Towards Unified and Scalable Singing Voice Transcription with Large Audio Language Models
papers.abstract: High-quality singing annotations are fundamental to modern Singing Voice Synthesis (SVS) systems. However, obtaining these annotations at scale through manual labeling is unrealistic due to the substantial labor and musical expertise required, making automatic annotation highly necessary. Despite their utility, current automatic transcription systems face significant challenges: they often rely on complex multi-stage pipelines, struggle to recover text-note alignments, and exhibit poor generalization to out-of-distribution (OOD) singing data. To alleviate these issues, we present VocalParse, a unified singing voice transcription (SVT) model built upon a Large Audio Language Model (LALM). Specifically, our novel contribution is to introduce an interleaved prompting formulation that jointly models lyrics, melody, and word-note correspondence, yielding a generated sequence that directly maps to a structured musical score. Furthermore, we propose a Chain-of-Thought (CoT) style prompting strategy, which decodes lyrics first as a semantic scaffold, significantly mitigating the context disruption problem while preserving the structural benefits of interleaved generation. Experiments demonstrate that VocalParse achieves state-of-the-art SVT performance on multiple singing datasets. The source code and checkpoint are available at https://github.com/pymaster17/VocalParse.

papers.title: Advancing Aesthetic Image Generation via Composition Transfer
papers.abstract: Composition is a cornerstone of visual aesthetics, influencing the appeal of an image. While its principles operate independently of specific content, in practice, composition is often coupled with semantics. As a result, existing methods often enhance composition either through implicit learning or by semantics-based layout control, rather than explicitly modeling composition itself. To address this gap, we introduce Composer, a framework rooted in aesthetic theory, designed to model composition in a semantic-agnostic manner. First, it supports composition transfer by extracting key composition-aware representations from a reference image and leveraging a tailored conditional guidance module to control composition based on pre-trained diffusion models. Second, when users specify only text themes without a composition reference, Composer supports theme-driven composition retrieval by leveraging the in-context learning capabilities of Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs), achieving explicit composition planning. To enhance composition in a reference-free mode, we conduct text-to-composition fine-tuning on the trained control module to enable implicit composition planning. Furthermore, we curated a high-quality dataset comprising 2 million image-text pairs using state-of-the-art generative models to support model training. Experimental results demonstrate that Composer significantly enhances aesthetic quality in text-to-image tasks and facilitates personalized composition control and transfer, offering users precision and flexibility in the creative process.

papers.title: SensingAgents: A Multi-Agent Collaborative Framework for Robust IMU Activity Recognition
papers.abstract: Human Activity Recognition (HAR) using Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU) sensors is a cornerstone of mobile health, smart environments, and human-computer interaction. However, current deep learning-based HAR models often struggle with heavy reliance on labeled data, position-specific ambiguity, and a lack of transparent reasoning. Inspired by the advanced agents framework, which emulates a collaborative agent using Large Language Models (LLMs), we propose SensingAgents, a novel multi-agent system for robust IMU activity recognition. SensingAgents organizes LLM-powered agents into specialized roles: a group of Analyst Agents for position-specific sensor analysis (arm, wrist, belt, pocket), a pair of Advocate Agents that resolves sensor conflicts through dynamic and static dialectical debates, and a Decision Agent that ensures reliability under sensor drift or failure. Evaluation on the Shoaib dataset demonstrates that SensingAgents significantly outperforms state-of-the-art single-agent and multi-agent LLM models, achieving an accuracy of 79.5% in a zero setting--29% higher than existing agent models and 9.4% higher than deep learning baselines--particularly in complex scenarios where multi-sensor data is conflicting or noisy. Our work highlights the potential of multi-agent collaborative reasoning for advancing the robustness and interpretability of ubiquitous sensing systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出多智能体协作框架SensingAgents，利用LLM提升IMU活动识别的鲁棒性和可解释性。

papers.title: Reference-based Category Discovery: Unsupervised Object Detection with Category Awareness
papers.abstract: Traditional one-shot detection methods have addressed the closed-set problem in object detection, but the high cost of data annotation remains a critical challenge. General unsupervised methods generate pseudo boxes without category labels, thus failing to achieve category-aware classification. To overcome these limitations, we propose Reference-based Category Discovery (RefCD), an unsupervised detector that enables category-aware\footnotemark[1] detection without any manually annotated labels. It leverages feature similarity between predicted objects and unlabeled reference images. Unlike previous unsupervised methods that lack category guidance and one-shot methods which require labeled data, RefCD introduces a carefully designed feature similarity loss to explicitly guide the learning of potential category-specific features. Additionally, RefCD supports category-agnostic detection without reference images, serving as a unified framework. Comprehensive quantitative and qualitative analysis of category-aware and category-agnostic detection results demonstrates its effectiveness, and RefCD can learn category information in an unsupervised paradigm even without category labels.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于参考图像的类别发现方法，无需标注即可实现类别感知的目标检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 目标检测中数据标注成本高，传统无监督方法无法区分类别，单样本方法仍需标注数据。

papers.title: A Breast Vision Pathology Foundation Model for Real-world Clinical Utility
papers.abstract: Pathology foundation models have shown strong retrospective performance, but whether such systems can support clinically relevant use remains unclear. This challenge is particularly important in breast cancer, where pathological assessment serves as the gold standard for diagnosis and guides treatment planning, surgical decision-making and risk stratification across pre-, intra- and post-operative stages. Here we present \textbf{BRAVE}, a breast-adaptive pathology foundation model developed and evaluated using a total resource of 101,638 breast whole-slide images from 32 sources across Asia, Europe and North America. We assessed BRAVE across 34 tasks in 82 cohorts spanning pre-operative biopsy, intra-operative frozen section and post-operative resection, using an evidence chain comprising retrospective benchmarking, clinically challenging scenarios, workflow-oriented clinical impact simulations, prospective observational validation with the thresholds locked in the retrospective cohorts and crossover pathologist-AI interaction studies. Across these settings, BRAVE supported practical roles in the clinical workflow, including safe exclusion of low-risk cases from routine review, AI-assisted second-review rescue of initially missed positives and prioritization of cases for further assessment. In prospective validation across three centres, BRAVE excluded 76.9% of negative biopsy cases (NPV 0.953) and 70.1% of negative frozen-section cases (NPV 0.973), and triaged 78.8% of post-operative subtyping cases as high-confidence clear-cut cases (NPV 1.000). In reader studies, AI assistance improved balanced accuracy from 88.5% to 95.1% (OR 3.14, P<0.001), with better efficiency, confidence and inter-rater agreement. BRAVE-derived scores also independently predicted disease-free survival (adjusted HR 4.79, P<0.001) and overall survival (adjusted HR 8.14, P<0.001).

analysis.tldr: BRAVE是一个乳腺病理基础模型，在34项任务中验证了临床实用性，包括前瞻性验证和交叉研究。
analysis.research_motivation: 病理基础模型在回顾性研究中表现良好，但能否支持临床实际应用尚不清楚，尤其在乳腺癌中，病理评估是诊断金标准，指导治疗决策。
analysis.problem: 验证病理基础模型在真实临床工作流中的实用性和有效性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建乳腺自适应病理基础模型BRAVE，使用来自32个来源的101,638张全切片图像，通过回顾性基准测试、临床挑战场景、工作流模拟、前瞻性验证和交叉研究进行评估。
contributions: 提出并评估了乳腺病理基础模型BRAVE，覆盖术前活检、术中冰冻切片和术后切除等阶段。
通过前瞻性验证和交叉研究证明了模型在临床工作流中的实用价值，如安全排除低风险病例、辅助二次审查和病例优先级排序。
analysis.experiments: 在82个队列的34项任务中评估，包括回顾性基准、临床挑战场景、工作流模拟、前瞻性验证（三个中心）和病理学家-AI交叉研究。前瞻性验证中，BRAVE排除了76.9%的阴性活检病例（NPV 0.953）和70.1%的阴性冰冻切片病例（NPV 0.973），并分类了78.8%的术后亚型病例（NPV 1.000）。AI辅助将平衡准确率从88.5%提升至95.1%（OR 3.14, P<0.001）。BRAVE评分独立预测无病生存期（调整HR 4.79, P<0.001）和总生存期（调整HR 8.14, P<0.001）。
limitations: 可能仅针对乳腺癌，泛化到其他癌症类型需进一步验证。

papers.title: A Queueing-Theoretic Framework for Stability Analysis of LLM Inference with KV Cache Memory Constraints
papers.abstract: The rapid adoption of large language models (LLMs) has created significant challenges for efficient inference at scale. Unlike traditional workloads, LLM inference is constrained by both computation and the memory overhead of key-value (KV) caching, which accelerates decoding but quickly exhausts GPU memory. In this paper, we introduce the first queueing-theoretic framework that explicitly incorporates both computation and GPU memory constraints into the analysis of LLM inference. Based on this framework, we derive rigorous stability and instability conditions that determine whether an LLM inference service can sustain incoming demand without unbounded queue growth. This result offers a powerful tool for system deployment, potentially addressing the core challenge of GPU provisioning. By combining an estimated request arrival rate with our derived stable service rate, operators can calculate the necessary cluster size to avoid both costly over-purchasing and performance-violating under-provisioning. We further validate our theoretical predictions through extensive experiments in real GPU production environments. Our results show that the predicted stability conditions are highly accurate, with deviations typically within 10%.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个排队论框架分析LLM推理的KV缓存内存约束下的稳定性，并导出稳定条件。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM推理受计算和KV缓存内存双重约束，现有工作缺乏统一理论框架来指导GPU资源部署，导致过度采购或性能违规。
analysis.problem: 如何建模并分析LLM推理服务在KV缓存内存约束下的稳定性（队列是否无界增长），以指导集群规模配置。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: KV缓存加速解码但快速耗尽GPU内存，传统排队论模型未考虑内存约束，导致稳定性分析不准确。
analysis.method: 建立包含计算和GPU内存约束的排队论框架，推导服务稳定/不稳定的条件，并给出基于到达率计算所需集群大小的公式。
contributions: 首次将KV缓存内存约束纳入排队论框架分析LLM推理稳定性。
导出严格的稳定与不稳定条件，并验证其在实际GPU环境中的高精度（偏差<10%）。
analysis.experiments: 在真实GPU生产环境中进行实验，验证稳定性条件预测的准确性，偏差通常在10%以内。
limitations: 框架假设到达率为已知常数，实际中可能波动。
未考虑调度策略或请求优先级的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.reason: 理论框架新颖，实验验证充分，对LLM推理部署有实际指导意义。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个排队论框架分析LLM推理的KV缓存内存约束下的稳定性，并导出稳定条件。

papers.title: HeterSEED: Semantics-Structure Decoupling for Heterogeneous Graph Learning under Heterophily
papers.abstract: Many real-world heterogeneous graphs exhibit pronounced heterophily, where connected nodes often have dissimilar labels or play different semantic roles. In such settings, standard heterogeneous graph neural networks that aggregate messages along metapaths or meta-relations primarily based on feature similarity can propagate misleading information, since feature similarity may be misaligned with underlying relational semantics. In this paper, we propose HeterSEED, a semantics-structure decoupling framework for heterogeneous graph learning under heterophily. HeterSEED decouples representation learning into a heterogeneous semantic channel that captures type- and relation-aware local semantics and a structure-aware heterophily channel that separates homophilic and heterophilic neighborhoods via pseudo-label-guided partitioning and aggregates them using metapath-based structural weights. A node-level adaptive fusion mechanism then combines the two channels to produce context-dependent node representations. Theoretically, we establish that, on heterogeneous graphs under heterophily, HeterSEED is strictly more expressive than standard heterogeneous graph neural networks that rely primarily on feature similarity and provably reduces the prediction bias introduced by heterophilic neighbors. Experiments on five real-world heterogeneous graphs, including two large-scale networks at the million-node and hundred-million-edge scale, demonstrate that HeterSEED consistently outperforms representative heterogeneous graph neural networks and recent heterophily-aware baselines, especially in strongly heterophilic regimes.

analysis.tldr: 提出 HeterSEED 框架，通过语义-结构解耦提升异构图在异配性下的学习能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实异构图常呈现异配性，即相连节点标签或语义角色不同，而标准异构图神经网络基于特征相似性聚合消息会传播误导信息。
analysis.problem: 解决异构图在异配性下因特征相似性与关系语义不对齐导致的消息聚合偏差问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 异配性下，基于特征相似性的聚合会引入误导信息，且标准模型表达能力不足。
analysis.method: 提出 HeterSEED，包含异质语义通道（捕获类型和关系感知的局部语义）和结构感知异配通道（通过伪标签引导划分同配/异配邻域，并用元路径结构权重聚合），再通过节点级自适应融合机制组合两通道。
contributions: 提出语义-结构解耦框架 HeterSEED，专门针对异配异构图学习。
理论证明 HeterSEED 比标准异构图神经网络更具表达能力，并能减少异配邻居引入的预测偏差。
在五个真实异构图（含百万节点/亿边规模）上实验，显著优于现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在五个真实异构图（包括两个大规模网络）上评估，HeterSEED 一致优于代表性异构图神经网络和近期异配感知基线，尤其在强异配场景下。
limitations: 伪标签引导的邻域划分可能依赖初始标签质量。
框架复杂度较高，可能影响训练效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，理论分析扎实，实验充分且效果显著，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 HeterSEED 框架，通过语义-结构解耦提升异构图在异配性下的学习能力。

papers.title: DiCLIP: Diffusion Model Enhances CLIP's Dense Knowledge for Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation
papers.abstract: Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation (WSSS) with image-level labels typically leverages Class Activation Maps (CAMs) to achieve pixel-level predictions. Recently, Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP) has been introduced to generate CAMs in WSSS. However, previous WSSS methods solely adopt CLIP's vision-language paired property for dense localization, neglecting its inherently limited dense knowledge across both visual and text modalities, which renders CAM generation suboptimal. In this work, we propose DiCLIP, a novel WSSS framework that leverages the generative diffusion model to enhance CLIP's dense knowledge across two modalities. Specifically, Visual Correlation Enhancement (VCE) and Text Semantic Augmentation (TSA) modules are proposed for dense prediction enhancement. To improve the spatial awareness of visual features, our VCE module utilizes diffusion's reliable spatial consistency to mitigate the over-smoothing issue in CLIP's attention. It designs the Attention Clustering Refinement (ACR) module to reliably extract diverse correlation maps from the diffusion model. The correlation maps act as a diversity bias for CLIP's self-attention, recursively pushing its visual features towards a more discriminative dense distribution. To augment the semantics of text embeddings, our TSA module argues that a single text modality is insufficient to encompass the variability of visual categories. Thus, we leverage diffusion's generative power to maintain a dynamic key-value cache model, shifting CAM generation from a patch-text matching mechanism to a novel visual knowledge retrieval paradigm. With these enhancements, DiCLIP not only outperforms state-of-the-art methods on PASCAL VOC and MS COCO but also significantly reduces training costs. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/zwyang6/DiCLIP.

analysis.tldr: 利用扩散模型增强CLIP的密集知识，提升弱监督语义分割中CAM的质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 弱监督语义分割（WSSS）依赖图像级标签生成类激活图（CAM），但现有基于CLIP的方法仅利用其视觉-语言配对特性，忽略了CLIP在视觉和文本模态上固有的密集知识不足，导致CAM生成次优。
analysis.problem: 如何增强CLIP在WSSS中的密集定位能力，以生成更高质量的CAM。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: CLIP的注意力图存在过平滑问题，且单一文本模态无法覆盖视觉类别的多样性。
analysis.method: 提出DiCLIP框架，包含视觉相关性增强（VCE）和文本语义增强（TSA）模块。VCE利用扩散模型的空间一致性缓解CLIP注意力的过平滑，通过注意力聚类细化（ACR）提取多样相关性图作为偏置；TSA利用扩散模型的生成能力维护动态键值缓存，将CAM生成从补丁-文本匹配转变为视觉知识检索。
contributions: 提出DiCLIP框架，首次利用扩散模型增强CLIP在WSSS中的密集知识。
设计VCE和TSA模块，分别从视觉和文本模态提升CAM质量。
在PASCAL VOC和MS COCO上达到SOTA，并显著降低训练成本。
analysis.experiments: 在PASCAL VOC和MS COCO数据集上评估，与SOTA方法比较，并报告了训练成本降低。
limitations: 可能依赖扩散模型的生成质量，若扩散模型本身有偏差可能影响结果。
动态键值缓存机制可能增加推理时的内存开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，利用扩散模型增强CLIP的密集知识，实验充分且达到SOTA，与视觉理解方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用扩散模型增强CLIP的密集知识，提升弱监督语义分割中CAM的质量。

papers.title: From Diffusion to Rectified Flow: Rethinking Text-Based Segmentation
papers.abstract: Text-based image segmentation aims to delineate object boundaries within an image from text prompts, offering higher flexibility and broader application scope compared to traditional fixed-category segmentation tasks. Recent studies have shown that diffusion models (e.g., Stable Diffusion) can provide rich multimodal semantic features, leading to studies of using diffusion models as feature extractors for segmentation tasks. Such methods, however, inherit the generative natures of diffusion models that are harmful to discriminative segmentation tasks. In response, we propose RLFSeg, a novel framework that leverages Rectified Flow to learn direct mapping from the image to the segmentation mask within the latent space. The model is thus freed from the noise-denoise process and the need to optimize the time step of diffusion models, resulting in substantially better performance than previous diffusion-based methods, especially on zero-shot scenarios. By introducing label refinement and an Adaptive One-Step Sampling strategy, the model achieves higher accuracy even on a single inference step. The framework redirects a pretrained generative model to the discriminative segmentation task with zero modification to model structure, thus reveals promising application potential and significant research value.

analysis.tldr: 提出RLFSeg，利用Rectified Flow替代扩散模型进行文本引导分割，消除噪声-去噪过程，提升零样本性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的分割方法继承了生成模型的噪声-去噪过程，不利于判别式分割任务，且需要优化时间步，导致性能受限。
analysis.problem: 如何消除扩散模型在文本引导分割中的生成特性（噪声-去噪过程和时间步优化），提升分割性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 扩散模型作为特征提取器时，其生成特性（噪声-去噪过程）对判别式分割任务有害，导致性能不佳，尤其在零样本场景。
analysis.method: 提出RLFSeg框架，使用Rectified Flow学习从图像到分割掩码的潜在空间直接映射，避免噪声-去噪过程和时间步优化；引入标签细化和自适应一步采样策略。
contributions: 首次将Rectified Flow应用于文本引导分割，消除扩散模型的生成特性。
提出标签细化和自适应一步采样策略，提升单步推理精度。
在零样本场景下显著优于现有扩散基方法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练生成模型的质量。
自适应一步采样策略的泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，零样本性能提升显著，但实验细节未提供，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RLFSeg，利用Rectified Flow替代扩散模型进行文本引导分割，消除噪声-去噪过程，提升零样本性能。

papers.title: GTF: Omnidirectional EPI Transformer for Light Field Super-Resolution
papers.abstract: Light field (LF) image super-resolution benefits from Epipolar Plane Images (EPIs), whose line slopes explicitly encode disparity. However, existing Transformer-based LF SR methods mainly attend to horizontal and vertical EPIs, leaving diagonal epipolar geometry underexplored. We present GTF, an omnidirectional EPI Transformer that explicitly models horizontal, vertical, 45-degree, and 135-degree EPIs within a unified reconstruction framework. GTF combines directional EPI processing, MacPI-based prior injection, adaptive directional fusion, and a topology-preserving feed-forward network to better exploit LF geometry. For the NTIRE 2026 fidelity tracks, we use GTF as the main model, while a lightweight GTF-Tiny variant targets the efficiency track. On five standard LF SR benchmarks covering both real-captured and synthetic scenes, GTF reaches 32.78 dB without inference-time enhancement, and stronger inference settings with EPSW and test-time augmentation further improve performance. Under the NTIRE 2026 efficiency constraint, GTF-Tiny attains 32.57 dB with only 0.915M parameters and 19.81 GFLOPs. In the NTIRE 2026 Light Field Image Super-Resolution Challenge, our submissions rank 3rd on Track 1 and Track 3 and 4th on Track 2. Architecture-evolution, channel-width, and inference analyses further support the effectiveness of diagonal EPI modeling, directional fusion, and the lightweight design.

analysis.tldr: 提出全向EPI Transformer GTF，显式建模水平、垂直及对角EPI，实现光场超分辨率SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有Transformer光场超分方法主要关注水平和垂直EPI，忽略了对角线极线几何，限制了性能提升。
analysis.problem: 如何显式建模多方向（包括对角线）EPI以充分利用光场几何结构进行超分辨率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 对角线EPI建模能提供额外几何信息，提升超分质量；轻量模型在极低参数量下仍保持高性能。
analysis.method: 提出全向EPI Transformer（GTF），包含方向EPI处理、MacPI先验注入、自适应方向融合和拓扑保持前馈网络；轻量版GTF-Tiny用于效率赛道。
contributions: 首次在Transformer中显式建模水平、垂直、45°和135°四个方向的EPI。
提出MacPI先验注入和自适应方向融合模块，有效整合多方向几何信息。
在五个标准基准上达到SOTA，NTIRE 2026挑战赛获得多项前三/四名。
analysis.experiments: 在五个标准LF SR基准（真实和合成场景）上评估，GTF达32.78 dB；GTF-Tiny仅0.915M参数、19.81 GFLOPs，达32.57 dB。NTIRE 2026挑战赛Track 1和3第三名、Track 2第四名。
limitations: 仅针对光场超分任务，未验证在其他LF任务上的泛化性。
对角线EPI建模可能增加计算开销，轻量版性能略低于完整版。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较强（全向EPI建模），实验充分且取得挑战赛名次，但属于特定领域应用，通用性有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出全向EPI Transformer GTF，显式建模水平、垂直及对角EPI，实现光场超分辨率SOTA。

papers.title: VL-UniTrack: A Unified Framework with Visual-Language Prompts for UAV-Ground Visual Tracking
papers.abstract: UAV-ground visual tracking (UGVT) aims to simultaneously track the same object from both the UAV and the ground view. However, existing two-stream methods suffer from isolated feature extraction and rely heavily on implicit appearance matching, which struggles to establish reliable correspondence under drastic view differences, leading to tracking unreliability. To address these limitations, we propose VL-UniTrack, a fully unified framework enhanced by visual-language prompts. By encoding features from both views within a single shared encoder, our method breaks the barrier of feature isolation to facilitate sufficient cross-view interaction. To overcome the ambiguity caused by relying solely on appearance matching, we design visual-language geometric prompting module, which fuses language descriptions with visual features to generate learnable prompts. These prompts are then fed into our prompt-guided cross-view adapter module to enable sufficient cross-view feature interaction and to guide the learning of view-specific feature representations. Furthermore, a confidence-modulated mutual distillation loss is proposed to regularize the training by mitigating noise propagation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on the latest benchmark. The code can be downloaded in https://github.com/xuboyue1999/VL-UniTrack.git

analysis.tldr: 提出VL-UniTrack，通过视觉-语言提示统一无人机与地面视角的目标跟踪框架，解决视角差异下的特征隔离与外观匹配模糊问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 无人机-地面视觉跟踪（UGVT）面临视角差异大、现有双流方法特征提取孤立且依赖隐式外观匹配导致跟踪不可靠的问题。
analysis.problem: 如何建立跨视角的可靠对应关系，克服特征隔离和外观匹配模糊性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有双流方法在剧烈视角差异下难以建立可靠对应，导致跟踪不可靠。
analysis.method: 提出VL-UniTrack，包含共享编码器、视觉-语言几何提示模块、提示引导的跨视图适配器模块和置信度调制互蒸馏损失。
contributions: 提出首个完全统一的UGVT框架，通过共享编码器打破特征隔离。
设计视觉-语言几何提示模块融合语言描述与视觉特征，生成可学习提示以引导跨视图交互。
提出置信度调制互蒸馏损失，通过抑制噪声传播正则化训练。
analysis.experiments: 在最新基准上达到最先进性能，代码已开源。
limitations: 可能依赖语言描述的质量和可用性。
未提及在极端光照或遮挡条件下的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较强，结合视觉-语言提示解决跨视角跟踪问题，实验SOTA，但应用场景较专。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VL-UniTrack，通过视觉-语言提示统一无人机与地面视角的目标跟踪框架，解决视角差异下的特征隔离与外观匹配模糊问题。

papers.title: From Parameter Dynamics to Risk Scoring : Quantifying Sample-Level Safety Degradation in LLM Fine-tuning
papers.abstract: Safety alignment of Large Language Models (LLMs) is extremely fragile, as fine-tuning on a small number of benign samples can erase safety behaviors learned from millions of preference examples. Existing studies attempt to explain this phenomenon by comparing parameters and hidden states before and after fine-tuning, but overlook their dynamic evolution during fine-tuning. In this paper, we uncover a critical mechanism underlying safety degradation by analyzing parameter dynamics, where benign fine-tuning causes parameters to cumulatively drift toward danger-aligned directions, progressively undermining the model's safety. This finding suggests that samples contributing more to this drift has greater fine-tuning risks. Based on this insight, we propose a method of Sample-Level Quantification of Safety Degradation (SQSD), which quantifies the influence of each training sample on safety degradation. Specifically, SQSD computes continuous risk scores to samples by measuring their induced parameter updates' projection difference between danger and safety directions. Extensive experiments across multiple models and datasets demonstrate that SQSD effectively quantifies sample-level fine-tuning risks and exhibits strong transferability across model architectures, parameter scales, and parameter-efficient methods.

analysis.tldr: 通过分析参数动态，提出SQSD方法量化每个训练样本对LLM微调安全退化的影响。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM安全对齐极其脆弱，少量良性样本微调即可破坏安全行为，现有研究忽略参数动态演化，无法解释安全退化机制。
analysis.problem: 如何量化每个训练样本对LLM微调安全退化的贡献，以识别高风险样本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 良性微调导致参数累积向危险对齐方向漂移，逐步破坏模型安全性。
analysis.method: SQSD：通过测量样本引起的参数更新在危险与安全方向上的投影差异，计算连续风险分数。
contributions: 揭示参数动态漂移是安全退化的关键机制
提出SQSD方法实现样本级安全退化量化
analysis.experiments: 在多个模型和数据集上验证SQSD有效量化样本级微调风险，并展示跨模型架构、参数规模和参数高效方法的强迁移性。
limitations: 可能依赖特定危险/安全方向的定义
计算开销可能较大
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实用，实验充分，与安全对齐方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过分析参数动态，提出SQSD方法量化每个训练样本对LLM微调安全退化的影响。

papers.title: Lightning Unified Video Editing via In-Context Sparse Attention
papers.abstract: Video editing has evolved toward In-Context Learning (ICL) paradigms, yet the resulting quadratic attention costs create a critical computational bottleneck. In this work, we propose In-context Sparse Attention (ISA), the first near-lossless empirical sparse framework tailored for ICL video editing. Our design is grounded in two key insights: first, context tokens exhibit significantly lower saliency than source tokens; second, we theoretically prove and empirically validate that Query sharpness correlates with approximation error. Motivated by these findings, ISA implements an efficient pre-selection strategy to prune redundant context, followed by a dynamic query grouping mechanism that routes high-error queries to full attention and low-error ones to a computationally efficient 0-th order Taylor sparse attention. Furthermore, we build \textbf{\texttt{LIVEditor}} , a novel lightning video editing model via ISA and a proposed video-editing data pipeline that curated a 1.7M high-quality dataset. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LIVEditor achieves a $\sim$60% reduction in attention-module latency while surpassing state-of-the-art methods across EditVerseBench, IVE-Bench, and VIE-Bench, delivering near-lossless acceleration without compromising visual fidelity.

analysis.tldr: 提出In-context Sparse Attention (ISA)框架，实现视频编辑中近无损的注意力加速，并构建LIVEditor模型在多个基准上超越SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频编辑中的上下文学习（ICL）范式导致二次注意力成本，成为计算瓶颈，现有方法难以兼顾效率与质量。
analysis.problem: 解决ICL视频编辑中注意力计算开销大、难以高效加速的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现上下文token的显著性低于源token，且查询锐度与近似误差相关，为稀疏注意力设计提供依据。
analysis.method: 提出ISA框架：通过预选择策略剪枝冗余上下文，结合动态查询分组，将高误差查询路由到全注意力，低误差查询使用0阶泰勒稀疏注意力。基于ISA构建LIVEditor模型，并设计视频编辑数据管道生成1.7M高质量数据集。
contributions: 提出首个针对ICL视频编辑的近无损稀疏注意力框架ISA，理论证明并验证查询锐度与近似误差的关系。
构建LIVEditor模型，实现注意力模块延迟降低约60%，在多个基准上超越现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在EditVerseBench、IVE-Bench和VIE-Bench上评估，LIVEditor在延迟降低60%的同时超越SOTA，实现近无损加速。
limitations: 可能依赖特定视频编辑任务，泛化性需进一步验证。
稀疏注意力策略在极端低延迟场景下可能存在质量损失。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且效果显著，与视频生成方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出In-context Sparse Attention (ISA)框架，实现视频编辑中近无损的注意力加速，并构建LIVEditor模型在多个基准上超越SOTA。

papers.title: Dream-MPC: Gradient-Based Model Predictive Control with Latent Imagination
papers.abstract: State-of-the-art model-based Reinforcement Learning (RL) approaches either use gradient-free, population-based methods for planning, learned policy networks, or a combination of policy networks and planning. Hybrid approaches that combine Model Predictive Control (MPC) with a learned model and a policy prior to leverage the advantages of both paradigms have shown promising results. However, these approaches typically rely on gradient-free optimization methods, which can be computationally expensive for high-dimensional control tasks. While gradient-based methods are a promising alternative, recent works have empirically shown that gradient-based methods often perform worse than their gradient-free counterparts. We propose Dream-MPC, a novel approach that generates few candidate trajectories from a rolled-out policy and optimizes each trajectory by gradient ascent using a learned world model, uncertainty regularization and amortization of optimization iterations over time by reusing previously optimized actions. Our results on 24 continuous control tasks show that Dream-MPC can significantly improve the performance of the underlying policy and can outperform gradient-free MPC and state-of-the-art baselines. We will open source our code and more at https://dream-mpc.github.io.

analysis.tldr: Dream-MPC 通过梯度上升优化轨迹，结合不确定性正则化和迭代摊销，在连续控制任务上超越无梯度 MPC 和基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于模型的强化学习方法中，混合 MPC 与策略先验的方法通常使用无梯度优化，计算成本高，而梯度方法虽高效但性能较差。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种梯度优化的 MPC 方法，使其在连续控制任务中既高效又优于无梯度方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出梯度方法在以往工作中性能不如无梯度方法，但 Dream-MPC 通过生成少量候选轨迹并梯度上升优化，结合不确定性正则化和迭代摊销，实现了性能提升。
analysis.method: Dream-MPC 从策略 rollout 生成少量候选轨迹，利用学习的世界模型进行梯度上升优化，加入不确定性正则化，并通过重用先前优化的动作实现优化迭代的时间摊销。
contributions: 提出 Dream-MPC，一种基于梯度优化的 MPC 方法，结合不确定性正则化和迭代摊销。
在 24 个连续控制任务上显著提升底层策略性能，超越无梯度 MPC 和 SOTA 基线。
analysis.experiments: 在 24 个连续控制任务上评估，Dream-MPC 显著提升底层策略性能，并超越无梯度 MPC 和 SOTA 基线。
limitations: 可能依赖世界模型的准确性，模型误差会影响优化效果。
梯度上升优化可能陷入局部最优，尤其在复杂任务中。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，实验充分，对连续控制任务有实际价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Dream-MPC 通过梯度上升优化轨迹，结合不确定性正则化和迭代摊销，在连续控制任务上超越无梯度 MPC 和基线。

papers.title: Open-Source Image Editing Models Are Zero-Shot Vision Learners
papers.abstract: Recent studies have shown that large generative models can solve vision tasks they were not explicitly trained for. However, existing evidence relies on closed-source models~(Veo~3, Nano Banana Pro) or requires task-specific instruction tuning, leaving open whether publicly available image-editing models possess zero-shot vision abilities out of the box. We conduct a systematic evaluation of three open-source image-editing models -- Qwen-Image-Edit, FireRed-Image-Edit, and LongCat-Image-Edit -- on dense visual prediction tasks \emph{without any fine-tuning}. We benchmark monocular depth estimation on NYUv2 and DIODE, surface normal estimation on NYUv2, and semantic segmentation on Cityscapes, covering both geometric and semantic scene understanding. Results show that open-source image-editing models exhibit non-trivial zero-shot visual understanding. On NYUv2 surface normals, FireRed-Image-Edit achieves a mean angular error of $17.69^\circ$, surpassing the fine-tuned Marigold ($20.86^\circ$) and matching the instruction-tuned Vision Banana ($17.78^\circ$) without any task-specific training. On NYUv2 depth estimation, LongCat-Image-Edit obtains $δ_1{=}0.822$ with affine alignment, and Qwen-Image-Edit leads on DIODE Indoor ($δ_1{=}0.868$). On Cityscapes semantic segmentation, Qwen-Image-Edit reaches 25.7 mIoU at the 19-class level and 49.5 mIoU at a coarser 7-category level. By comparing three independently trained editors, we test whether zero-shot vision ability is an emergent property of image-editing pretraining rather than a model-specific artifact. Code, evaluation scripts, and all results are publicly released to serve as a reproducible baseline for future work.

analysis.tldr: 开源图像编辑模型无需微调即可在深度估计、表面法线预测和语义分割等视觉任务上展现零样本能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究表明大型生成模型能解决未显式训练的视觉任务，但证据多依赖闭源模型或需任务特定微调，开源图像编辑模型是否天然具备零样本视觉能力尚不清楚。
analysis.problem: 验证开源图像编辑模型在密集视觉预测任务上的零样本能力，并探究该能力是否为图像编辑预训练的涌现属性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供现象分析。
analysis.method: 系统评估三个开源图像编辑模型（Qwen-Image-Edit、FireRed-Image-Edit、LongCat-Image-Edit）在单目深度估计、表面法线估计和语义分割任务上的零样本性能，无需任何微调。
contributions: 首次系统评估开源图像编辑模型的零样本视觉能力，覆盖几何与语义理解任务。
通过对比三个独立训练的模型，验证零样本视觉能力是图像编辑预训练的涌现属性而非模型特定伪影。
公开代码、评估脚本和所有结果，作为可复现基线。
analysis.experiments: 在NYUv2和DIODE上评估深度估计，NYUv2上评估表面法线估计，Cityscapes上评估语义分割。FireRed-Image-Edit在NYUv2表面法线任务上平均角度误差17.69°，超越微调Marigold（20.86°）并匹配指令微调Vision Banana（17.78°）。LongCat-Image-Edit在NYUv2深度估计上δ₁=0.822，Qwen-Image-Edit在DIODE室内深度上δ₁=0.868。Cityscapes语义分割上Qwen-Image-Edit达到25.7 mIoU（19类）和49.5 mIoU（7类）。
limitations: 仅评估了三个开源模型，可能不覆盖所有开源图像编辑模型。
零样本性能仍低于专门微调模型，实际应用可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，系统评估开源图像编辑模型的零样本视觉能力，实验充分且结果有竞争力，但技术深度中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 开源图像编辑模型无需微调即可在深度估计、表面法线预测和语义分割等视觉任务上展现零样本能力。

papers.title: SAMIC: A Lightweight Semantic-Aware Mamba for Efficient Perceptual Image Compression
papers.abstract: Perceptual image compression focuses on preserving high visual quality under low-bitrate constraints. Most existing approaches to perceptual compression leverage the strong generative capabilities of generative adversarial networks or diffusion models, at the cost of substantial model complexity. To this end, we present an efficient perceptual image compression method that exploits the long-range modeling capability and linear computational complexity of state space models, with a particular focus on Mamba. Unlike existing methods that rely on an inherently fixed scanning order and consequently impair semantic continuity and spatial correlation, we develop a semantic-aware Mamba block (SAMB) to enable scanning guided by dynamically clustered semantic features, thereby alleviating the strict causality constraints and long-range information decay inherent to Mamba. Inspired by singular value decomposition, we design an SVD-inspired redundancy reduction module (SVD-RRM) that performs a low-rank approximation on the latent features by introducing a learnable soft threshold, leading to channel-wise redundancy information reduction. The proposed SAMB is integrated into both the encoder and decoder of the compression framework, whereas the SVD-RRM is incorporated only in the encoder. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method performs favorably against state-of-the-art approaches in terms of rate-distortion-perception tradeoff and model complexity. The source code and pretrained models will be available at https://github.com/Jasmine-aiq/SAMIC.

analysis.tldr: 提出轻量级语义感知Mamba图像压缩方法，通过动态扫描和SVD降冗余提升率失真感知权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有感知图像压缩方法依赖GAN或扩散模型，模型复杂度高；而Mamba虽具有线性复杂度，但固定扫描顺序破坏语义连续性。
analysis.problem: 如何在低码率下保持高视觉质量的同时降低模型复杂度，并解决Mamba固定扫描顺序导致的语义信息损失。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Mamba的固定扫描顺序会损害语义连续性和空间相关性，且存在严格因果约束和长程信息衰减。
analysis.method: 提出语义感知Mamba块（SAMB），利用动态聚类语义特征引导扫描；设计SVD启发冗余减少模块（SVD-RRM），通过可学习软阈值对潜在特征进行低秩近似以减少通道冗余。
contributions: 提出SAMB模块，实现语义引导的动态扫描，缓解Mamba的因果约束和信息衰减。
设计SVD-RRM模块，通过低秩近似和可学习软阈值减少通道冗余。
在率失真感知权衡和模型复杂度上优于现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上评估率失真感知权衡和模型复杂度，与SOTA方法对比表现优越。
limitations: 可能对高分辨率图像的计算效率仍需验证。
语义聚类可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，结合Mamba与语义感知，实验表现好，但应用领域较专。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轻量级语义感知Mamba图像压缩方法，通过动态扫描和SVD降冗余提升率失真感知权衡。

papers.title: Efficient Geometry-Controlled High-Resolution Satellite Image Synthesis
papers.abstract: High-resolution satellite images are often scarce and costly, especially for remote areas or infrequent events. This shortage hampers the development and testing of machine learning models for land-cover classification, change detection, and disaster monitoring. In this paper, we tackle the problem of geometry-controlled high-resolution satellite image synthesis by adding control over existing pre-trained diffusion models. We propose a simple yet efficient method for controlling the synthesis process by leveraging only skip connection features using windowed cross-attention modules. Several previously established control techniques are compared, indicating that our method achieves comparable performance while leading to a better alignment with the geometry control map. We also discuss the limitations in current evaluation approaches, amplifying the necessity of a consistent alignment assessment.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种仅利用跳跃连接特征的窗口交叉注意力方法，实现高效几何控制的高分辨率卫星图像合成。
analysis.research_motivation: 高分辨率卫星图像稀缺且昂贵，限制了土地覆盖分类、变化检测和灾害监测等机器学习模型的发展。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地在预训练扩散模型中添加几何控制，以合成高分辨率卫星图像。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有控制技术性能有限，且与几何控制图的对齐效果不佳；当前评估方法存在局限性，缺乏一致的对齐评估。
analysis.method: 在预训练扩散模型中，仅利用跳跃连接特征，通过窗口交叉注意力模块实现几何控制。
contributions: 提出一种简单高效的几何控制方法，仅使用跳跃连接特征和窗口交叉注意力。
与多种已有控制技术对比，表明该方法在保持性能的同时，实现了更好的几何对齐。
讨论了当前评估方法的局限性，强调了一致性对齐评估的必要性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅在特定卫星图像场景下验证，泛化性未知。
窗口交叉注意力的计算效率可能受窗口大小影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法简洁有效，但摘要未提供实验细节，创新性和影响中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种仅利用跳跃连接特征的窗口交叉注意力方法，实现高效几何控制的高分辨率卫星图像合成。

papers.title: InterMesh: Explicit Interaction-Aware End-to-End Multi-Person Human Mesh Recovery
papers.abstract: Humans constantly interact with their surroundings. Existing end-to-end multi-person human mesh recovery methods, typically based on the DETR framework, capture inter-human relationships through self-attention across all human queries. However, these approaches model interactions only implicitly and lack explicit reasoning about how humans interact with objects and with each other. In this paper, we propose InterMesh, a simple yet effective framework that explicitly incorporates human-environment interaction information into human mesh recovery pipeline. By leveraging a human-object interaction detector, InterMesh enriches query representations with structured interaction semantics, enabling more accurate pose and shape estimation. We design lightweight modules, Contextual Interaction Encoder and Interaction-Guided Refiner, to integrate these features into existing HMR architectures with minimal overhead. We validate our approach through extensive experiments on 3DPW, MuPoTS, CMU Panoptic, Hi4D, and CHI3D datasets, demonstrating remarkable improvements over state-of-the-art methods. Notably, InterMesh reduces MPJPE by 9.9% on CMU Panoptic and 8.2% on Hi4D, highlighting its effectiveness in scenarios with complex human-object and inter-human interactions.

analysis.tldr: InterMesh 通过显式建模人-物和人际交互，显著提升多人人体网格恢复精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有端到端多人人体网格恢复方法（如基于 DETR 的框架）仅通过自注意力隐式建模交互，缺乏对人-物和人际交互的显式推理，导致复杂交互场景下姿态估计不准确。
analysis.problem: 如何显式地将人-环境和人际交互信息融入多人人体网格恢复流程，以提升姿态和形状估计的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

contributions: 首次在端到端多人人体网格恢复中显式引入交互感知信息。
设计轻量级模块，以最小开销提升复杂交互场景下的姿态估计精度。
analysis.experiments: 在 3DPW、MuPoTS、CMU Panoptic、Hi4D 和 CHI3D 数据集上验证，相比 SOTA 方法，在 CMU Panoptic 上 MPJPE 降低 9.9%，在 Hi4D 上降低 8.2%。
limitations: 依赖外部人-物交互检测器，可能引入额外误差。

papers.title: Stage-adaptive audio diffusion modeling
papers.abstract: Recent progress in diffusion-based audio generation and restoration has substantially improved performance across heterogeneous conditioning regimes, including text-conditioned audio generation and audio-conditioned super-resolution. However, training audio diffusion models remains computationally expensive, and most existing pipelines still rely on static optimization recipes that treat the relative importance of training signals as fixed throughout learning. In this work, we argue that a major source of inefficiency lies in the evolving balance between semantic acquisition and generation-oriented refinement. Early training places stronger emphasis on acquiring condition-aligned semantic structure and coarse global organization, whereas later training increasingly emphasizes temporal consistency, perceptual fidelity, and fine-detail refinement. To characterize this evolving balance, we introduce a progress-based regime variable derived from the training-time slope of an SSL-space discrepancy, which measures semantic progress during training. Based on this signal, we develop three complementary stage-aware mechanisms: decayed SSL guidance for early semantic bootstrapping, self-adaptive timestep sampling driven by the regime variable, and structure-aware regularization activated from convergent grouped organization in parameter space. We evaluate these mechanisms on text-conditioned audio generation and audio-conditioned super-resolution. Across both settings, the proposed stage-aware strategies improve convergence behavior and yield gains on the primary generation and spectral reconstruction metrics over standard static baselines. These results support the view that efficient audio diffusion training can benefit from treating external guidance, internal organization, and optimization emphasis as stage-dependent components rather than fixed ingredients.

analysis.tldr: 提出阶段自适应音频扩散训练策略，通过动态调整训练信号重要性提升效率与性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 音频扩散模型训练计算成本高，现有方法使用静态优化策略，未考虑训练过程中语义获取与生成精炼的动态平衡，导致效率低下。
analysis.problem: 如何根据训练阶段动态调整音频扩散模型的训练信号权重，以提升训练效率和生成质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 早期训练侧重语义结构与全局组织，后期侧重时间一致性、感知保真度和细节精炼，这种动态平衡是效率瓶颈的来源。
analysis.method: 引入基于SSL空间差异的训练进度变量，并设计三种阶段感知机制：衰减的SSL引导、自适应的timestep采样、结构感知正则化。
contributions: 提出进度变量量化训练阶段，并基于此设计三种阶段自适应机制。
在文本条件音频生成和音频超分辨率任务上验证了方法有效性，改善了收敛行为和生成指标。
analysis.experiments: 在文本条件音频生成和音频条件超分辨率两个任务上评估，与静态基线相比，所提策略在生成和频谱重建指标上取得提升。
limitations: 摘要未提供具体数据集和计算成本对比。
方法可能依赖SSL空间差异的可靠性，未讨论其局限性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，针对音频扩散训练效率问题提出动态阶段自适应策略，实验验证有效，但摘要未提供详细实验对比。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出阶段自适应音频扩散训练策略，通过动态调整训练信号重要性提升效率与性能。

papers.title: Angle-I2P: Angle-Consistent-Aware Hierarchical Attention for Cross-Modality Outlier Rejection
papers.abstract: Image-to-point-cloud registration (I2P) is a fundamental task in robotic applications such as manipulation,grasping, and localization. Existing deep learning-based I2P methods seek to align image and point cloud features in a learned representation space to establish correspondences, and have achieved promising results. However, when the inlier ratio of the initial matching pairs is low, conventional Perspective-n-Points (PnP) methods may struggle to achieve accurate results. To address this limitation, we propose Angle-I2P, an outlier rejection network that leverages angle-consistent geometric constraints and hierarchical attention. First, we design a scale-invariant, crossmodality geometric constraint based on angular consistency. This explicit geometric constraint guides the model in distinguishing inliers from outliers. Furthermore, we propose a global-tolocal hierarchical attention mechanism that effectively filters out geometrically inconsistent matches under rigid transformation, thereby improving the Inlier Ratio (IR) and Registration Recall (RR). Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on the 7Scenes, RGBD Scenes V2, and a self-collected dataset, with consistent improvements across all benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于角度一致性和层次注意力的跨模态异常点剔除网络，提升图像-点云配准精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 图像到点云配准是机器人操作、抓取和定位的基础任务，现有深度学习方法在初始匹配内点率低时，传统PnP方法难以获得准确结果。
analysis.problem: 解决跨模态图像-点云配准中低内点率下异常匹配剔除困难的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

contributions: 提出基于角度一致性的跨模态几何约束，显式指导模型区分内点和外点。
设计全局到局部的层次注意力机制，有效过滤刚性变换下的几何不一致匹配。
analysis.experiments: 在7Scenes、RGBD Scenes V2和自采集数据集上达到最先进性能，内点率和配准召回率一致提升。
limitations: 可能依赖初始匹配质量，极端低内点率下性能未知。
层次注意力机制的计算开销未在摘要中讨论。

papers.title: RLearner-LLM: Balancing Logical Grounding and Fluency in Large Language Models via Hybrid Direct Preference Optimization
papers.abstract: Direct Preference Optimization (DPO), the efficient alternative to PPO-based RLHF, falls short on knowledge-intensive generation: standard preference signals from human annotators or LLM judges exhibit a systematic verbosity bias that rewards fluency over logical correctness. This blindspot leaves a logical alignment gap -- SFT models reach NLI entailment of only 0.05-0.22 despite producing fluent text. We propose RLearner-LLM with Hybrid-DPO: an automated preference pipeline that fuses a DeBERTa-v3 NLI signal with a verifier LLM score, removing human annotation while overcoming the "alignment tax" of single-signal optimization. Evaluated across five academic domains (Biology, Medicine, Law) with three base architectures (LLaMA-2-13B, Qwen3-8B, Gemma 4 E4B-it), RLearner-LLM yields up to 6x NLI improvement over SFT, with NLI gains in 11 of 15 cells and consistent answer-coverage gains. On Gemma 4 E4B-it (4.5B effective params), Hybrid-DPO lifts NLI in four of five domains (+11.9% to +2.4x) with faster inference across all five, scaling down to compact base models without losing the alignment-tax mitigation. Our Qwen3-8B RLearner-LLM wins 95% of pairwise comparisons against its own SFT baseline; GPT-4o-mini in turn wins 95% against our concise output -- alongside the 69% win the same judge gives a verbose SFT over our DPO model, this replicates verbosity bias on a frontier comparator and motivates logic-aware metrics (NLI, ACR) over LLM-as-a-judge for knowledge-intensive generation.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Hybrid-DPO 方法，融合 NLI 信号与 LLM 评分，在知识密集型生成中平衡逻辑正确性与流畅性，显著提升 NLI 指标。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准 DPO 在知识密集型生成中存在冗长偏见，奖励流畅性而忽视逻辑正确性，导致逻辑对齐差距。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖人工标注的情况下，克服 DPO 的冗长偏见，同时提升逻辑正确性与流畅性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: SFT 模型 NLI 蕴含度仅 0.05-0.22，但生成文本流畅；标准偏好信号存在系统性的冗长偏见。
analysis.method: Hybrid-DPO：自动偏好管道，融合 DeBERTa-v3 NLI 信号与验证器 LLM 评分，替代人工标注并克服单一信号优化的对齐税。
contributions: 提出 Hybrid-DPO 方法，融合 NLI 与 LLM 评分，无需人工标注。
在五个学术领域、三种基座模型上验证，NLI 提升最高达 6 倍，且推理速度更快。
analysis.experiments: 在 Biology、Medicine、Law 等五个领域，使用 LLaMA-2-13B、Qwen3-8B、Gemma 4 E4B-it 三种架构，NLI 在 15 个实验单元中 11 个提升，答案覆盖率一致提升。
limitations: 依赖 DeBERTa-v3 和验证器 LLM 的质量。
可能未在更大规模模型上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，直接解决 DPO 在知识密集型生成中的关键问题，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Hybrid-DPO 方法，融合 NLI 信号与 LLM 评分，在知识密集型生成中平衡逻辑正确性与流畅性，显著提升 NLI 指标。

papers.title: Accountable Agents in Software Engineering: An Analysis of Terms of Service and a Research Roadmap
papers.abstract: AI coding assistants and autonomous agents are becoming integral to software development workflows, reshaping how code is produced, reviewed, and maintained. While recent research has focused mainly on the capabilities and impacts of productivity of these systems, much less attention has been paid to accountability: who is responsible when agents generate, modify, or recommend code? In practice, accountability is defined through the Terms of Service (ToS) and related policy documents that govern the use of AI-powered development tools. In this vision paper, we present a comparative analysis of the Terms of Service for widely used AI coding assistants and agent-enabled development tools. We examine how these documents allocate ownership, responsibility, liability, and disclosure obligations between tool providers and software developers, and we identify common patterns and divergences between providers. Our analysis reveals a consistent tendency to shift responsibility for correctness, safety, and legal compliance onto users, as well as substantial variation in how providers address issues such as indemnification, data reuse, and acceptable use. Based on these findings, we argue that existing policy frameworks are poorly aligned with increasingly agent-mediated and autonomous software development workflows. We outline a research roadmap for accountable agents in software engineering, identifying challenges and opportunities for modeling responsibility, designing governance artifacts, developing tooling that supports accountability, and conducting empirical studies of developers' perceptions and practices.

analysis.tldr: 分析AI编码助手的服务条款，揭示责任向用户转移的趋势，并提出软件工程中可问责代理的研究路线图。
analysis.research_motivation: AI编码助手和自主代理正重塑软件开发流程，但现有研究主要关注能力和生产力影响，忽视了问责性问题：当代理生成、修改或推荐代码时，谁应负责？
analysis.problem: AI编码工具的服务条款如何分配所有权、责任、义务和披露义务，以及这些条款是否适应日益代理化和自主化的软件开发工作流。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 服务条款分析显示，工具提供商普遍将正确性、安全性和法律合规的责任转移给用户，且在赔偿、数据重用和可接受使用等条款上存在显著差异。
analysis.method: 对广泛使用的AI编码助手和代理开发工具的服务条款进行对比分析，识别常见模式和差异。
contributions: 首次系统比较AI编码助手和代理开发工具的服务条款，揭示责任分配模式。
提出软件工程中可问责代理的研究路线图，包括责任建模、治理工件设计、支持问责的工具开发以及开发者感知的实证研究。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 分析仅限于服务条款文本，未涉及实际法律案例或用户实践。
研究路线图尚未经过实证验证。

papers.title: Maximizing Rollout Informativeness under a Fixed Budget: A Submodular View of Tree Search for Tool-Use Agentic Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: We formalize Rollout Informativeness under a Fixed Budget (RIFB) as the expected non-vanishing policy-gradient mass that a tool-use rollout set injects into Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). We prove that any budget-agnostic independent sampler suffers a collapse rate bounded away from zero for hard prompts regardless of the budget. Motivated by this, we recast intermediate state selection as a monotone submodular maximization problem, where a greedy one-step selector enjoys a 1 minus 1/e approximation guarantee. Our Uncertainty-aware Upper Confidence Bound (UUCB) terms arise as closed-form marginal gains of this objective. This turns the token-level entropy bonus from an empirical trick into an analytic consequence of the formulation. We present InfoTree, a training-time tree-search framework coupling UUCB with a learned Adaptive Budget Allocator (ABA) and an asynchronous Speculative Expansion scheme. ABA rescues prompts whose initial tree is wasted on uniform outcomes, lifting the mixed-outcome ratio from 58.1 percent to 76.3 percent with less than 5 percent budget overhead. Speculative Expansion reduces wall-clock overhead from 14.3 percent to 4.8 percent by tolerating bounded staleness in UUCB scores. Across nine benchmarks spanning math reasoning (AIME 2024 and 2025, MATH-500, OlympiadBench, USAMO), web-search agents (GAIA, HLE-100, BrowseComp-lite), and tool-rich coding and OS agents (APPS-verified, AgentBench-OS), InfoTree outperforms flat GRPO, DeepSearch, Tree-GRPO, AT2PO, CW-GRPO, and RC-GRPO. Head-to-head compositions with Tree-GRPO prefix sharing and CW-GRPO contribution weights deliver further gains, confirming that our selector operates orthogonally to rollout reuse and trajectory re-weighting. A 5 by 5 by 5 robustness grid reveals that over three quarters of the hyperparameter space lies on a performance plateau, confirming UUCB robustness.

analysis.tldr: 提出InfoTree框架，将工具使用智能体强化学习中的树搜索形式化为子模最大化问题，在固定预算下最大化rollout信息量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有工具使用智能体强化学习方法在固定预算下rollout信息量不足，导致策略梯度消失，且独立采样器对困难提示的崩溃率有下界。
analysis.problem: 如何在固定预算下最大化rollout信息量，以提升GRPO在工具使用场景中的训练效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要证明任何预算无关的独立采样器对困难提示的崩溃率有非零下界；token级熵奖励被形式化为分析结果而非经验技巧。
analysis.method: 将中间状态选择建模为单调子模最大化问题，提出UUCB作为边际增益闭式解，结合自适应预算分配器ABA和异步推测扩展方案。
contributions: 形式化固定预算下的rollout信息量问题并证明独立采样器的崩溃率下界
提出InfoTree框架，包含UUCB、ABA和推测扩展，在9个基准上超越多种基线
analysis.experiments: 在9个基准（数学推理、网页搜索、工具编码和OS代理）上对比flat GRPO、DeepSearch等，并进行了5x5x5鲁棒性网格分析。
limitations: 可能依赖特定GRPO变体

analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.reason: 理论创新强，实验充分，与工具使用智能体强化学习高度相关。
