papers.title: Reward-Guided Semantic Evolution for Test-time Adaptive Object Detection
papers.abstract: Open-vocabulary object detection with vision-language models (VLMs) such as Grounding DINO suffers from performance degradation under test-time distribution shifts, primarily due to semantic misalignment between text embeddings and shifted visual embeddings of region proposals. While recent test-time adaptive object detection methods for VLM-based either rely on costly backpropagation or bypass semantic misalignment via external memory, none directly and efficiently align text and vision in a training-free manner. To address this, we propose Reward-Guided Semantic Evolution (RGSE), a training-free framework that directly refines the text embeddings at test time. Inspired by evolutionary search, RGSE treats text embedding adaptation as a semantic search process: it perturbs text embeddings as candidate variants, evaluates them via cosine similarity with current and historical high-confidence visual proposals as a reward signal, and fuses them into a refined embedding through reward-weighted averaging. Without any backpropagation, RGSE achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple detection benchmarks while adding minimal computational overhead. Our code will be open source upon publication.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需训练的测试时文本嵌入自适应方法，通过进化搜索对齐视觉-语言模型中的语义偏移。
analysis.research_motivation: 开放词汇目标检测在测试时分布偏移下性能下降，现有方法依赖昂贵反向传播或外部记忆，缺乏高效且无需训练的语义对齐方案。
analysis.problem: 测试时分布偏移导致VLM文本嵌入与区域提议视觉嵌入之间的语义错位。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 奖励引导语义进化（RGSE）：将文本嵌入适应视为语义搜索过程，通过扰动生成候选变体，利用当前和历史高置信度视觉提议的余弦相似度作为奖励信号，经奖励加权平均融合得到精炼嵌入。
contributions: 提出首个无需训练、无需反向传播的测试时文本嵌入自适应框架RGSE。
在多个检测基准上达到最先进性能，且计算开销极小。

limitations: 可能依赖高置信度视觉提议的质量。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需训练的测试时文本嵌入自适应方法，通过进化搜索对齐视觉-语言模型中的语义偏移。

papers.title: SADE: Symptom-Aware Diagnostic Escalation for LLM-Based Network Troubleshooting
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents are increasingly applied to network troubleshooting, but root-cause localization on public benchmarks remains well below practical deployment thresholds. We argue this is because existing agents do not encode the disciplined, layer-by-layer methodology that human network engineers use, and instead rely on free-form deliberation that conflates evidence acquisition with hypothesis commitment. We present SADE (Symptom-Aware Diagnostic Escalation), an agent that encodes the classical Cisco troubleshooting methodology as an explicit policy. SADE pairs a phase-gated diagnostic workflow, which separates evidence acquisition from hypothesis commitment, with a routed library of fault-family skills and high-yield diagnostic helpers. On a held-out 523 incident set of the public NIKA benchmark covering eleven unseen scenarios, SADE improves root-cause F1 by 37 percentage points over a ReAct + GPT-5 baseline; a model-controlled comparison against the same Claude Sonnet backend without the SADE policy attributes 22 of those points to the diagnostic policy alone, showing that the gain is not a side-effect of the model upgrade.

analysis.tldr: SADE通过编码Cisco排障方法论，将证据收集与假设判定分离，显著提升LLM网络排障根因定位F1达37个百分点。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在网络排障中根因定位准确率远低于实际部署阈值，现有智能体缺乏人类工程师的逐层方法论，依赖自由形式推理导致证据收集与假设判定混淆。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM智能体在排障中遵循结构化、分阶段的诊断流程，避免过早承诺假设，提升根因定位精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有智能体将证据收集与假设判定混为一谈，导致根因定位性能不佳；而编码经典Cisco方法论可带来显著提升。
analysis.method: SADE编码Cisco排障方法论为显式策略，包含阶段门控诊断工作流（分离证据收集与假设判定）、路由故障族技能库和高收益诊断辅助工具。
contributions: 提出SADE智能体，将经典排障方法论编码为显式策略，实现证据收集与假设判定的分离。
在NIKA基准的523个未见场景上，根因F1提升37个百分点，其中22个百分点归因于诊断策略本身。

papers.title: Velox: Learning Representations of 4D Geometry and Appearance
papers.abstract: We introduce a framework for learning latent representations of 4D objects which are descriptive, faithfully capturing object geometry and appearance; compressive, aiding in downstream efficiency; and accessible, requiring minimal input, i.e., an unstructured dynamic point cloud, to construct. Specifically, Velox trains an encoder to compress spatiotemporal color point clouds into a set of dynamic shape tokens. These tokens are supervised using two complementary decoders: a 4D surface decoder, which models the time-varying surface distribution capturing the geometry; and a Gaussian decoder, which maps the tokens to 3D Gaussians, helping learn appearance. To demonstrate the utility of our representation, we evaluate it across three downstream tasks -- video-to-4D generation, 3D tracking, and cloth simulation via image-to-4D generation -- and observe strong performances in all settings.

analysis.tldr: Velox 通过编码器-双解码器架构学习4D几何与外观的压缩表征，在视频/图像到4D生成、3D跟踪和布料模拟中表现优异。
analysis.research_motivation: 4D对象（动态3D场景）的表征需要同时描述几何和外观，且应具备描述性、压缩性和易获取性，现有方法在效率或质量上存在不足。
analysis.problem: 如何从非结构化的动态点云中学习一个既忠实捕捉几何外观又高效压缩的4D潜在表征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用编码器将时空彩色点云压缩为动态形状令牌，并通过4D表面解码器（建模时变表面分布）和高斯解码器（映射为3D高斯以学习外观）进行联合监督。

papers.title: High-Fidelity Single-Image Head Modeling with Industry-Grade Topology
papers.abstract: We present a single-image head mesh reconstruction framework that addresses the longstanding challenge of simultaneously preserving facial identity and producing industry-grade topology. Our framework adopts a coarse-to-fine optimization pipeline that refines a rigged template across three stages -- rig, joint, and vertex -- achieving stable convergence and consistent topology. To mitigate the ill-posed nature of single-image 3D face reconstruction and ensure identity preservation, we employ a normal consistency objective jointly with landmark alignment. To further preserve local surface structure and enforce topological regularity, we introduce geometry-aware constraints based on Gaussian curvature and conformal consistency, along with auxiliary regularizations that correct fine artifacts such as lip seams and eyelid discontinuities. Our hierarchical optimization with geometry-aware regularization yields meshes with semantically meaningful edge flow and industry-grade topology. After geometry reconstruction, we extract UV-space texture and normal maps to preserve appearance details for visualization and downstream use. In a user study with 22 professional technical artists, our results were assessed as approaching industry-grade usability, and 95% of participants ranked our method as the top-performing approach, underscoring its effectiveness for real-world digital human production.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种单图头部网格重建框架，在保持身份特征的同时生成工业级拓扑结构。
analysis.research_motivation: 单图像3D人脸重建长期面临身份保持与工业级拓扑难以兼得的挑战，现有方法生成的网格拓扑质量不足，无法直接用于数字人生产管线。
analysis.problem: 如何从单张图像重建出既保留面部身份特征又具有工业级拓扑质量（语义化边流、无伪影）的头部网格。

papers.title: RaguTeam at SemEval-2026 Task 8: Meno and Friends in a Judge-Orchestrated LLM Ensemble for Faithful Multi-Turn Response Generation
papers.abstract: We present our winning system for Task~B (generation with reference passages) in SemEval-2026 Task~8: MTRAGEval. Our method is a heterogeneous ensemble of seven LLMs with two prompting variants, where a GPT-4o-mini judge selects the best candidate per instance. We ranked 1st out of 26 teams, achieving a conditioned harmonic mean of 0.7827 and outperforming the strongest baseline (gpt-oss-120b, 0.6390). Ablations show that diversity in model families, scales, and prompting strategies is essential, with the ensemble consistently beating any single model. We also introduce Meno-Lite-0.1, a 7B domain-adapted model with a strong cost--performance trade-off, and analyse MTRAGEval, highlighting annotation limitations and directions for improvement. Our code is publicly available: https://github.com/RaguTeam/ragu_mtrag_semeval

analysis.tldr: 通过异构LLM集成和GPT-4o-mini裁判选择，在SemEval-2026多轮生成任务中取得第一。
analysis.research_motivation: 多轮对话生成中，如何利用参考段落生成忠实且高质量的回复是一个挑战，现有单模型方法在多样性和鲁棒性上存在不足。

papers.title: DAO-enabled decentralized physical AI: A new paradigm for human-machine collaboration
papers.abstract: We propose DAO-enabled decentralized physical AI (DePAI), a democratic architecture for coordinating humans and autonomous machines in the operation and governance of physical-digital systems. We (1) synthesize foundations in blockchains, decentralized autonomous organizations (DAOs), and cryptoeconomics; (2) connect DAO design with digital-democracy research on deliberation and voting, showing how each can advance the other; (3) position DAO-governed decentralized physical infrastructure networks (DePIN) within a vertically integrated stack that links energy and sensing to connectivity, storage/compute, models, and robots; (4) show how these elements specify workflows that couple machine execution with human oversight, enabling enhanced self-organization of techno-socio-economic systems, which we call DePAI; and (5) analyze risks, including security, centralization, incentive failure, legal exposure, and the crowding-out of intrinsic motivation, and argue for value-sensitive design and continuously adaptive governance. DePAI offers a path to scalable, resilient self-organization that integrates physical infrastructure, AI, and community ownership under transparent rules, on-chain incentives, and permissionless participation, aiming to preserve human autonomy.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于DAO的去中心化物理AI架构，用于协调人类与自主机器在物理-数字系统中的协作与治理。

papers.title: DALight-3D: A Lightweight 3D U-Net for Brain Tumor Segmentation from Multi-Modal MRI
papers.abstract: Automatic brain tumor segmentation from multi-modal MRI remains challenging because volumetric models often incur substantial computational cost. This paper presents DALight-3D, a compact 3D U-Net variant that combines depthwise separable 3D convolutions, identifier-conditioned normalization, cross-slice attention, and adaptive skip fusion. The method is evaluated on the Medical Segmentation Decathlon Task01 BrainTumour benchmark under matched optimization settings against standard 3D U-Net, Attention U-Net, Residual 3D U-Net, and V-Net baselines. In the reported 50-epoch comparison, DALight-3D achieves a mean Dice of 0.727 with 2.22M parameters, compared with 0.710 Dice and 3.20M parameters for Residual 3D U-Net. Component-wise ablations show consistent performance degradation when SepConv, identifier-conditioned normalization, CSA, or SSFB is removed. These results indicate that DALight-3D offers a favorable accuracy-efficiency trade-off within the present benchmark setting.

analysis.tldr: 提出轻量级3D U-Net变体DALight-3D，在脑肿瘤分割中实现精度与效率的平衡。

papers.title: From Priors to Perception: Grounding Video-LLMs in Physical Reality
papers.abstract: While Video Large Language Models (Video-LLMs) excel in general understanding, they exhibit systematic deficits in fine-grained physical reasoning. Existing interventions not only suffer from limited generalization but fundamentally conflate generative artifacts with genuine physical fallacies. Furthermore, we find that models fail systematically not only in anti-physics anomalies but also in counter-intuitive scenarios where visual facts contradict statistical expectations. Accordingly, we propose the Unified Attribution Theory: this dual failure stems not from perception deficiency, but from Semantic Prior Dominance -- the reasoning mechanism is deeply hijacked by internal narrative scripts. To address this, we construct the Programmatic Adversarial Curriculum (PACC), the first high-fidelity adversarial video dataset synthesized based on physical laws, thoroughly decoupling visual artifacts from logical errors. Concurrently, we design the Visual-Anchored Reasoning Chain (VARC) to force models to explicitly ground their judgments in low-level visual facts prior to logical adjudication. Experiments demonstrate that without invasive architectural modifications, standard LoRA fine-tuning with the PACC curriculum effectively neutralizes prior interference in state-of-the-art (SOTA) models, yielding a substantial leap in physical reasoning capabilities.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一归因理论揭示视频大模型物理推理缺陷源于语义先验主导，并构建对抗课程数据集与视觉锚定推理链来缓解。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频大模型在通用理解上表现优异，但在细粒度物理推理中存在系统性缺陷，现有干预方法泛化性差且混淆生成伪影与真实物理错误。
analysis.problem: 视频大模型在物理推理中因语义先验主导而无法准确感知反物理异常和反直觉场景。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型不仅在反物理异常中失败，在视觉事实与统计预期矛盾的场景中也失败，表明失败源于语义先验主导而非感知缺陷。
analysis.method: 提出统一归因理论，构建基于物理定律的高保真对抗视频数据集PACC，并设计视觉锚定推理链VARC强制模型在逻辑判断前先基于低级视觉事实。

limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的物理推理任务。

papers.title: Predictive and Prescriptive AI toward Optimizing Wildfire Suppression
papers.abstract: Intense wildfire seasons require critical prioritization decisions to allocate scarce suppression resources over a dispersed geographical area. This paper develops a predictive and prescriptive approach to jointly optimize crew assignments and wildfire suppression. The problem features a discrete resource-allocation structure with endogenous wildfire demand and non-linear wildfire dynamics. We formulate an integer optimization model with crew assignments on a time-space-rest network, wildfire dynamics on a time-state network, and linking constraints between them. We develop a two-sided branch-and-price-and-cut algorithm based on: (i) a two-sided column generation scheme that generates fire suppression plans and crew routes iteratively; (ii) a new family of cuts exploiting the knapsack structure of the linking constraints; and (iii) novel branching rules to accommodate non-linear wildfire dynamics. We also propose a data-driven double machine learning approach to estimate wildfire spread as a function of covariate information and suppression efforts, mitigating observed confounding between historical crew assignments and wildfire growth. Extensive computational experiments show that the optimization algorithm scales to otherwise intractable real-world instances; and that the methodology can enhance suppression effectiveness in practice, resulting in significant reductions in area burned over a wildfire season and guiding resource sharing across wildfire jurisdictions.

analysis.tldr: 提出预测-决策联合优化框架，通过分支定价切割算法和双机器学习估计，提升野火扑救资源分配效率。

papers.title: Ilov3Splat: Instance-Level Open-Vocabulary 3D Scene Understanding in Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: We introduce Ilov3Splat, a novel framework for instance-level open-vocabulary 3D scene understanding built on 3D Gaussian Splatting (3D-GS). Most prior work depends on 2D rendering-based matching or point-level semantic association, which undermines cross-view consistency, lacks coherent instance-level reasoning, and limits precision in downstream 3D tasks. To address these limitations, our method jointly optimizes scene geometry and semantic representations by augmenting Gaussian splats with view-consistent feature fields. Specifically, we leverage multi-resolution hash embedding to efficiently encode language-aligned CLIP features, enabling dense and coherent language grounding in 3D space. We further train an instance feature field using contrastive loss over SAM masks, supporting fine-grained object distinction across views. At inference time, CLIP-encoded queries are matched against the learned features, followed by two-stage 3D clustering to retrieve relevant Gaussian groups. This enables our framework to identify arbitrary objects in 3D scenes based on natural language descriptions, without requiring category supervision or manual annotations. Experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that Ilov3Splat outperforms prior open-vocabulary 3D-GS methods in both object selection and instance segmentation, offering a flexible and accurate solution for language-driven 3D scene understanding. Project page: https://csiro-robotics.github.io/Ilov3Splat.

analysis.tldr: 基于3D高斯泼溅的实例级开放词汇3D场景理解框架，通过联合优化几何与语义实现语言驱动的任意物体识别。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有开放词汇3D场景理解方法依赖2D渲染匹配或点级语义关联，导致跨视角一致性差、缺乏实例级推理能力，限制了3D下游任务的精度。
analysis.problem: 如何在3D高斯泼溅中实现实例级、开放词汇的语义理解，支持任意物体的自然语言查询。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

contributions: 提出联合优化几何与语义的3D-GS框架，增强高斯点云以支持视图一致的语义特征。
引入多分辨率哈希嵌入和对比学习实例特征场，实现密集、连贯的3D语言对齐。
在标准基准上超越现有开放词汇3D-GS方法，在物体选择和实例分割任务中取得更优性能。
analysis.experiments: 在标准基准上评估，与现有开放词汇3D-GS方法比较，在物体选择和实例分割任务中表现更优。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖SAM掩码质量，对遮挡或小物体效果有限。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于3D高斯泼溅的实例级开放词汇3D场景理解框架，通过联合优化几何与语义实现语言驱动的任意物体识别。

papers.title: JASTIN: Aligning LLMs for Zero-Shot Audio and Speech Evaluation via Natural Language Instructions
papers.abstract: The rapid advancement of generative audio models has outpaced the development of robust evaluation methodologies. Existing objective metrics and general multimodal large language models (MLLMs) often struggle with domain generalization, zero-shot capabilities, and instructional flexibility. To address these bottlenecks, we propose JASTIN, a generalizable, instruction-driven audio evaluation framework that formulates audio assessment as a self-instructed reasoning task. JASTIN bridges a frozen high-performance audio encoder with a fine-tuned LLM backbone via a trainable audio adapter. To ensure robust zero-shot generalization, we introduce a comprehensive instruction following data preparation pipeline, incorporating Multi-Source, Multi-Task, Multi-Calibration, and Multi-Description data. Experimental results demonstrate that JASTIN achieves state-of-the-art Pearson and Spearman correlations with human subjective ratings. It consistently outperforms general MLLMs across speech, sound, music, and out-of-domain evaluation tasks without the need for task-specific retraining.

analysis.tldr: 提出JASTIN框架，将音频评估转化为自指令推理任务，实现零样本音频评估，在多个任务上超越通用多模态大模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式音频模型快速发展，但缺乏鲁棒的评估方法；现有客观指标和通用多模态大模型在领域泛化、零样本能力和指令灵活性方面存在瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个可泛化、指令驱动的音频评估框架，实现零样本跨域音频质量评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: JASTIN框架：冻结高性能音频编码器，通过可训练音频适配器连接微调LLM；设计多源、多任务、多校准、多描述的数据准备流程，将音频评估建模为自指令推理任务。
contributions: 提出JASTIN，一个指令驱动的零样本音频评估框架，将音频评估转化为自指令推理任务。
引入多源、多任务、多校准、多描述的数据准备流程，确保零样本泛化能力。
在语音、声音、音乐和域外评估任务上达到与人类主观评分最先进的皮尔逊和斯皮尔曼相关性，无需任务特定重训练。
analysis.experiments: 在语音、声音、音乐和域外评估任务上评估，与人类主观评分比较，JASTIN达到最先进的皮尔逊和斯皮尔曼相关性，且一致优于通用多模态大模型。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的多源数据准备流程，数据收集成本高。
零样本性能可能在某些极端域外场景下降。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性高，零样本音频评估有实际需求，实验表明SOTA，但技术细节未完全展开。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出JASTIN框架，将音频评估转化为自指令推理任务，实现零样本音频评估，在多个任务上超越通用多模态大模型。

papers.title: SpecPL: Disentangling Spectral Granularity for Prompt Learning
papers.abstract: Existing prompt learning for VLMs exhibits a modality asymmetry, predominantly optimizing text tokens while still relying on frozen visual encoder as holistic extractor and neglecting the spectral granularity essential for fine-grained discrimination. To bridge this, we introduce Disentangling Spectral Granularity for Prompt Learning (SpecPL), which approaches prompt learning from a novel spectral perspective via Counterfactual Granule Supervision. Specifically, we leverage a frozen VAE to decompose visual signals into semantic low-frequency bands and granular high-frequency details. A frozen Visual Semantic Bank anchors text representations to universal low-frequency invariants, mitigating overfitting. Crucially, fine-grained discrimination is driven by counterfactual granule training: by permuting high-frequency signals, we compel the model to explicitly distinguish visual granularity from semantic invariance. Uniquely, SpecPL serves as a universal plug-and-play booster, revitalizing text-oriented baselines like CoOp and MaPLe via visual-side guidance. Experiments on 11 benchmarks demonstrate competitive state-of-the-art performance, achieving a new performance ceiling of 81.51\% harmonic-mean accuracy. These results validate that spectral disentanglement with counterfactual supervision effectively bridges the gap in the stability-generalization trade-off. Code is released at https://github.com/Mlrac1e/SpecPL-Prompt-Learning.

analysis.tldr: SpecPL通过频谱分解和反事实监督提升VLM提示学习的细粒度判别能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLM提示学习存在模态不对称，主要优化文本token而忽略视觉频谱粒度，导致细粒度判别不足。
analysis.problem: 如何从频谱角度解耦视觉信号的语义低频与细节高频，以提升提示学习的细粒度判别能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用冻结VAE分解视觉信号为语义低频和细节高频，通过视觉语义库锚定文本表示，并采用反事实粒度训练（置换高频信号）迫使模型区分视觉粒度与语义不变性。
contributions: 提出频谱解耦的提示学习方法SpecPL，从频谱视角处理视觉粒度。
引入反事实粒度训练，通过置换高频信号增强细粒度判别。
作为即插即用模块，可提升CoOp、MaPLe等基线性能。
analysis.experiments: 在11个基准上达到81.51%调和平均准确率，验证了频谱解耦与反事实监督的有效性。
limitations: 依赖冻结VAE，可能限制高频信息的表达能力。
反事实训练的计算开销未在摘要中说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，实验充分，与VLM提示学习方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SpecPL通过频谱分解和反事实监督提升VLM提示学习的细粒度判别能力。

papers.title: DiffCap-Bench: A Comprehensive, Challenging, Robust Benchmark for Image Difference Captioning
papers.abstract: Image Difference Captioning (IDC) generates natural language descriptions that precisely identify differences between two images, serving as a key benchmark for fine-grained change perception, cross-modal reasoning, and image editing data construction. However, existing benchmarks lack diversity and compositional complexity, and standard lexical-overlap metrics (e.g., BLEU, METEOR) fail to capture semantic consistency or penalize hallucinations, which together prevent a comprehensive and robust evaluation of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) on IDC. To address these gaps, we introduce DiffCap-Bench, a comprehensive IDC benchmark covering ten distinct difference categories to ensure diversity and compositional complexity. Furthermore, we propose an LLM-as-a-Judge evaluation protocol grounded in human-validated Difference Lists, enabling a robust assessment of models' ability to both capture and describe visual changes. Through extensive evaluation of state-of-the-art MLLMs, we reveal significant performance gaps between proprietary and open-source models, highlight the critical importance of reasoning capability, and identify clear limitations in model scaling. Our framework also demonstrates strong alignment with human expert judgments and strong correlation with downstream image editing data construction quality. These findings establish DiffCap-Bench as both a reliable IDC evaluation framework and a practical predictor of downstream utility. The benchmark and code will be made publicly available to support further research.

analysis.tldr: 提出DiffCap-Bench，一个覆盖10种差异类别、结合LLM-as-a-Judge评估的图像差异描述基准，揭示MLLM在细粒度变化感知上的性能差距与局限。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像差异描述（IDC）基准缺乏多样性和组合复杂度，且标准词重叠指标无法捕捉语义一致性或惩罚幻觉，导致无法全面鲁棒地评估多模态大模型（MLLM）的IDC能力。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个多样、组合复杂且评估鲁棒的IDC基准，以准确衡量MLLM在细粒度变化感知和跨模态推理上的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 评估发现闭源与开源MLLM之间存在显著性能差距，推理能力至关重要，且模型扩展存在明显局限。
analysis.method: 构建DiffCap-Bench，包含10种差异类别；提出基于人工验证差异列表的LLM-as-a-Judge评估协议。
contributions: 提出DiffCap-Bench，一个覆盖10种差异类别、确保多样性和组合复杂度的IDC基准。
提出LLM-as-a-Judge评估协议，基于人工验证的差异列表实现鲁棒评估。
通过广泛评估揭示MLLM在IDC上的性能差距、推理重要性及扩展局限，并验证与下游图像编辑质量的强相关性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个最先进MLLM上进行了广泛评估，包括闭源和开源模型，并与人类专家判断及下游图像编辑数据构建质量进行了相关性分析。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有可能的差异类型或真实场景中的极端情况。
LLM-as-a-Judge评估可能受LLM自身偏见影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 基准覆盖10种差异类别且评估协议新颖，与MLLM评估强相关，但方法创新中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DiffCap-Bench，一个覆盖10种差异类别、结合LLM-as-a-Judge评估的图像差异描述基准，揭示MLLM在细粒度变化感知上的性能差距与局限。

papers.title: Example-Based Object Detection
papers.abstract: In recent years, object detection has achieved significant progress, especially in the field of open-vocabulary object detection. Unlike traditional methods that rely on predefined categories, open-vocabulary approaches can detect arbitrary objects based on human-provided prompts. With the advancement of prompt-based detection techniques, models such as SAM3 can even outperform some category-specific detectors trained on particular datasets without requiring additional training on those datasets. However, despite these advancements, false positives and false negatives still occur. In practical engineering applications, persistent misdetections or missed detections of the same object are unacceptable. Yet retraining the model every time such errors occur incurs substantial costs in terms of human effort, computational resources, and time. Therefore, how to leverage existing false positive and false negative samples to prevent such errors from recurring remains a highly challenging and urgent problem. To address this issue, we propose EBOD (Example-Based Object Detection), which integrates a prompt-based detector (SAM3) with robust feature matching modules (DINOv3 and LightGlue). The proposed framework effectively suppresses the repeated occurrence of false positives and false negatives by leveraging previous error examples, without requiring additional model retraining. Code is available at https://github.com/sunzx97/examples_based_object_detection.

analysis.tldr: 提出EBOD框架，利用错误示例抑制目标检测中的重复误检和漏检，无需重新训练模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有开放词汇目标检测方法（如SAM3）虽能检测任意物体，但在实际工程应用中，对同一物体的持续误检或漏检不可接受，而重新训练模型成本高昂。
analysis.problem: 如何利用已有的假正例和假负例样本，在不重新训练模型的前提下，防止相同检测错误重复出现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，即使先进的开放词汇检测器（如SAM3）仍存在假正例和假负例，且这些错误在工程应用中会反复出现。
analysis.method: 将基于提示的检测器（SAM3）与鲁棒特征匹配模块（DINOv3和LightGlue）结合，利用历史错误示例抑制重复错误。
contributions: 提出EBOD框架，无需额外训练即可利用错误示例抑制重复误检和漏检。
开源代码，便于复现和应用。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖SAM3、DINOv3和LightGlue等预训练模型，可能受限于这些模型的能力。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EBOD框架，利用错误示例抑制目标检测中的重复误检和漏检，无需重新训练模型。

papers.title: Harnessing Linguistic Dissimilarity for Language Generalization on Unseen Low-Resource Varieties
papers.abstract: Low-resource language varieties used by specific groups remain neglected in the development of Multilingual Language Models. A great deal of cross-lingual research focuses on inter-lingual language transfer which strives to align allied varieties and minimize differences between them. However, for low-resource varieties, linguistic dissimilarity is also an important cue allowing generalization to unseen varieties. Unlike prior approaches, we propose a two-stage Language Generalization framework that focuses on capturing variety-specific cues while also exploiting rich overlap offered by high-resource source variety. First, we propose TOPPing, a source-selection method specifically designed for low-resource varieties. Second, we suggest a lightweight VACAI-Bowl architecture that learns variety-specific attributes with one branch while a parallel branch captures variety-invariant attributes using adversarial training. We evaluate our framework on structural prediction tasks, which are among the few tasks available, as proxy for performance on other downstream tasks. Using VACAI-Bowl with TOPPing yields an average 54.62% improvement in the dependency parsing task, which serves as a proxy for performance on other downstream tasks across 10 low-resource varieties.

analysis.tldr: 提出利用语言差异性的两阶段框架，通过TOPing源选择和VACAI-Bowl架构提升低资源语言变体的泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 多语言模型忽视低资源语言变体，现有跨语言研究侧重对齐高资源语言，未能利用语言差异性来泛化到未见变体。
analysis.problem: 如何利用语言差异性而非仅对齐，提升低资源语言变体在结构预测任务上的泛化性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：1) TOPPing源选择方法，针对低资源变体选择最佳源语言；2) VACAI-Bowl轻量架构，一个分支学习变体特定属性，另一分支通过对抗训练学习变体不变属性。
contributions: 提出TOPPing源选择方法，专为低资源变体设计。
提出VACAI-Bowl架构，同时捕获变体特定和不变特征。
在依赖解析任务上平均提升54.62%，作为下游任务性能的代理。
analysis.experiments: 在10种低资源语言变体上评估依赖解析任务，作为下游任务代理，平均提升54.62%。
limitations: 仅评估了结构预测任务，其他下游任务效果未知。
框架可能依赖高质量源语言选择。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出利用语言差异性的两阶段框架，通过TOPing源选择和VACAI-Bowl架构提升低资源语言变体的泛化能力。

papers.title: Pen-Strategist: A Reasoning Framework for Penetration Testing Strategy Formation and Analysis
papers.abstract: Cyber threats are rapidly increasing, expanding their impact from large-scale enterprises to government services and individual users, making robust security systems increasingly essential. However, a significant shortage of skilled cybersecurity professionals exacerbates this challenge. While recent research has explored automating tasks such as penetration testing using LLM-based agents, existing frameworks often perform poorly due to limited capability in strategy formulation, domain-specific reasoning, and accurate action and tool selection. To overcome these limitations, we propose Pen-Strategist framework, consisting of a novel domain-specific reasoning model that derives pentesting strategies via logical reasoning and a classifier that converts the strategies into actionable steps. First, we construct a reasoning dataset containing logical explanations for both strategy derivation and step selection in pentesting scenarios. We then fine-tune a Qwen-3-14B model for strategy generation using reinforcement learning. Evaluation on the test split of the dataset demonstrates a 87% improvement in strategy derivation performance compared to the baseline. Furthermore, we integrate the fine-tuned Pen-Strategist model into existing automated pentesting frameworks, such as PentestGPT, and evaluate its performance on vulnerable machines, achieving a 47.5% improvement in subtask completion while surpassing the baseline GPT-5. Further experiments on the CTFKnow benchmark show an 18% performance gain over the base model. For step prediction, we train a semantic-based CNN classifier, which outperforms commercial LLMs by 28% and enhances execution stability. Finally, we conduct a user study to qualitatively assess the generated strategies, and Pen-Strategist demonstrates superior performance compared to the Claude-4.6-Sonnet.

analysis.tldr: 提出Pen-Strategist框架，通过领域特定推理模型和分类器提升渗透测试策略生成与执行效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 网络威胁日益严重，但网络安全专业人员短缺，现有基于LLM的自动化渗透测试框架在策略制定、领域推理和工具选择方面表现不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何提升LLM在渗透测试场景中的策略推导、动作选择和工具选择的准确性与稳定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有LLM框架在渗透测试中策略制定能力有限，领域推理和动作选择不准确。
analysis.method: 构建包含逻辑解释的推理数据集，使用强化学习微调Qwen-3-14B模型生成策略，并训练语义CNN分类器将策略转化为可执行步骤。
contributions: 提出Pen-Strategist框架，包含领域特定推理模型和步骤分类器。
构建渗透测试策略推理数据集，并通过强化学习微调模型。
在多个基准上取得显著性能提升，包括策略推导提升87%，子任务完成提升47.5%。
analysis.experiments: 在测试集上策略推导性能提升87%；集成到PentestGPT后子任务完成提升47.5%，超越GPT-5；在CTFKnow基准上提升18%；步骤预测分类器优于商业LLM 28%；用户研究显示优于Claude-4.6-Sonnet。
limitations: 依赖特定数据集和微调，泛化性可能有限。

analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，但属于特定领域应用，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Pen-Strategist框架，通过领域特定推理模型和分类器提升渗透测试策略生成与执行效果。

papers.title: CAR: Query-Guided Confidence-Aware Reranking for Retrieval-Augmented Generation
papers.abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) depends on document ranking to provide useful evidence for generation, but conventional reranking methods mainly optimize query-document relevance rather than generation usefulness. A relevant document may still introduce noise, while a lower-ranked document may better reduce the generator's uncertainty. We propose CAR (Confidence-Aware Reranking), a query-guided, training-free, and plug-and-play reranking framework that uses generator confidence change as a document usefulness signal. CAR estimates confidence through the semantic consistency of multiple sampled answers under query-only and query-document conditions. Documents that significantly increase confidence are promoted, those that decrease confidence are demoted, and uncertain cases preserve the baseline order, while a query-level gate avoids unnecessary intervention on already confident queries. Experiments on four BEIR datasets show that CAR consistently improves NDCG@5 across sparse and dense retrievers, LLM-based and supervised rerankers, and four LLM backbones. Notably, CAR improves the YesNo reranker by 25.4 percent on average under Contriever retrieval, and its ranking gains strongly correlate with downstream generation F1 improvements, achieving Spearman rho = 0.964.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需训练的置信度感知重排序框架CAR，通过生成器置信度变化提升RAG文档排序对生成的有用性。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统重排序方法主要优化查询-文档相关性，但相关文档可能引入噪声，而低排名文档可能更有效降低生成器不确定性，因此需要以生成有用性为导向的排序方法。
analysis.problem: 现有重排序方法忽略文档对生成器实际帮助，导致检索增强生成中证据排序与生成质量不匹配。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 相关文档可能引入噪声，低排名文档可能更有效降低生成器不确定性，表明相关性不等于生成有用性。
analysis.method: CAR框架通过比较仅查询和查询-文档条件下多次采样答案的语义一致性来估计置信度变化，提升置信度的文档排名上升，降低的下降，不确定时保持原序，并通过查询级门控避免对已自信查询的干预。
contributions: 提出一种无需训练、即插即用的重排序框架CAR，利用生成器置信度变化作为文档有用性信号。
在四个BEIR数据集上验证CAR在多种检索器和生成器上一致提升NDCG@5，且排序提升与下游生成F1强相关。
analysis.experiments: 在四个BEIR数据集上使用稀疏和稠密检索器、基于LLM和监督重排序器以及四个LLM骨干进行实验，CAR一致提升NDCG@5，在Contriever检索下将YesNo重排序器平均提升25.4%，排序增益与生成F1的Spearman相关系数为0.964。
limitations: 依赖多次采样计算置信度，可能增加推理开销。
门控机制可能对某些查询过度保守。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实验充分，对RAG领域有实用价值，但技术深度中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需训练的置信度感知重排序框架CAR，通过生成器置信度变化提升RAG文档排序对生成的有用性。

papers.title: Enhancing Cryo-EM Density Map Segmentation in Phenix for Improved Atomic Model Building
papers.abstract: We introduce PhenixCraft, a fully automated pipeline for building atomic models from cryo-EM density maps. By integrating AlphaFold predictions, we enhance the map-segmentation step in Phenix during model building, addressing challenges posed by noise and artifacts that traditionally hinder this step. Our results demonstrate PhenixCraft's superior performance in TM-scores and sequence accuracy, significantly improving upon the limitations and inefficiencies of traditional model building using Phenix.

analysis.tldr: PhenixCraft通过集成AlphaFold预测改进冷冻电镜密度图分割，提升原子模型构建的TM-score和序列准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 冷冻电镜密度图中的噪声和伪影严重阻碍了原子模型构建中的图分割步骤，传统Phenix方法存在局限性和低效性，亟需自动化且鲁棒的解决方案。
analysis.problem: 如何自动化地从冷冻电镜密度图中构建高质量原子模型，克服噪声和伪影对图分割的干扰。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出传统Phenix在图分割步骤中受噪声和伪影影响，导致模型构建受限且效率低下。
analysis.method: 提出PhenixCraft全自动流水线，通过集成AlphaFold预测来增强Phenix中的图分割步骤，从而改进原子模型构建。
contributions: 提出PhenixCraft，一种全自动的冷冻电镜密度图原子模型构建流水线。
通过集成AlphaFold预测显著提升图分割质量，进而提高模型构建的TM-score和序列准确性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖AlphaFold预测的准确性，对于低分辨率或特殊构象的密度图效果有限。
仅针对Phenix平台，未验证在其他模型构建软件中的通用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.reason: 方法明确但实验细节缺失，属于增量改进，适合有相关背景的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PhenixCraft通过集成AlphaFold预测改进冷冻电镜密度图分割，提升原子模型构建的TM-score和序列准确性。

papers.title: Towards General Preference Alignment: Diffusion Models at Nash Equilibrium
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) has been popular for aligning text-to-image (T2I) diffusion models with human preferences. As a mainstream branch of RLHF, Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) offers a computationally efficient alternative that avoids explicit reward modeling and has been widely adopted in diffusion alignment. However, existing preference-based methods for diffusion alignment still rely on reward-induced preference signals and typically assume that human preferences can be adequately modeled by the Bradley--Terry (BT) model, which may fail to capture the full complexity of human preferences. In this paper, we formulate diffusion alignment from a game-theoretic perspective. We propose Diffusion Nash Preference Optimization (Diff.-NPO), an intuitive general preference framework for diffusion alignment. Diff.-NPO encourages the current policy to play against itself to achieve self improvement and lead to a better alignment. Empirically, we demonstrate the effectiveness of Diff.-NPO on the text-to-image generation task via various metrics. Diff.-NPO consistently outperforms existing preference-based diffusion alignment methods.

analysis.tldr: 将扩散模型对齐问题建模为博弈论框架，提出Diff.-NPO方法通过自我博弈实现更优对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于偏好的扩散模型对齐方法依赖Bradley-Terry模型假设，无法充分捕捉人类偏好的复杂性，且依赖奖励信号，存在局限性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个更通用的偏好对齐框架，以克服Bradley-Terry模型的限制并提升扩散模型的对齐效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Diffusion Nash Preference Optimization (Diff.-NPO)，从博弈论角度将扩散对齐视为一个博弈过程，通过让当前策略与自身对抗实现自我改进，达到纳什均衡。
contributions: 首次将扩散模型对齐问题形式化为博弈论框架。
提出Diff.-NPO方法，通过自我博弈实现通用偏好对齐。
analysis.experiments: 在文本到图像生成任务上使用多种指标评估，Diff.-NPO一致优于现有基于偏好的扩散对齐方法。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于文本到图像生成任务，泛化性待验证。
自我博弈的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，博弈论视角新颖，实验显示一致提升，但摘要未提供具体实验细节。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将扩散模型对齐问题建模为博弈论框架，提出Diff.-NPO方法通过自我博弈实现更优对齐。

papers.title: A Hybrid Method for Low-Resource Named Entity Recognition
papers.abstract: Named Entity Recognition (NER) is a critical component of Natural Language Processing with diverse applications in information extraction and conversational AI. However, NER in specific domains for low-resource languages faces challenges such as limited annotated data and heterogeneous label sets. This study addresses these issues by proposing a hybrid neurosymbolic framework that integrates rule-based processing with deep learning models for Vietnamese NER. The core idea involves a two-stage pipeline: first, a rule-based component reduces label complexity by grouping relational and special categories; second, pre-trained language models are fine-tuned for high-precision extraction. A post-processing module is then utilized to restore fine-grained labels, preserving expressiveness for application-level usability. To mitigate data scarcity, a scalable data augmentation strategy leveraging Large Language Models (LLMs) is introduced to expand the label set without full re-annotation, which is a significant novelty of this work. The effectiveness of this method was evaluated across five specific-domain datasets, including logistics, wildlife, and healthcare. Experimental results demonstrate substantial improvements over strong RoBERTa-based baselines. Specifically, the proposed system achieved F1 scores of 90 percent in Customer Service, up from 83 percent; 84 percent in GAM, up from 73 percent; 83 percent in AI Fluent, up from 80 percent; 94 percent in PhoNER_Covid19, up from 91 percent; and 60 percent in Rare Wildlife, up from 36 percent. These findings confirm that the hybrid approach effectively captures the linguistic complexity of Vietnamese and contextual nuances in specialized domains, offering a robust contribution to low-resource NER research.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合神经符号框架，结合规则与深度学习，通过LLM数据增强提升低资源越南语NER性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 低资源语言特定领域NER面临标注数据稀缺和标签集异构的挑战，现有方法难以兼顾精度与泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 解决低资源越南语NER中标注数据不足、标签复杂且领域适应性差的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段流水线：规则组件先合并关系/特殊类别降低标签复杂度，微调预训练语言模型提取，后处理恢复细粒度标签；并利用LLM进行可扩展数据增强。
contributions: 提出混合神经符号框架，结合规则与深度学习提升低资源NER性能。
引入基于LLM的数据增强策略，无需完全重新标注即可扩展标签集。
analysis.experiments: 在物流、野生动物、医疗等5个领域数据集上评估，F1分数相比RoBERTa基线提升7-24个百分点。
limitations: 方法依赖规则设计，可能难以迁移到其他语言或领域。
LLM数据增强的质量和多样性未深入分析。
