analysis.category: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.sub_area: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.reason: 方法有创新但实验规模有限，适合相关领域研究者参考。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出混合神经符号框架，结合规则与深度学习，通过LLM数据增强提升低资源越南语NER性能。

papers.title: How Does Thinking Mode Change LLM Moral Judgments? A Controlled Instant-vs-Thinking Comparison Across Five Frontier Models
papers.abstract: We evaluate whether enabling provider-exposed reasoning mode changes moral judgments within the same model checkpoint. Across 100 moral-judgment scenarios and five frontier reasoning-trained LLMs (Claude Sonnet 4.6, GPT 5.5, Gemini 3 Flash, DeepSeek V3.1, and Qwen3.5 397B), aggregate binary-verdict agreement remains high and statistically indistinguishable between instant and thinking modes (Krippendorff's alpha = 0.78 vs. 0.79). However, disagreement is concentrated in 21 model-disputed scenarios, where instant-mode agreement is near chance (alpha = 0.08). On these scenarios, reasoning directionally narrows cross-model disagreement, increasing mean pairwise agreement from 5.4 to 6.7 out of 10. Reasoning also reduces demographic-judgment inconsistency in three of five models and does not increase it for any model. Across all five model families, reasoning changes self-labeled ethical frameworks more often than binary verdicts.

analysis.tldr: 启用推理模式对LLM道德判断的总体影响很小，但能减少模型间分歧和人口统计不一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型语言模型（LLM）的道德判断可能受推理模式影响，但现有研究缺乏对同一模型检查点下即时与推理模式差异的系统评估。
analysis.problem: 探究在相同模型检查点内，启用推理模式是否会改变LLM的道德判断。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：即时与推理模式在总体二元判决上高度一致（Krippendorff's alpha分别为0.78和0.79），但在21个模型争议场景中即时模式一致性接近随机（alpha=0.08）；推理模式方向性地缩小了跨模型分歧，并减少了部分模型的人口统计判断不一致性。
analysis.method: 在100个道德判断场景和五个前沿推理型LLM上，比较即时模式与推理模式的二元判决、跨模型一致性和人口统计一致性。
contributions: 系统评估了推理模式对LLM道德判断的影响，发现总体影响小但能减少模型间分歧。
揭示了推理模式减少人口统计判断不一致性且不增加任何模型的不一致性。
发现推理模式改变自我标签的伦理框架的频率高于改变二元判决。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了在100个场景和五个模型上的评估，包括Krippendorff's alpha和平均成对一致性等指标。
limitations: 仅评估了五个模型，可能不具广泛代表性。
道德判断场景有限，可能无法覆盖所有道德维度。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 研究动机明确，但方法简单，实验规模有限，贡献中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 启用推理模式对LLM道德判断的总体影响很小，但能减少模型间分歧和人口统计不一致性。

papers.title: Career-Aware Resume Tailoring via Multi-Source Retrieval-Augmented Generation with Provenance Tracking: A Case Study
papers.abstract: AI-assisted resume tailoring systems commonly operate on a single uploaded resume, which limits their ability to recover relevant experience omitted from the current draft and makes it difficult for users to distinguish grounded edits from model-generated suggestions. This paper presents Resume Tailor, an agentic resume-tailoring system that maintains a longitudinal career vault in a vector database and uses multi-source retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) to assemble job-specific resume content from historical resumes and structured career records. The system is implemented as a 12-node LangGraph pipeline with typed state management, hybrid semantic-lexical confidence scoring, provenance-aware fallback generation, anti-hallucination guardrails, and a conditional review loop. We report a pilot evaluation on nine job descriptions (JDs) across software engineering, data analytics, and business analysis roles using a single candidate's career history. For six JDs where the candidate held at least one prior role in the same occupational category, enabling the career vault improved Applicant Tracking System (ATS)-style fit scores by an average of 7.8 points. For two JDs requiring domain-specific expertise absent from the vault, scores decreased by an average of 8.0 points. One partially overlapping role showed a modest gain of 2 points. These results suggest that longitudinal retrieval can improve resume tailoring when relevant prior experience exists, while also highlighting the need for confidence-gated retrieval when domain overlap is weak.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个基于多源检索增强生成和溯源追踪的简历定制系统，在相关经验存在时提升ATS评分。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI辅助简历定制系统仅基于单份简历，无法恢复遗漏的相关经验，且用户难以区分真实编辑与模型生成建议。
analysis.problem: 如何利用多源历史简历和结构化职业记录，在简历定制中实现相关经验的检索与溯源，并避免幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当候选人在同一职业类别有先前角色时，启用职业库平均提升ATS评分7.8分；当缺乏相关领域经验时，评分平均下降8.0分。
analysis.method: 构建纵向职业库（向量数据库），通过多源检索增强生成（RAG）组装简历内容，采用12节点LangGraph管道，包含混合语义-词汇置信度评分、溯源回退生成、反幻觉护栏和条件审查循环。
contributions: 提出Career-Aware Resume Tailoring框架，利用多源RAG和溯源追踪。
通过9个职位描述的试点评估验证了纵向检索在相关经验存在时的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在软件工程、数据分析和业务分析三个领域的9个职位描述上，使用单一候选人的职业历史进行试点评估。
limitations: 仅基于单一候选人的数据，泛化性有限。
当领域重叠较弱时，检索可能降低评分。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有一定创新性，但实验规模小，应用范围较窄。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个基于多源检索增强生成和溯源追踪的简历定制系统，在相关经验存在时提升ATS评分。

papers.title: CCL-D: A High-Precision Diagnostic System for Slow and Hang Anomalies in Large-Scale Model Training
papers.abstract: As training scales grow, collective communication libraries (CCL) increasingly face anomalies arising from complex interactions among hardware, software, and environmental factors. These anomalies typically manifest as slow/hang communication, the most frequent and time-consuming category to diagnose. However, traditional diagnostic methods remain inaccurate and inefficient, frequently requiring hours or even days for root cause analysis. To address this, we propose CCL-D, a high-precision diagnostic system designed to detect and locate slow/hang anomalies in large-scale distributed training. CCL-D integrates a rank-level real-time probe with an intelligent decision analyzer. The probe measures cross-layer anomaly metrics using a lightweight distributed tracing framework to monitor communication traffic. The analyzer performs automated anomaly detection and root-cause location, precisely identifying the faulty GPU rank. Deployed on a 4,000-GPU cluster over one year, CCL-D achieved near-complete coverage of known slow/hang anomalies and pinpointed affected ranks within 6 minutes-substantially outperforming existing solutions.

analysis.tldr: 提出CCL-D系统，通过实时探针和智能分析器，在4000 GPU集群上6分钟内精准定位大规模模型训练中的慢速/挂起异常。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模模型训练中，集体通信库的慢速/挂起异常频发且诊断耗时（数小时至数天），传统方法精度低、效率差，亟需高精度自动化诊断系统。
analysis.problem: 如何快速、精准地检测和定位大规模分布式训练中由硬件、软件和环境交互导致的慢速/挂起通信异常。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: CCL-D系统包含两个组件：1）rank级实时探针，利用轻量级分布式追踪框架测量跨层异常指标并监控通信流量；2）智能决策分析器，自动执行异常检测和根因定位，精确识别故障GPU rank。
contributions: 提出CCL-D系统，实现大规模分布式训练中慢速/挂起异常的高精度检测与定位。
在4000 GPU集群上部署一年，实现已知异常近全覆盖，定位时间缩短至6分钟，显著优于现有方案。
analysis.experiments: 在4000 GPU集群上部署超过一年，覆盖已知慢速/挂起异常，定位受影响rank平均耗时6分钟。摘要未提供具体对比基线或消融实验细节。
limitations: 可能依赖特定通信库或硬件环境，泛化性未验证。
仅针对慢速/挂起异常，未覆盖其他类型故障。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.reason: 系统设计完整，实际部署验证效果显著，但属于工程系统方向，与核心ML方法创新关联较弱。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CCL-D系统，通过实时探针和智能分析器，在4000 GPU集群上6分钟内精准定位大规模模型训练中的慢速/挂起异常。

papers.title: Information Coordination as a Bridge: A Neuro-Symbolic Architecture for Reliable Autonomous Driving Scene Understanding
papers.abstract: Reliable autonomous driving requires scene understanding that is semantically consistent across heterogeneous sensors and verifiable at the reasoning stage. However, many recent LLM-driven driving systems attach the language model as a post-processor and force it to reason over redundant or conflicting perception outputs, which can amplify hallucinated entities and unsafe conclusions. This paper proposes InfoCoordiBridge, a BEV-centric neuro-symbolic architecture that inserts an explicit coordination bridge between perception and language reasoning. InfoCoordiBridge comprises (i) a unified multi-agent perception layer that outputs typed structured facts together with modality-focused synopses, (ii) an ICA module that aligns and fuses multi-source outputs into a single SceneSummary, and (iii) an SSRE module that performs SceneSummary-grounded reasoning with verification. Experiments on nuScenes and Waymo show that ICA preserves competitive 3D detection accuracy while substantially improving fusion consistency, reducing redundancy to below 1% and achieving about 98% attribute agreement. On NuScenes-QA and a template-aligned Waymo-QA benchmark, SSRE improves factual grounding and reduces hallucinated entity mentions compared with representative VLM and agentic baselines. Overall, by coordinating multi-sensor outputs into a single conflict-aware SceneSummary before prompting, InfoCoordiBridge prevents redundant and cross-modally inconsistent perception evidence from propagating into high-level reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种以BEV为中心的神经符号架构InfoCoordiBridge，通过显式协调多传感器感知输出，提升自动驾驶场景理解的可靠性和事实性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM驱动的自动驾驶系统将语言模型作为后处理器，强制其对冗余或冲突的感知输出进行推理，这会放大幻觉实体和不安全结论，亟需一种能保证语义一致性和可验证性的场景理解方法。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种架构，在感知与语言推理之间插入显式协调桥梁，以消除多传感器输出的冗余和冲突，并实现基于事实的可靠推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，直接将语言模型附加在感知输出之后会导致幻觉放大和不安全结论，因为感知输出存在冗余和跨模态不一致。
analysis.method: 提出InfoCoordiBridge，包含三部分：(i) 统一多智能体感知层，输出类型化结构化事实和模态聚焦摘要；(ii) ICA模块，对齐并融合多源输出为单一SceneSummary；(iii) SSRE模块，基于SceneSummary进行带验证的推理。
contributions: 提出一种BEV中心的神经符号架构，通过显式协调桥梁连接感知与语言推理。
设计ICA模块实现多源感知输出的对齐与融合，显著降低冗余并提高属性一致性。
设计SSRE模块进行基于SceneSummary的推理，减少幻觉实体提及，提升事实基础。
analysis.experiments: 在nuScenes和Waymo数据集上评估，ICA在保持竞争性3D检测精度的同时，将冗余降至1%以下，属性一致性达约98%；在NuScenes-QA和Waymo-QA基准上，SSRE相比代表性VLM和智能体基线改善了事实基础并减少了幻觉实体提及。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的结构化事实定义和模态聚焦摘要生成。
在极端传感器故障或高度动态场景下的鲁棒性尚未明确讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且效果显著，与VLM和自动驾驶场景理解高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种以BEV为中心的神经符号架构InfoCoordiBridge，通过显式协调多传感器感知输出，提升自动驾驶场景理解的可靠性和事实性。

papers.title: Stabilizing LLM Supervised Fine-Tuning via Explicit Distributional Control
papers.abstract: Post-training large language models (LLMs) often suffers from catastrophic forgetting, where improvements on a target objective degrade previously acquired capabilities. Recent evidence suggests that this phenomenon is primarily driven by excessive distributional drift during optimization. Motivated by this perspective, we propose Anchored Learning, a simple framework that explicitly controls distributional updates during offline fine-tuning via a dynamically evolving moving anchor. Instead of matching a fixed reference distribution, the anchor interpolates between the current model and a frozen reference to construct an intermediate target that the model distills toward, transforming global fine-tuning into a sequence of local trust-region updates in distribution space. Theoretically, we prove this anchor-based update admits a linear KL-divergence upper bound per iteration, ensuring a stable transition between model distributions. Extensive experiments on iGSM, MedCalc, and IFEval show that Anchored Learning consistently lies on the Pareto frontier of gain-stability trade-offs, achieving near-optimal performance improvements while substantially reducing degradation compared to strong baselines. For example, while standard SFT suffers from over 53% performance degradation on iGSM and MedCalc, Anchored Learning slashes this drop to under 5% while maintaining near-optimal gains (e.g., 75.2% on iGSM).

analysis.tldr: 提出 Anchored Learning 框架，通过动态移动锚点控制分布偏移，缓解 LLM 微调中的灾难性遗忘。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM 后训练常出现灾难性遗忘，即目标任务的提升会损害已有能力，现有方法缺乏对分布漂移的有效控制。
analysis.problem: 如何在不显著损失已有能力的前提下，稳定地微调 LLM 以提升目标任务性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 灾难性遗忘主要由优化过程中的过度分布漂移引起，标准 SFT 在 iGSM 和 MedCalc 上性能退化超过 53%。
analysis.method: Anchored Learning：在离线微调中，通过动态移动锚点（当前模型与冻结参考的插值）构建中间目标，将全局微调转化为一系列局部信任区域更新，并证明每步 KL 散度上界为线性。
contributions: 提出 Anchored Learning 框架，显式控制分布更新以缓解灾难性遗忘。
理论证明锚点更新每步 KL 散度上界为线性，保证分布稳定过渡。
在 iGSM、MedCalc 和 IFEval 上实现增益-稳定性帕累托最优，将性能退化从 53% 降至 5% 以下。
analysis.experiments: 在 iGSM、MedCalc 和 IFEval 三个基准上评估，与强基线对比，Anchored Learning 始终位于增益-稳定性帕累托前沿，退化降至 5% 以下，同时保持近最优增益（如 iGSM 上 75.2%）。
limitations: 摘要未提及计算开销或训练效率。
可能依赖参考模型的选择和锚点更新策略。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且理论扎实，实验效果显著，与 LLM 微调方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Anchored Learning 框架，通过动态移动锚点控制分布偏移，缓解 LLM 微调中的灾难性遗忘。

papers.title: Stream-T1: Test-Time Scaling for Streaming Video Generation
papers.abstract: While Test-Time Scaling (TTS) offers a promising direction to enhance video generation without the surging costs of training, current test-time video generation methods based on diffusion models suffer from exorbitant candidate exploration costs and lack temporal guidance. To address these structural bottlenecks, we propose shifting the focus to streaming video generation. We identify that its chunk-level synthesis and few denoising steps are intrinsically suited for TTS, significantly lowering computational overhead while enabling fine-grained temporal control. Driven by this insight, we introduced Stream-T1, a pioneering comprehensive TTS framework exclusively tailored for streaming video generation. Specifically, Stream-T1 is composed of three units: (1) Stream -Scaled Noise Propagation, which actively refines the initial latent noise of the generating chunk using historically proven, high-quality previous chunk noise, effectively establishes temporal dependency and utilizing the historical Gaussian prior to guide the current generation; (2) Stream -Scaled Reward Pruning, which comprehensively evaluates generated candidates to strike an optimal balance between local spatial aesthetics and global temporal coherence by integrating immediate short-term assessments with sliding-window-based long-term evaluations; (3) Stream-Scaled Memory Sinking, which dynamically routes the context evicted from KV-cache into distinct updating pathways guided by the reward feedback, ensuring that previously generated visual information effectively anchors and guides the subsequent video stream. Evaluated on both 5s and 30s comprehensive video benchmarks, Stream-T1 demonstrates profound superiority, significantly improving temporal consistency, motion smoothness, and frame-level visual quality.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个专为流式视频生成设计的测试时扩展框架Stream-T1，通过噪声传播、奖励剪枝和记忆下沉三个单元提升时间一致性和视觉质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的测试时视频生成方法候选探索成本高且缺乏时间引导，而流式视频生成的块级合成和少步去噪特性天然适合测试时扩展，但缺乏专门框架。
analysis.problem: 如何利用流式视频生成的结构优势，设计高效的测试时扩展方法以提升视频生成的时间一致性和视觉质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Stream-T1框架，包含三个单元：Stream-Scaled Noise Propagation利用历史高质量块噪声引导当前块初始潜变量；Stream-Scaled Reward Pruning综合短期和长期评估平衡局部空间美学与全局时间连贯性；Stream-Scaled Memory Sinking根据奖励反馈动态路由KV-cache上下文，引导后续视频流。
contributions: 首次提出专为流式视频生成设计的测试时扩展框架Stream-T1。
设计三个创新单元：噪声传播、奖励剪枝和记忆下沉，分别解决时间依赖、候选评估和上下文引导问题。
analysis.experiments: 在5秒和30秒视频基准上评估，显著提升了时间一致性、运动平滑度和帧级视觉质量。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量历史块噪声的可用性。
奖励剪枝的评估标准可能需针对不同场景调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且针对流式视频生成这一重要方向，实验显示显著提升，值得深入阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个专为流式视频生成设计的测试时扩展框架Stream-T1，通过噪声传播、奖励剪枝和记忆下沉三个单元提升时间一致性和视觉质量。

papers.title: Deployment-Relevant Alignment Cannot Be Inferred from Model-Level Evaluation Alone
papers.abstract: Alignment evaluation in machine learning has largely become evaluation of models. Influential benchmarks score model outputs under fixed inputs, such as truthfulness, instruction following, or pairwise preference, and these scores are often used to support claims about deployed alignment. This paper argues that deployment-relevant alignment cannot be inferred from model-level evaluation alone. Alignment claims should instead be indexed to the level at which evidence is collected: model-level, response-level, interaction-level, or deployment-level. Two studies support this position. First, a structured audit of eleven alignment benchmarks, extended to a sixteen-benchmark corpus, dual-coded against an eight-dimension rubric with Cohen's kappa = 0.87, finds that user-facing verification support is absent across every benchmark examined, while process steerability is nearly absent. The few interactional benchmarks identified, including tau-bench, CURATe, Rifts, and Common Ground, remain fragmented in coverage, and benchmark construction rather than data source determines what is measured. Second, a blinded cross-model stress test using 180 transcripts across three frontier models and four scaffolds finds that the same verification scaffold raises one model's verification support to ceiling while leaving another categorically unchanged. This shows that scaffold efficacy is model-dependent and that the gap identified by the audit cannot be closed at the model level alone. We propose a system-level evaluation agenda: alignment profiles instead of single scores, fixed-scaffolding protocols for comparable interactional evaluation, and reporting templates that make the inferential distance between evaluation evidence and deployment claims explicit.

analysis.tldr: 模型级评估无法推断部署相关对齐，需转向系统级评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前对齐评估主要基于模型级基准（如真实性、指令遵循），但这些分数常被用于支持部署级对齐声明，存在推断鸿沟。
analysis.problem: 证明模型级评估不足以推断部署相关对齐，并提出系统级评估框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 审计11个对齐基准（扩展至16个）发现用户端验证支持完全缺失，过程可操控性几乎不存在；跨模型压力测试显示相同验证脚手架对不同模型效果差异巨大。
analysis.method: 结构化审计（双编码、八维度评分卡）和盲法跨模型压力测试（180个对话、3个前沿模型、4个脚手架）。
contributions: 提出对齐声明应索引到证据收集层级（模型级、响应级、交互级、部署级）。
通过审计和实验证明模型级评估无法弥补与部署之间的推断距离。
提出系统级评估议程：对齐画像、固定脚手架协议、报告模板。
analysis.experiments: 审计11个对齐基准（扩展至16个），双编码Cohen's kappa=0.87；盲法跨模型压力测试使用180个对话、3个前沿模型、4个脚手架。
limitations: 审计基准数量有限，可能未覆盖所有相关基准。
压力测试仅涉及三个模型和四个脚手架，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新（层级索引+系统级议程），实验扎实，对对齐评估领域有重要启示。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 模型级评估无法推断部署相关对齐，需转向系统级评估。

papers.title: StableI2I: Spotting Unintended Changes in Image-to-Image Transition
papers.abstract: In most real-world image-to-image (I2I) scenarios, existing evaluations primarily focus on instruction following and the perceptual quality or aesthetics of the generated images. However, they largely fail to assess whether the output image preserves the semantic correspondence and spatial structure of the input image. To address this limitation, we propose StableI2I, a unified and dynamic evaluation framework that explicitly measures content fidelity and pre--post consistency across a wide range of I2I tasks without requiring reference images, including image editing and image restoration. In addition, we construct StableI2I-Bench, a benchmark designed to systematically evaluate the accuracy of MLLMs on such fidelity and consistency assessment tasks. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that StableI2I provides accurate, fine-grained, and interpretable evaluations of content fidelity and consistency, with strong correlations to human subjective judgments. Our framework serves as a practical and reliable evaluation tool for diagnosing content consistency and benchmarking model performance in real-world I2I systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出StableI2I框架，用于评估图像到图像转换中的内容保真度和一致性，无需参考图像。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像到图像（I2I）评估主要关注指令遵循和生成图像的感知质量或美学，但未能评估输出图像是否保持输入图像的语义对应和空间结构。
analysis.problem: 缺乏统一且动态的评估框架来显式衡量I2I任务中的内容保真度和前后一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出StableI2I，一个无需参考图像的统一动态评估框架，用于显式衡量内容保真度和前后一致性；并构建StableI2I-Bench基准来系统评估多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在这类评估任务上的准确性。
contributions: 提出StableI2I评估框架，可准确、细粒度且可解释地评估内容保真度和一致性。
构建StableI2I-Bench基准，用于评估MLLMs在保真度和一致性评估任务上的准确性。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明StableI2I提供准确、细粒度且可解释的评估，与人类主观判断高度相关。
limitations: 可能依赖特定I2I任务类型，泛化性需进一步验证。
基准规模可能有限，覆盖的I2I场景不够全面。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 提出新颖的I2I评估框架和基准，实验与人类判断相关，对I2I领域有实用价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出StableI2I框架，用于评估图像到图像转换中的内容保真度和一致性，无需参考图像。

papers.title: RemoteZero: Geospatial Reasoning with Zero Human Annotations
papers.abstract: Geospatial reasoning requires models to resolve complex spatial semantics and user intent into precise target locations for Earth observation. Recent progress has liberated the reasoning path from manual curation, allowing models to generate their own inference chains. Yet a final dependency remains: they are still supervised by human-annotated ground-truth coordinates. This leaves the reasoning process autonomous, but not its spatial endpoint, and prevents true self-evolution on abundant unlabeled remote sensing data. To break this bottleneck, we introduce RemoteZero, a box-supervision-free framework for geospatial reasoning. RemoteZero is motivated by a simple asymmetry: an MLLM is typically better at verifying whether a region satisfies a query than at directly generating precise coordinates. Leveraging this stronger discriminative ability, RemoteZero replaces geometric supervision with intrinsic semantic verification and enables GRPO training without box annotations. The resulting framework further supports iterative self-evolution, allowing the model to improve from unlabeled remote sensing imagery through its own verification signal. Experiments show that RemoteZero achieves competitive performance against strong supervised methods, demonstrating the potential of self-verifying training for geospatial reasoning localization.

analysis.tldr: RemoteZero 通过自验证机制实现无需人工标注的遥感地理空间推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有地理空间推理方法虽能自动生成推理链，但仍依赖人工标注的坐标进行监督，无法利用海量无标注遥感数据实现自我进化。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用人工标注的边界框或坐标监督的情况下，训练模型进行精确的地理空间推理定位。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在验证区域是否满足查询方面优于直接生成精确坐标，存在能力不对称。
analysis.method: 提出 RemoteZero 框架，利用 MLLM 更强的判别能力，用内在语义验证替代几何监督，并结合 GRPO 训练实现无框监督的迭代自我进化。
contributions: 首次实现无需人工标注坐标的地理空间推理定位。
提出基于自验证信号的迭代自我进化训练方法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及与强监督方法相比具有竞争力。
limitations: 可能依赖 MLLM 的判别能力，在判别能力不足时性能受限。
自验证信号可能存在噪声，影响训练稳定性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，解决了地理空间推理中的人工标注瓶颈，但实验细节不足，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RemoteZero 通过自验证机制实现无需人工标注的遥感地理空间推理。

papers.title: GEM: Graph-Enhanced Mixture-of-Experts with ReAct Agents for Dialogue State Tracking
papers.abstract: Dialogue State Tracking (DST) requires precise extraction of structured information from multi-domain conversations, a task where Large Language Models (LLMs) struggle despite their impressive general capabilities. We present GEM (Graph-Enhanced Mixture-of-Experts), a novel framework that combines language models and graph-structured dialogue understanding with ReAct agent-based reasoning for superior DST performance. Our approach dynamically routes between specialized experts: a Graph Neural Network that captures dialogue structure and turn-level dependencies, and a finetuned T5-Small encoder-decoder for sequence modeling, coordinated by an intelligent router. For complex value generation tasks, we integrate ReAct agents that perform structured reasoning over dialogue context. On MultiWOZ 2.2, GEM achieves 65.19% Joint Goal Accuracy, substantially outperforming end-to-end LLM approaches (best: 38.43%) and surpassing state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods including TOATOD (63.79%), D3ST (58.70%), and Diable (56.48%). Our graph-enhanced mixture-of-experts architecture with ReAct integration demonstrates that combining structured dialogue representation with dynamic expert routing and agent-based reasoning provides a powerful paradigm for dialogue state tracking, achieving superior accuracy while maintaining computational efficiency through selective expert activation.

analysis.tldr: 提出图增强混合专家与ReAct智能体框架，在对话状态跟踪任务上超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 对话状态跟踪需要从多领域对话中精确提取结构化信息，现有大语言模型虽能力强大但在此任务上表现不佳，亟需更有效的结构化建模与推理方法。
analysis.problem: 如何结合图结构对话理解、混合专家动态路由和智能体推理，提升多领域对话状态跟踪的准确性和效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出GEM框架，包含图神经网络专家（捕捉对话结构与轮次依赖）、微调T5-Small序列建模专家，以及ReAct智能体处理复杂值生成，通过智能路由器动态选择专家。
contributions: 提出图增强混合专家架构，结合图神经网络与序列模型进行动态专家路由。
集成ReAct智能体进行结构化推理，提升复杂值生成能力。
在MultiWOZ 2.2上达到65.19%联合目标准确率，显著超越现有端到端LLM方法（最佳38.43%）和SOTA方法。
analysis.experiments: 在MultiWOZ 2.2数据集上评估，GEM达到65.19% Joint Goal Accuracy，优于TOATOD (63.79%)、D3ST (58.70%)和Diable (56.48%)。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集（MultiWOZ），泛化性需进一步验证。
ReAct智能体推理可能增加延迟，效率分析未充分展开。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（图增强MoE+ReAct），实验效果显著，与对话系统方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出图增强混合专家与ReAct智能体框架，在对话状态跟踪任务上超越现有方法。

papers.title: Deep Reprogramming Distillation for Medical Foundation Models
papers.abstract: Medical foundation models pre-trained on large-scale datasets have shown powerful versatile performance. However, when adapting medical foundation models for specific medical scenarios, it remains the inevitable challenge due to the gap induced by the discrepancy between pre-training and downstream tasks, the real-world computation, and speed constraints. Relevant techniques that probably handle this challenge more or less suffer from some intrinsic limitations. For example, knowledge distillation (KD) assumes that teacher and student models share the same task, training strategy, and model structure family, while prevalent parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) fails to achieve personalized and lightweight deployment. Even the combination of PEFT and KD still struggles to resolve model structures and training strategies inconsistencies between teacher and student models, leading to inefficient knowledge transfer. In this study, we propose a novel framework called Deep Reprogramming Distillation (DRD) to combat the general adaptation challenge. Specifically, DRD introduces the novel reprogramming module that on the one side overcomes the domain and task discrepancy between pretraining and downstream scenarios, and on the other side builds the student-friendly efficient distillation from foundation models to lightweight downstream models. Furthermore, to mitigate variability under different training conditions, we design a centered kernel alignment (CKA) distillation method to promote robust knowledge transfer. Empirical results show that DRD surpasses previous PEFT and KD methods across 18 medical downstream tasks under different foundation models, covering various scenarios including 2D/3D classification and 2D/3D segmentation.

analysis.tldr: 提出深度重编程蒸馏（DRD）框架，解决医学基础模型适配下游任务时领域差异和模型结构不一致的问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学基础模型在特定场景适配时面临预训练与下游任务差异、计算和速度限制，现有知识蒸馏（KD）要求师生模型任务、策略和结构一致，参数高效微调（PEFT）无法实现轻量化部署，两者结合仍难以解决结构不一致问题。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地将医学基础模型适配到下游任务，同时克服领域差异、任务差异以及师生模型结构和训练策略不一致带来的知识迁移瓶颈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出KD要求师生模型共享任务、训练策略和结构族，PEFT无法实现个性化轻量化部署，两者组合仍无法解决结构和策略不一致导致的知识迁移低效。
analysis.method: 提出深度重编程蒸馏（DRD）框架，包含重编程模块（克服领域和任务差异，构建从基础模型到轻量下游模型的蒸馏）和中心核对齐（CKA）蒸馏方法（促进鲁棒知识迁移）。
contributions: 提出DRD框架，通过重编程模块同时解决领域/任务差异和模型结构不一致问题。
设计CKA蒸馏方法，减少不同训练条件下的变异性，提升知识迁移鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在18个医学下游任务上（涵盖2D/3D分类和分割）超越PEFT和KD方法，使用不同基础模型。
limitations: 可能依赖特定重编程模块设计，泛化性需进一步验证。
CKA蒸馏的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验覆盖广泛，与医学图像领域高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出深度重编程蒸馏（DRD）框架，解决医学基础模型适配下游任务时领域差异和模型结构不一致的问题。

papers.title: LEGO: LoRA-Enabled Generator-Oriented Framework for Synthetic Image Detection
papers.abstract: The rapid advancement of generative technologies has made synthetic images nearly indistinguishable from real ones, thereby creating an urgent need for robust detectors to counter misinformation. However, existing methods mainly rely on universal artifact features that are shared across multiple generators. We observe that as the diversity of generators increases, the overlap of these common features gradually decreases. This severely undermines model generalization. In contrast, focusing only on unique artifacts tends to cause overfitting to specific forgery patterns. To address this challenge, we propose LEGO (LoRA-Enabled Generator-Oriented Framework). The core mechanism of LEGO employs an MLP to modulate multiple LoRA (Low-Rank Adaptation) blocks, each pretrained to capture the unique artifacts of a specific generator, followed by attention-based feature fusion. Unlike conventional methods that seek a single universal solution, LEGO delegates unique artifact extraction to specialized LoRA modules by dividing its training procedure into two stages. Each LoRA module is individually trained on a single-generator dataset to learn generator-specific representations, then MLP and attention layers are trained on mixed datasets to dynamically regulate the contribution of each module. Benefiting from its modular yet robust design, LEGO can be naturally extended by incorporating new LoRA modules for adaptation to newly emerging next-generation datasets, while still achieving substantially better performance than prior SOTA methods with fewer than 30,000 training images, less than 10% of their training data, and only 5 epochs in each training stage.

analysis.tldr: 提出LEGO框架，通过LoRA模块分别捕获各生成器的独特伪影，再经MLP和注意力融合，实现高效合成图像检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有合成图像检测方法依赖跨生成器的通用伪影特征，但随着生成器多样性增加，通用特征重叠减少，导致泛化能力下降；而仅关注独特伪影又易过拟合。
analysis.problem: 如何在合成图像检测中平衡通用特征与独特伪影，提升模型对多种生成器的泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到随着生成器多样性增加，通用伪影特征的重叠逐渐减少，严重损害模型泛化。
analysis.method: 提出LEGO框架，核心是使用MLP调制多个LoRA模块，每个LoRA预训练捕获特定生成器的独特伪影，再通过注意力融合特征；训练分两阶段：先单独训练各LoRA，再训练MLP和注意力层。
contributions: 提出LEGO框架，通过LoRA模块分别捕获各生成器独特伪影，解决通用特征重叠减少导致的泛化问题。
两阶段训练策略和模块化设计使LEGO易于扩展至新生成器，且仅需少量训练数据（<30,000张）和5个epoch即可超越SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但声称在少于30,000张训练图像、不到10%的训练数据和5个epoch下，性能优于先前SOTA方法。
limitations: 可能依赖预定义的生成器类别，对新生成器需添加新LoRA模块。
两阶段训练可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，模块化设计有实用价值，但实验细节不足，适合精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LEGO框架，通过LoRA模块分别捕获各生成器的独特伪影，再经MLP和注意力融合，实现高效合成图像检测。

papers.title: Dissociating spatial frequency reliance from adversarial robustness advantages in neurally guided deep convolutional neural networks
papers.abstract: Deep convolutional neural networks (DCNNs) have rivaled humans on many visual tasks, yet they remain vulnerable to near-imperceptible perturbations generated by adversarial attacks. Recent work shows that aligning DCNN representations with human visual cortex activity improves adversarial robustness, but the mechanisms driving this advantage are unclear. One hypothesis suggests that neural alignment confers robustness by biasing models away from brittle high-frequency details and towards the low spatial frequencies (LSF). However, recent work shows that human object recognition critically depends on a narrow, mid-frequency "human channel". Interestingly, this band was partially preserved in prior LSF-focused studies. Here, we investigate whether a spectral bias towards the LSF or the human channel is the primary driver of the adversarial robustness observed in neurally aligned DCNNs. We first show that DCNNs aligned to higher-order regions of the human ventral visual stream systematically increase reliance on both LSF and the human channel. However, directly steering DCNNs towards these bands revealed a clear dissociation. Biasing models towards the human channel, either alone or together with LSF, does not improve robustness and even impairs it. LSF bias produced some robustness gains, but such improvements are modest despite inducing much larger shifts in spatial-frequency reliance than neurally aligned models. Spatial-frequency-biased models overall show little, if any, increase in similarity to human neural representational geometry. Together, our results suggest that altered spatial-frequency reliance is likely an emergent property of learning more human-like representations rather than the primary mechanism by which neural alignment confers adversarial robustness, and motivate the need for future research examining representational properties beyond spatial-frequency profiles.

analysis.tldr: 神经对齐提升对抗鲁棒性并非主要通过改变空间频率依赖实现。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度卷积神经网络易受对抗攻击，而神经对齐（与人类视觉皮层对齐）可提升鲁棒性，但其机制尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 探究神经对齐带来的对抗鲁棒性优势是否源于模型对空间频率的依赖变化（特别是低频或人类通道）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 神经对齐模型同时增加了对低频和人类通道的依赖，但直接引导模型偏向这些频带并未带来鲁棒性提升，甚至损害鲁棒性；低频偏置仅带来微弱增益，且空间频率偏置模型与人类神经表征相似度无显著增加。
analysis.method: 通过对比神经对齐模型与直接空间频率偏置模型（低频偏置、人类通道偏置、两者结合）的对抗鲁棒性和表征相似性，进行因果分析。
contributions: 发现神经对齐模型的空间频率依赖变化是学习类人表征的副产品，而非鲁棒性提升的主因。
揭示直接引导模型偏向人类通道或低频无法有效提升鲁棒性，甚至可能损害性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅基于特定神经网络架构和数据集，结论的泛化性需验证。
未探索其他可能的表征属性（如纹理、形状）对鲁棒性的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法有创新性，但实验信息有限，且与核心关注方向（VLM/视频生成等）距离较远。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 神经对齐提升对抗鲁棒性并非主要通过改变空间频率依赖实现。

papers.title: A cross-modal network for facial expression recognition
papers.abstract: Deep neural networks enriched with structural information have been widely employed for facial expression recognition tasks. However, these methods often depend on hierarchical information rather than face property to finish expression recognition. In this paper, we propose a cross-modal network with strong biological and structural information for facial expression recognition (CMNet). CMNet can respectively learn expression information via face symmetry on a whole face, left and right half faces to extract complementary facial features. To prevent negative effect of biological and structural information fusion, a salient facial information refinement module can obtain salient facial expression information to improve stability of an obtained facial expression classifier. To reduce reliance on unilateral facial features, a half-face alignment optimization mechanism is designed to align obtained expression information of learned left and right half faces. Our experimental results demonstrate that CMNet outperforms several novel methods, i.e., SCN and LAENet-SA for facial expression recognition. Codes can be obtained at https://github.com/hellloxiaotian/CMNet.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种利用面部对称性和半脸对齐优化的跨模态网络（CMNet）用于面部表情识别。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于深度神经网络的面部表情识别方法多依赖层次化信息而非面部属性，缺乏对生物和结构信息的有效利用。
analysis.problem: 如何利用面部对称性和半脸信息提取互补特征，并解决生物与结构信息融合时的负面影响以及单侧特征依赖问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CMNet，包含：1）通过整脸、左半脸和右半脸分别学习表情信息；2）显著面部信息精炼模块抑制融合负面效应；3）半脸对齐优化机制减少对单侧特征的依赖。
contributions: 提出跨模态网络CMNet，利用面部对称性提取互补表情特征。
设计显著面部信息精炼模块和半脸对齐优化机制，提升分类器稳定性和鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在面部表情识别任务上，CMNet优于SCN和LAENet-SA等方法。摘要未提供详细实验设置。
limitations: 可能仅在特定数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
未与更多最新方法比较。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有一定创新性，但实验对比有限，影响力和技术深度中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种利用面部对称性和半脸对齐优化的跨模态网络（CMNet）用于面部表情识别。

papers.title: Joint Optimization of Trajectory Control, Resource Allocation, and Task Offloading for Multi-UAV-Assisted IoV
papers.abstract: This paper investigates a multi-Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) joint base station-assisted Internet of Vehicles (IoV) task offloading system in dense urban environments. To minimize system delay and energy consumption under strict coupling constraints, the complex non-convex optimization problem is decoupled into a hierarchical execution framework. First, a sequential distributed optimization algorithm based on Second-Order Cone Programming (SOCP) is proposed to optimize the 3D flight trajectory of each UAV, ensuring adaptive network coverage. Second, a novel hybrid resource scheduling paradigm synergizing Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) and Large Language Models (LLMs) is developed. Within this framework, the DRL agent dictates the initial resource allocation, while the LLM acts as a semantic macro-scheduler to rectify long-tail allocation imbalances for failed and surplus tasks. Crucially, a reward decoupling mechanism is introduced to isolate DRL training from external LLM interventions, thereby ensuring policy convergence. Finally, the task offloading ratios are precisely determined via Linear Programming (LP) within an alternating optimization loop. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed method significantly outperforms traditional multi-agent reinforcement learning baselines in terms of task success rate and system efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出多无人机辅助车联网中轨迹控制、资源分配与任务卸载的联合优化方法，结合SOCP、DRL和LLM实现系统时延与能耗最小化。
analysis.research_motivation: 密集城市环境中多无人机辅助车联网任务卸载面临轨迹、资源与卸载的强耦合约束，传统方法难以同时优化系统时延和能耗。
analysis.problem: 解决多无人机辅助车联网中联合优化3D轨迹控制、资源分配和任务卸载的非凸优化问题，以最小化系统时延与能耗。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将复杂非凸问题解耦为层次化执行框架：基于SOCP的顺序分布式优化优化3D轨迹；结合DRL和LLM的混合资源调度范式，DRL负责初始分配，LLM作为语义宏调度器纠正长尾分配不平衡，并引入奖励解耦机制保证策略收敛；通过交替优化中的线性规划精确确定任务卸载比例。
contributions: 提出基于SOCP的顺序分布式优化算法优化多无人机3D轨迹。
提出DRL与LLM混合资源调度范式，并引入奖励解耦机制确保策略收敛。
analysis.experiments: 仿真结果表明所提方法在任务成功率和系统效率上显著优于传统多智能体强化学习基线。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM的推理延迟影响实时性。
仿真环境与真实场景可能存在差距。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法结合DRL与LLM解决资源分配问题具有创新性，但应用场景较特定，仿真验证为主。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多无人机辅助车联网中轨迹控制、资源分配与任务卸载的联合优化方法，结合SOCP、DRL和LLM实现系统时延与能耗最小化。

papers.title: Ground4D: Spatially-Grounded Feedforward 4D Reconstruction for Unstructured Off-Road Scenes
papers.abstract: Feedforward Gaussian Splatting has recently emerged as an efficient paradigm for 4D reconstruction in autonomous driving. However, in unstructured off-road scenes, its performance degrades due to high-frequency geometry, ego-motion jitter, and increased non-rigid dynamics. These factors introduce conflicting Gaussian observations across timestamps, leading to either over-smoothed renderings or structural artifacts. To address this issue, we propose Ground4D, a spatially-grounded 4D feedforward framework for pose-free off-road reconstruction. The key idea is to resolve temporal conflicts through spatially localized conditioning. Specifically, we introduce voxel-grounded temporal Gaussian aggregation, which partitions the canonical Gaussian space into spatial voxels and performs query-conditioned temporal attention within each voxel. Intra-voxel softmax normalization ensures that temporal selectivity and spatial occupancy become mutually reinforcing rather than conflicting. We furthermore introduce surface normal cues as auxiliary geometric guidance to regularize the geometry of Gaussian primitives. Extensive experiments on ORAD-3D and RELLIS-3D demonstrate that Ground4D consistently outperforms existing feedforward methods in reconstruction quality and generalizes zero-shot to unseen off-road domains. Project page and code:https://github.com/wsnbws/Ground4D.

analysis.tldr: 提出Ground4D，通过空间体素约束的时序高斯聚合实现非结构化越野场景的4D重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 前馈高斯泼溅在自动驾驶4D重建中高效，但在非结构化越野场景中因高频几何、自运动抖动和非刚性动力学导致性能下降，出现过度平滑或结构伪影。
analysis.problem: 解决非结构化越野场景中前馈4D重建因时序高斯观测冲突导致的渲染质量退化问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出高频几何、自运动抖动和非刚性动力学引入冲突的高斯观测，导致过度平滑或结构伪影。
analysis.method: 提出空间接地框架Ground4D，核心是体素接地时序高斯聚合：将规范高斯空间划分为空间体素，在每个体素内执行查询条件时序注意力，并通过体素内softmax归一化使时序选择性与空间占用相互增强；同时引入表面法线作为辅助几何引导。
contributions: 提出体素接地时序高斯聚合机制，解决时序冲突。
引入表面法线作为几何引导，提升重建几何质量。
在ORAD-3D和RELLIS-3D上超越现有前馈方法，并零样本泛化到未见越野场景。
analysis.experiments: 在ORAD-3D和RELLIS-3D数据集上评估，重建质量优于现有前馈方法，并展示零样本泛化能力。
limitations: 可能依赖体素分辨率的选择。
未提及对极端动态场景的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，针对特定场景问题提出有效方案，实验充分，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Ground4D，通过空间体素约束的时序高斯聚合实现非结构化越野场景的4D重建。

papers.title: Towards Robust LLM Post-Training: Automatic Failure Management for Reinforcement Fine-Tuning
papers.abstract: Reinforcement fine-tuning (RFT) has become a core paradigm for post-training large language models, yet its training process remains highly fragile. Existing efforts mainly improve reliability at the system level or address specific issues in individual subproblems by modifying RFT algorithms. Despite their effectiveness, they largely overlook the problem of failure management at the training-process level. When training goes wrong, practitioners still rely heavily on expert-driven manual inspection and correction, and automatic failure management for RFT remains largely unexplored. In this paper, we take a first step toward systematic failure management for reinforcement fine-tuning. To understand the empirical structure of RFT failures, we first construct RFT-FaultBench, the first benchmark for fine-grained failures in reinforcement fine-tuning, covering 5 fault families, 16 fault types, 779 training runs, 22,549 train-step records, and 1,457,288 trajectory-level records. Based on this benchmark, we conduct a comprehensive empirical study showing that RFT failures are both observable from training dynamics and distinguishable through their empirical fault fingerprints. Building on these findings, we propose RFT-FM, an automatic failure management framework for reinforcement fine-tuning that unifies anomaly detection, failure diagnosis, and auto remediation in a closed loop. Experimental results show that RFT-FaultBench is neither trivial nor saturated: it exhibits clear anomaly structure while still posing substantial challenges, especially under subtle fault settings. Moreover, RFT-FM shows strong capability in detecting, diagnosing, and mitigating RFT failures.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个强化微调故障管理框架RFT-FM，通过构建细粒度故障基准RFT-FaultBench实现自动检测、诊断与修复。
analysis.research_motivation: 强化微调（RFT）训练过程高度脆弱，现有方法主要关注系统级可靠性或修改算法解决子问题，但缺乏训练过程级的自动故障管理，仍依赖人工排查。
analysis.problem: 解决强化微调训练过程中缺乏自动故障管理机制的问题，实现故障的自动检测、诊断与修复。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过构建RFT-FaultBench基准进行实证研究，发现RFT故障可从训练动态中观测，并通过故障指纹区分。
analysis.method: 提出RFT-FM框架，统一异常检测、故障诊断和自动修复，形成闭环管理。
contributions: 构建首个细粒度强化微调故障基准RFT-FaultBench，涵盖5个故障族、16种故障类型、779次训练运行等大量数据。
提出自动故障管理框架RFT-FM，实现异常检测、故障诊断与自动修复的闭环。
analysis.experiments: 在RFT-FaultBench上实验，显示基准具有清晰异常结构且具挑战性，RFT-FM在检测、诊断和缓解故障方面表现强劲。
limitations: 可能仅覆盖有限故障类型，实际场景中故障模式可能更复杂。
自动修复策略可能不适用于所有故障类型，需进一步验证泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 首次系统研究RFT故障管理，构建基准并提出框架，但实验细节有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个强化微调故障管理框架RFT-FM，通过构建细粒度故障基准RFT-FaultBench实现自动检测、诊断与修复。

papers.title: Joint Semantic Token Selection and Prompt Optimization for Interpretable Prompt Learning
papers.abstract: Vision-language models such as CLIP achieve strong visual-textual alignment, but often suffer from overfitting and limited interpretability when adapted through continuous prompt learning. While discrete prompt optimization improves interpretability, it usually depends on large external models, leading to high computational costs and limited scalability. In this paper, we propose Interpretable Prompt Learning (IPL), a hybrid framework that alternates between discrete semantic token selection and continuous prompt optimization. Specifically, IPL formulates semantic token selection as an approximate submodular optimization problem, encouraging tokens that are both human-understandable and semantically diverse. It further adopts an alternating optimization strategy to integrate discrete token selection with continuous prompt tuning, improving interpretability while preserving adaptability to downstream tasks. Our framework is plug-and-play, allowing seamless integration with existing prompt learning methods. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks show that IPL consistently improves both interpretability and accuracy across five representative prompt learning methods, providing an effective and scalable extension to existing frameworks.

analysis.tldr: 提出IPL框架，通过交替离散语义标记选择和连续提示优化，提升CLIP提示学习的可解释性和准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 连续提示学习虽能适应下游任务，但常过拟合且可解释性差；离散提示优化虽可解释性强，但依赖大模型导致计算成本高、可扩展性有限。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持下游任务适应性的同时，提升提示学习的可解释性并降低计算开销？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出IPL框架，将语义标记选择建模为近似子模优化问题，选择人类可理解且语义多样的标记，并通过交替优化策略与连续提示调优结合。
contributions: 提出IPL框架，融合离散语义标记选择和连续提示优化，提升可解释性。
将语义标记选择形式化为子模优化问题，保证多样性和可理解性。
IPL即插即用，可无缝集成到现有提示学习方法中。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上，IPL在五种代表性提示学习方法上一致提升可解释性和准确率。
limitations: 子模优化可能增加计算开销。
可解释性提升程度可能因任务而异。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，结合离散和连续优化提升可解释性，实验充分，但技术深度中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出IPL框架，通过交替离散语义标记选择和连续提示优化，提升CLIP提示学习的可解释性和准确性。

papers.title: FLUID: Continuous-Time Hyperconnected Sparse Transformer for Sink-Free Learning
papers.abstract: Continuous-time (CT) Transformers improve irregular and long-range modeling over CT-RNNs by exploiting inputs or outputs embeddings with continuous dynamics. However, the core scaled-dot-product-attention (SDPA) mechanism remains inherently discrete. We propose FLUID (Flexible Unified Information Dynamics), a CT Transformer that incorporates continuous dynamics directly into the attention computation by replacing it with Liquid Attention Network (LAN). LAN reinterprets attention logits as continuous dynamical system and reformulates them as the solution to a linear ODE modulated by input-dependent nonlinear recurrent gates. Theoretically, we establish stability guarantees for LAN dynamics and show that it serves as an interpolating middle ground between SDPA and CT-RNNs, recovering each as special case under well-defined parameterization of its gating functions. LAN also introduces an explicit attention-sink gate to eliminate disproportionate attention mass on uninformative nodes. FLUID replaces standard residual connections with input-dependent Liquid Hyper-Connections to adaptively regulate interlayer information flow. Empirically, we evaluate FLUID on a broad set of learning tasks, including (i) irregular time-series, (ii) long-range modeling, (iii) lane-keeping control of autonomous vehicles, and (iv) learning physical dynamics under a scarce data regime. Across all the tasks, FLUID consistently matches or outperforms CT baselines, achieving improvements of up to 47% in certain scenarios and enhancing generalization under distributional shifts. Additionally, FLUID demonstrates superior noise robustness and a self-correcting inductive bias in autonomous vehicle control. We also provide a detailed analysis of key hyperparameters to guide tuning and show that FLUID occupies an intermediate position among competing approaches in terms of runtime and memory efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出FLUID，一种将连续时间动力学融入注意力计算的Transformer，通过液态注意力网络和超连接替代标准机制，在多个任务上提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 连续时间Transformer在非规则和长程建模上优于CT-RNN，但其核心注意力机制仍是离散的，限制了连续动态的利用。
analysis.problem: 如何将连续时间动力学直接集成到Transformer的注意力计算中，以克服离散注意力的局限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准SDPA注意力机制本质离散，无法充分利用连续动态；现有CT Transformer在注意力计算上仍受限于离散性。
analysis.method: 提出FLUID，包含液态注意力网络（LAN）将注意力logits视为连续动力系统，用线性ODE求解；引入注意力汇门消除无关节点上的注意力质量；用液态超连接替代残差连接。
contributions: 提出LAN，将注意力计算重新解释为连续动力系统，并建立稳定性保证。
引入注意力汇门和液态超连接，分别解决注意力汇问题和自适应信息流调节。
在多个任务上验证FLUID优于或匹配CT基线，最高提升47%。
analysis.experiments: 在非规则时间序列、长程建模、自动驾驶车道保持、稀缺数据物理动力学四个任务上评估，FLUID匹配或超越基线，在分布偏移下泛化更好，并展示噪声鲁棒性和自纠正归纳偏置。
limitations: 摘要未提供与其他非CT Transformer的对比。
运行时和内存效率仅提及处于中间位置，未详细分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，理论分析扎实，实验覆盖多个任务且效果显著，但非当前最核心方向，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FLUID，一种将连续时间动力学融入注意力计算的Transformer，通过液态注意力网络和超连接替代标准机制，在多个任务上提升性能。

papers.title: Demystifying Manifold Constraints in LLM Pre-training
papers.abstract: The empirical success of large language model (LLM) pre-training relies heavily on heuristic stabilization techniques, such as explicit normalization layers and weight decay. While recent constrained optimization approaches that explicitly restrict weights may improve numerical stability and performance, the mechanism and motivation for adding constraints still remain elusive. This paper systematically demystifies the role of explicit manifold constraints in LLM pre-training. By introducing the Msign-Aligned Constrained Riemannian Optimizer (MACRO)-a provably convergent, single-loop optimization framework-our study disentangles weight regularization heuristics from interacting mechanisms like RMS normalization and decoupled weight decay. Theoretical analyses and comprehensive empirical evaluations reveal that manifold constraints independently bound forward activation scales and enforce stable rotational equilibrium, thereby subsuming the roles of these heuristic mechanisms. Evaluations on large-scale LLM architectures demonstrate that MACRO achieves highly competitive performance while rigorously preserving the theoretical guarantees of exact Riemannian optimization.

analysis.tldr: 揭示流形约束在LLM预训练中替代归一化与权重衰减的机制，提出MACRO优化器。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM预训练依赖启发式稳定技术（如归一化层、权重衰减），但其机制不明；显式约束优化虽有效，但动机与机理仍不清晰。
analysis.problem: 厘清显式流形约束在LLM预训练中的独立作用，并设计可证明收敛的优化框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 流形约束能独立约束前向激活尺度并维持旋转平衡，从而替代RMS归一化和解耦权重衰减的启发式作用。
analysis.method: 提出MACRO（Msign-Aligned Constrained Riemannian Optimizer），一种单循环、可证明收敛的黎曼优化框架，将权重约束与启发式机制解耦。
contributions: 理论分析证明流形约束可替代归一化与权重衰减的稳定作用
提出MACRO优化器，兼具理论保证与大规模LLM上的竞争性能
analysis.experiments: 在大规模LLM架构上评估，MACRO达到高度竞争性能并保持精确黎曼优化的理论保证。
limitations: 摘要未提及计算开销或收敛速度对比
可能仅适用于特定约束形式（如Msign对齐）
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 理论分析深入，方法创新，实验验证充分，对LLM预训练有重要启示。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 揭示流形约束在LLM预训练中替代归一化与权重衰减的机制，提出MACRO优化器。

papers.title: Structured 3D Latents Are Surprisingly Powerful: Unleashing Generalizable Style with 2D Diffusion
papers.abstract: 3D asset generation plays a pivotal role in fields such as gaming and virtual reality, enabling the rapid synthesis of high-fidelity 3D objects from a single or multiple images. Building on this capability, enabling style-controllable generation naturally emerges as an important and desirable direction. However, existing approaches typically rely on style images that lie within or are similar to the training distribution of 3D generation models. When presented with out-of-distribution (OOD) styles, their performance degrades significantly or even fails. To address this limitation, we introduce \textbf{DiLAST}: 2D Diffusion-based Latent Awakening for 3D Style Transfer. Specifically, we leverage a pretrained 2D diffusion model as a teacher to provide rich and generalizable style priors. By aligning rendered views with the target style under diffusion-based guidance, our method optimizes the structured 3D latent representations for stylization. We observe that this limitation stems not from insufficient model capacity, but from the underutilization of structured 3D latents, which are inherently expressive. Despite being trained on comparatively limited data, 3D generation models can leverage 2D diffusion guidance to steer denoising toward specific directions in latent space, thereby producing diverse, OOD styles. Extensive experiments across diverse data and multiple 3D generation backbones demonstrate the effectiveness and plug-and-play nature of our approach.

analysis.tldr: 利用2D扩散模型引导结构化3D潜变量实现通用风格迁移，无需重新训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D风格迁移方法依赖分布内风格图像，对分布外（OOD）风格泛化能力差，限制了3D资产在游戏、VR等领域的创意应用。
analysis.problem: 如何让3D生成模型在保持高质量的同时，实现对任意分布外风格的鲁棒迁移。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到性能瓶颈并非模型容量不足，而是结构化3D潜变量未被充分利用——其本身具有强表达能力，但需借助2D扩散先验来激活。
analysis.method: DiLAST：利用预训练2D扩散模型作为教师，通过扩散引导对齐渲染视图与目标风格，优化结构化3D潜变量实现风格化。
contributions: 提出DiLAST框架，首次将2D扩散先验用于3D潜变量风格迁移，实现OOD风格泛化。
揭示结构化3D潜变量未被充分利用的现象，并证明其通过2D扩散引导可激活强表达能力。
在多种3D生成骨干上验证了方法的即插即用性和有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在多种数据和3D生成骨干上进行了广泛实验，验证了有效性和即插即用性，但摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 依赖2D扩散模型推理，可能带来额外计算开销。
未讨论对极端OOD风格（如抽象艺术）的鲁棒性边界。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，利用2D扩散激活3D潜变量，实验充分，但摘要未提供量化结果，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用2D扩散模型引导结构化3D潜变量实现通用风格迁移，无需重新训练。

papers.title: Evaluation Cards for XAI Metrics
papers.abstract: The evaluation of explainable AI (XAI) methods is affected by a lack of standardization. Metrics are inconsistently defined, incompletely reported, and rarely validated against common baselines. In this paper, we identify transparency of evaluation reporting as a central, under-addressed problem. We propose the XAI Evaluation Card, a documentation template analogous to model cards, designed to accompany any study that introduces an XAI evaluation metric. The card covers explicit declaration of target properties, grounding levels, metric assumptions, validation evidence, gaming risks, and known failure cases. We argue that adopting this template as a community norm would reduce evaluation fragmentation, support meta-analysis, and improve accountability in XAI research.

analysis.tldr: 提出XAI评估卡模板，规范可解释AI指标的报告与验证。
analysis.research_motivation: 可解释AI评估缺乏标准化，指标定义不一致、报告不完整、缺乏基线验证，导致研究碎片化且难以复现。
analysis.problem: XAI评估指标的报告不透明，缺乏统一文档模板来记录指标的目标属性、假设、验证证据和失败案例。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前XAI评估存在指标定义不一致、报告不完整、缺乏基线验证和元分析困难等问题。
analysis.method: 提出XAI Evaluation Card文档模板，要求明确声明目标属性、基础水平、指标假设、验证证据、博弈风险和已知失败案例。
contributions: 识别评估报告透明度是XAI领域的关键问题
设计XAI评估卡模板以标准化指标报告
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 模板的有效性需社区采纳和实证验证
可能无法覆盖所有XAI评估场景
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.reason: 提出标准化模板，但缺乏实验验证，适合关注XAI评估方法的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出XAI评估卡模板，规范可解释AI指标的报告与验证。

papers.title: UAV as Urban Construction Change Monitor: A New Benchmark and Change Captioning Model
papers.abstract: Remote Sensing Image Change Captioning (RSICC) aims to generate spatially grounded natural language descriptions of scene evolution from bi-temporal imagery, moving beyond binary change masks toward semantic-level understanding. However, existing methods rely on implicit feature differencing without explicitly modeling structured change semantics, and struggle to reconcile the conflicting representation demands of change detection and caption generation. In addition, current benchmarks provide limited coverage of high-resolution urban construction scenarios. To address these challenges, we propose PTNet, a prototype-guided task-adaptive framework for joint change captioning and detection. PTNet explicitly models structured change semantics through a learnable prototype bank that guides cross-temporal interaction, disentangles task-specific representations via multi-head gating, and injects detection-derived spatial priors into caption generation, enabling coherent semantic correspondence while preserving fine-grained spatial sensitivity. Furthermore, we construct UCCD, a large-scale UAV-based benchmark comprising 9,000 high-resolution image pairs and 45,000 annotated sentences for urban construction monitoring. Extensive experiments on UCCD and WHU-CDC demonstrate that PTNet consistently outperforms existing methods. The dataset and source code are publicly available at https://github.com/G124556/ptnet.

analysis.tldr: 提出原型引导任务自适应框架PTNet和UAV城市变化监测基准UCCD，实现遥感图像变化描述与检测的联合优化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有遥感图像变化描述方法依赖隐式特征差分，缺乏结构化变化语义建模，且难以协调变化检测与描述生成之间的表征冲突；同时缺乏高分辨率城市建筑场景的基准。
analysis.problem: 如何显式建模结构化变化语义并解耦变化检测与描述生成的任务特定表征，实现联合变化描述与检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PTNet，包含可学习原型库引导跨时交互、多头门控解耦任务表征、检测空间先验注入描述生成。
contributions: 提出原型引导任务自适应框架PTNet，实现联合变化描述与检测。
构建大规模UAV城市建筑变化监测基准UCCD，含9000对高分辨率图像和45000句标注。
analysis.experiments: 在UCCD和WHU-CDC数据集上实验，PTNet持续优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量原型初始化。
UAV场景泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高（原型引导+任务解耦），构建了实用基准，但应用领域较专，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出原型引导任务自适应框架PTNet和UAV城市变化监测基准UCCD，实现遥感图像变化描述与检测的联合优化。

papers.title: Detecting Deepfakes via Hamiltonian Dynamics
papers.abstract: Driven by the rapid development of generative AI models, deepfake detectors are compelled to undergo periodic recalibration to capture newly developed synthetic artifacts. To break this cycle, we propose a new perspective on deepfake detection: moving from static pattern recognition to dynamical stability analysis. Specifically, our approach is motivated by physics-inspired priors: we hypothesize that natural images, as products of dissipative physical processes, tend to settle near stable, low-energy equilibria. In contrast, generative models optimize for statistical similarity to real images but do not explicitly enforce structural constraints such as geometric smoothness, leaving deepfakes more likely to occupy unstable, high-energy states. To operationalize this, we introduce Hamiltonian Action Anomaly Detection (HAAD), comprising three contributions: \textbf{i)} We model the image latent manifold as a potential energy surface. Under this hypothesis, real images are expected to produce basin-like low-energy responses, whereas fake images are more likely to induce high-potential, high-gradient responses. \textbf{ii)} We employ Hamiltonian-inspired dynamics as a stability probe. By releasing latent states from rest, samples near stable regions remain bounded, while high-gradient samples produce larger trajectory responses. \textbf{iii)} We quantify these dynamic behaviors through two trajectory statistics, \ie, Hamiltonian action and energy dissipation. Extensive experiments show that HAAD outperforms evaluated state-of-the-art baselines on challenging cross-dataset transfer benchmarks, supporting a physics-inspired stability prior for digital forensics.

analysis.tldr: 利用哈密顿动力学将深度伪造检测从静态模式识别转向动态稳定性分析，提出HAAD方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度伪造检测器需不断重新校准以应对新合成伪影，缺乏通用性；物理启发的先验可能提供更鲁棒的检测视角。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种不依赖特定伪造模式、基于图像内在物理稳定性的深度伪造检测方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 自然图像倾向于低能稳定态，而生成模型生成的图像因缺乏几何平滑等结构约束，更可能处于高能不稳定的状态。
analysis.method: 将图像潜在流形建模为势能面，利用哈密顿动力学作为稳定性探针，通过轨迹统计量（哈密顿作用量和能量耗散）区分真实与伪造图像。
contributions: 提出基于物理启发的稳定性先验，将深度伪造检测转化为动态稳定性分析。
设计HAAD框架，包含势能面建模、哈密顿动力学探测和轨迹统计量化三个模块。
analysis.experiments: 在跨数据集迁移基准上，HAAD优于现有最先进基线。
limitations: 可能对高度逼真的生成模型（如扩散模型）效果有限。
计算开销可能较大，需进一步优化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，物理启发视角有潜力，但摘要未提供详细实验对比，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用哈密顿动力学将深度伪造检测从静态模式识别转向动态稳定性分析，提出HAAD方法。

papers.title: Optimize-at-Capture: Highly-adaptive Exposure Controlling for In-Vehicle Non-contact Heart-rate Monitoring
papers.abstract: Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) holds great promise for continuous heart-rate monitoring of drivers in intelligent vehicles. However, its performance is severely degraded by the highly dynamic illumination changes. A critical yet overlooked factor is the lack of exposure controlling during video acquisition -- most existing systems rely on either fixed exposure settings or camera build-in auto-exposure, both of which fail to maintain stable facial brightness under rapidly changing lighting conditions during driving. To address this gap, we propose a highly-adaptive exposure controlling framework that proactively adjusts exposure parameters based on predictive modeling of historical skin reflections. Unlike standard auto-exposure, our method is specifically optimized for rPPG measurement, ensuring the skin region of interest (ROI) remains within the optimal dynamic range for rPPG signal extraction. As an important contribution of this study, we introduce ExpDrive, a public in-vehicle physiological monitoring dataset comprising synchronized facial video and reference ECG from 48 subjects captured under real driving conditions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms fixed exposure and standard auto-exposure strategies. Specifically, it reduces the Mean Absolute Error (MAE) by 6.31 bpm (from 14.1 to 7.79 bpm) and significantly increases the success rate by 32.3 percentage points (p < 0.001) (from 24.9% to 57.2%) across challenging driving scenarios. Notably, it clearly improved the performance of non-contact heart-rate monitoring in both low-light (rainy) and high-glare (sunny) conditions, validating the efficacy of exposure-aware acquisition design.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种面向车载非接触心率监测的自适应曝光控制方法，通过预测皮肤反射调整曝光参数，显著提升rPPG在动态光照下的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 车载rPPG心率监测受动态光照影响严重，现有固定或相机内置自动曝光无法维持面部亮度稳定，导致性能下降。
analysis.problem: 缺乏针对rPPG优化的曝光控制策略，导致在快速变化光照下皮肤ROI亮度超出最佳动态范围。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 固定曝光和标准自动曝光在低光（雨天）和高光（晴天）场景下均失败，导致MAE高达14.1 bpm，成功率仅24.9%。
analysis.method: 基于历史皮肤反射的预测模型，主动调整曝光参数，使皮肤ROI保持在rPPG信号提取的最优动态范围内。
contributions: 提出一种高度自适应的曝光控制框架，专为rPPG测量优化。
发布ExpDrive数据集，包含48名受试者在真实驾驶条件下的面部视频和参考ECG。
analysis.experiments: 在ExpDrive数据集上，与固定曝光和标准自动曝光对比，MAE从14.1降至7.79 bpm，成功率从24.9%提升至57.2%（p<0.001）。
limitations: 可能依赖历史数据质量，极端光照突变时预测可能滞后。
仅针对心率监测，未验证对其他生理信号（如呼吸率）的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且效果显著，但属于特定应用场景，与VLM/MLLM核心方向关联较弱。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种面向车载非接触心率监测的自适应曝光控制方法，通过预测皮肤反射调整曝光参数，显著提升rPPG在动态光照下的性能。

papers.title: Critical Windows of Complexity Control: When Transformers Decide to Reason or Memorize
papers.abstract: Recent work has shown that Transformers' compositional generalization is governed by \emph{complexity control}, initialization scale and weight decay, which steers training toward low-complexity reasoning solutions rather than high-complexity memorization. Existing analyses, however, treat complexity control as a single static hyperparameter choice, leaving open \emph{when} during training this control is actually decisive. We show that the memorization-versus-reasoning fate of a Transformer is determined within a sharp, identifiable window of training. On a controlled compositional task we find that (i)~weight decay applied for a single 25\%-of-training window matches full-training weight decay in out-of-distribution (OOD) accuracy ($0.93$ vs $0.91$); (ii)~holding total regularization budget constant, placing it in the middle of training yields $5{-}9\times$ higher OOD accuracy than placing it early; (iii)~the boundary of the critical window is remarkably sharp, window onset shifted by as little as $100$ optimization steps causes mean OOD to jump from chance ($0.15$) to reasoning-regime ($0.61$); (iv)~the window's position depends systematically on initialization scale, but the basin of attraction for reasoning solutions \emph{shrinks} at small initialization, contradicting the prevailing recommendation that smaller initialization is uniformly better. We further show that the critical-window phenomenon is task-specific: it does not appear on grokking with modular arithmetic, where properly tuned constant weight decay matches scheduled weight decay.

analysis.tldr: Transformer 的推理与记忆竞争在训练中一个极窄的关键窗口内决定，窗口位置受初始化尺度影响且任务特异。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究将复杂度控制视为静态超参数，忽略了训练过程中何时施加控制才是决定性的，导致对 Transformer 组合泛化行为的理解不完整。
analysis.problem: 确定 Transformer 在训练过程中从记忆转向推理的关键时间窗口，并分析其边界、位置与初始化尺度的关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在组合任务上，权重衰减仅在训练中期 25% 窗口内有效即可达到全训练效果；窗口边界极窄，100 步偏移即可导致 OOD 准确率从随机跃升至推理水平；小初始化下推理吸引域反而收缩，与常规推荐相悖；该现象在模算术任务中不出现。
analysis.method: 通过控制权重衰减的应用窗口（早期、中期、晚期）和初始化尺度，在组合任务和模算术任务上系统实验，定位关键窗口并分析其特性。
contributions: 发现 Transformer 的推理与记忆竞争在训练中一个极窄的关键窗口内决定，窗口位置受初始化尺度影响。
揭示小初始化下推理吸引域收缩的反直觉现象，挑战了“越小初始化越好”的普遍建议。
证明关键窗口现象具有任务特异性，在模算术任务中不出现。
analysis.experiments: 在受控组合任务和模算术任务上进行实验，报告了 OOD 准确率比较（如全训练权重衰减 0.91 vs 窗口 0.93）、窗口偏移 100 步导致准确率从 0.15 跳至 0.61 等结果。
limitations: 实验仅在合成任务上进行，未在真实 NLP 任务上验证。
未深入解释关键窗口形成的理论机制。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 发现训练关键窗口现象，对理解 Transformer 泛化机制有重要启示，但实验限于合成任务。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Transformer 的推理与记忆竞争在训练中一个极窄的关键窗口内决定，窗口位置受初始化尺度影响且任务特异。

papers.title: Beyond Penalization: Diffusion-based Out-of-Distribution Detection and Selective Regularization in Offline Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) faces a critical challenge of overestimating the value of out-of-distribution (OOD) actions. Existing methods mitigate this issue by penalizing unseen samples, yet they fail to accurately identify OOD actions and may suppress beneficial exploration beyond the behavioral support. Although several methods have been proposed to differentiate OOD samples with distinct properties, they typically rely on restrictive assumptions about the data distribution and remain limited in discrimination ability. To address this problem, we propose DOSER (Diffusion-based OOD Detection and Selective Regularization), a novel framework that goes beyond uniform penalization. DOSER trains two diffusion models to capture the behavior policy and state distribution, using single-step denoising reconstruction error as a reliable OOD indicator. During policy optimization, it further distinguishes between beneficial and detrimental OOD actions by evaluating predicted transitions, selectively suppressing risky actions while encouraging exploration of high-potential ones. Theoretically, we prove that DOSER is a $γ$-contraction and therefore admits a unique fixed point with bounded value estimates. We further provide an asymptotic performance guarantee relative to the optimal policy under model approximation and OOD detection errors. Across extensive offline RL benchmarks, DOSER consistently attains superior performance to prior methods, especially on suboptimal datasets.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于扩散模型的OOD检测与选择性正则化框架DOSER，在离线强化学习中超越统一惩罚方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 离线强化学习中，现有方法通过惩罚OOD动作来缓解价值高估，但无法准确识别OOD动作，可能抑制有益探索，且依赖数据分布的严格假设。
analysis.problem: 如何准确区分有益和有害的OOD动作，并实现选择性正则化以提升离线RL性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 训练两个扩散模型分别捕获行为策略和状态分布，利用单步去噪重构误差作为OOD指标；在策略优化中通过评估预测转移区分有益/有害OOD动作，选择性抑制风险动作并鼓励高潜力探索。
contributions: 提出DOSER框架，利用扩散模型实现OOD检测与选择性正则化。
理论证明DOSER是γ-压缩映射，存在唯一不动点且有界价值估计，并给出渐近性能保证。
在多个离线RL基准上取得优于先前方法的性能，尤其在次优数据集上。
analysis.experiments: 在多个离线RL基准上评估，DOSER一致优于先前方法，尤其在次优数据集上。
limitations: 依赖扩散模型的训练质量，可能受限于模型容量。
选择性正则化的阈值设定可能影响性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，理论扎实，实验充分，与离线RL方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于扩散模型的OOD检测与选择性正则化框架DOSER，在离线强化学习中超越统一惩罚方法。

papers.title: Experiment-as-Code Labs: A Declarative Stack for AI-Driven Scientific Discovery
papers.abstract: To unleash the full potential of AI for Science, we must untether the agents from a purely digital environment. The agent's ability to control and explore in real-world labs is essential because the physical lab remains foundational to scientific discovery. While some tasks can be performed on a computer (e.g., data analysis, running simulated experiments), Eureka moments could occur at any time while operating lab instruments (e.g., when a scientist notices unexpected clues, intuition may prompt a real-time course change). Although autonomous labs are on the rise, which expose programmable APIs to control scientific instruments via software, bridging the gap between increasingly powerful AI agents and automated lab equipment requires innovation that draws insights from computer systems. We propose a new paradigm called ``Experiment-as-Code (EaC) Labs,'' where a core concept is to encode experiments as declarative configurations that can be compiled down to device-level APIs. AI agents come up with hypotheses and experiments, written as an ensemble of declarative configurations. The systems layer performs program analysis, safety checks, resource assignment, and job orchestration. Finally, programmatic experimentation occurs via actuating the device APIs. This is a general stack that is science-, lab-, and instrument-independent, representing a novel synthesis across the physical, systems, and intelligence layers to unleash the next breakthrough in AI for Science.

analysis.tldr: 提出实验即代码（EaC）范式，通过声明式配置桥接AI智能体与物理实验室，实现自动化科学发现。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI科学发现局限于数字环境，无法充分利用物理实验室的实时探索能力；自主实验室虽有可编程API，但缺乏系统级抽象来连接AI智能体与设备。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个通用的系统栈，使AI智能体能够通过声明式配置控制物理实验室设备，实现安全、可编排的自动化实验。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Experiment-as-Code (EaC) Labs范式，核心是将实验编码为声明式配置，通过系统层进行程序分析、安全检查、资源分配和作业编排，最终通过设备API执行程序化实验。
contributions: 提出EaC Labs范式，将实验表示为声明式配置，可编译为设备级API。
设计跨物理层、系统层和智能层的通用栈，独立于具体科学、实验室和仪器。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未提供实际部署或实验验证。
声明式配置的表达能力和安全性需进一步评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.reason: 概念新颖，但缺乏实验验证，适合关注AI for Science方向的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出实验即代码（EaC）范式，通过声明式配置桥接AI智能体与物理实验室，实现自动化科学发现。

papers.title: Worst-Case Discovery and Runtime Protection for RL-Based Network Controllers
papers.abstract: RL-based controllers achieve strong average-case performance in networking tasks such as congestion control and adaptive bitrate streaming. Yet their performance can degrade severely under network conditions where strong performance is still achievable. Identifying such conditions and quantifying the resulting performance gap is intractable by enumeration, while the sequential and closed-loop nature of RL controllers makes formal verification methods impractical. We present ReGuard, a framework that discovers worst-case scenarios for a given RL controller and protects it against them at inference time without retraining. Discovery is formulated as a bilevel regret-maximization problem, which yields a certified lower bound on the worst-case performance gap. The discovered trajectories are then analyzed as counterfactuals and compiled into lightweight logic rules that intervene only when a risky state is detected, leaving the controller's behavior unchanged otherwise. We evaluate ReGuard across three RL-based network controllers: Pensieve, Sage, and Park. ReGuard discovers scenarios in which the controller's performance is 43$-$64% worse than what is achievable. ReGuard not only discovers gaps 57% to 6$\times$ larger than those found by the strongest baselines but also shrinks them by 79$-$85% via lightweight rule-based protection while preserving nominal performance. ReGuard's protection extends beyond the scenarios it discovers, improving performance across a wider range of network conditions.

analysis.tldr: ReGuard通过双层遗憾最大化发现RL网络控制器的最坏情况，并用轻量规则在推理时保护，无需重训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于RL的网络控制器在平均情况下表现良好，但在某些网络条件下性能会严重下降，而枚举所有条件不可行，形式化验证方法因RL的序列和闭环特性而不实用。
analysis.problem: 如何自动发现RL网络控制器的最坏情况场景，并在推理时提供保护以缩小性能差距，同时避免重训练。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: RL控制器在特定网络条件下性能下降可达43-64%，且现有方法难以发现这些场景。
analysis.method: 提出ReGuard框架，将最坏情况发现建模为双层遗憾最大化问题，得到最坏性能差距的认证下界；将发现的轨迹作为反事实分析，编译为轻量逻辑规则，仅在检测到风险状态时干预。
contributions: 提出ReGuard框架，能够发现RL网络控制器的最坏情况场景并给出认证下界
通过轻量规则保护，在不影响正常性能的前提下将性能差距缩小79-85%
analysis.experiments: 在三个基于RL的网络控制器（Pensieve、Sage、Park）上评估，ReGuard发现的性能差距比最强基线大57%到6倍，并通过规则保护缩小79-85%，且保护泛化到未发现的场景。
limitations: 方法依赖于可模拟的网络环境，可能不适用于真实网络中的未知动态
规则保护可能无法覆盖所有风险状态，存在遗漏
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且效果显著，但属于特定应用领域，与核心方向中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ReGuard通过双层遗憾最大化发现RL网络控制器的最坏情况，并用轻量规则在推理时保护，无需重训练。

papers.title: Extending Differential Temporal Difference Methods for Episodic Problems
papers.abstract: Differential temporal difference (TD) methods are value-based reinforcement learning algorithms that have been proposed for infinite-horizon problems. They rely on reward centering, where each reward is centered by the average reward. This keeps the return bounded and removes a value function's state-independent offset. However, reward centering can alter the optimal policy in episodic problems, limiting its applicability. Motivated by recent works that emphasize the role of normalization in streaming deep reinforcement learning, we study reward centering in episodic problems and propose a generalization of differential TD. We prove that this generalization maintains the ordering of policies in the presence of termination, and thus extends differential TD to episodic problems. We show equivalence with a form of linear TD, thereby inheriting theoretical guarantees that have been shown for those algorithms. We then extend several streaming reinforcement learning algorithms to their differential counterparts. Across a range of base algorithms and environments, we empirically validate that reward centering can improve sample efficiency in episodic problems.

analysis.tldr: 将差分时序差分方法推广到回合制问题，证明其保持策略排序并提升样本效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 差分TD方法在无限时域问题中有效，但奖励中心化会改变回合制问题的最优策略，限制了其应用；同时近期工作强调归一化在流式深度强化学习中的作用，促使研究回合制问题中的奖励中心化。
analysis.problem: 如何将差分TD方法扩展到回合制问题，同时保持策略排序不变并继承理论保证。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出差分TD的泛化形式，证明其在终止条件下保持策略排序，并与线性TD等价，从而继承理论保证；进而将多种流式强化学习算法扩展为差分版本。
contributions: 提出一种泛化的差分TD方法，适用于回合制问题。
证明该方法保持策略排序，并与线性TD等价，继承理论保证。
将多种流式强化学习算法扩展为差分版本，并实验验证奖励中心化可提升样本效率。
analysis.experiments: 在多种基础算法和环境上验证了奖励中心化能提升回合制问题的样本效率。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的回合制问题。
理论分析可能依赖于线性函数近似，非线性情况未充分讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.reason: 方法有理论创新且实验验证有效，但应用范围有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将差分时序差分方法推广到回合制问题，证明其保持策略排序并提升样本效率。

papers.title: Mitigating Label Shift in Tabular In-Context Learning via Test-Time Posterior Adjustment
papers.abstract: TabPFN has recently gained attention as a foundation model for tabular datasets, achieving strong performance by leveraging in-context learning on synthetic data. However, we find that TabPFN is vulnerable to label shift, often overfitting to the majority class in the training dataset. To address this limitation, we propose DistPFN, the first test-time posterior adjustment method designed for tabular foundation models. DistPFN rescales predicted class probabilities by downweighting the influence of the training prior (i.e., the class distribution of the context) and emphasizing the contribution of the model's predicted posterior, without architectural modification or additional training. We further introduce DistPFN-T, which incorporates temperature scaling to adaptively control the adjustment strength based on the discrepancy between prior and posterior. We evaluate our methods on over 250 OpenML datasets, demonstrating substantial improvements for various TabPFN-based models in classification tasks under label shift, while maintaining strong performance in standard settings without label shift. Code is available at this repository: https://github.com/seunghan96/DistPFN.

analysis.tldr: 提出DistPFN，通过测试时后验调整缓解表格上下文学习中的标签偏移问题。
analysis.research_motivation: TabPFN作为表格数据的基础模型，在上下文学习中易受标签偏移影响，过度拟合训练数据中的多数类，导致分类性能下降。
analysis.problem: 解决TabPFN在标签偏移场景下预测偏差的问题，无需修改架构或额外训练。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: TabPFN在标签偏移时倾向于过度依赖训练先验（上下文类别分布），导致对多数类过拟合。
analysis.method: DistPFN通过降低训练先验权重并强调模型预测后验来重新缩放类别概率；DistPFN-T引入温度缩放自适应调整强度。
contributions: 首个针对表格基础模型的测试时后验调整方法DistPFN
提出DistPFN-T自适应控制调整强度
在250+OpenML数据集上验证有效性，标签偏移下显著提升，标准设置下保持性能
analysis.experiments: 在超过250个OpenML数据集上评估，涵盖多种TabPFN模型，标签偏移场景下性能提升显著，标准设置下性能保持。
limitations: 仅针对分类任务中的标签偏移，未考虑其他偏移类型
调整强度依赖于先验与后验差异，可能对极端偏移敏感
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实用，实验充分，但仅针对标签偏移，领域较窄。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DistPFN，通过测试时后验调整缓解表格上下文学习中的标签偏移问题。
